title: 101 Grunts
author: Jonathan L Gower - Ripented by: CubicVirtuoso
description: 101 Grunt is a simple 3 map series where you have to fight a total of 101 grunts. You make your way through simple corridors and simple puzzles until you reach the end. Really basic stuff the brush work is pretty basic and so is the architecture, but its surprisingly fun. This is my first level for Halflife. The reason its called 101 Grunts is because their are 101 grunt enemies in the level. There is also 4 Assassins and some gun turrets. I have made this level because I think fighting the grunts was the best aspect of the gameplay in halflife. This level is by no means perfect. I haven't got the AI as good as the original game but they will take cover, use doors and stairs. The architecture in the level is basic but adequate. I would appreciate some feedback on any aspects of the level. http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=34704
additional_info: *Thanks* Freon for the Rain Tutorial, Valve Software, Radio 1 for providng the sounds while I was making this level

author: amckern
description: Small map set with no goal in mind. Map 6 is just so that you can progress on to the next map in the map cycle.
additional_info: Map 4 appears to be an updated version of Monster Mash.

author: Sence
description: This map is about some early age wars. Includes weapon replacements and 5 different missions!
additional_info: N/A

title: 20 Cristales
author: CesarPS
description: Objective of the map is to destroy the 20 crystals, each area has a certain amount of blue crystals and enemies in rounds until reach the administration area and kill the Final Boss.
additional_info: A counter with lights was implemented in the lobby. The areas are modified by rounds. It has antirush implemented. It has advertising textures for the Valhalla community. Modifying or removing part of the map is prohibited. It has Easter eggs.

title: 2 Bases
author: Sharpe
description: A map where there are two forts with infinitely spawning enemy human grunts.
additional_info: N/A

title: 24 hour map (The Suggestion Map)
author: Keen
description: This is a map based off of this thread: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/41936-What-should-I-map-MAP-will-make-1-room-area-daily-based-off-your-suggestions Where I attempted to create what people suggested to the best of my ability. I think overall I did pretty, pretty good. "So the idea here is you, the public, post a suggestion, and once every 24 hours(or whenever people post) I will choose a suggestion and create a themed room/custom monsters or small/medium area based off of your idea and post screenshots with a playable working map everyday for your gaming pleasure. In general it's a first come, first serve if I see your post first I will try to prioritize that but I am the mapper and have complete discretion in this area. If it even averages to 1 suggestion from the public a day that would be perfect. To make things simple I will plan on making this a walkthrough map in general. Examples of posts you could make: "Keen make a room with 2 monsters and a couch" "Keen here is an image of Coliflour turn it a monster to chase the player!" "Keen make a jump puzzle with this picture of Carl Sagan!" Anyone with an account can post an idea for me to add to the DailyMap. Keep your request relatively simple and strait forward, and not take up more than a "medium-large area"."
additional_info: I did actually take a lot longer than 24 hours, well maybe 24-48 total over 2-3 weeks lol Suggestions from: TrEmPlEr the-middleman Streamfox w00tguy123 Tuesday's Avenger SourceSkyBoxer TheBard108 Dynamite madmax2 I did not manage to get to all the suggestions before i stopped work on the project/finished

title: 28 Corp.
author: amckern
description: You have been in the clone vats for a while now. The Australian government are tired of waiting for the new combat marines that the Gman has been building for them - and spent almost 5 Billion on. The Australian Government is now sending in the marines to storm the G-Man's office after it has closed, and kill of the Clones. The vats have been powered off, and the Cryogenic plasma drained. As you take your first breaths of life the marines take out the last Sci as he gets to his car. Your Clone mates and your self have been preloaded with a mission: Get to the G-Man's office on the second level and open the Sat Uplink access door Kill all the grunts to receive access to the uplink lift controls Destroy the uplink
additional_info: N/A

author: w00tguy123
description: Fight the Persians in a losing battle to the end. Inspired by the movie 300.
additional_info: N/A

title: 339 - Cyraxx & The Den of Delusion
author: Dr. Varhansen
description: A descent into the chaotic world of Chance "Cyraxx" Wilkins — a "man" living with his grandmother, whose house has become a maze of paranoia, decay, and fractured reality. What begins as a simple break-in spirals into a twisted journey through a collapsing home filled with hostile echoes, deranged mutations of Cyraxx himself, and the remnants of a mind split by obsession. Prank your way into Cyraxx's Attic as the environment shifts between grimy realism and nightmarish distortion. Survive the house. Confront the nightmare in the attic. Escape the Den of Delusion… if the house lets you. Afterwards, step into a winter wonderland to bring your own flavor of Christmas Cheer to 339 Lloyd Street in a bonus Christmas Sandbox map! -Collaborate with "Music Biz" Marty to take down the Plague at 339 Lloyd Street! -Communicate with Cyraxx via Laptop Transmissions to see what he's up to… -But beware, what REALLY lies in the attic above…? *Based on True Stories* Download .map File for editing here
additional_info: -Pardon large file size, mostly coming from the .wav files & custom models. -Episode 1 Meant for Single Player but you can play co-op. -Christmas Map is a sandbox style map at the end. -Probably some bugs & exploits. -Future episodes to come.

title: 4 Ways
author: agrs700
description: Map fun, need more player for finish 3 LVL.
additional_info: Entry in the Sven Co-op Mapping Contest. Included in the Sven Co-op Contest Map Pack.

title: 4chan /pol/ Gasworks
author: Keen
description: Go into 4chan and restore the Temple of Kek. Unlock new areas with items, vaporware disks and Kool-Aid, that will make you believe new areas are unlocked. After that, you shall praise kek and await judgement by the admins.
additional_info: Old message "Map is not Yet PVP compatable with Sven Co-op Unless Run on a Special PVP server, those apparently exist now, Praise Kek I fully completely will keep working on this map and convert it to PVP Sven Co-op, since ** and the other devs make it so damn hard to actually just turn on DM for those of us who want it (lots of lag currently in svencoop pvp even tho ppl want it and people have to literally write angelscript and trigger codes to go around the dm settings thanks lead coder) So I spent about 3 months working on this map and released it on election day, the results of our election surprised even myself. We did it lads. We meme'd a President to the white house that will utterly annihilate all social progress for the past 50 years. Praise Kek Brothers. Praise Kek. I wouldn't normally post a link to the DM version here but my fans are a little rabid sometimes :) and seem very interested to see my work in whatever form. Since it's a meme map and creative like I have linked the DM version here for now, but by Feb 2017 I will release a new/other version that has working PVP in Sven Co-op with occasional/variable monster spawns. Ideally i think it would be really cool if players could have ally monsters from their team/side go after enemy's. I'm sure I could do that with some help. Enjoy. Please do not delete this map for "not being co-op or PVP compatible right away" as it will be soon. Thank you. Here is the Full GameBanana Link Where I First Released The Map" -Keen

title: 5:00 AM
author: Hondo
description: The city has been seized by a paramilitary group and no one can tell what is going on, we have a few members in the vicinity, and the aliens keep creeping up. In the street there's a hotel where this group seen like they are trying to find something, what could it be?

title: 5 Minutes
author: uliboh
description: kill all Aliens within 5 minutes.
additional_info: N/A

title: 5 Ways to Die
author: The Hunter (original) CubicVirtuoso (ripent conversion)
description: The Hunter's single-player "5 Ways to Die" trap map, converted to Sven Co-op. This is in essence a trap map but it has a puzzle sense to it as well. There are 5 main rooms (lots of corridors though) and in each room there are at least 2 ways to go. 1 or 2 will lead to death, and only 1 will lead to survival. It's pure luck until the end where it turns to a puzzle.
additional_info: The original single-player version, released in May 2005, can be found here at TWHL.

title: 5chan
author: Keen
description: Destroy 5chan! It is a cesspool of corruption and virus now! Collect the artifacts and keycards for the doors that blockek the way. Power them up with picard coins to unleash anti-kek energy and damage the entire dimension! 5chan cannot endure too many energy blasts and will regenerate with a backup of the reality. But it will lose its power and destroying it will become easier. Destroy 5 chan 3 times to remove it for good. Each time the map becomes more broken, and easier to accomplish with new rooms and ways to explore.
additional_info: "So you know that INFAMOUS 4chan website.. Hehhhhh.. this is a map kind of like that !!! ONLY PLAY IF YOU ARE MATURE OR 16-18-21 LEGAL SHIT ETC NSFW alluah ackbar my friend (isis is a bad)" -Keen

title: 6 Doors
author: StreamFox
description: 6doors is medium fun-skill map with a boss fight at the end. Each door leads to a room with some obstacles. You only can open the next door if you pulled the levers at the previous room (at the same time, of course!). After you finished all the six rooms, you can open the boss door and activate the main teleport, which leads to the final task.
additional_info: Minimum of 4 players are required.

title: 7 Day Map
author: Keen
description: Unofficial prequel to The Fox Halloween 2022 and unofficial sequel to Keen Halloween. Sort of a spinoff. (at least until KH8 and KH9 are released… if they ever are). You are woken up from cryostasus by Picard who wants you to save the halloween planet again. The king is gone but someone else has taken over, so you must first resurrect the old king/keen and he might help us fight and save the planet.
additional_info: 7 day map or 7 days was a map made with the intention of mapping it in 7 days, doing things suggested by community members, or participating in it somewhat. It was clearly never finished and scrapped altogether. The community recovered and fixed the map, and included other leftover maps that had the keen halloween vibe that might or might've not been part of 7daymap, to make a more full experience and not waste any of the maps recovered that were left (except those that made it in the dumpster because they were too broken or too trashy).

title: 7 Hours War Ep1
author: redmyclan
description: You need to stop invasion of combine, get through the map then finish this map. I have to say I haven't seen anyone making the map about combine enemies. I have waited so long but not even has a sign. So I tried so hard to learn about ancient coding like gold source to make the map I wished. Not so many tutorial videos for these days.
additional_info: -This map supported survival mode -To end this map you must go to the gate at end map -Supported for Sven Coop 5.25 or above -If you don't know how to go on, try to break metal plate.

title: 7 Hours War Ep2
author: redmyclan
description: The second map in 7 hours war series and probably the last map. The map has more improves from previous one like more cover, more enemy types , more details , more checkpoints ,etc. Some of new enemies may have improved abilities. You can still find ammo around nook. And like previous episode you should beware enemies which will respawn behind your path. I really wish to expand more the map but my time is limited, you may find boss time frequently after you defeat one. You can play alone but it will torture you even without survival mode. (more images will be added later)
additional_info: - There are original option and community edition option to download(commu has custom hl2 gun) - This map supported survival mode - Supported Sven-Coop 5.25 or above - To finish this map , just kill the final boss - There is secret location where you will get unusual weapons and items.

title: 7 Hours War Killing Combines
author: redmyclan
description: Warning : Low frame rate for low PC spec. Combines are invading our earth and you and your team are one of soldiers who to stop them. It's based wave gameplay. Kill enemies and earn money to buy better weapons(Buy only in breaktime). Total wave is 8 and the last wave is final boss. To revive all dead players, finish the wave and all will be revived. Find ammo, health kit, armor around of map in serious situation. The final boss will be random chosen from 1 of 5. Damage reduction and enemies health are lower when you play solo. Amount of players can raise enemies damage, health , total enemy on wave. There is 2 version for downloading between normal and no buying (No buying for servers that already have buying plugin)

author: Jmal
description: Counter-Strike 1.6 Classic Map!
additional_info: This map is the only officially made hostage rescue map that has more than four hostages. Wiki page Currently the download is missing the wad file so textures may not render properly.

title: 8 Jump
author: Kataclism
description: A very hard map where the the players have to complete various jumping sections, requiring techniques like bunnyhopping or grenade- and crossbow-jumping.
additional_info: N/A

title: A Day in Hell
author: MassAsster
description: In the first map your mission is to stop a virus from spreading. The second map is identical to the first, but it's dark and filled with zombies instead of grunts. There's an unrelated grunt-battle section added as a second mission.
additional_info: The maps aren't connected by a trigger_changelevel, so they'll need to be placed next to each other in the map cycle.

title: A Soldier's Tale
author: Matt Arnold
description: As part of the HECU, you enter the Black Mesa Research Facility via an armoured personnel carrier. It leaves you in a large warehouse-style building and your objective is nothing more than to stay alive and kill as many enemies as possible. Good Luck!
additional_info: Survival is disabled by default but you can enable it by uncommenting the commented lines in the ast_r_1.cfg and ast_r_2.cfg

title: Abandoned
author: Nih
release_date:
v4 - January 22, 2017 (SC5.10)
v3 - December 25, 2011 (SC4.6)
v2 - September 2, 2010 (SC4.5)
v1 - December 24, 2008 (SC4.0B)
description: You and your colleagues knew that the resonance cascade would happen. It was inevitable. The administrator was more concerned about profit than the fate of the human race. But it's not too late to save earth. You and some of your colleagues ventured deep into the abandoned parts of Black Mesa to find the unfinished plans for the GTIS, or Global Transdimensional Intrusion Shield. With the plans for this, we could stop the aliens from ever coming to our planet. Or should the horror happen before mankind is fully prepared, at least prevent more from coming. Unfortunately, hell decided to break loose just as you found the documents. Screams are heard from outside the old archiving room. Barney and Fred were supposed to keep guard, but now they're being zombified. Shit happens. You need to escape NOW, and you need to get the documents with you. Fortunately, being the gun-nut Barney is, he left some extra weaponry at our SUV's. If we can get to the SUV's, we can ride through the tunnel system, up the main entry lift, fight our way to the lambda guys, and save the world. Let's do it. Primary objective: Escape with the documents that will save earth and get to the surface using the Main Facility Lift. Secondary objectives: (In this order) Retrieve Keycard to Waste Disposal Area in the industrial area. Activate the Generator to get power to the doors. (Laser fence must be disabled.) Find the keycard to the Tunnels in the Waste Disposal Area. Optional: You can open the door to Waste Disposal Area for faster access to Main Facility Lift. Use the the Main Facility Lift to reach the surface.
additional_info: Players recommended: 4-8 There's a bunch of easter eggs hidden around the map. They're all really cool, but ridiculously hard to find. You see that couch? Use it. For stuff. Repair the turrets. Revive? Refrigerator Known bugs Some monsters spawn incorrectly. Door to Tunnels Area occasionally bugs. There's a bunch of really crazy bugs that no one's going to notice, and if you notice them, I declare you a silly goose.

title: Abandoned Control Room
author: JPolito
description: You find yourself in the remains of the dead Sven Co-op forums. To escape you must power up whats left to open the doors. But.. you are not alone!
additional_info: Originally part of the map sc_forums that never came to be. The original map did not have an ending, weapons and almost no enemies. The zombie model had missing files aswell.

title: Abelkerky
author: einar svc
description: Horde arena map with infinitely respawning zombies, gonarches and voltigores inside of arena
additional_info: ## SvenCo-op map - abelkerky_b1 ## Map Author: einar svc ## Website: http://www.svencoop.com

title: Abeyance
author: Forsete, also known as Thobias Fast
additional_info: From original readme: Base : Everything from scratch Build Time : Roughly 5 months on and off Editor(s) used : J.A.C.K 1.1 Known Bugs : Didn't run into anything serious. * Copyright / Permissions * I don't care as long as you credit me appropriately for the maps. And of course don't make money off of it... kthxbye.

title: Absolute Redemption
author: Original author: Maverick Developments - Conversion: kmkz
description: This is a port of two Half-life mods: Absolute Redemption and its prequel Drug Barons. rede0 is the first map of Absolute Redemption (or rede1 if you want to avoid the long intro). rede_db1 is the first map of Drug Barons. Absolute Redemption Story: After the events of Drug Barons you are sent into a new mission: rescue the 3 sacred telnorps that are trapped in different locations but it wont be easy, Giussetteli private army will try to stop you. Drug Barons story: After the events of black mesa you accept Gman proposal and your first task is to destroy the drug Barons.

title: Access Point
author: Dr Orange
description: A Half-Life single player map set in a high security storage facility, now ported to Sven Co-op.
additional_info: Maps features AntiRush support that is optional, and is disabled by default. To enable AntiRush, open accesspoint.as and go to Line 6 - change this to "true". const bool blAntiRushEnabled = false;

title: Ace Football
author: acehigh
description: This is a football map with tons of secrets. Get the ashtray into one of two goals. It's red vs. blue so please make the teams fair and always play nice. There's an admin room for people who want to watch or kill you.
additional_info: N/A

title: Acopz
author: matman
description: In this mission, you will be trying to destroy the generator that keeps all the Xen World monsters growing! When you do that, you have to get to the extraction point. Then in part two, it's time to finish what you have started by killing "a teh guard". Good luck!
additional_info: N/A

title: Act Of Bingus
author: BingusMaster
description: Ok so before anyone says anything I'm just gonna say this is the last map I'll make It's a map where you work on a restaurant and must fight off waves of enemies from a rival restaurant, basically just budget Gyudon Addict, the difference being the different geometry and you fighting smileys on an underground tunnel at the end of the map
additional_info: Credits to Enuze for some of the models

title: Activist
author: Frel
description: A nearby corporate laboratory has been participating in humane animal experiments for the betterment of mankind. Being one of the great unwashed hippy generation, you and your tree hugging comrades have stormed level 1 security and cleared the lobby due to the ridiculous illegality of wooping hippy ass for no good reason. Now armed with automatic weaponry gleaned from the armoury within and with S.W.A.T. sirens nearing, you take it upon yourselves to "liberate" the animals held in labs accessed from the upper floors. No doubt you'll fuck some shit up on the way and release a plague or something, but hey, aren't those animals cute? Mission objectives Attempt to free the cute little animals and waste years of research efforts. Try not to unleash a deadly mutating bacterium in the process.
additional_info: N/A

title: Actual
author: The_6th_Monkey
description: You and several other businessmen are on a plane traveling to a classified location. Without warning a freak electrical storm appears ahead. It is impossible to avoid so the pilot is forced to crash land. Escape the plane and try to reach safety. After making your way clear of the plane and onto the cliffs you realize something has gone terribly wrong. You and your fellow businessmen continue hoping for safety ahead.
additional_info: Actual is The_6th_Monkey's first Sven Co-op map.

title: Adam Fun
author: Adam
description: A fun-style/exploration map with death traps. Uses original textures. Version is in beta. Note from uploader: I found this file on my hard drive. After a brief Google search, I have learned that others have posted about this and stated they enjoyed it very much and that it was originally a TFC map. This appears to have not yet been uploaded to SCMapDb. AdamR (AdamBean) confirmed that this is not one of his maps.
additional_info: N/A

title: Adam's Dungeon
author: AdamR
release_date:
Revised 1 - December 25, 2023
Final - February 22, 2009
Beta 6 - December 20, 2007
Beta 5 - September 18, 2006
Beta 4 - September 12, 2006
Beta 3 - August 16, 2006
Beta 2 - February 1, 2006
Beta 1 - January 29, 2006
description: Yet another maze style map. Set in some random lost dungeon at the top of some really big mountain in the middle of nowhere. Nobody cares where mate. Just watch out for traps and make your way to the end. I've been less of a dick since the revised version and actually laid out hints as to where the traps are. I still hope you die though. Keep an eye out for secrets. Some are very rewarding, others will fuck you up. At the end you can enjoy some fake gold coins and 2006 memes. This map is best played with 3 to 6 players. At least 2 players are required. (Unless you cheat.)

title: Adam's Puzzles
author: AdamR
description: Inspired by 5 Ways to Die, this map has 10 rooms - 4 paths to choose. 3 kill you, the other lets you proceed. You work out which one will kill you by answering a shown question. Some questions make no sense at all because they don't have to. Enjoy the music as you're going through, and look out for secrets! You get a special treat at the end! (not just porn)
additional_info: Author note (4/April/2014): I've been asked if beta 3 or another update is in the works. No, this map will not get any more updates. I'm generally not pleased with this map. It was made quickly and isn't a great play anyway. There is little reason to keep it on your servers. Sv Question A Rip-Off of this map

title: Adventure
author: Acky
description: A 3-part walkthrough map. You start at the same location in each one and take a teleport to get to the action area.
additional_info: The first map contains a 2-player button setup, but it can easily be done alone if you are fast enough. According to the map's motd.txt, there is a secret room in the weapon chamber.

title: Adventure 1
author: Sultan William
description: You are in a Mario world and need to destroy all Xen monsters.
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=38333

title: Aemos
author: Anzymut ripent fix
description: This cooperative maps shows the city of Aemos subjected to martial law further to demons plague via an artefact… The mission is bluntly stressful. Without a welded team, the map is very difficult to finish. French Cette map coopérative mets en scène la ville d'Aemos soumise à la loi martiale suite à l'invasion de démons via un artefact… La mission est carrément stressante. Sans une équipe soudée, la map est très difficile à terminer.

title: Aerial Contact
author: Hezus
description: This map is dedicated to the classic Apache Battle map by Mad Jonesy. Aerial Contact has the same concept, but is architecturally updated and has a few gameplay fixes and changes. Objective: Destroy all 5 incoming Choppers
additional_info: Aerial Contact is included in the SC3.0 Map Pack.

title: Aerodock 1
author: tsy_4
description: -Gravity is controlled inside the facillity. -The enemy has a secondary base set up on a nearby planet. -You may encounter xen forces on your mission. -Bring the hostage back to the insertion point where we will have a space craft waiting for your pick up. -If you reach a ledge in the map which you've tried to boost up but you're being blocked, it meamns you're not meant to go there yet. I'm sorry but i didn't want people shortcutting the map.
additional_info: Year 2119, deep space research center starts doing experiments in hopes to make the "Xen" creatures friendly. Word comes to them that the blackhole research faciliity already succeeded in making "Xen" Creatures friendly. April 19 2119: 4 Blackhole Research scientests are taken hostage by The Deep Space Company. The hostages will be freed in exchange for the "Friendly Xen" research. April 20 2119: Negotiations over the hostages begin between the two facilities. April 21 2119: Negotiations fail and 2 Black Hole "Higher Ups" are murdered by Deep space soldiers. April 22 2119: Black hole operatives (Alpha Squad) are sent in and fail. April 23 2119: A second team of Black Hole operatives (Bravo Squad) are sent in, once again they fail. April 24 2119: Xen creatures begin attacking the Deep Space Research center perhaps in an attempt to free the Xen creatures being experimented on. A third team of Black Hole operatives (You) are sent in to rescue the hostages…

title: Affliction
author: Toni Hiltunen
description: Starting with a black sequence, it’s clear you were in some medical distress. Fortunately, the HEV did what it was supposed to do: protect and heal you. Waking up being guarded by Assassins, seems the least of your troubles.
additional_info: Maps features AntiRush support that is optional, and is disabled by default. To enable AntiRush, open affliction.as and go to Line 4 - change this to "true". const bool blAntiRushEnabled = false;

title: AFK World 1 (OUTDATED)
author: Keen
description: NOTE: For the heavily updated version of this map, please see Cryolife. A very short map where players slide on a treadmill dodging really easy sticks sticking out of the walls, visit some community members rooms, break a random iron column to open a door, and swim through some water to end the map.
additional_info: To find the exit you must break the column in front of the iron grate door No idea who the author is, but judging from the textures it probably was cryokeen Contains community members rooms from: Gordon9999 and Gigabyte

title: Afraid Of Monsters / Afraid Of Monsters: Director's Cut Co-op
author: Andreas Rönnberg, James Marchant, Zorbos
release_date:
Community fix release by R4to0 - October 31, 2021
v6.1.1 - July 1, 2019
v6.1 - November 3, 2017
v6 (Zorbos' Custom Version) - October 31, 2017
v5.1 - April 15, 2016

title: Afrika Korps
author: MysticMDT
description: This is a World War II themed map that takes place in a town in North Africa taken by the Afrika Korps. There are several objectives to complete such as stealing secret documents. Mission 1: Location: North Africa Rommel's Afrika Korps has taken a town in North Africa. Your teams mission is to steal the war documents and any other secret documents in the area. Also you have to locate and destroy the sensitive radar and communication equipment before they can transmit the secret war documents. The Afrika Korps has set up defense points with mg42's that you will have to disable. Once you have the war documents exit the town in the west. With any luck, We'll force Rommel and the Afrika Korps out of North Africa soon enough. Objectives: Disable all axis mg42's Locate and steal any secret document Destroy all communication equipment Destroy any active tank in the area Locate and destroy axis radar Steal the war documents Head down to the west for extraction Mission 2: Location: Tobruk, North Africa You need to destroy the axis anti-tank cannon located in the desert of Tobruk immediately. We lost many tanks out there and we need your team asap to get the job done. Objective: Destroy the axis anti-tank gun with explosions TIPS: Use explosives (grenades, bazooka) to disable the mg42's or tanks, it's the only way. The ally medic can heal you in combat so keep him close to you.
additional_info: Afrika Korps is included in Sven Co-op 4.0B and Sven Co-op 3.0 mod releases. It received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums. The map is highly customized (custom npc and weapon models, textures, and sounds). Afrika Korps Bonus was later released as a continuation of the series.

title: Afrika Korps Bonus
author: MysticMDT, SiC
description: Location: North Africa Hello Lieutenant, Rommel's Afrika Korps have taken a town in North Africa. Your teams mission is to steal the war documents and any other secret documents in the area. Also you have to locate and destroy the sensitive radar and communication equipment before they can transmit the secret war documents. The Afrika Korps have set up defense points with MG42's that you will have to disable. If you spot a German Tank , destroy it with a Bazooka in the area. Once you have the war documents exit the town in the west. With any luck, we'll force Rommel and the Afrika Korps out of North Africa soon enough. Dwight D. Eisenhower General U.S. Army, Commanding. Objectives: Disable all axis mg42's Destroy any active german tank in the area Locate and steal any secret document Destroy all communication equipment Locate and destroy axis radar Steal the war documents Head down to the west for extraction
additional_info: Use explosives (grenades or bazooka) to disable the MG42's or Tanks; it's the only way. If you run out of grenades there are several places to find them. The ally medic can heal you in combat so keep him close to you. Afrika Korps first appeared in the SC 3.0 Content Pack as a continuation to Afrika Korps and is now a part of Sven Co-op 4.0.

title: After Event Hunger
author: redmyclan
description: After you escaped from the main they hunger story, It turns out that every town you go is now fulfill by they hunger zombies, There is no other ways to escape. Then you have found some community with a few peoples are setting in town. You decide to join them and build up their community and become stronger. + Main Objective – Main Objective Build your community by go for scavenging foods, resources and weapons around the town and when your community is strong enough then destroy the bandit community. + Difficult Scale – Difficult Scale Player will take extra damage from headshot 1 - 3 player = default damage to monster 4 - 6 players = 20% less damage to monster 7 - 12 players = 40% less damage to monster 13 - 18 players = 60% less damage to monster 19+ players = 80% less damage to monster + About Weapons – About Weapons At start you will only have wrench, A lowest damage of all melees. This wrench is only useful for repairing otherwise seems useless. Melee weapons can be broken except wrench, However this wrench has weakest damage. You can find more weapons around the town, Mostly you will find melees but you may find low grade ranged weapons and ammunitions. Ranged damage are based on caliber (full damage for pump-action , less 30% for semi-auto and less 60% for full-auto) You might find rare weapons with a low chance to spawn, These rare weapons couldn't be crafted (Like Big Panzer, MG-42, M16 , AK47 , etc). However you can still craft their ammunitions. + About Armor – About Armor Your armor won't completely block all damage. There are light, medium and heavy armor light armor is when you have 1 - 25 armor and block 30% damage medium armor is when you have 26 - 75 armor and block 60% damage heavy armor is when you have more than 75 armor and block 90% damage Start max armor is 50 Some perks will give extra max armor + About Scavenging – About Scavenging The main items you need to loot is food boxes and material boxes. Collect them and drop at base Material can be used for crafting and fixing. Food can restore your starvation by using on kitchen at home. Other boxes can be unpacked at infront of house. + About Starvation – About Starvation You need to watch about your starvation because if it becomes zero then your hp will start draining until to 10 hp. You need to find some food to restore your starvation. By return to base with your food box and drop to drop zone at home. Then use the button at kitchen to restore your starvation. By the way, Your health will regenerate while you are having remain starvation and can regenerate up to 50 hp. Please, share the food with other players too. + About Fatigue – About Fatigue Your fatigue will keep draining when you are outside the base. If your fatigue become zero, Your screen will start drunk. Recover fatigue by staying around the base. If you need to rush, You can drink coffee in bed room at home. + About Infection – About Infection Most of melee enemies will has a chance to give you infection on hit. If you have infected, you can cure it on infirmary at home. If infection becomes zero, You will start to become one of them. + About Perks – About Perks You can only have 1 trait perk and 1 job perk. Most crafting features required it's own job perk. If this is the first time you play then suggest you should pick police, athlete or thug perk. You can change perk at neighborhood, With costing for 5 foods per neighborhood. + About Checkpoint – About Checkpoint You can active checkpoint by build relationship with neighborhoods. Each neighborhood contained 1 checkpoint, The map has 4 total neighborhoods To build relationship, You need to give your food box for relationship. Neighborhoods required 5 relationships and they will open their door. Some of your perks will give extra relationships.
additional_info: -Why it has tag "co-op required"? because many crafting features required their own perk You can play solo if you want but you would lack of those features. -The map need a little of your brain, It's not a puzzle map, But should acknowledge what buttons or texts could mean to you. -Daily may have a chance to revive 1 player for sometime, And the text will reveal "Someone to join" -If you have survived for over 1 hour, Bandits will try to siege attack your base.

title: Aggregate Pain
author: Michael Sisk
description: An old map for Half-life converted to Sven Co-op. Once again you are Gordon Freeman (or you can pretend you are not). You just made it out alive as the military was taking over the Black Mesa Compound. They are now using the compound to engineer a hideous monster capable of mass destruction. As a member of a new organization, intent on thwarting the military's evil plans for corruption, you have been assigned to sneak into the compound, find your way to the hideous monstrosity, and destroy it. Good luck!
additional_info: "This is my second level for Half-Life. My first one was called Sepulcher. It got a score of 31 on Radium's website. It was fairly short and linear. Many people also complained that it was too difficult. I'm fairly certain that Aggregate Pain is much better than Sepulcher. It's bigger, less linear, and has better gameplay. It still might seem a little bright on 3dfx cards since I'm running on a TNT which has a tendency to make everything seem darker. Aggregate Pain means Total Pain. If you download this level please e-mail me and let me know what you think of it." -Michael Sisk "I really dont know what i was thinking when i converted this and, adding a wad with a name (seems i was thinking like a 11 year old boy stealing something and adding the name on it.). Do not download this. All credits belong to Garompa for fixing and to the original autor. Thanks and sorry." -Giselachar20 "Don't worry, your effort was not in vain and your changes made it to the last version :) thanks to the power of bspguy. We'd love if you could port more maps like this, and i didn't take full credits for this" -Garompa

title: Aim Training Facility / Small Sandbox
author: Hedgy
description: This map serves as simple sandbox or Aim Training Facility. You can summon monsters, spawn guns and toggle features by shooting in preferable option! Hope you'll like it! Have fun!
additional_info: There are 4 hidden target for you to find and reveal the "Secret"! :)

title: Airport
author: Walter
description: AIRPORT part 1 Xen forces decided to take this airport as their base and are teleporting their troops in. Your objective is to eliminate the Xen threat and secure the place. The army will probably interfere, as they are desperate to gather Xen technology. Do not let this happen! AIRPORT part 2 Finish your mission and escape!
additional_info: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=39693 I come here today to release the beta version of a project I started in 2005. It's called Airport. It has 2 parts and it's simple walk through except for the ending, which requires you to defend your aircraft and repair the engines. It is beatable alone but might be a bit difficult at some points. I admit the architecture is nothing fancy compared to the stuff some guys are pulling today. Feel free to add your suggestions as I plan to release the final version this year. Further reading (not important, just some curiosities): I learned 95% of my mapping skills while doing this This release is actually the second attempt to do this map in 2006 The first attempt had so many mapping mistakes it had do be abandoned I decided to start over when it didn't compile after leaving the computer on for 3 days The second try also had many problems and from 2007 to May this year I barely opened the files since I wasn't sure they were fixable I finished this because I felt it was something I had to do after putting so much efforts on it. One of the solutions for the problems was to split the map in two, that's why it has all these inaccessible areas visible in both maps.

title: Alamo
author: foolish_mortal (original), Trempler (conversion)
description: This map is originally from the Heart of Evil Mod. (Original creator of Alamo: foolish_mortal).
additional_info: The source was released and so Trempler removed the complete entity work and redesigned the map to be a cool escape map.

title: Alien Battle
author: Ttam
description: The map is based (very) loosely on the bit in Starship Troopers (the film) where the MI hold the base waiting for the dropship to land. There is only one type of monster (monster_alien_slave). This is because I like the way it thinks (???) - it runs away when in deep trouble, and generally looks intelligent! The map is set in a evening style environment, with lights in your base, and plenty of things to hide behind. There is also a 9mmAR turret located at the front of your base, which is about twice as powerful than the hand held weapons and can fire 360 degrees with it :) The map itself was designed to play primarily on the internet, and so only 10 aliens respawn at any one time. You start off with the 9mmAR gun with full bullets and without any grenades (they seem to scare the monsters making them stop firing at you and run off!). Additional bullets are found in your base. No health is provided, because I'm a nasty git and like people running out on a suicide run with 10 health :) You do start off with 100% armor though… No other weapons are supplied. If you don't like this - tough. but I only used the 9mmAR because that is the only weapon the starship Troopers MI seem to carry around (well, it fires some kind of bullet, and is dome sort of rifle!) ;)
additional_info: As the aliens keep respawning forever, you are unable to 'win'. However, you can get to a point that you kill the aliens as soon as they respawn, if you have enough players. It is more fun if you just stay in your base and shoot the aliens. If you almost run out of health, go on a suicide run, its quite fun :)

title: Alien Defense
author: Wildcat
description: Help your fellow soldiers defend your base from an alien invasion. Your goal is to take out as many of the invading aliens as possible.
additional_info: Hint: Make use of the rocket launcher.

title: Alien Die
author: LordSlayer
description: A box with several ways to kill zombies and other enemies.
additional_info: N/A

title: Alien Die 2
author: Michael Koeberlein, LordSlayer
description: Alien Die 2 is a fun map from alien slaughter house including Garg which used explosion weapon. Inside the vending machine you can break it while see teleport.
additional_info: N/A

title: Alien Fight
author: Original Prankster
description: Choose from 3 player classes (medic, demo or infantry) and fight aliens!
additional_info: N/A

title: Alien Planet
author: DeathBog
description: Kill the alien grunt boss.(In fix version kill the bigmom.)
additional_info: N/A

title: Alien Ship 1
author: Anton Risberg
description: Unfinished map about Xen and getting into an alien ship. It does have an ending.
additional_info: Partly unfinished, lacking in enemies, but with an ending. Push the THAT'S ALL button to end the map.

title: Alien Shooter 1 Demo
author: Dr.Abc
description: A giant killing box with many lights and monsters. You are one of sven-team. sven-team are good. aliens are bad. sven-team shoot aliens. and blow'em up. You are one who sent to investigate the secret lab and eliminate all of aliens.Get in lab and use explosives to seal the alien-cave up.
additional_info: The map's terrain comes from the demo version of AlienShooter 1. You could only play this map with thirdperson.(Don't worry ,map scripts will toggle it automatically. ;)If not type "thirdperson" in your console.) However, IDK how to change the view to firstperson when this map changed, you have to toggle it manually .:(

title: Aliens vs. Players
author: amckern
description: After being cut off from the rest of the world, your commander has ordered you to get to, and kill, the empress alien, the story gets deeper at each MOTD. There is a ripent version floating around that makes the 3rd map arena much more an arena, you CAN NOT Download this as a map, as its a server side mod.
additional_info: 1-4 players recommended - more makes it much too easy sc_avp2 is an updated version of sc_max. Original story for sc_max: You're inserted into a new level in Max Payne to fight the Half-Life grunts acting as NYPD and thugs.

title: Allahu Ackbar
author: Keen
description: *THESE MAPs MAY NOT BE PASSABLE/WINNABLE. THE GOAL IS TO GET TO HEAVEN THE WHITE ZONE* a silly map that involes killing polygon soldiers and blowing up the quad towers. (this is a joke map, a parody to help people laugh at these semi-dark times, its a joke! I am not endorsing ISIS or Al Qaeda!)
additional_info: it's just a prank bro included map source files

title: Alley
author: Vince
description: Your team was assigned to a mission that was finding an alien disturbance in a base centered in North America. You snuck aboard a cargo truck and here you are it's living or dying your choice…
additional_info: Recommended players: 2-4 Playing tips: Watch out for the little things they can be of some use. The water is clear but the grunts have a hard time seeing through it. Don't take anything for granted. Just because you loaded the map up and played for a minute doesn't mean you can predict everything that will happen.

title: Ally
author: yulo
description: A map where you are on a mission to kill murdering robots with the help of some lucky soldiers.

title: Alpha Unit
author: Hichem Bourai
description: After the events of surface-ex-tension-2:extended-resistance your team must now extract Dr. Eli Vance to safety. The Alpha Unit is gathering at an outpost to launch a search and rescue mission into the Black Mesa Anomalous Materials Lab Test Chamber and you must join them as the spearhead of the operation immediately. Guided by Dr. Vance, you'll have to rescue any survivors at the Test Chamber, and recover the unstable Xen crystal sample.
additional_info: Conversion of the half-life mod The Alpha Unit. This was done as an unofficial followup to surface-ex-tension-2:extended-resistance This old mod contained an absolute astounding amount of broken or rotated textures, alongside many other issues, as if the mapper had decompiled the entire series. (all fixed now). Lighting on textures was also broken due to this. Maps were merged from 16 to 5 maps. And lighting was fixed. Much of the npc scripted sequences were removed alongside the constant presence of an entire squad of NPCs blocking the way. This was toned down to the max. The npc dialogue was changed or stripped (most was unintelligible and all npcs had the same voice acting). NPCs now have different voices. The story was not changed much but custom content has been added. A lot of things were changed to make the maps harder, such as added enemies, puzzles, items to collect, and the story was tweaked to be more interesting and understandable.

title: Alternative Way
author: Dron (Andrei Pavlov)
description: A what if scenario, if Gordon Freeman took a different route to Black Mesa to a different part of the testing facility.

title: Ambush
author: Lymphoid
description: Full-bright walkthrough map with catacombs maze.
additional_info: N/A

title: Ambush 2
author: Lymphoid
description: This was posted to the original Sven Co-op forums as a beta version. There are no functional goals, other than to climb the tower. This was based off of a Micro Machines G.I. Joe "Cobra Communications Tower" playset.
additional_info: N/A

title: Aniquilación
author: Inkina
description: In an urban environment devastated by a mysterious alien invasion, the player finds themselves trapped in a city besieged by unknown forces. With the responsibility to escape and find a path to survival, the protagonist embarks on a rescue mission, facing hostile alien creatures and exploring the dark corners of the ruined city. Every corner represents a new challenge amidst the alien chaos. Good luck and Have fun…
additional_info: Base: From scratch Editor used: Sven Co-op SDK (Svencraft)

title: Anitalink Lobby
author: Keen @nit@ w00tguy123
description: A lobby map for the Anitalink server. they have treated me well /#notashillbutslightlyashillyoloswagyoloyoliswag one of the versions has some not safe for work content. viewer discretion is advised. arcade machines may be broken. use the portals on the upper levels in the arcade version to access the lower level. map is borked. enjoy
additional_info: The community recovered old lost maps and different versions of this map and merged them into a playable walkthrough version (not a lobby map) called anitalink_r (ripent or remaster). It is intended to hint that the anitalink servers were dead for a long time and probably still are overall, and anyway this map was completely unused and abandoned, so you must get out of there by destroying all the iconic npcs of each map vote! These maps were lost and later recovered in 2025 by the community, restored, merged and released as a playable version.

title: Annihilation
author: Skals
description: Well, your kinda stuck there and you need to complete 4 tasks to be able to complete the map. To do so, you will need to destroy the source that attracts the pit drones, kill the gargantua, secure the lab sector and destroy one of the giant doors. Each time a task has been completed, one of the giant doors will open (except the one you need to destroy)… When all of this is done, go down the pit, break the security door, and trigger the game_end.
additional_info: Players required: 2-4 (some places need teamwork) Weapons available: pistol, shotgun, crowbar, medkit, crossbow, ag oh and sub-machine. Location: somewhere in Black Mesa outdoor facility. Objective: Destroy all hostiles and proceed to the wind tunnel. Difficulty: medium. and the map is small. Sven Co-op Official Forum Thread: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=33842

title: Another Day At The Office
author: BonkTurnip
description: Another Day At The Office (ADATO) - v1.0.4 PLEASE disable xpmod, if you want this map to play out the way it's supposed to. Map Specifications: Minimum number of players: 2 Recommended number of players: 4-5 Size: Large Difficulty: Hard Story: You and your business partners are working for a top secret weapons factory. Upon arriving to work one day and working at your desk for a few hours, you feel that something is off. You realize that you have not been badgered by other employees for quite some time now. You look outside your office to find everything eerily quiet. Where is everyone? Why is the loading bay empty? As you ponder these questions, your phone buzzes in your coat pocket. Instinctively, you pull it out and glance at the screen. You rub your eyes. Could it be true? The security department has reported several unauthorized personnel throughout the facility. They are considered to be armed and dangerous. Security recommends that you and your coworkers immediately evacuate the building. They must think so little of you! "Stupid security department thinks I cannot take care of myself!" you mutter angrily, "I'll wipe those brutes out of this facility myself!". With your mind made up, you gather your courage and your coworkers to dispatch the hostile forces permeating throughout the facility.
additional_info: This map has a very large number of enemies and it is highly recommended that you stay together in order to increase chances of survival. You will encounter hacked security turrets and ninja-like thieves among many other unsavory individuals. Be on the lookout! Keep your eyes peeled for secrets: they are scattered throughout the facility and can contain very useful items. This can be a very difficult map. Don't get discouraged if you cannot complete it the first time through. This map was made to be played in survival mode so disabling it will result in very long corpse runs in most cases. I am aware of a glitch where the enemies prematurely spawn above the glass in the library. This should be fixed in 5.24. Have fun!!

title: Another Unit
author: B-dama
release_date:
v6 - January 22, 2016 (SC 5.0)
v5 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v4 - September 2, 2010 (SC 4.5)
v3 - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0B)
v2 - October 14, 2003 (SC 3.0)
v1 - October 3, 2003
description: This is the marine corps side story of Half-Life. There are lots of details and neat sequences, such as manta ships dropping in alien reinforcements.
additional_info: Another Unit received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums. Included in Sven Co-op 4.5, Sven Co-op 4.0B and Sven Co-op 3.0 mod releases.

title: Another Unit (Alternate version) Part 1
author: GAMESABA
description: An alternate-walkthrough map of Another Unit from its original. At the end of the map, It said "To Be Continued" for the next sequel called "Another Unit (Alternate version) Part 2" sadly did not development the map or its progress. Current location: Black Mesa high security storage area. Objective: Go into facilities to join other military forces.
additional_info: 2 or more players required.

title: Antares 2
author: Larry, JPolito
description: Antares 2 Alien Invasion & Defense Your marine squad has been sent to investigate the Antares Manufacturing Station and Colony. Communication failed some weeks ago. Once landed, find a way to the base command center. We have no clue what you will find there. Inside the base you have to re-establish the power generator and keep it running, until you have sent your broadcast. Objectives : Move to the command center. Re-engage the power generator of the base. Keep power running to send the emergency broadcast. Keep the "Communications Hub" alive.
additional_info: FAQ: This map is a walkthrough/defense map with random elements. There are random paths, random weapons, and random waves of enemies. Weapons can be upgraded by spending "PowerCrates" in the generator room. The Pipe Wrench weapon allows you to repair turrets, doors, and the "Communication Hub" (required to complete the map). Map Trivia: 27 trigger_randoms (for paths, monsters, weapons) 106 enemy squadmakers highest r_speed: about 1650 wpoly in the worst place. Development Trivia: This was originally intended to be released in 2012, but Larry disappeared. The map was subsequently re-worked by JPolito to have custom textures, a plot, voice acting, and an ending. It was released in January 2025, over 12 years since the last changes were made.

title: Apache
author: Wildcat
description: Your main objective is to take out the robogrunts air support, an apache outside the base. Help your fellow soldiers defend your base from a robogrunt invasion. Your goal is to take out the robogrunts' air support, an apache outside of the base. Good luck.
additional_info: N/A

title: Apache 2
author: Wildcat
description: SC_APACHE TAKE OUT THE TWO TERRORIST APACHES INCOMING TO YOUR BASE. LOOK SHARP, ENEMIES ARE DROPPING OFF FROM AN APC ON GROUND AND ENEMIES WILL BE REPELLING DOWN FROM THE AIR. FRIENDLY FORCES WILL ASSIST YOU.
additional_info: Map Title: SC Apache version 2 (beta 3) BSP name: sc_apache2_beta3 (30/05/04) Archive name: apache2.7z Additional Textures: none

title: Apache Battle
author: Mad Jonesy
description: Destroy the helicopter.
additional_info: N/A

title: Apache Battle 2
author: Mad Jonesy
description: Early version of Apache Battle. Destroy the apache using the weapons at your disposal.
additional_info: N/A

title: Apache Battle 3
author: Mad Jonesy
description: Fight and kill the Apache numerous times. This map features a large and impressive canyon also, which makes the hunting all that more difficult. Also, a rocket turret is featured, think of this, as a quick killer, 2 or 3 rockets should take it down with ease. Note: This map, unlike the Helebat 1, supports helicopter respawning that actually works.
additional_info: 3 - 6 recommended, less than that will result in you becoming quick Apache chow Hints: The glass wall in the equipment room, can be shot through slightly by the Apache, but will not break, anyone say 'distraction'? But make sure you stand back a bit. Don't look up while shooting and chasing the Apache near the canyon. Hmm, this strategy requires at least two people, and three to be safe, the marines in the tunnel re-spawn facing the same direction, if they could be killed, someone could sit in the tunnel behind them with a shotgun waiting for them to re-spawn. That's one problem solved. Those areas where I have 'forgot' to put a ladder (i.e. in the hidden basement bunker) require 2 players, if you haven't worked this out yet, there is little hope. One player needs to crouch and the other jumps on his head. The first player stands up, and the other should be able to jump up and grab the goodies, which trust me, help a lot in this map. When in doubt, hide.

title: ApacheCo
author: Fourth Letter
description: Indoor/outdoor horde map.
additional_info: N/A

title: APC Rally
author: JJ45
description: Ride the APC and smash all the walls towards the enemy bunker, then destroy the robots!
additional_info: N/A

title: Apprehension
author: HeAdCrAb KILLA
description: You and a squad of the toughest mercenaries have been sent to a remote area near the Black Mesa complex. A team of scientists has been captured by an elite terrorist group. Your mission is to rescue the team and to not let any of them perish. Use your squad and your weapons wisely. This isn't your average rescue mission. Move out!
additional_info: Ideal for 1-6 players. Uses some custom models and textures. Apprehension is HeAdCrAb KILLA's first and only BOMS map.

title: Arcad
author: Streamfox, RNG
description: Fight throught your way in a sort of storage facility until the end. Collect items to make your way forward.
additional_info: Special thanks to RNG, that he made his own additional rooms, and with that was helping get the map closer to the finish and made it better. Optimal player amount is 3-4, with more players map might be ruined, etc. If you died wait for someone to REVIVE you, or prepare for a long journey. Work as a TEAM cover eachother's butt, and always heal your teammates. This map is one of (Streamfox) my very first maps. Actually just a small part of it what I after build additional rooms on it. That small part (the original map itself) based on a dream. Where's some storage room appeared.

title: Arcad 2
author: StreamFox
description: Arcad 2 is a team puzzle oriented map. Solve puzzles to move forward. Mission is to destroy an infected spacestation. Plot Research scientists from SX-3 reported, that nearby SX-6 spacestation infected by unknow alien organisation. Scientists decetced the burried SX-7 underground facitily on nearby planet. Inside the facitily there's a working experimental lasercannon which should have enough power to blow up the infected spacestation. They sent a special Co-op team to activate the laser cannon, and destroy the infected spacestation.
additional_info: Not a straight sequel of Arcad. 3 players are required to start and complete the map! Hint: Most of the computer keyboard are usable. In most cases you have to push 2 keyboards at the same time to hack computers. Few computers needs other method to hack them. Like press and hold down keyboard, or pressing keyboards rapidly. Porgress bars will shown up during the hacking. Known issues: Some texture rendered brushes randomly become opaque, mostly glass doors. This isn't affect gameplay, just kinda annyoing. Intro sequence might be bugged during game, like the tunnel get overlapped and getting have gaps.

title: Arcade
author: w00tguy123
description: A test map filled with playable arcade machines. These are scattered in some of Keen's maps. The only difference between this and 2012 version is that I added a dumb kz puzzle and an end-game condition. I also fixed the issues that came up after the SC 5.0 release. This was made in the era before scripting, so the map uses about 1500 entities, none of which I'll understand ever again.

title: Arctic Base
author: Hunter Alpha
description: Part 1: Two weeks ago we lost contact with our arctic base and since then we have sent a military squad to investigate but we have now lost contact with the squad. You must find out what happened and secure the base. A team of scientists (and escorts) will arrive an hour after you do. Note: We will keep in contact with you and advise you accordingly. Part 2: The research subject seems to have escaped and started to dig tunnels under the base. Find a way back to the base and kill anything that gets in your way. Note: Look for survivors but it's doubtful if anyone has survived. Part 3: Killing the Gonarch seems to have angered the gonome and the zombified crew. You must kill ALL of them to contain their infestation. Note: After you have killed them all go to the hanger and meet the new crew.
additional_info: This map is good for 2-5 players (but there are 9+ spawn spots).

title: Arctic Escape
author: Rodhy
description: Small one level map, Clear out all the aliens and proceed to the helipad for extraction.
additional_info: N/A

title: Arctic Escape (Leon)
author: Leon, ported by Meryilla
description: Your vessel has become shipwrecked somewhere in the Arctic circle. As competent seamen you must find your way to a radio and attempt to call for rescue. ACHTUNG! WARNING! WAARSCHUWING! ATTENZIONE! A strange research facility happens to exist at the location you are shipwrecked. For some strange reason it has many lasers and other unusual killing mechanisms (including spinners) that you must navigate. — CREDITS — Author: Leon Testers: Craterboy, Crazyfeeling, Leandros, Lyca Models: From condition zero Music: From HL2
additional_info: Unrelated to Arctic Escape. Originally an escape map for TFC so expect lots of platforming, puzzles which require coordinated teamwork, and no combat. At least 3 players are necessary to complete the map. Differences to the original: Added ambient sounds. Added buttons for the lift on each underground level. Survival mode support, enabled through a vote. Losing no longer triggers the victory sequence. Made it possible to travel back from the control centre, instead of forcing players to suicide. Increased number of oxygen tanks. Players can no longer wander off with the oxygen tanks, they are stripped if the player attempts to leave the 1st underground level. There are now 4 possible locations for the radio in the final room, to stop players from beelining the known position. Delayed game start by 20 seconds, to allow slow-loaders a chance to connect in time for the survival vote.

title: Arctic Incident
author: XF-Alien (original) - AlexCorruptor, Outerbeast, Tunac (conversion)
description: The action takes place in a scientific complex, which is located somewhere in the Arctic. In the caves, scientists have found a new form of life, which is resistant to frost and incredibly aggressive to intrusion. The staff at the complex do not have sufficient means to counter it. As a consequence they are forced to ask for help from the military, but the military, apparently, have their own plans for the incident. You as the only survivors must fight your way through the blistering cold, with all odds against you, and finally escape.
additional_info: This is a port of the Arctic Incident mod for Half-Life.

title: Arctic Mission
author: TruckStopSantaClaus
description: You find yourself in a icy tundra. You must find a way home at all cost game should work great for 1 to 8 players

title: Are You Retarded
author: Ice Box
description: In my own words: It's a troll map to annoy players.
additional_info: There is a quiz in chinese language at the end of the map.

title: Area 491
author: GAMESABA
description: The average sven player cannot beat this.
additional_info: N/A

title: Area Zero
author: The fox
description: A walkthrough mission that begins in a complex and transitions to a Xen environment.
additional_info: Map contains a tentacle. Some enemies are named after SnarkCafe clan members.

title: Area49 2
author: Leon, ported by Meryilla
description: AREA49_2 By (<@>) Leon www.paranetwork.co.uk __ Nevada, June 2011 They were just rumours in the news. I didn't take them seriously at first, just the media milking things I suppose. I didn't really believe any of it. I mean, secret bio-weapons production facilities, here in the land of the free? It's bizarre. Well, I thought I could forget all about politics for the time being; after all it was supposed to be my vacation and whatever the area49 thing is, its going to be far away from me. How wrong I was. __ Work as a team to overcome the obstacles that lie in your path to escaping. The map is most fun with a team of about four to eight players, one of which should be elected as 'leader' to instruct the rest of the group. __ Requirements: Three or more players Good teamwork and co-operation skills Voice communication is recommended If you haven't many players, strafe jumping is necessary at some parts. Entity Bug: Entity bug fix points are located at the two main spawn areas on the walls. These fix points are only visible if you have the entity bug and are clearly marked with a notice and a button.
additional_info: Originally an escape map for TFC. Differences to the original: Massively reduced the HP of some of the breakables (nobody should be forced to crowbar down a crate with 10k HP). During the heli fight the spawns now follow the position of the jeeps as they move The intro scene is now skippable. Survival Mode (difficult and not recommended for your first playthrough)! The more prevalent music has been replaced with HD sources. Some adjustments have been made to the weapon spawns to make it more suitable for a Sven experience.

title: Argentina Tiroteo
author: Iva El Mas Capo
description: TRANSLATED FROM SPANISH: Hello, I made this Argentina map in Sven Co-op 😅 Honestly, it took me quite a lot of work to make. I spent several hours learning the editor, experimenting with different things, accidentally breaking everything, and fixing errors that I didn't even understand at first. There were moments when the map simply didn't work the way I expected, and I had to rebuild entire sections from scratch. I also had to learn how to optimize certain parts because otherwise everything would lag, and that involved a lot of trial and error before it became reasonably stable. I built everything little by little: first the map's foundation, then the buildings, streets, and details. Many times, something that seemed simple turned out to be complicated, such as properly aligning textures, setting up the lighting, or making sure certain areas didn't feel empty. I also tried several different ideas, and many of them were eventually discarded because they didn't turn out the way I wanted. The map is inspired by the reality of Argentina and is a direct criticism of the country's situation. I wanted to represent the deterioration, corruption, and economic disaster that many people associate with years of poor political management, including the government of Cristina Fernández de Kirchner. That's why the map has a rather bleak atmosphere, with neglected areas, signs, partially ruined structures, and details that reinforce that overall theme. I also tried to make it more than just a visual experience. As players explore it, I wanted them to feel that atmosphere: semi-abandoned places, areas that look like they're falling apart, and a generally darker style than most typical maps. I didn't want to create something clean or perfect, but rather something that felt more realistic within the limits of the game. Beyond that, I tried to make it enjoyable to play and not just decorative. I adjusted paths, spaces, and areas so that players could move through it comfortably without it becoming frustrating. I'm sure there are still things that could be improved, though, since I'm still learning and this is one of the first maps I've made with this level of detail. It's not perfect, but I put a lot of hours, patience, and testing into it before reaching this result. If you give it a try, any feedback is welcome, whether it's about performance, design, or details that could be improved. 😄

title: Army 4
author: Wildcat
description: You are part of the special marine forces of the United Nations sent out to destroy a terrorist base that was found by recon. You will move in and take the base by surprise. Go in and kill all enemy personnel in the proximity. We have strange reports from our agents within the complex of strange "creatures" that terrorist experiments have created set to destroy the world. When you get inside, meet up with our agents and destroy any and all of these "creatures" you encounter.

title: Artifact
description: [18|0303: Transmission Begin… Gentlemen, Your mission is to retrieve an Ancient Artifact, known as the "Sun Sceptre". We stand to lose alot of money if the mission isn't a success, but as always, I have total faith in you. I'm sorry I couldn't make it to the HQ to brief you further, I have some rather pressing business to attend to. However, I have uploaded most of the information you need to the Computer so make sure you check it out before you leave. I have arranged an initial drop of supplies such as food and Radio equipment at your destination. Remember, there's £10,000,000 riding on this one so I expect to hear a positive result from you within a week. Good Luck Gentlemen. This Message was Written and Transmitted by Gen. Kamikaze Transmission End… ]
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic.

Ascii Art is Internet forum 2channel's Shift JIS arts.

title: Assault On Black Mesa 2
author: Penguin
release_date:
v5 - October 18, 2004 (Classic Map Pack)
v4 - September 15, 2002 (SC 2.0F)
v3 - March 5, 2002
v2 - March 4, 2002
v1 - February 18, 2002
description: *-*-*Incoming Transmission*-*-* After the incident at Black Mesa, the government seized the facility in hopes of containing the events that took place there. In the heart of the facility lies important information concerning the events, and we sent in 3 special operatives to extract the information and retrieve it. Due to unforseen circumstances, the miltary seized the team and has imprisoned them within the Black Mesa warehouse district. Although risky, we feel that the SvenCoop team is fully capable of taking on the much larger force and rescuing our operatives. You will be sent in with minimal weapons, to slip by the security shield. Once inside though, use brute force to gain entry. We will contact you again inside the facility… -SvenCoop HQ *-*-*Incoming Transmission*-*-* The progress made thus far has impressed all here at HQ. In the blueprints we have obtained, the Central Sewer system that you are in leads to the abandoned storage buildings. Beware that these have not seen use in many many years. Expect resistance as you near the surface, as you will come up very close to the warehouse with the operatives. Remember if they cannot be rescued for any reason, do not hesitate to extinguish them. They still have extremely sensitive information about SvenCoop, which can not fall into enemy hands. After you meet the rest of the team, head to the airfield to wait extraction. Be extremely careful, our Xen teleportation monitor are showing signs like the ones during the Incident… -SvenCoop HQ
additional_info: N/A

title: Attack
author: Hterag
description: Pretty old map, but I was clearing out some of my older maps when I came across it, I had a few minutes fun out of it a long time ago so I thought some other people might like a go. Be kind, this is a map that started off as a competition between a friend and I to see who could make the best map in an hour, yes thats right 1 hour(although to make it playable it was worked on a bit more…).
additional_info: MISSION OBJECIVE Aliens have invaded!(yeah you saw that one coming…) You are a member of the research team and have to defend the base, find a way to get into the gun locker and then wipe out everything with more than two legs! SECTRETS There are several secrets, see if you can find them… … oh don't tell me you actually expected me to write them all down here? :P Map name: sc_attack Author: Hterag(aka Guras) Map type: Invasion/defence/arena Recommended players: 2-10 Total build time: Approximately 2.5 hours Compile time: 87 seconds Max wpoly: 1118(ouch… could be worse) http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=29182

title: Attack & Defend
author: NIPPER
description: You are attacking an outpost, full of enemy soldiers armed to the teeth. Once you reach the battlements, the enemy is on the run; clear the underground tunnel and claim the watch tower. Then, defend your newly taken outpost from the onslaught that is coming.
additional_info: Included in the NIPPER Map Pack. Hints: To take down the fence, break the little black boxes with red spots that are along the fence posts. Break all 5 and the fence will fall. To take down the underground doors, break the little black boxes with red spots that are on the right and left side. Break both and the door will open. Once you take over the outpost, an onslaught of 80 enemies will come. You must defend your newly claimed base.

description: Well this is your typical semi-abandoned storage installation that between 1-4 players must defend against the hordes of monsters. The level features two waves of attack , attack wave 2 being much harder than one (duh). Anyhow one the coolest things is the force field (becareful not to kill your teammates ;p). It also has a bunker, gun turret and underground tunnels.
additional_info: N/A

title: Auspices
author: Seraph
release_date:
v3 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v2 - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0B)
v1 - December 23, 2003 (SC 3.0)
description: One week ago, Alien forces launched an underground attack on a remote military base. We "thought" it was under control until we started receiving strange communications from the base. They were asking for, "food nipples with cheese," and demanding that we, "send a giant pie to bathe in." Communications then ceased and we have concluded that the aliens have warped the base personnel's minds into believing that they serve their alien "masters." We have decided to send your squad in to investigate this matter since your previous engagements involving these Aliens have been quite successful. Your orders are to investigate the facility and neutralize all hostile forces. Also note that strange readings have been noticed in a deep underground chamber. Consequently, the readings have led us to believe that this is the origin of the base personal mind warping. Good luck, and if you start to feel odd get out of there as quick as you can. Sincerely, General Seraph
additional_info: Auspices is included in Sven Co-op 4.8, Sven Co-op 4.5, Sven Co-op 4.0B and Sven Co-op 3.0 mod releases. It is so big that it reached the engine limits at the time it was made. There are a few randomized paths to keep things interesting.

title: Awaken
author: Zorik
description: This takes place after Freeman rejects GMan proposition at the end of the vanilla game. Somehow he was able to survive the battle with Alien Grunts and found a portal to our world. After that two scientist revived him back to life. The journey begins again.
additional_info: Editor used : Worldcraft 3.3 Other : Wally Info : No map has Leak. Episode making time: Too much Equipment: 120 mhz processor, 48 ram and 8mb graphics card. Original README: + Readme Final (2021/09/06) – Readme Final (2021/09/06) README UPDATE (2021 09 06) AWAKEN I have recovered my old PC hard disc and found this lost MOD, which now after much more than a decade I can share with you. It was once uploaded into internet (via 56 Kb/s modem :) ), but I suppose that HL1 custom mods page doesn't exist any more. The game takes place after Freeman rejects GMan proposition at the end of the vanilla game. Somehow he was able to survive the battle with Alien Grunts and found a portal to our world. After that two scientist revived him to life. The journey begins again To play AWAKEN you have to put the folder in main game folder and then activate it from game's "custom game" menu. I have used many assets from the original game, HL demo and Opposing force. This mod is made only for fun so please use it at your own risk. PS. The episode was made by me in 2004 when I was a 16 years old boy:) My actual mail is different- lp.ude.demug|eseiwmada#lp.ude.demug|eseiwmada Best wishes, Adam

title: Ayakashi Banquet
author: nekomata
description: When you going to reach the temple, You'll know. Nico Nico Nico Nico Nico Nico Nico Jiniwa !! It's Nekomata like every time. This Map is based on the reflection points of the previous work halflifuro. It's a map that you can do whatever you want. SC has quite Japanese-style maps such as rhapsody_b1_1, sc_dojo_v2, bh1_l1. Personally, I'm Nijia !! Saam Laa'i !! Sussie !! I made it as "Let's make such a Japanese-style map !!" I would be very happy if you could enjoy it.
additional_info: Your physical strength will recover when you approach the three waters on the map. Also, there are plenty of ammo. Youkai cannot pass under the first torii gate near the starting point. That torii is the borderline of youkai, and after that, the youkai will not be able to exert their full power. Attempts to ambush above the torii gate. If the number of people is small and it is difficult to clear it, it may be good to invite them to the torii gate and fight. When you go to a place like the last shrine and finish the map, it is at the entrance of the shrine Please push two stone lanterns at the same time.

title: Aztec
author: Sunnyalex
description: You wake up and find yourself trapped within a giant Aztec temple complex, full of puzzles and deadly traps. As you and your fellow "inmates" make your way through the temple, you notice that there is more to it than it initially appeared. Suddenly you find yourself confronted with unexpected enemies and need to fight your way back out.
additional_info: HINTS: Always keep your eyes open for short-cuts that become available, once you finished certain parts of the map. New spawn points are unlocked throughout your way to reduce "walking distances". This map is played in two phases: "forward" (you will notice when you reached "the end") and then "backwards" to where you initially started.

title: Back To Xen 2
author: Reuniclus-579
description: A new device was developed to stop the alien invasion. That device can disturb transporter signals, so aliens can't beam in to attack and it is the same for humans. That means no further research in XEN. The Administrator decided to cancel the project, but some scientists blocked all entrances to the Transporter Research labs to continue their work. They finished construction, but were not able to activate it. Your mission is to find that device and activate it. It is located somewhere in the New Mesa Complex.

description: A map where you, a soldier with your squad, will complete some simple objectives. With an estimated duration of 5 to 10 minutes per map. You can find a total of 13 secrets and some references too. Also my first map for Sven Co-op, I appreciate all the feedback. Objectives: Destroy all enemy artillery Stop the communication satellite Return to the extraction point Good luck soldier Have fun…

title: Bad Day at Work
author: Skals
description: Bad Day at Work (bdaw) is a small series of maps, going from bdaw_c1a1 to bdaw_c1a4 (4 maps). Sadly the project was not completed, yet a good enough amount of gameplay was already created. The level bdaw_c1a4 was originally a large level where Gordon goes through several traps and ends up in a large level with G-Man and an evil scientist in it who summons several strong minions before his facility overloads and he dies. Then you take a teleporter to escape the level and first encounter the group of alien commandos now seen in the bdaw_c1a4 map, however this was not uploaded due to the fact that the map files for bdaw were lost accidentally.
additional_info: Unfortunately, the map files were lost so the project could not be continued, but this should still provide about 10 minutes of gameplay for you and your friends. The first map of the series is called "bdaw_c1a1". Mission 4 a.k.a. bdaw_c1a4 is not a proper level, it is only a small cutscene with a game_end. c1a4 was originally a long mission where Gordon goes through a series of traps and obstacles to eventually get to a room with a boss battle where several strong monsters are battled once summoned to the room by a mad scientist. However, this was replaced with a simple level to end the game.
