title: Cocyx Box
author: Cocyx The Skeleton
description: A small and short obstacle course map, with very easy obstacles… except… that you can only see yourself through a camera very far away! A nightmare on your muscle memory! Not so easy anymore, huh?
additional_info: N/A

title: Coldburn
author: Keen
description: You and your crew are in a spaceship and detect ancient man-made structures and faint life-signs on this cold moon of one of our gas giants. Your crew beam down/shuttle down to investigate.
additional_info: Coldburn 1: You will need to hug the last wall with strafe(A) in order to close the last lever/escape the vacuum. Coldburn 2: Floor 1 - Collect 25 Cryofluid from the cryopods to power up a secret door Floor 2 - Destroy the ancient computers to enable the master computer button of each room to advance to the next Floor 3 - Travel down to the bottom floor where you will need 4 keycards to unlock 4 levers. Activate the levers to open the exit elevator door

title: Colony X
description: Going down for the "Big Sleep" always worries me. The Cryogenic Technology often fails and kills off entire Crews. Just the other day Frank arrived with his Crew at D4 and the Security Staff were greeted with a bunch of Ice-Coffins. Frank was a bastard anyway. Good riddance. The rest of my Crew don't seem to care as much as I do, unless they're bottling up all the fear for some future shrink to tell them they're childhood was a mess. Why did I start this ? I guess the idea of exploring new Worlds and making them habitable for future generations excited me. That was 10 years ago. At least i'm not on the "Nostromo". Hah. If only something exciting like that would happen to us ! It might relieve the tedium of Colony Maintenance. [C:7683/300] Signing Off until We reach Colony A32…
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic. Sequel to Planet 3c.

title: Colour Skills
author: N.O.L.F
description: A team-based puzzle map, which also happens to be my first escape map ever. All puzzles are self-explaining, but might take some time to understand. Don't be frustrated if you and your team fail once or twice, some of the puzzles are quite challenging. Look out for some secrets ;) There are 10 Levels in total, from easy to hard. Have fun, good luck!! Thanks to all people who played and liked my other maps and therefore inspired me to create this one! Special thanks to Nyro for being such a great help and pushed me to continue making this map. He also made the Hawaii song :)
additional_info: At least 3 players are required, though you will find it much easier with a fourth. Players will be split into two teams - Red and Blue. Blue and Red floors, buttons, forcefields etc can only be safely interacted with by players belonging to the respective team. e.g. A player on red team can walk on red floors, whereas a blue player would be killed by doing so. Your current team is displayed on your HUD on the left hand-side, and by default player models will be enforced to the red/blue massn models (toggleable, see Server Operators section). Each player will also have an icon above their player model showing which team they are on. You can switch to the Red or Blue team by typing .red or .blue respectively in chat. Originally a custom map for TFC. Differences to the original: Added ricochet fall effect when players fall off the map, just for fun Player spawns now follow the lift for the credit sequence Telefragging is disabled The map is easier in general compared to TFC due to much more lenient player movement

title: Command
author: The Ferret
description: - Try to complete each secondary objective seperately to avoid excessive monster spawning - If this is the multiplayer version, you MUST have someone protecting the 'Command Core' - Try not to be a hero :-) Thanks for playing the beta! All comments and questions are welcome, send either to… moc.liamtoh|notxoltm#moc.liamtoh|notxoltm or the Sven-Coop Official Forums. Good luck, and have fun!
additional_info: N/A

title: Command & Conquer: Defence
author: BloodShed
description: A Command & Conquer inspired map. Quote from the map briefing: TO: outpost 290983 FROM: High command Message: WARNING there is a NOD group closing in on your position. We already know that you don't have your base fully up and running, and your positionary beacon isn't ready yet. Main objective: Defend your base until the beacon can deploy itself and you can activate it, so we can send reinforcement. Good luck
additional_info: You can hear the voices of the real game when you kill an enemy

title: Command & Conquer: Unnamed
author: Kuroneko
description: Defend against the invasion of enemies that fell down to earth in the most clumsiest way possible! Start the map by building an outpost
additional_info: No readme or MOTD included

title: Command&Conquer
author: Snarkeh
description: Author's Note: This map can be VERY resource intensive, Server OPs beware. Briefing Discontinued GDI funding and a large scale NOD offensive has left GDI forces in the sector in a critical state of neglect. NOD forces have overrun and captured the main GDI base in the area leaving on a small damaged outpost the only remaining base under GDI control in the sector. Defend the remaining base from all attacks until an assault on the NOD base can be mounted. Eliminate all NOD forces. *END TRANSMISSION* OBJECTIVES Build your Base and purchase upgrades to help fortify your position. Hold out until help arrives. Destroy the NOD base within the area. Remember If you lose your Refinery or the Barracks, they will be gone forever. If your Construction Yard is destroyed, your mission will be a failure. Tips Teamwork is extremely important for an effective team on this map. Wait for everyone to connect and decide a strategy at the lobby before you start the map. It's good practice to give people roles for both waves and rest periods. Have designate people to collect Tiberium, others to build or repair. Be very efficient with your time during the rest periods. Every second counts to recover and strengthen your defenses. Getting Carry Capacity and Repair Wrench upgrades from the Barracks are a good first priority. Be careful with your credit spending, you may ran out of money when most you need it.
additional_info: Known Issues This map can be VERY resource intensive, Server OPs beware. Due to the finicky nature of Goldsrc and Sven there may be some Janky-ness such as NPC rockets Phasing through buildings, (known Sven bug) NPC path finding and attacking being weird at times, groups of AI just outright breaking randomly in some playthroughs but not in others, occasional server hitching, and other weirdness that I couldn't troubleshoot. If you have any issues with the map of have any questions you can @ me on the Sven Co-op discord mappers channel.

title: Complex
author: enCore
description: Find a way out of this complex.
additional_info: N/A

title: Complex 2
author: perfect
description: You're inside one of the of loading compartments at Black Mesa. After you a gate closed, the barbed wire trapped you in the complex. To reach freedom, make your way through dark corridors and gloomy compartments, ending up in the ventilation shafts in which a heavy fight awaits.
additional_info: The map is built on the idea that the farther you go, the more difficult it becomes. Map for 2-7 players. Release thread: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=31673

title: Con Force
author: freredarme
description: Con-Force (Or full name as Contra-Force) was released about 2003, I have enjoyed those moments as well. Until this day, I see there is still nowhere contains about this mod. This game will make you to buy weapons from start up(sadly , I hardly get those original weapons from mod so I use ins2 weapons instead). Killing enemies to earn money for better weapons. I also add additional menu option called "Misc" at equipment category where you can buy healthkit, armor or even checkpoint. The misc menu is in equipment category by the way. Dfficulty reduce damage to monster by power of 10% per player There are 16(-1) maps. The reason that cf_cooplevel07.bsp doesn't exist because the map is too small to play So I decided to not add it and skip to cf_cooplevel08.bsp instead.
additional_info: N/A

title: Concrete deathmatch
author: MARKUHA
description: My first map was made in about 4 days for friends in the Deathmatch genre. The map borrows ideas from Crossfire and Undertow. Also use mp_falldamage 0
additional_info: N/A

title: Conect
author: eMTeG
description: A standard walkthrough map in some kind of lab or facility. This the beta 1 SP test version of a map pack called Conect. Here is the Story: Primary objective is to re-establish the Black Mesa Satelite Comlink. To do this u have to get to the surface and fight your way to the transmitter but the way is blocked: to reach the surface you need a bridge but this bridge is momentary "not availiable"… you have to reactivate an generator. This generator has been shout down by the militaries so in most areas of map is only the emergency power active what means there is only a red lightning. The generator is sealed of with grunts and aliens…
additional_info: In this version are some invisible ladders and blocks included, to make this map playable for 1 player. In final version u'll need 2 players to reach some points in the map. Please check: -Are there big bugs, wich make this map not playable? -Are there places where u cant get out? -Do you think there are to much/to strong or not enougth monsters? Other notes: This is the map 1 of 2 or maybe 3 maps. You can't reach the sourface, this map ends when the generator has been activated. You can finish this map with 1 player! In the first room you can use the railing to jump on the ladder. The genarator is down -> lifts has to be controlled manualy. Copie .bsp and .cfg file into maps folder and the 2 sound files into sound/misc

title: Confuse
author: Sunnyalex
description: A map of great adventure and fun! It will riddle your mind and test your skills. Figure out what is truth and what is illusion. Jump your way through the training course. You will be rewarded with hordes of monsters attacking.
additional_info: This map requires at least two players

title: Conspiracy
author: Cheeseh
release_date:
Final - November 26, 2005
v2 - November 24, 2005
v1 - November 21, 2005
description: You are called in as a medical team to help heal survivors of an attack on a building carrying out prototyping research work with the help of Otis the security guard. You want to find out why everyone is dead and why an attack happened and who is behind it. You will explore the level finding most of this out from the start.
additional_info: N/A

title: Contact
author: alex546
description: You are part of a rescue team ordered to check a facility. You have no idea what just happened with Black Mesa and the same occurs at this facility…
additional_info: This is a fully play demo. For more info, see http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=32741. Comes with detail textures! Use r_detailtextures 1

title: Contra
author: HelloTimber
description: This is a map bring FC game Contra into Sven Co-op. But of course it's not simply make the 2D one into the 3D one, I consult the original level design and remake it totally. The coast, the bridge, the canyon, and the fortress… So you can say it is a map that not completely same but can remind you the scene in original Contra. Textures are extracted from Contra, screenshot and fix in WindowsPaint, or totally drawn in WindowsPaint by myself. This map includes AngelScript, all the bullets are floating as the original Contra does. Players can pick up ammo N(Normal ammo, the initial one but not appear in map), M, S, L, all of these ammo have different features. You can choose True mode or Casual mode at start place. True mode is original like style and challenging, both player and npc take one bullet then say gg. Casual mode is easier than True mode, which make players can be hit 10 times in a life time.
additional_info: Honestly, the work of drawing some textures is pretty interesting. I don't know why there are so many brush errors when I compile the map. I've fixed many visible wrong brushes, this cost me lots of time. If you have any suggestion on this map, welcome tell it out in the comment. The map has been basically done, now waiting for the weapons and enemies AS scripts. Coming soon. How long? In a month, I guess. I'm so lazy that I have already hung this map for 2 months Now waiting for Dr.ABC's ASscript so I can add weapons and enemies into the map, then release it. I wanna make both weapons and enemies as Contra like. THX for Dr.ABC's help. -22.10.2020 Finally, this map is finished. Dr.ABC's AngelScript for my map was done long time ago, he's a really good person, but it was me that forgot to continue the map. This map was expected to be finished in a month(November in 2020), however, I became a freshman in my collage, so I was too fullfilling and busy to make map. As time passed, I almost forgot this hard work. Untill my friend L40_M3N9 reminds me that, "Hey, I think you've forgotten something." "What?" "Map." "OMG-" So I remember this map again and continue the remaining work. Because it is winter holiday, I can do what I can at home, so I make my map day and night, spend about a week on it, then it is done. I hate bugs very much, since I have to wait centuries long for my poor computer to compile a bsp, and it always has several bug in somewhere. But making functions are very interesting, I was concentrated when doing these. In my own opinion, this map isn't bad. I hope you'll like it. Maybe I wold change this map a bit when I release the following maps(perhaps), so I name this map beta. -22.02.2021 Medkit 164389527 SAmmo 165789423 About a known problem, the func_tankrocket in boss fight produce extremely big explosion and smoke that the scale of sprites are not correct obviously. And I don't know how to solve it.

title: Conundrum 3
author: DocRock
description: While solving puzzles and fighting legions of monsters, explore Egyptian ruins, snowy mountains, buried tunnels, deep mines and volcanic caverns in this third installment of Conundrum by DocRock There are some 35 unique areas to experience as you play this incredible and challenging campaign. The overall goal is to find and collect the six relics in six perilous zones. The first two to find are blood and stones. The adventure starts in Con3_Huba where you can see samples of the different environments and start the campaign, or you and friends can vote to jump to any one of the 16 key Maps where you can also choose from 4 different levels of difficulty. Things start with a simple challenge where you have to push an ornate box to a matching decal on the ground followed by a couple of sections where you have multiple boxes that have to be placed for gates to open so you can progress, all while trying to stay alive as various monsters let you know they don't like you and your friends invading their space! Map sections after that get more difficult but there are only a few boxes to move, rather you have to be agile and nimble with tricky platforming (jumping and landing and moving) in breathtaking sheer cliff landscapes. On most of the map sections, falling is a bad thing so you need to be good at crawling, jumping, long-jumping and always aware of what is going on around you. If you lose control and push a box off the edge where you can't get to it then the map will reset, too bad and try again! Map sections like this are only in the beginning, later maps are focused on survival and it's important to have team members that can heal you if need be. There are 3 interlude maps where you can see the relics you've collected, take a deep breath and then move on to find the remaining relics. At the end, you will have a final battle to test your skills, be patient. You will deal with many kills including the big boss. Note: In a number of places the monsters will fight each other. This is by design and not an accident. We found that playing on an active scene where all the bad guys aren't just shooting at the players made game play much more interesting.
additional_info: Known problems: If you have problems while pushing the boxes on this campaign you might see these symptoms: 1. boxes don't want to push or are very slow 2. your player perspective rubber-bands as you push things This problem is caused by the video sync between the game and your monitor refresh rate. You can fix this by setting "GL_VSYNC 1" in your game console or go to your GAME OPTIONS > VIDEO > and check "WAIT FOR VERTICAL SYNC" This should fix the problem for you for the most part. Also, if for any reason you get stuck and can't figure out (at that moment) what to do you can always votemap con3_huba and then jump back to the map to restart it or come back at a later time when you've had a chance to think about things and talk with other players. Servers may also have an empty map running where someone left it so do the same thing to get things started again where you want it. Difficulty Notes: One other note about Gameplay Difficulty Selections. The maps vary in difficulty. Some maps are more focused on platforming and jumping then on just killing reams of monsters. Choosing a more difficult level only adds monsters and might make the existing ones harder to kill. Things were done this way because with 3 or 4 players all shooting and healing each other, things would otherwise be much too easy. Then again, one or two experienced players can run through the maps on the "Difficult" setting as a challenge. The maps are set up so one player automatically selects "Easy", Two players get "Medium" three players get "Hard" and 4 players get "Difficult". This can be easily changed at the Selection Kiosks, but once any player breaks the start barrier and you hear the suit zipper start sound, the difficulty selection is locked at that point even if more players join. Special notes: On Con3_10 there is a hidden button that will enable snow on part of the map (just for fun). Special notes for Server Operations: This campaign is set up so you only need to add Con3_HubA to your mapcycles and votemaps. All of the other maps are accessible through that start map.

title: Coop
author: eMTeG
description: coop1: Standard indoor walkthrough map with plenty of aliens, grunts, and crates. coop2: Walkthrough map with a huge room of enemies at the end. coop3: Clear all of the enemies.
additional_info: You need to change the map manually upon reaching the end and killing all enemies.

title: Cow Tycoon
author: goose
description: In 199X, a group of unknown individuals assemble a humble farmstead. One month later, a federal investigation is launched into an empty field known only for having become Ground Zero. Until then, God has become our plaything.
additional_info: -Tread carefully. Reality here often ceases to make sense, and your car will vanish upon hitting a corner too hard. Meat must be held above ground or it may clip into the floor, and sometimes processing can cause it to clip into different dimensions, jittering into the floor and spreading its symptoms upon contact with other meat. GoldSrc is a piece of shit. -Money is shared between all players. Play on a private server with a coordinated (or not) group of friends. Public servers will become an impossible nightmare. -Harvesting wheat or taking out a loan are your last resorts if you run out of money.

title: Crablegs
author: Socrates
description: Well, first there was a map with respawning gargantuas. Then one with respawning aliens. Then respawning soldiers. Now, heck, they've got one with respawning houndeyes. There's only one place to logically go from here… Headcrabs. Headcrabs, and headcrabs, and headcrabs. And then some headcrabs. The map is simple: two arenas, not really connected in any way players can reach, and with scads of headcrabs pouring in to each arena. Originally this was going to be a competitive teamplay thing, but teamplay doesn't work in Sven Co-op as yet, so I just left it as two arenas. But what are you still reading this for? If you had just went and played the map without even bothering to read the documentation, you could've been buried in headcrabs 10 minutes ago. Even though it's only taken you 5 minutes to read this. It's weird that way.
additional_info: At least 3 players recommended.

title: Crack-Life
author: International Minds
description: WARNING: THIS MOD CONTAINS MATERIAL THAT IS NOT SAFE FOR WORK. Crack-Life is a retarded Half-Life mod that replaces models and sounds in the original Half-Life campaign with overused jokes and memes.
additional_info: This conversion features: Done from scratch, using original mod files. Using Sven Co-op HLSP campaign as a base for the conversion. Scripted weapons (not all) to mimic the original weapons behaviour, as well as a workaround for the irreplaceable client side sounds. Removed almost every duplicate sound file (my ears…). + Known bugs - Known bugs Some sound effects are predicted client side and cannot be replaced with global sound replacement file. A user reported to me that map scripts may fail to compile if server runs w00tguy's Classic Mode Deluxe due to ItemMapping usage. I don't know much about it as I haven't tried myself.

title: Cracklife 2
author: siemka123
description: Crack-Life Campaign redesigned for Sven Co-op Multiplayer Finished, this is the final verison.

title: Crash
author: Keen
description: A blue maze with weapons scattered across, there is no ending
additional_info: N/A

title: CraXnHaX
author: Sence
description: I'm having fun on the internet until some day some random user wants to hack me. Yes… you're the random user and you got nothing better to do like trolling trolls. Get some proxys and destroy every single file on my comp.
additional_info: THIS IS NOT THE FINAL SOON THERE WILL BE MORE.

title: Crazy Jump
author: KiLLeR
description: A jumping-horde map. They should jump off to the building to splash to the water.
additional_info: N/A

title: Crazy Maze
author: DarthRod
description: Welcome to the crazy maze!!! You and your team have to get the end of the labyrinth to access the control room! Inside it you will find 10 buttons that do things to either help or harm players in the maze. Besides the maze, there is a disco club, bar, and a secret or two. Buttons in the control room: Crusher : A giant crusher lifts down to splat all players who are in the maze. You have to wait 3 minutes before using this button again. Light : Switch on/off the lights in the maze. Way : Show/hide the way of the maze. Water : Players in the maze will drown. You have to wait 3 minutes before using this button again. Spawn a Shock Roach : Spawn a Shock Roach at one of five places choose by a random device. You have to wait 2 minutes before using this button again. Random Side Walls : When a player push this button, a random side wall will push the players out of the maze (splat). Flashbang : Launch a flashbang into the maze. Friction : Make the tiles of the maze slippery. Random Hurt/Heal : It randomly chooses between hurting or healing the players who are in the maze. You have to wait 1 minute before using this button again. Earthquake : You feel the floor shaking and rocks fall from the ceiling to crush people.
additional_info: Crazy Maze is similar to and inspired by Mat club. Map comes with a bunch of music also featured by Drunken Fool's radio plug-in. Release thread: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=23716

title: Crazy Teleport
author: GForce
description: You find yourself in a dark dimension where past maps are warped into evil new areas. In the other room, a rusty power generator sits still. Objectives: Find a weak point in the power generator and destroy it (use your spraypaint to find it easily) Hold out against the enemies at the different areas during varied amounts of time (2-4 minutes each) Defeat the bosses Wait for rescue Map inspired by: Afraid of monsters, Osprey, Horde, Vger, Overrun
additional_info: N/A

title: Crazy Walker
author: Keen
description: You go through a strange bleeding mushroom acid-like land, defeat xen monsters and get teleported about the map while blowing away npcs and seeing trippy colorful textures all around you. [Map Updated July 16, 2017 to fix Train]
additional_info: After the car reached his destination and the players are teleported, destroy the wall infront of you and continue on foot. A community version is now available that merges all maps related to crazywalker and also uses a more up to date version of the map: crazywalkerb5 + cheeseplease + keenrpgv3 + dominatrix

title: Crazylab
author: Poda
description: Objective: Shutdown the generator and leave the base.
additional_info: N/A

title: Crime City
author: MizzyMiz
description: This is an open world map with multiple paths to complete it. I was greatly inspired by the "district" maps for Garry's Mod by "a social guarantee". /Premise/ You arrived into this city on a train and your primary objective is to leave. Do some jobs for the local criminals (Yakuza, Russian mob, Mobius INC, the police) and get enough money to leave this place. (Each faction has 4 quests and will mostly lock out eachother, so you should focus on one faction per playthrough) /Money/ You can get Digibux for completing missions, as well as just finding it laying around. You can buy weapons and other things with it. You should probably buy a weapon first, because most first missions need a weapon to be completed. You can also unlock the bus system, which acts as a fast travel method. Be careful with it, because you can accidentally telefrag your friends! (I am bad at mapping so if you are carrying too much money for something you will need to drop them from the inventory by pressing I) /Objective/ The questlines will tell you what to do, usually take the money and go back to the train station. This map is survival mode by default so make sure to buy the medkit and take care of eachother, some fights can be hard. If you hurt civilians the police will become hostile to you, and will be hostile until the end of the map. Hurting a faction member will only anger that faction, the police will not care. They also do not care about homeless people. If you mess up and anger any faction you didn't want to anger, you can restart the map from the train station or by typing "restart" into the console. If you forgot what an NPC said, you can open the console and read it again from there.
additional_info: N/A

title: Crisis 1
author: Heiko
description: Set before the events of Crisis 2. Opening in a military HQ the players are briefed and promptly sent on their way to meet their objective. The briefing is as follows: "Good morning soldiers. You've been chosen to take care of a special task concerning the Black Mesa Facility. Your mission is to infiltrate the complex to find Gordon Freeman and kill him." "Commander. We've located the position of the target. It's in sector 4e." "OK. You know what to do. The teleporter will take you to 4e."
additional_info: Crisis 1 was actually released after Crisis 2. It's in the Best of Map Showcase. The end of the map leads immediately into the beginning of Crisis 2. (ie. no inbetween passage of time) You can see the G-Man in the window when you are receiving your mission

title: Crisis 2
author: Heiko
description: Crisis 2 (full name Coop Crisis 2) is a typical walkthrough map which has the players follow a system of rails throughout an area that presumably exists somewhere in the Black Mesa Research Facility. Players must continually work together to proceed to various areas within the map, all leading up to an epic battle with respawning grunts in order to obtain the keycard to an elevator.
additional_info: Crisis 2 was plagued by blockers in the earlier versions of Sven Co-op. Included in Sven Co-op 3.0, Sven Co-op 2.1, Sven Co-op 2.0F, Sven Co-op 2.0B, and Sven Co-op 1.9 mod releases. A prequel, Crisis 1, was released after Crisis 2. Ranked #13 in the Creepsworld Top50 maps list. The map ends inconclusively, with the all familiar "To Be Continued" text gracing the screen before the map switch. However it is incredibly unlikely that there will be a third map in the series.

title: Crood Coop
author: Headz
description: A walkthrough map with some interesting puzzles.
additional_info: N/A

title: Crossed Paths
author: Loulimi
description: A major update is planned soon! "They have a situation down there that they can’t handle by themselves. You’ll be briefed once arrived, but attackers apparently stole something from them. Something very valuable." Neophus and Loulimi are proud to present Crossed Paths. This collaboration puts you into the shoes of defence contractors tasked with recovering a crystal from unknown attackers.

title: Crusader 5
author: zacman
description: Zombie overload.
additional_info: https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/31095-Crusader-5 Will probably crash the server or overflow everyone after a few minutes.

title: Crusades
author: Static-X_Solja
description: A simple horde map with a never-ending onslaught of zombies. All you have is a crowbar, pistol, and crossbow. You can try to defend the scientists, but nothing happens if they die. Description from text file included with map: Crusades by Static-X_Solja heres another old map of mine, proly my favorite. Basically your up against a shit load of zombies that keep advancing and you armed with nothing but a crowbar… NOTE-There can be about 50 monsters on the screen at once so dont complain about the lag!!
additional_info: N/A

title: Crusher
author: Unknown
description: Crush scientists, barney and/or players.
additional_info: N/A

title: Crying Lamb
author: A1win
description: Okey, here's a small map that was requested by $ilentSheep. The idea of the map is like Afrika Korps 3, but with no goal. I set a timelimit of 30 minutes though. Enemies respawn until the timelimit expires or the admin decides to change the map There are 3 enemy assassins and 3 friendly assassins, 1 enemy medic, 1 friendly medic and one enemy grunt/robogrunt for each player. For example, if there are 4 players, there will be 4 enemies + 1 enemy medic + 3 enemy assassins, 1 friendly medic and 3 friendly assassins. The maximum number of enemies is 8 even though there were more than 8 players. Well here's the exact info: 1 players: AR Grunt 2 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt 3 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt, Medic Glock Grunt 4 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt, Medic Glock Grunt, AR Robogrunt 5 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt, Medic Glock Grunt, AR Robogrunt, AR+GL Grunt 6 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt, Medic Glock Grunt, AR Robogrunt, AR+GL Grunt, SG+HG Grunt 7 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt, Medic Glock Grunt, AR Robogrunt, AR+GL Grunt, SG+HG Grunt, Medic DEagle Grunt 8 players: AR Grunt, SG Grunt, Medic Glock Grunt, AR Robogrunt, AR+GL Grunt, SG+HG Grunt, Medic DEagle Grunt, Shotgun Robogrunt If you are interested in how this is done, here's a tutorial: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?p=275083 I spent four hours to make and test it, fix some bugs and so on… Well did some other things too, maybe two hours of mapping and an hour testing. I named it Crying Lamb (sc_clamb) so it's related to $ilentSheep's name, if anyone didn't notice I can improve this a bit but I don't want to spent more hours
additional_info: Optimal number of players: 1 to 8 NOTE: The violence in this map is imaginary. No-one really gets hurt. Map done and tested in four hours. http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=23761

title: Cryo City (OUTDATED)
author: Keen
description: CryoCity4 (plus cryocity 5 and 7) (+18 because the world is a prude). a working func_vehicle map for sven co-op 5.0 you can use the many func_vehicles in this map to drive around and plow through monsters and friendlys alike. Explore the map, it's towers full of typical soldiers and alien_slaves, as well as the depths of the map with a funky non-functional arcade and many respawning monsters. the monsters do seem to reproduce forever in the underground area, so i set the CFG to only host the map for 30 minutes at time. I have included other versions CryoCity5/6/7 as well, but they seem to crash with increasing frequency, but do include things such as amazing ramps and semi-functional arcade machines. currently you must suicide with K to free yourself from the machine constraints. There are some very, very minor mildly pornographic DRAWN IMAGES on some of the towers in CryoCity4, CryoCity 6 and 7 lack these asthestic buildings but become increasingly crashy. Main Issues: The maps are a quick hodge-podge func_vehicle and lobby testing map/s cobbled together from other parts, enjoy them for what they are! No proper game_end. in cryocity4 the monsters or players can shoot the map change buttons at spawn and trigger a vote map change. you are only likley to have very few of the maps on the list so it's unlikely to do much unless you have those maps installed on your server/machine.
additional_info: cryocity4 is the most stable version of the map. arcades may not work properly. not sure if i will update this map it was just kind of the first func_vehicle map that I know of, special thanks to nico

title: Cryo Origins: Wayne
author: Wayne
description: Complete the puzzles to find the exit. You feel the place is familiar. Like a particular secret in a certain city but in a spooky day. At the distance, a big lighthouse stands tall. Maybe getting there is the first goal?
additional_info: Originally a part of the cryorage-origins community mapping project that never came to be. This piece from it is mapped entirely into a fully playable map, inspired by Keen Halloween and the SecretCity Saga Remastered. This is version 2 of cr_wayne.bsp which is outdated and smaller in comparison.

title: Cryo Underground (OUTDATED)
author: CryoKeen
description: cryo_underground2 - a map very similar to the cryocity4 series, no adult content and only underground with lots of driving paths if you can discover them, some semi-working Snake machine but like before you have to kill yourself to respawn from the Snake Arcade due to bug. otherwise an expansion of the underground facility seen in cryocity4-5-7 with many tiny func_vehicles for you to play with. the spawn rate is reasonable in the habitat underground area with the elevator that spawns grunts near the arcade area, perfect for a lobby map imho. also the pacman machine is broken for some unknown reason maybe another release or w00tguys magic fingers will fix it. he's got a lot on his plate though right now, no rush. MAIN ISSUES: Map has no ending. Snake broken. Pacman may or may not work. Otherwise a short/medium, fun map. (community edit fixed this)

title: Cryocell
author: Keen
description: Some green ruins, some green cryocells you have to collect and use to advance. Many cryoenemies to cryokill. And some klingons and picard.
additional_info: All weapon replacement models made by RNG except the SAW, which was made by Turrican. All sounds, textures and other features used in this map not properly credited belong to their respective owners. I do not know who made some of these textures, if you know who's textures some of these are or you want to leave a question or comment please drop me an moc.liamg|neekcinegoyrc#liame - CryoKeen These maps were lost and later recovered in 2025 by the community, restored, merged and released as a playable version.

title: CryoCube
author: CryoKeen
description: Releasing 2 smallish maps that have I've been playing on peoples servers. You will want to redownload this if you've already got keenzonea9, as I've ripented in a squadmaker that spawns a headcrab that when you kill, will toggle on the ambient sounds in the map. Puzzle/fun/no major monsters to kill map. Cryocube is a map that has identical rooms where you have no monsters to fight but instead try to figure out a way out either by yourself or with your buddys without getting killed! Cryocube has a room or 2 where you fall down but you don't die. You will need to respawn yourself to get out of the pit, sorry about that. Also there is a room where a giant killer fan will spin the wrong direction. For cryocube, press your use key on the FIRST light in the ceiling in the spawn room, that will toggle on/off the ambient sound. Otherwise please have fun and tell me about any bugs and how I can improve both maps!
additional_info: N/A

title: Cryolife
author: Keen
description: Cryolife or Cryogenic Life, is yet another installment of Keen's mapping adventures, featuring lots of weird hallways, teleports to strange areas, picard coins and artifacts to collect and lots of collabs with other mappers.
additional_info: This is a map series recovered by the community, fixed up and merged into 2 maps. The following maps were recovered and merged: cryogeniclife_0a, cryolife1a, cryolife2a, cryolife3a_fixalpha, cryolife4a_alpha. They are available as an extra download All textures were unembedded and put into a wad, and lewd textures were censored for more safety at the time to stream or public playthroughs.

title: Cryorage Origins
author: Keen, Tim, The Fox
description: Before RedShift there was CryoOrigins. Before CryoOrigins there was CryoRage. The rage energy from the ragecubes of the ragemaps has been unleashed and you have to find the way to restore the dimension's balance to find the exit. Collect artifacts, coins, flowers and cubes to find the way to the ragecube and destroy it! Once the rage subsides… the origins may begin.
additional_info: These maps were recovered, bugfixed and merged by the community into 3 maps. These maps are from the CryoRage and CryoOrigins series by Keen, lose ideas that are mashed up into a series with help from the support of patreons and subscribers. It seems to be that this developed into RedShift but that also did not see the light of day. Cryo Origins was a project between many mappers. Another map in the series was cryo-origins:wayne, but was made standalone for different reasons

title: Crystal
author: AzShadow
description: Our planet has recently been infiltrated by aliens and we believe that a more devastating attack is imminent. We found out that the source of these creatures is a secret research facility named Crystal which we lost a contact with a couple of weeks ago. Presumably the alien surge resulted from a faulty experiment but that is something we cannot change anymore. Your team has been assigned the mission to destroy the alien source in Crystal and put an end to the alien infiltration. Keep in mind that the facility holds some very advanced technology - be careful and use it to your advantage if you can. As you approach your destination you managed to sneak into the lobby of Crystal via the facility's ventilation system. It's up to you to finish the job from here on. Good luck!
additional_info: Included as an official map in Sven Co-op 4.8, beginning with Sven Co-op 4.0B. The map series resides in the Best of Map Showcase since June 9, 2007. Crystal is essentially a puzzle-themed walkthrough map of a research facility and features unique architecture as well as many custom ambient sounds. Crystal 2 is essentially an alien world with intensive fighting scenes and several jumping puzzles, all leading up to the final boss battle. At least 2 players are required in order to complete this map series.

title: CTF City
author: giselachar20
description: ------PvP City ------ A new PVP, based in Team Fortress Classic. --Capture The Flag--- Quoting: "CTF CITY is a player-versus-player (PvP) map in which two megacorporations (the Red and Blue teams) send agents to capture each other's flags while defending their own bases. The first team to reach 5 captures is victorious. Players may choose from seven distinct classes, each with unique active or passive abilities." It has all you love from warforts and has the best of TFC. Features: -Warfort style map. -Original tfc textures and flags. -CTF mode. Team-based competitive play 7 player classes with unique abilities Automatic team balance Automatic skip option if only one player is on the server Coming soon: -Original TFC weapons. -More pvp modes.

title: Cube Zero
author: Keen
description: Never really was able to properly finish this map because it always lagged horribly in my editors. maybe someone else can finish it, the idea being like the Cube movies and you appear in a cube map and have to navigate in 3-dimensions. Unfortuntely I wasn't able to do it in a proper way i tried 16 unit clip stairs, I tried using func_ladders, but with the ladders you get weird teleporting and fast movement lol. so yeah, maybe i can finish this in a few years when i have a computer thats 4x faster lol. included source files and such so you can be inspired or edit it. tldr; map very small unfinished buggy af source included yolo swag yolo :#

title: Cxx Sven-Party
author: Cxx.Liu
description: Sven-Party ~ Sven-Party ~ Version 2 This is a party map for sven co-op 10 players limited 2 Parts 4 Minigames (Not too much) I'm sorry, it still has some bugs but you can still play it Map 1 [Rock & Roll !!!] Dodge the rocks And you can select weapon to you medkit so you can see where is your character looking at [Sven Rhythm] Just like the real DDR game But add an "attack" button Don't jump, and move your mouse during the game Map 2 [Chemical Alarm] Get to the next room before the door fully close [Overstrike] 8 rooms, hide in a room before the air strike after a strike, one room will collapse so it's all about "luck"
additional_info: N/A

title: Cyberjunk
author: Xoleras
description: Description: Capture the flag map meant for 16-32 players. Notes: I worked on this map aimlessly in 2017 for fun but never released it. I figured I could easily turn it into a CTF map with little effort, since I don't have any use for it anyway. Installation: Copy the contents (Maps and WADs) to your C:/…/Sven Co-op/svencoop/ folder Completion Date: 08/2017
additional_info: N/A

title: CyberSpy
author: Fortune
release_date:
Final (remake) - October 30, 2004
Beta (remake) - October 9, 2004
Final (original) - March 22, 2003
description: In the Alaskan tundra north of Gakona, a research building known as DyMar have created and launched multiple nuclear capable satellites with the striking range of anywhere they want. Unknown to the rest of the country, and the world, the building was taken over by a band of renegade terrorists known as 'Sword', bent on nothing but the destruction of the very Earth itself. We must not let this happen… Your mission, locate two data disks to erase the base's computer's memory, and defeat Lt. Zimmern who is leading this attack.
additional_info: CyberSpy is a remake/update of PostalX. It uses new models, sounds, textures, and a nice custom skybox.

title: Cyborg Destiny: Cybernetic Darkmoon Project
author: Keen
description: Cybernetic Moon! So this map/ maps are a experiment in CLASSIFIED TOPSECRET combined with kek and facinating brain insight combined with memes and fun-ness and turrican music bless the turrican loops.
additional_info: The community recovered lost maps from the darkmoon project and old versions of cybernetic moon. Since both were connected they were fixed and merged into one map using the most up to date and complete versions. Much had to be patched up and restored, and a full fledged version was created. Merging the map names as well now this has the names of all the maps included: Cyborg Destiny: Cybernetic Darkmoon Project + Old extra info - Old extra info So this map, both maps that ive provided here, may potentially be very laggy, and very buggy, but this is the SCMDB and im going to release as many maps here until i get banned from this place too, so yolo swag yolo grab them and play them with your friends while you can! Basic differences between them: cyberneticmoon1g - includes a bit of "darkmoon" project and probly laggier, but does not have green fog. cyberneticmoon1h - might be less laggy, theres some green fog everywhere, and probly other changes. * Super Non-Finished but Cucked Map, you may have to suicide if you spawn in an area you cannot escape * both maps use some model and sound replacement files, in the impromptu res files i generated they do NOT include the downloading of custom sounds because last i checked i put way to many custom sounds in and it overloads the res files (i think the limit is 1,000??) and then it will say missing files. so yeah there will be missing files but that's partially because of me not optimizing the res files with a brain of neurons of myself AND because svencoop breaks after res files reach a certain point. I am hopeful the great Nico and/or Lossy and/or others will be able to fix my said res files, and perhaps reupload a better version than my dropbox version which will have a (Original) tag attached to the name of the download. I live on an island now and my upload is pretty poor so uploading this 7z 120mb took several hours and if its corrupt just leave a message in the comments and ill reupload it in a .zip format lol. So yeah I have INCLUDED The RMF FILES, expect this as a norm for my other upcomming maps, because unlike other people I am going to try to release as much content and media and SOURCE FILES as possible so (You) The public can fix my broken maps or upgrade them or do what ever you'd like basicly within reason etc yolo

title: Cyborg Keks Quantum Fuzziness
author: Keen, w00tguy123, nero
description: A series of tube hallways that go right left up and down, and you have vehicles to smash the monsters along the way, or your friends (oops), the terrain is difficult so there are hidden displacers to go across the vertical puzzles just in case. Find the exit and beware the scientists!
additional_info: Old message: "3 New maps using func_vehicles you can drive around and smash players and NPC's! Or just walkthrough the map without the vehicles. The bikes are concealed in the wall on the third map, quantum_fuzziness I believe. There is no proper ending for the third map, and possibly the 2nd map. If i got some positive or negative feedback i would be inspired to continue this series thanks!" -Keen

title: Cyclone
author: Banan2288
description: You've been hired to investigate the Secret Corporation complex and discover it's true purpose. Massive amount of unknown energy has been detected and tracked by World Defending Institution. If energy have anything common with Alien Collapse, the world is in true danger- corporation may attempt to open new portals to foreign worlds. The problem is those portals can be destroyed only from inside, and any life forms can successfully travel to our planet by creating micro-portals around the facility- this power cannot be controlled.
additional_info: 2-3 players recommended. 2 players required.

title: Damned Forest
author: Sence
description: Short cinematic maps. Explore a foggy forest, wake up, buy a shotgun from a resident evil merchant, shoot zombies and fall in a pit. The end.
additional_info: Author's first map.

title: Danger of Collapse Part 1
author: Silencer
release_date:
Final - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0B)
v2 - June 23, 2007
v1 - June 22, 2007
description: This complex in the Arctic is controlled by an unknown organization. Their members extorted the world's best scientists and forced them to do research on the Xen creatures here. As if that had not been fatal enough, a group of the Xen forces teleported themselves into this complex in order to free their friends. You and your team were sent here to clean up the mess. Mission Objectives: Eliminate all Xen creatures. Eliminate all members of the unknown organization. Get a copy of the research data and transfer it to your HQ. Blow up the base with its research data inside.
additional_info: It's an official map in Sven Co-op 4.0B. (NOTE: The old version of this map is called danger_of_collapse. The new version, which comes with SC 4.0 Beta 1, is called sc_doc) Players needed: 2 Players suggested: 3-8 This map will be followed by parts 2-5, which are currently in development.

title: Danger Zone
author: Element21302
description: A classic Half Life-like story.
additional_info: This is still a work in progress. First map I've made. Please leave feedback if you have time. Tell me how and where it sucks the most, not just that it sucks.

title: Dangerous Rooms
author: Jix
description: You are in a strange room and you get a simple shotgun an then you kill the aliens, you advance to the next room an the story begins… MISSION: Kill the HeadcrabMaster up at the Scientist
additional_info: This map is FINALLY released

title: Dangerous Sector
author: Jose Fung
description: In this mission, the Sven Co-op Team's mission is to investigate mysterious events, in the area you may found many enemies.
additional_info: Recommended Players: 2-8 This map has no custom models, sounds, sprites etc.

title: Danmaku
author: Jix
description: You are a in the team of the LAMBDA-2 project. Your mission is to eliminate any unknown lifeform in the surface of Black Mesa: South complex untill LAMBDA-1 project be fixed and configurated to send all Xen creatures to their motherland.
additional_info: "Danmaku" means "Bullet hell" in japanese and the term is generally used in SHMUPs, but no idea why the Mapper named this map that way. Recommendations? Bugs? post them! Released v1

title: Dark City
author: Maury147
description: Dark map with AOM and Resident Evil themes.
additional_info: This map was previously known as Evil Town "darck_city"

title: Dark Corridors
author: Alpha
description: You have been captured and put into a dastardly test. Your objective is to complete 5 floors of combat. My very first Sven Co-op map.
additional_info: Still in development, and the .map file is in the zip file included

title: Dark Crossfire
author: Valve
description: A dark version of the classic HLDM map crossfire.
additional_info: A couple of useless entities were removed, optimized a lot of areas and added the entity-based PvP mechanics (13 players at most)

title: Dark Forest
author: Halfliferyan
release_date:
Final - September 23, 2005
v2 - September 6, 2005
v1 - September 3, 2005
description: Darkforest1: You must rescue Breen from the dark forest. Note: Bring VIP Breen and make him follow you to the top of the CenCom1 teleporter located next to spawn. Its the only way to get ahead on map. Credits are located in DarkForest1_2credits.txt file in your svencoop folder. This map and everything that comes with it is for Non-Commericial use only. If you don't agree, quit this map. Delete the map and everything that came with it from your svencoop folder and off your pc. Enjoy and Have fun. Darkforest2: You defeat the Cult Army! Credits are located in DarkForest1_2credits.txt file in your svencoop folder. This map and everything that comes with it is for Non-Commericial use only. If you don't agree, quit this map. Delete the map and everything that came with it from your svencoop folder and off your pc. Enjoy and Have fun.
additional_info: https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/29219-DarkForest-Final https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/28994-Dark-forest https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/29029-DarkForestV1 https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/28577-Sc_silenthil_v2

title: Dark Frenzy
author: AlexCorruptor
description: A darker version of the classic HLDM map: Frenzy
additional_info: Optimizations, Entity-based PvP mechanics (13 players at most)

title: Dark Island
author: NIPPER
description: You arrive on a dark island in search of a lost ship. You must find it to complete your mission, and to find it, you must brave pests, Dryads, Evils, Scabs and WhereDidIComeFrom's. Speak with the island to find out where the ship is. To get to the bottom of the island, you must first go to the top.
additional_info: 6-10 players recommended. The stick with the glowy thing on the end of it is a wizard staff OK?! Use your imagination people! New areas are opened by finding artifacts or killing bosses. If a monster has more than 100 health you better make sure you kill it before you go looking for a new area.

title: Dark Nebula
author: Onox792
release_date:
v3 - November 10, 2017
v2 - October 7, 2017
v1 - October 6, 2017
description: A group of marines were hired to kill the aliens in a remote area of Black Mesa but they failed, now you and your squad are the last hope to finish the work. Your mission is simple: Clean the instalations of aliens presence completly, after the operation is done you must look for a radio to send help and prepare yourself for the rescue.
additional_info: There is a secret room in the map with a hidden switch to enable it. This is my first map, I have been working on it for a year.

title: Dark Seekers
author: goanna
description: This 2 map set is loosely based on the movie "I am Legend" with Will Smith. You and some friends find yourselves in an abandon parking lot. You just heard an announcement over the emergency broadcast system: The city is being quarantined due to the release of a virus by a research team. The virus transforms humans into bloodthirsty creatures. These creatures can no longer be exposed to light. The power to the entire city has been shut off by someone or something. You must find the warehouse then get to the maintenance room to turn the valves back on. Then get to the power station to turn the power back on to relight the city. Head for the subway and make your way along the rails to the south end of the city. Hints: Check every door, some may have good things behind them, some may have, hmm, not-so-good-things, hehe. Answer the damn phone! It will take 2 people to get in the power station yard. When you see a pod of the creatures, RUN LIKE HELL! Once the power is back on get the creatures to chase you into the street lights.
additional_info: At least 2 players required.

title: Dark Ship
author: Unknown
description: The map is dominated by a dark environment, and you need to destroy all the aliens in the lower area, find the toolbox, and retreat to the upper area kill alien queen.
additional_info: Reuniclus-579: Map created not by me!!! during svencoop 4.8, I got this map from a Halloween map pack shared by a community (the community has been disbanded for many years, in fact, this map pack was only shared for a few days before it was deleted, except for darkship, the rest of the maps in the map pack can be found on SCMapDB, well, I forgot what the other maps were) I didn't back up the original map, sorry.

title: Dark Voyage
author: Viper
description: Congradulations on your mission in Britain. The information proved quite useful in our gateway. Now we need your services again. You are most likely aware of the situation in the United States. We have certain interests in the research being done in the Black Mesa facility. We lost contact with our spies yesterday, I am not one to leave loose ends. Kill them if they are encountered. Your mission is to infiltrate the Southern Complex and retrieve all data available on ANY project related to the Llamda complex. With the country in a state of emergency you will not have to worry about American reinforcements. We have chosen you because of your reputation… failure is not an option!
additional_info: N/A

title: Darkland
author: cyberdaemon
description: Another different installment of the frontline series where you now instead fight grunts called Orks.
additional_info: Other maps in these series are: frontline, frontline-te, frontline-se

title: DAV Train
author: DAVLevels
description: The SC Team refused the G-man's job offer, and find themselves in a cargo carriage in Black Mesa Materials Transport Sector to be taken to a remote location and have their memories erased. The team must now arm themselves and fight their way through the facility and face HECU soldiers and otherworldy creatures from another dimension to escape their demise. The sector is under full lockdown, and the team must first reclaim a stolen keycard to be able to unlock the only exit of the sector, where the rescue vehicle awaits them. However, the bad guys won't make this task easy, and will do everything in their power to stop the SC Team from escaping… Will you emerge victorious?
additional_info: This campaign was an old and obscure Half-Life mod made by David Cintrao, and has been converted from decompiles and reworked for Sven Co-op with a lot of changes that hopefully will provide a fun co-op experience. Maps have been merged and a lot of enhancements to the gameplay which include more enemies, more events and secrets to unlock, with a huge boost in difficulty.

title: Dawn of the Dead Minigame
author: Raaka-arska
description: When there's no more room in Hell, the dead will walk the Earth.
additional_info: I suggest playing this map with only 5 people. That gives each person one extra life after they die. REMEMBER: Shoot the zombies in the head! TIP: Always keep running! Note: There is no ending to this map.

title: DBJR
author: Fourth Letter
description: DBJR is a rats map in a bedroom and office. Contains bed, desk + computer, bureau, closet, a ride-able paper airplane, some secrets, and many other trinkets and areas to explore and have fun with. To keep things interesting, waves of enemies periodically spawn in the bedroom. Don't worry though—you have plenty of weapons to easily take care of them.
additional_info: Gravity is set low (300). DBJR is ideal for HookMod.

title: Dead Dungeons
author: Jamesmarine
description: Dead Dungeons, released by Jamesmarine. This is a co-operative map, requiring minimum 2 players. Difficulty: Mild Enjoy
additional_info: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=39591

title: Dead Simple Neo
author: Nih
description: Story: You wake up in a mysterious room. You have no clue why you are here, but you need to get away from this place. It seems that this is some sort of cruel game that someone has prepared for you. Basically, the map is your typical run-of-the-mill arena map, but with a twist. You start the map by selecting 4 different gamemodes: Classic Gamemode: Monsters spawn in waves, and in the end you fight the boss(es). Capture Pads Gamemode: You must activate 8 beams by moving a barrel into 8 locations around the map. Each time you activate a pad, a new wave spawns. Protection Gamemode: Same as classic except you have to keep barney alive the whole time. Gonome Hunter Gamemode: You must kill 20 super gonomes to win. Each time you kill a certain amount of gonomes, a new wave spawns. There are a total of 7 waves. It has a lot of new 4.0 features, such as bodyguards, weapons, tor, rpg grunts, and various other stuff. In order to get weapons you have to press buttons that bring down platforms in the middle, but once you've done that you also allow respawning enemy medics access to the battlefield, so you have to weigh your choices carefully, and you might want to consider bringing the platforms up once you've got the guns. Once you get access to the outside area, you can pretty much ignore those weapons though. You can activate some friendly barnies by pressing two buttons in the outside area simultaneously.
additional_info: Based on a Doom 2 map. Made during internal beta testing of SC 4.0 and released 2 days after 4.0's release.

title: Dead Simple Neo 2
author: Nih
release_date:
v2 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v1 - March 13, 2010 (SC 4.5)
Beta - August 18, 2009
description: You wake up in a mysterious room, with no recollection of what brought you here. As you frantically try to comprehend your current situation, your heart pumps your body full of terror. You arrive at a horrifying conclusion: It seems that this is some sort of cruel game that someone has prepared for you. Objectives: Choose one of the 4 gamemodes and follow your objective.
additional_info: 4-8 players recommended Won 3rd place in the Sven Co-op Mapping Contest. Known bugs If a new wave starts while a babygarg is flaming, strange things will happen. The mode selection system sometimes gets a little glitchy. Appears to depend on server lag.

download_links.name: SCMapDB - .bsp Hotfix for SC 5.25. Fixes gamebreaking bug in Overload mode. Ripented - meaning it will not create version conflict.

title: Dead Zone
author: goanna
release_date:
Final - 2007
Dead Zone 4 - September 8, 2005
Dead Zone 3 - January 16, 2005
Dead Zone 2 - September 17, 2004
Dead Zone 1 - 2004
description: sc_dead_zone Mission: 1-Infultrate the secret base. 2-Destroy the monster cloning machine. Objectives: Activate first power button to activate red button to open passage. Activate red button in defence wall to activate teleporter. Activate second power button, in lower level, to activate distruct button. Kill hezus zombie soldier to destroy fence blocking exit route. Activate red button in lower level to turn on garg teleport system. Storyline: Our government, in their pursuit of the ultimate weapon of war, have built a machine for cloning monsters, specifically the babygarg. The facility is heavly guarded and protected by traps. This machine must be shut down. Watch your step! sc_dead_zone2 Mission: 1-Detroy all opposition. 2-Stop the shipping of cloned monsters. Objectives: Find key cards to advance to each section. Give babygarg scientists to play with. Blow open wall with expolsives. Find the exit out of the facility. Storyline: Housing and shipping for cloned monsters are in this facility. They are shipping the cloned monsters to form an army. Destroy all opposition and stop future shipments. sc_dead_zone3_final Mission: -Save the last two babygargs in existance.- Objectives: 1-Detroy all opposition on your way to the research lab. 2-Stop the construction of the new research lab. 3-Explosives have been set up near a wall in the research lab to gain entry into the pens housing the babygargs. The door to the detonator is locked. A scientist will open the door for allies. 3-Save the last two babygargs. Hints:(Not in fix version!) You will be able to clone one babygarg in the control room that will help you against the troops guarding the train elevator down to the next area. sc_dead_zone4_final Mission: 1-Infultrate the secret base. 2-Kill everyone in the facility. 3-Find entrance to lower level labs. 4-Rescue shocktroopers. Mission brief: You will be met with tough resistance. The base is heavily guarded by Apache helicopters. Xen is sending in troops to save the shocktroopers with the intent of creating an ally against the army of zombie grunts, but to no avail. Instead of creating an ally they find themselves fighting more than just the grunts. Once you have cleared this section of the facility procede on to the lower levels where the shocktroopers are being held. The shocktroopers are in poor health therefore they won't be much help. Once released they will aid you against the enemy the best they can. sc_dead_zone4-2_final Mission: 1-You will have to find the junction box and destroy it to open main gate. 2-Someone will have to summon the enemy Apache with the distress button. (The Apache must be summoned and destroyed in order to advance.) 3-Find a way to the lower level. 4-You will need to find security cards to open locked doors. 5-Again, kill everyone in facility. 6-In this episode you will need to find the mastermind behind the cloning machine and destroy him. Our intelligence sources tell us he has a small bunker-like room he may retreat to. Mission brief: It seems the cloning machine has advanced. They are now transforming captured Xen creatures and our security personnel into troops. The proccess isn't working perfectly however and is producing zombie-like-grunts. There is also a report that some of Black Mesa's security force is still alive and imprizoned. Try to rescue these guards they may be able to help, if they aren't too far gone. The scientists will try to kill anyone captured if the facility falls under attack, so be cautious. There have also been reports that the mastermind scientist turned his machine on himself, with equally disgusting results. There are many "failed transformations" held in cages. These creatures are very powerful and extremely dangerous so watch yourselves. Good luck!
additional_info: N/A

title: Deadline
author: Nih
description: The year is 2040. At the beginning of the 21st century, technology advanced rapidly. Soon, machines were able to supply almost every conceivable human need or want with the press of a button. The results were catastrophic. Mass unemployment ensued. People were unable to afford the goods they required. The Government eventually decided to take action. The Unemployment Act of 2037 was passed. The law sought to combat unemployment by establishing the Ministry of Job Creation. The purpose of the Ministry was to ensure a steady supply of new jobs with government salaries, so no one would be without a job. You and your fellow colleagues have been employed at the Ministry of Job Creation as Job Creators. You must create the new jobs that society requires.
additional_info: N/A

title: Deadly Floor
author: Solid Shadow
description: A simple maze, completing it will let you access the admin room Map Type: Fun Info: Map Author: Solid Shadow
additional_info: N/A

title: Deadly Race
author: FoxPlays
description: Lasers, traps and other killing things! Who is first reach the end of this merciless race? You decide!
additional_info: 5+ players recommended.

title: Deadthings
author: goanna
description: sc_deadthings Mission Objectives: 1-Infultrate "the castle of the undead". 2-Locate the 1st security card to gain access to the main vestibule. 3-Find 4 more security cards to gain access to the feeding cells. You MUST have all 4 cards before the door will open. 4-Free and protect the survivors. 5-Activate the teleporter then lead the survivors to the teleporter for extraction. 6-Go back to the outside area for extraction. Mission brief: Some renigade Umbrella Ops, US Special Forces, and a few mecenaries have found a concentration of the slime responsible for causing the dead towalk the earth. They intend to control these creatures for their own evil purposes. Reports that came in before we lost communications indicated there are several other life forms in the immediate vicinity, which we did not recognize. sc_deadthings2 Mission Objectives: 1-Find a way into the bunker. 2-Find explosives and bring to site. 3-Find key in the "caverns of the lickers". 4-Destroy ALL barrels of slime. 5-Get to the PN boat for extraction, once there people will have 90 seconds to get there before launch. Mission brief: A military-controlled transportation station for slime has been located in a remote mountain region. Your team is being sent in to shut down this operation. Destroy all vehicles and barrels of slime sc_deadthings3 Mission Objectives: 1-Take out the guards. 2-Destroy the Osprey and stop the transporting of the creatures. 3-Destroy the 4 stages of morphing creatures in the slime chamber. Mission brief: This is the last compound of slime experimentation we've detected. Here morphed creatures are being developed and transported by helicopter to an undisclosed location. Shut down the transporting system and destroy all creatures in the compound.
additional_info: N/A

title: Death
author: Killer99
description: 1. This map is kinda like the stadium map but not 2. Map is pretty plain but great fun 3. More sections will be added in time
additional_info: N/A

title: Death Mission
author: goanna
description: sc_death_mission Mission Objectives: 1-Destroy all opposition. 2-Find the teleporter computers and destroy them. 3-Find a secret room. 4-Find a way to the main portal. Mission brief: A few mecenaries have taken over a temple and an old castle and have set up portals that are teleporting in creatures from different places.Four of these portals are teleporting in skocktroopers of the X race and one to place we don't recognise. We beleive this is a form of distraction to prevent the detection of their main compound. Shut down the portal by destroying the computers that control the portals. Then find a way to their compound. sc_death_mission2 Mission Objectives: 1-Take out the tank and destroy all opposition. 2-Find the switches to open grates and a security card to access main door. You also have to find a piece of missing conduit to get the security switch working. 3-Find the buttons that control the doors containing the scientists. Lead the scientists to the teleporters. 4-In the last room the 3rd button is hidden among several buttons. Pushing each button is the only way to find the correct button. The other buttons control teleporters; wonder what teleports in? 5-There are two secret rooms containing items to find also. Mission brief: You've made it to the compound, good job. Now, there are 3 scientists being held in secret rooms. These rooms can only be found once the cell doors have been activated. Lead them back to the teleporters and put one in each unit for safe transport back. There are many traps and obsticles in your way to finding these buttons, not to mention the place is over run with assassins. sc_death_mission3 Mission Objectives: 1-Destroy all opposition. 2-Find the security card to the pump room. 3-Find a security code to the outside area door. 4-Once outside find 5 creatures and get them into cages fort transport, ALIVE. Mission brief: A new combat creature has been developed by enemy forces. In an efort to build a defence against these creatures we need live specimens. Your job is to infultrate the south end of the compound and caverns capturing at least 5 of these creatures. Use the existing cages for transport.Get them to chase you through the cages to trap them. Good Luck! sc_death_mission4 Mission Objectives: 1-Defend the bunkers. You'll have 30 seconds to reach the 1st bunker and set up a blockade before your presence is detected. 2-Search the caverns for creatures and destroy them. 3-Find and defend the south bunker. Mission brief: A horde of the new combat creatures has been detected in a different section of the compound. This horde must be destroyed. NO SURVIVORS!

title: Deathroll Puzzle
author: zaid AL-hajaya(zaid_HG)
description: You are dropped in a dark room blackout and waken up to find yourself in that room and when you get out you find yourself in a maze full of easy yet dangerous questions and puzzles you have to solve to advance. A narrator or "writer" will give you advice that you have to keep in mind in order to solve the game. You may find old friends in your way that you can (but not forced to) save or free them. Use your brain more than your guns in order to solve it. To get out of this rat hole and enjoy while doing that it's recommended for 1-3 players.
additional_info: If you try to climb over the walls you will be instantly killed. You may find secret items during game play. So keep an eye open for goodies. At start you will find a button to start the game and a texture tells you to go back it is written in Arabic.

title: Deathrun Droide
author: GuO
description: Run to the finish while another player tries to kill you with traps.
additional_info: This was downloaded in-game and may be missing files.

title: Deathrun Straight Line
author: Neo
description: A Deathrun map inspired from a mobile game for Sven Co-op (work in-progress) 2-4 Players at least 12 Players or less recommended
additional_info: Deathrun is a gamemode which is about two teams : Red Team (lets call them Killers) who uses traps and kill the other team if possible. And another team (lets call them the Runners) whom tries to stay alive and reaches the end to eliminate the other team (Killers). The Runners (Blue Team) must rush to the end while avoiding traps where they can find weapons and kill the Red Team (Killers). The Killers (Red Team) must prevent the Runners (Blue Team) from reaching the end or they will lose.

title: Death-Wish
author: AEAR
description: STORY : You Woke Up In Strange Place , Later You Will Find Out That You Has Been Trapped In Some Crazy Experiment. a place full of bloody deadly challenges and puzzles , you must beat them all and get your freedom and escape from this nightmare.
additional_info: Deathwish have alot of features like :HINTS : Multiple Endings ( 2 Endings) Secrets , Secret Ending. 2 Maps , Deathwish and Secret Map. Custom Weapons and Monsters. The Map Use "Cry Of Fear Project Weapons for sven coop" by Kerncore , R4to0 and D.N.I.O. 071 . Lobby Jumpscares Bosses Collecting Items And More… - For anyone having trouble with the third puzzle or unsure what to do: there are 6 papers on the ground, each with one letter and one number. The "???" in the hint represents a word, and the code itself is the phrase that comes after the colon. You must think of a sentence or word that needs the letter R twice and then delete one R. For example, if the answer were "no arrow", you would remove one R and enter "no arow" instead.

title: Decay
author: Gearbox Software
description: A conversion of original Half-life mod published by Gearbox Software ported to Sven Co-op. Story: Gina Cross and Colette Green arriving at the Anomalous Materials Labs at Black Mesa and reporting to Dr. Keller, who is readying the day's analysis of an unknown specimen. Despite the objections of Dr. Rosenberg to pushing the analysis equipment beyond its design capacities, Cross and Green are assigned to assist setting up the experiment for Gordon Freeman. When Freeman inserts the specimen into the scanning beam, however, it triggers a "resonance cascade", causing massive damage to the facility and teleporting alien creatures into the base. Keller and Rosenberg agree that Black Mesa cannot deal with the situation on its own, and so decide to call for military assistance. Cross and Green escort Rosenberg to the surface, where he sends a distress signal to the military. However, the military are ordered not only to contain the situation, but to silence the base by killing its employees. Rosenberg elects to stay behind to meet with the military on arrival and Cross and Green return to Keller. Once reunited with Keller, Cross and Green work to seal the dimensional tear to stop the invasion. The military arrive and try to remove all personnel as well as the alien force. After resetting key equipment to prevent a second dimensional rift, the two are tasked with preparing a satellite for launch. The satellite, which is launched by Freeman in Half-Life, is used in tandem with ground-based equipment to significantly weaken the effects of the resonance cascade. Keller tasks Cross and Green with activating this set of prototype equipment, a displacement beacon, which through the satellite may be able to seal the dimensional rift. However, after activating the beacon, both characters are caught up in a "harmonic reflux", a distortion caused by the rift. Despite this, Cross and Green are able to return safely and Keller congratulates them on their success. Bonus Chapter: The unlockable vortigaunt mission provides background information explaining how the orange crystals used by the rift-sealing machine in Half Life: Decay are acquired and used by the Nihilanth during the final boss battle in Half Life. The two player-controlled vortigaunts battle through Marines and Black Ops in the underground Black Mesa complex to find the orange crystals in the back of a military van. At this point the screen fades and the mission is declared a success; it is presumed that the Nihilanth warps them back to Xen and installs the crystals in his cave.

additional_info: The objective is to defend your base against 30 waves of random enemies. The difficulty increases every 3 waves, and your weapons are upgraded every 8 waves. Your entire base is destructible. If your Barracks is destroyed, you lose. Structures to protect: Guard towers: These spawn friendly snipers. Base wall: Your primary defensive structure. Enemies will have a clear shot at your Barracks without this. Research Lab: You can schedule the following upgrades here: turret defenses, health regeneration, a special weapon, and a friendly tor. Factory: Spawns friendly NPCs

This is to prevent levels restarting to keep gameplay fair and not frustrating. This can be disabled in script by changing Line 7 to "false". title: Delta Research Facility
author: The-Real-Game (Gareth P)
description: Delta Research Facility By The-Real-Game Gman: Greetings Gentlemen, you will now find yourself located at the Delta Research Facility. The Delta Research Facility has been one of my biggest competitors for a long time now. However after I found out they had spies in my company I decided to take action. However the previous team I sent in were ill prepared and never returned. I however have more faith in you, I must warn you the creatures are much stronger than we first thought. Intense research has lead to improvement of the creatures strength and stamina. Meaning they pose a significant threat to you and my companies future. You have been hired because, as you are former Black Mesa employees I believe you will have much more experience with these creatures, in light of this I know you will stand a better chance against them. Firstly you must get into the facility, I believe there is an entrance up ahead. Secondly one in the base you must make sure the facility won't be doing any research for along time, destroy the main equipment and eliminate all employees and creatures. Lastly I will need to obtain the precious data they are holding, use their satellite to transmit it to me. If you are successful you will receive your payment and be offered a full contract with my company. That is all….
additional_info: Delta Research Facility (deltaR) Notes: By Gareth P (The-Real-Game) moc.liamtoh|ku_emaglaereht#moc.liamtoh|ku_emaglaereht www.geocities.com/therealgame_uk Compile Time : 50 Minutes *Hugs Pc* :D 1. Unzip to your Half-Life folder 2. Type Map deltar in your svencoop console IMPORTANT: You may not in ANYWAY alter or use this map as a base for any other maps. This map is the sole property of me! This map must not be distributed for money or trade. You may however freely distribute this map in it's current form.

title: Delta Return
author: The-Real-Game
description: It's been five long years since the Delta Research Facility incident, in which you obliterated the original facility. We had yet to hear anymore from the facility until now. As you will know a few days ago there was a security breach at our research plant, in which one of the leaders of our main *Classified* project was abducted. Well we've now traced the abductors, it appears they're from the Delta Research Facility. It seems the facility has now been rebuilt; they have received funding from an unknown source, which we are in the process of tracking down. Your mission is to infiltrate the facility once again and rescue our project leader. Be warned that the base is strongly guarded by soldiers and a variety of other creatures.
additional_info: Ranked #31 in the CreepsWorld Top50 maps list. Included in the CreepsWorld Map Pack.
