description: You are a mine worker and have to work your way through the mine.
additional_info: otokotati_no_kouzan Uboa City no asu wo hore!! yume wo … kibou wo … ato, anal ha horuna. - Dig up rocks for hope of Uboa City!! …(^^;) by takedeppo.50cal

title: Outer Space Kek
author: Keen
description: A small outer space map where you fight cyborg zombies until you find the Finish Portal. Sorry about the lag at spawn, it seems worse in 5.0 or from a recent update. lol.
additional_info: Roman and all the others will add more info after i get some sleep

title: Outjail
author: matman
description: OMGZ! These guards are on the crooked side. You are local people who joined a group to get rid of these bad jail guards. Your job is to kill the head guard by killing all the snipers first. Tips: Use the fence and the weight set to take cover. There are no medkits, so use other players for health.
additional_info: matman feels this is an improvement over his previous maps.

title: Outpost 1-2
author: DaKinG
release_date:
sc_outpost 1+2 v2 FINAL - February 20, 2003
sc_outpost 1+2 v2 - February 13, 2003
sc_outpost "final" - December 9, 2002
infiltration beta1 - August 22, 2002
description: Hello. Current Location: Black mesa west Outpost and near storage Sector E. This Black mesa Outpost have been taken under military control. Our mission is to secure the hostages who are in one of the top secret labs in this sector. The hostages have information which is very valuable for us. If we are lucky the marines have not spotted them yet. Good luck. Over And Out!!! Objectives: Secure the area. Locate Luther and Einstein.
additional_info: N/A

title: Outpost 3
author: DaKing
description: This map features a very open-ended layout, in which the players are able to complete their objectives in any order they want, and approach it from any side they want. MOTD: Howdy soldier sir. Current Location: A mercinary camp close to Black Mesa research facility. Infiltrate the mercinary camp and try to find out what the heck they are doing in there, by hack there computer. Destroy the antiair gun so we will be able to make an airstrike. Also try to destroy the tank in the garage , ure escape route will be the sewer way. Good luck. Over And Out!!! Objectives: Disable the anti air gun. Destroy the Tank. Hack the computer and steal information. Escape throug the sewer.
additional_info: Node graph generation on this map takes a while. If the map appears to freeze after loading just wait. http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=14962

title: Overrun
author: Nih
description: Protect Otis against hordes of evil zombies who respawn in the air. If he dies, you lose. If the time runs out, you win. Tips: Activate the sentry guns by touching them or shooting them. Use the radio on the ground to hear music.
additional_info: At least 4 players recommended.

title: Oxycontinent Cybernetic Colony
author: Keen, Turrican
description: Invade the Cybernetic Colony of the Oxycontinent, where crystals are being harvested. Get your pickaxe and gather those crystals! Power up the final teleport to end the map. Beware of the crystal protectors…
additional_info: Originally these were a series of maps or just one map called Oxycontin Beta Carotene (OxyBetaC), but they were lost to time and we only had these. Probably also Oxycontinent and Cybernetic Colony were different series of maps, but I have merged them because they were too similar. Oxycontinent is from 2009 with some rooms by Turrican, and Cybernetic Colony is from 2015 all from Keen.

title: Ozku General Discussion
author: Ozku
description: Forum-themed walkthrough with some neat events.
additional_info: This map had no ending. Also a texture was missing, and the map cfg. (all fixed now) NOTE: Apparently this was sc_forums 2007 community map submission part from the mapper Ozku. Probably he expanded on it and released it as a standalone map since sc_forums commap never saw the light of day.

title: Pack Animals
author: BurnOut64
description: In this level, you fight houndeyes for points. Story kind of thing: There was a houndeye outbreak from who knows where, and the military was sent to contain them. After compleating the Gman's first task (Sven Coop1 and 2) he sends you in as a last effort. Other info: You can see where a grunt was climing down a rope but it broke and he fell and went crunch. A grunt set off a grenade in the building and the ceiling kinda calapsed (sorry about no decal mark…). The military set up a temporary tent, and they where going to put up a gun, but they had no time (actually, I had no time to make one, lol). The military dudes could not escape, because the aliens blocked the tunnel. Save the scientist, don't let him get gibbed! Other other stuff: If you look closely, you can see behind the web and blockade. Known bugs: The scientist does not activate the retinal scanner. This is because I don't know how to make one, and I don't want to go look :-P. (It's not THAT important) You may get stuck in angled brush intersections, but I ruduced this by probly 70% useing clip brushes. This is not known, but there may be places where you can see through the walls. Part of the map dissapears when you are on one side, you'll see. Technical: Only I can acsses the 4 secrets in this small map! Muahahahah! Notice that there is room for 4 ropes on the temporary military ledge but there are only 3 coming down? (Secret #1) The 4 or so monster makers have about a 30 monster limit. Tips: Don't camp at the grenades, I've warned you! Don't use cheats to get the RPG, I've warned you! Remember the story where the guy's wings melt if he flew too high? I've warned you! Use my name, not the signs. Hope you join a server with me playing on it. I'm better than you. :-) You can break the ruble to let the sci get to the scanner. (This is so the houndeyes don't go into the respawn area, but the sci can…) You can't gauss jump, but you probly won't even find it, muahahahah! :-) Um… Other other other stuff: This map looks ALOT like NightMare!!! I didn't relize it 'til a playtester mensioned it… Sorry for unoriginality, it was unintensional! :-) Monkey: I'm just seeing if your paying atention… Jerry Springer's final thought: Why did you read all the way down here? Sorry if this was too long… I love to write. :-)
additional_info: Map: "Pack Animals" Author: BurnOut64 (moc.lartneC-efiLflaH|46tuOnruB#moc.lartneC-efiLflaH|46tuOnruB) Previous maps: None! This is the first map I've actually finished!!! (I've started lots and I've got 100's of saved RMFs in the WC21 directory. Muahahahah! Time to make: Uh… 3 or more days, I loss track of time alot Compile time: Uh… Few minetes? Base: Scratch Level building thingy: WorldCraft 2.1

title: Pacman
author: Navy Seal
description: Run the fuck away from the giant monsters with giant sharp teeth, try to kill them
additional_info: Map based on the game pacman with monsters and teleporter is include.

title: Pacman (Re-Edit)
author: electro
description: Don't let Pacman caught and kill us. Collect all the coins then pick up the weapons so we can kill all the Pacmans.
additional_info: N/A

title: Palladium
author: rohtuax
description: A small horde map Voltigore only, This means were in the cube. it's in the Voltigore zone room behind the Gargantua button. Then, there is a safe room if has to be an AFK (Away from the Keyboard).
additional_info: N/A

title: Para 1
author: SWH Prod
description: Creator- [SWH]Prod E-mail- swh_prod [at] hotmail.com Para1.bsp is my first co-op map (and singleplayer). Known issues: -Occasionally the V22's wings will clip through the canyon walls. -The heavy machineguns won't stop firing (this was done on purpose, I put it here to warn you.) -The V22 won't level out on runway and will be banked if it is reversed to start place. -Canyon walls have HUGE pixels. This was done to increase framerates and decrease lag. -Canyon walls don't have the best joints. (Hey, nobody's perfect.) :) -Not all the intended runway markings show, but it still looks ok. I believe this is a bug with the HL engine. -V22 doesn't have any sound and propellers don't rotate. (Have you ever tried to make ambient_generics float around with a plane?) Map Constrution info: -Map made on World Craft 2.1 -Compile time- 1-2 minutes -Compile computer- 350 MHz PII, 64 MB RAM, VooDoo3 2000 -Construction time- 10-12 hours spanned over 1 week. First I tried making my own plane, but it was buggy so I downloaded the V22 prefab from the Black Mesa Air Force site at http://www.planethalflife.com/bmaf
additional_info: Map Title: Para 1 BSP Name: para1 (21/06/00) Archive Name: sc_para1.7z Additional Textures: mig.wad Map Type: Horde Map hints: -The plane's throttle control is at the very front of the cockpit. Walk IN BETWEEN THE CHAIRS AND ONTO THE CONSOLE AND HIT USE TO ACTIVATE THE PLANE. -The pool below the spawn area is to fall into so you don't take falling damage if you can't go on the plane. -When in the plane at high altitude stay away from doors and windows so you don't take heavy mgun fire. -The heavy mguns are remotely operated and have unpenetrable armor so just dodge their bullets. -Don't hang around the back of the plane or you'll take falling damage during the nose dive. -On the low pass you can jump out. It's a good idea because if you wait for the plane to stop on the runway then you'll take heavy mgun fire, and probably AR grenades. If you go during the low pass, you only have to worry about alien grunts (until the humans get there). -If you wait for the plane to stop on the runway, stay away from the cabin as AR grenades fly in. -Try not to fall out of the plane at high altitude or the fall will kill you. -Stop the plane at high altitude to snipe and lob grenades while taking minimal fire. -Don't be cruel by leaving all your teammates to jump in the pool while you take the plane fo yourself. Not only will they get cut down by the heavy mguns, but you'll die very quickly. -NEVER LET EVERYONE DIE IN THE PLANE WHERE IT IS NOT ACCESSIBLE. If you're low on health, go to the cockpit and get the plane to move in either direction. If the plane is stuck in midair where no one can get it, you might as well restart the map.

title: Party
author: Hezus
description: Where does BMRF Staff go when they are finished researching ? Where does Barney go when he's buying someone the beer he promised ? The BRMF Club ! Lights, flashes, a DJ table and of course a bar with beer. This map ran on some servers to celebrate the 2.0Beta release. Not a serious attempt on a map but fun for the whole family.
additional_info: Followed by Party 2.

title: Party 2
author: Hezus
description: Party 2 is the sequel to the popular Party map. This map was created to celebrate Hezus' 18th birthday. The general theme is the same as the old Party map but in a new setting. This time you can walk around on the streets outside and there are 2 places you can hang around. There is the bar where Otis serves the drinks and of course there is the big disco with the lights, the beats and the tunes.
additional_info: Preceded by Party. Followed by Party 3.

title: Party 3
author: Hezus
description: Hezus' birthday map for 2004, his 20th birthday. This club offers DJ table with many sounds and presets to mix around with, and LJ (lightjockey) table with many different lights to use, full light programs, neon lighting and a stroboscoop. And of course a good time for all guests who can listen and dance around on the DJ's tunes and the LJ's lights, sit at the bar drinking a beer, or chill out on the upstairs area. The DJ and the LJ both have some stuff to play with. The DJ has : Looped-parts from REAL tracks Sample sounds to mix his own track 6 different beats to mix with 6 different melodies to play with 6 different voices to mix through The LJ has : Ability to turn on Neon Lighting Stroboscope Green spread-laser Single control of every normal disco light 3 different types of programmed disco lights Enjoy your stay ;)
additional_info: Preceded by Party 2.

title: Payload City
author: giselachar20
description: ------Payload City ------ A new PVP, based in Payload Mode from Team Fortress 2 --Payload Mode--- Quoting: "Payload is a game mode in which the BLU team must escort a cart, usually full of explosives, through a series of checkpoints and into the RED team's base within a certain amount of time. Players may choose from eight distinct classes, each with unique active or passive abilities." It has all you love from warforts and has the best of TF2. Features: -Warfort style map. -New Medic Class with Ubercharge from Medic TF2. -Automatic Halloween Mode (includes Merasmus and the wheel of fate) -Original tfc textures and flags. -Payload mode. Team-based competitive play 8 player classes with unique abilities Automatic team balance Automatic skip option if only one player is on the server
additional_info: Medic class: -Medigun with ubercharge. -Medic restores own health by 2-3hp per sec.

title: Peaces Like Us
author: Original author: Koumei Satou. Conversion: kmkz
description: This is a conversion of "Half-life: Peaces like us" to Sven Co-op made with ripent tools. Tried to remain accurate to the original mod but with needed modifications to support coop gameplay. Story: Mankind found an entrance to XEN world and an investigation team met with the uncanny aliens in there world. Then, mankind succeeded in becoming allies with them. Later, a scientist team built a joint laboratory in the world of XEN. But, something bad was approaching… If you want to report a bug please give details of the problem you found, so there is a bigger chance to solve it, and faster. Avoid making reports based only on the W00tguy repacker. Is common to have there false positives and things that does not affect the game and i have noticed that people is posting these reports without caring if there is a real problem. Fix trolling not allowed: there is a group of users that since they are unwilling to take the effort and time to make their own maps instead they mess with other people work adding their custom versions disguised as "fixes", trying in a display of arrogance to impose their own map preferences just to feel they are doing a contribution to the Sven Co-op community. To them i say if you really want to support the community leave other authors in peace and make your own maps. Current version: v2.0
additional_info: The first map is hlplu_1. The tutorial map is included, is hlplu_t.

title: Peany World
author: Keen , Turrican
description: Keen asked Peany if he could make a official 'Peany's Cafe' server map. She said yes, and thus an epic work began. It simply started as a map with one objective: unlocking Peany's sign. Over time the project turned into a much more elaborate map series with multiple goals to be completed by players. Players assist Keen, Peany, Turrican and Kain by helping them carry out various tasks, travelling through a grid/computer place, lots of snow-covered areas, Turrican's laboratory, ladder puzzles, and much, much more.
additional_info: Two players are required to play these maps. More maps in the series exist. There have been plans to convert the series into 'Sven Co-op World' instead of 'Peany World', although it is unknown if or when this will occur. The plot of 'Sven Co-op World' would focus on players assisting the developers of Sven Co-op in fighting a war. This statement above no longer has any meaning or value because it has been done! The community has recovered lost maps from these series and merged them into playable sequels. Peanyworld 2 is now added making this a 5 part map series (1-1, 1-2, 2-1a, 2-1b, 2-2). You are under attack by an unknown force, made up of "blockers" and the snow test creatures have fled their cages, also teleporting around. Created as a sort of prequel to resistance

title: Penis Island
author: sprt
description: Wackiest 5 minute map ever.
additional_info: Plays best with amx_fire

title: Penis Island 2: Gullivers Adventure
author: sprt
description: The sequel to the critically acclaimed, and genre defining map.
additional_info: Now with even more penis!

title: Persia
author: Skacky
description: 24 hours ago, we received a transmission from an Arabic TV channel. Terrorists said that they have a huge fire power and they will attack a great city in the next 48 hours. A squad has been sent to the presumed place of the terrorist's HQ, but we have lost communications for 2 hours. Spies said that the squad managed to place explosives on the great fire power, and told us that this power is a huge mecha with 2 turrets, 2 miniguns and an anti-air missile battery. The explosives are quite dangerous, so the terrorists didn't defuse it. You were sent with your team for make a big boom and destroy this damn war machine. Remember, if you fail, a great city will be destroyed! Mission: Make your way through the streets, and reach the radiopost held by the terrorists. Steal all the secret documents of the terrorist engineers to stop the creation of the weapons. Open the door of the fortress's entrance. Enter the fortress and make your way to the mecha. Press the detonator and RUN !!
additional_info: It's an official map in Sven Co-op 4.0B. At least 2 players required. Currently resides in the Best of Map Showcase.

title: Phantasmish
author: Fourth Letter
description: Phantasmish attempts to capture the feeling of Phantasm, a Duke Nukem 3D usermap which uses many tricks that seem to be physically impossible. The gameplay is partly inspired by Metroid Prime. Most of the world is available initially with more areas available as items are retrieved.
additional_info: Phantasmish received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums. Slower computers may have trouble running this map due to high r_speeds. A map review can be found at here at Sven Co-op Central.

title: Phbeta1
author: Keen
description: This is one of my first maps
additional_info: N/A

title: Phobia
author: crash
description: This level takes place on Xen. Near the beginning area, there are 5 yellow crystals that must be destroyed before you can move on. You will need the Long Jump module on the lowest platform to reach the platform with the bounce pad. Using the bounce pad you will be able to reach the highest platform where the biggest crystal resides, the others are within easy reach.
additional_info: HINT You will need to long jump right before you hit the bounce pad to be able to make it onto the high platform. crash's second released map.

title: Phobos IV
author: Pavel Koten
description: The year is 2136. The planet is under the effect of a deadly virus. Many people die every day, but there is hope. There exists the only cure in the space station Phobos IV, however the base is overrun with extra-terrestrials and security systems have gone rogue. As the only remaining survivors of this catastrophe, you must find and hack the virus database and retrieve the cure, however you are not alone, and something awakens in the deep… Find the cure, and save humanity from an ill fate.

title: Phoenix Walker
author: Keen
description: Kind of a puzzly map.
additional_info: This is a ripent version with a game_end added after the bowling ball.

title: Picclub
author: Piccolo
description: Hi all… This is my first Sven-Coop map. Have fun, Piccolo
additional_info: N/A

title: Pink
author: Robootto
description: Bright and colorful walkthrough with no ending.
additional_info: N/A

title: Pizza ya san
author: takedeppo.50cal
description: "Pizza ya san" means pizza shop. You are a employee of the pizza shop. Make delicious pizza and delivery it for orders!! … Working at pizza shop must be very risky attempt. (<@><@>;) Good luck. ….(^^;)b yay
additional_info: Community-made Spanish translated version of the map available at http://scmapdb.com/local--files/map:pizza-ya-san/pizza_ya_san_es.zip *Questions: Q. Why pizza shop? A. Do not think, feel it. Q. Is this Japanese map? A. Do not think, feel it. Q. Translation is so s*ck. strange! A. Do not think, feel it. Q. What is UBOA? A. Do not think( … Q. What should we do in this map? A. Do not( … Q. Who made this map? A. D( … Q. I found bugs/glitches. A. Do not think, do not feel, just inform me plz. Q. How much is a pizza in Japan? A. Around $20-40 (￥1980-3980). Q. Okay, I just play without saying anything. A. Good. ….(^^;)b yay

title: Planet 3c
description: [C:\Entering Inter-Planetary Communications v.1.03 Loading … Load Successful ] I have to do the whole Space Travel thing quite regularly and, as you know, the novelty soon wore off. However, I've never been on a trip outside of our Solar System before and to tell the truth I'm quite excited about this trip ! We're staying in one of the best Hotels Colony3c has to offer. It's in the very heart of the Uptown District which means we have access to Colony3c's finest and famous entertainment. Once this whole deal with Kami-Tech is over, i'm looking forward to some top quality relaxation. The view from my window is absolutely stunning: A vast City with large mountains as its backdrop. Colony3c is almost constantly in a twighlight state during the day and then when night falls all the stars come out. The sheer volume of stars is very impressive and they all glow very clearly due to the effective Air Pollution control. I hear some Asteroids will be passing the planet soon and they will just skim the Atmosphere, creating an amazing light show. Hopefully we'll be here long enough to see it. Anyway, I had better sign off for now. I need to get some good sleep in before the meeting tomorrow. I wish you and the kids could have come with me, but I know how you feel about Space Travel. You don't know what you're missing though ! I'll bring back some good photos. See you in a week… [Command Send id:7683|7300 … Send Successful Closing ]
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic. Prequel to Colony X.

title: Platformatic
author: ^DiZnEy^
description: An evil scientist has captured you and puts you in a large room with plats. He tries to sink you down to the toxic by lowering the plats you jump on. Tho, the system is weak for the moment, and the plats may take time before reacting to the evil scientist`s controlls. Now you are about to get slaughtered in the toxic toghetter with the aliens the evil scientist dumped in with you. The game lasts 5 minutes. After that, a flashing ladder will appear which leads you to the scientist. The map ends after the scientist died. Enjoy! Hope you like it! :)
additional_info: N/A

title: Platforms
author: Half-Life Dev
description: Enter the reactor room, where you'll find 64 platforms, each displaying the image of one of the four scientists. A screen will indicate which platform will remain, challenging you to position yourself correctly before the others disappear. Survive through the 6 stages as the speed increases. The map is for 2 to 32 players
additional_info: Subscribe to my YouTube channel

title: Platoon
author: Garompa
description: The Sven Co-op Institute has been hunting down the whereabouts of this so called G-Man as he creates a ton of problems in his wake. His last objective seems to be the Black Mesa Research Facility. Because he is an expert of escape, to catch him, you will go in undercover as a Black Mesa scientist, corner the target and eliminate him. Our hackers and soldiers will create distractions and lure the target to the designated trap we have set for him. You must dispose of him and stop whatever his plans are. He has probably sabotaged the latest big experiment and you will need to also put a stop to that after his quick dispatch.
additional_info: This is a heavily ripented and adapted conversion of the Half-Life mod Platoon (found on Moddb and was created as a prequel to military-duty. 31 maps have been reduced to 5, with lots of bosses, minibosses and other goodies.

title: Player Sanctuary
author: SV BOY
description: Welcome to the Playermodel Sanctuary (AKA Digital Playermodel Sanctuary, DPS, if you're a nerd) Here you can either rest and wait for other players or inspect yourself from all the angles and options to test player animations or conditions The map is best recomended around 1-8 players, you can probably easily break if multiple people try to use the menu. You either test playermodel shit or wait & chill. The map was designed for singleplayer use Dont mind the Gabumon, there has to be some overwatch. What do: SFX\Music - 8 Different tracks to choose from, with Ambience and Volume options, some of them activate special effects Dedicated Barnacle Room - He's lonely, but at least he's in a pretty place (barnacle animations) All weapons available - including Minigun and Shock Roach (weapon animations) A backpack and a crown to check model attachements to models Customize the sanctuary - Toggle objects, pose at mirrors, disable teleporters, spin on the platform, adjust the lighting etc. Check all of the player angles thru whole bunch of cameras, check if they float when crouched and so on. A whole dedicated island to check water animations. Digitally exotic! You can check if the cheeky playermodels that hide stuff depending on the animation under the island. Different sound effects, beep boop. Lots of stuff to mess with, doubles down as a lobby map, in a way! You can toggle text help in-game to check what different camera buttons do, but generally Mouse 1 to select things, Mouse 3 to leave Camera and Hold R to hide things.
additional_info: Start the sanctuary by pressing the blue glowing button! Problems: I will probably might or might not fix them, theyre not map breaking and you can still do your playermodel stuff but keep in mind: Due to trigger_camera not having custom FOV option, some cameras might look odd depending on your fov. Recomended FOV for this map is between 70-95. You cannot leave the camera menu by pressing Mouse3, reason being if you select between cameras you technically join one and leave another, which triggers two things, which would trigger the "hide" and "show" cameras options; cant be bothered to make logic around that. Lots of invisible buttons! You may bump into these with thirdperson on. You might need to enable Raw Mouse Input in your mouse settings (or alternatively ‘m_rawinput 1` in console) if your mouse doesn’t work when using cameras Minigun is a bitch, so you cannot give it rapidly on demand. Mirrors are still fucked - Remapping, chrome and interpolation (not a problem locally) are not a thing on mirrors. You can fix the remapping and chrome by either turning on gabumon or if you dont want gabumon, just chuck a satchel somewhere in the lab, that will do it. Mirrors 3 and 4 might cause performance problems on lower end hardware, especially 4th mirror Menu navigation on multiplayer sucks, you either have to double click sometimes or click multiple times to click on something, especially cameras Probably other imperfections that ive forgot but might piss me off later.

title: Player Tower
author: L3gion
description: This is a very simple map, the only thing the players need to do is that to "climb" onto each other's head and reach the opened window.
additional_info: This map needs a big amount of players.

title: Pointless
author: TheBard
description: Blah blah blah This map is pointless don't complain it's POINTLESS Live or Die, Mr Useless is useless, Run for the chopper, fooled you, lights, blue squares & Scientist having fun ! ! !
additional_info: After last years disapointing 1 map release, i'm back on track for more maps this year. Only 6 weeks in and the first ones out its a puzzle/fun map with a good dose of wacky thrown in. Use's a number of the new entitys

title: Poke646 / Poke646: Vendetta Co-op
author: Mindmotor Studios, Zorbos
release_date:
Community fix release by R4to0 - January 8, 2020
1.3 - April 15, 2017
1.2b - September 22, 2016
1.1b - September 20, 2016
1.0b - September 17, 2016

title: Polar Rescue
author: AdamR
description: A gang of illegal arms dealers have taken a 5 man team of the world’s finest nuclear specialists hostage to a hideout of theirs in Antarctica. Your Sven Co-op team has been selected specially to rescue them. Knowing the captives well they are likely to refuse working with terrorists or similar even under torture, we have learned that the gang will kill them when they find out they have no use for them. Stealth is the key in this mission. A guard activating an alarm will massively impair your status. The gang have also constructed several mini nuclear rockets that are currently being stored in the same hideout. Disable any nuclear equipment on the premises to put a stop on further production. Be sure to pick up any documents. They will tell us what this gang intends on doing in the near future. You will have to get in secured storage areas to find them. 2 elite soldiers have already been dispatched to the area. Hopefully they will be able to reach you and assist you in your mission, though don't hold your breath for their arrival. An Osprey helicopter will arrive to extract your team and the hostages once all your objectives are completed and the insertion point is clear. Use a radio to call for the Osprey once your mission is completed. Your objectives are: Rescue all hostages before they are executed Disarm all nuclear weapons Collect all secret documents Clear the insertion point for extraction Radio for an extraction Osprey once you have all hostages in a safe area (radio room) Rescuing the 5 hostages is your absolute top priority, and you only have 20 minutes before the gang executes them! Failure will denote your redundancy to our elite force — and nobody leaves us, alive.

title: Pool Day
author: K3nshiro
description: Its a port of the cs fy_pool_day map for Sven Coop. I was learning mapping so I started from here. You have to kill all CT and plant the bomb to win. Any questions or feedback are welcome!
additional_info: N/A

title: Poolarea
author: Robootto
description: Big indoor swimming-bath, one long pool in main swimming hall, and one big pool in special led swimming pool area.
additional_info: 2 secrets at the beginning

title: Portal House
author: WAR-chorius
description: I started with this project from 2014 … based on the most played half life mods, you will see the new improvements of the portal house maps and videos. New enemies, new maps, new weapons and new maps available. Any bugs or game bugs … please report in the comments. Your ideas are welcome I thank and credit the following users: - Toxagen (Residual point) - Andrea "Toadman" (Azure Sheep & Point of View) - Koumei Satou & kmkz (Sweet Half life) - Sirkite (Star wars weapons) - Nero0 (Custom NPC Female assassin) - Zorbos (Sven Coop - Poke 646) - S@bre (Skin Special Forces - gamebanana.com) - DeathBog (map Mega monster masacre) - Garompa & BlueSpark (Traduccion)

title: Portal House Remastered
author: Garompa
description: After the events of A Soldier's Tale the Sven Co-op team sent a nuke through the big Race X portal to shut it down with the help of MarphyBlack's squad. Part of the explosion came back through the portal and there were no survivors. Whats worse is that the explosion created a reaction with the portal, disrupting space around it, capturing the ruins of Gamma labs and the sorrounding sectors into a harmonic reflux. The entire area is now shifting in and out of Xen, and the team is rescued by Luther Johnson's portal device. There is no time to escape the reflux before the area is sent to Xen forever so you must join everyone on a race towards Sector D of Gamma labs where the scientists have set up a working Portal House device to get back to Earth. But it won't be easy.
additional_info: The Portal House map series had a lot of problems, and many servers avoided installing it for several reasons. I wanted to remedy that because it was enjoyable to most people. So I remastered the whole thing. On top of huge amounts of bug fixes, and file organization, the old story which had default dialogue lines that made no sense at all is now a proper full fledged chapter with sense, themed around the post-Decay events that we never knew: the fates of Keller, Gina and Colette. Join them in this revamped adventure. NOTE: I didn't bother to properly translate the motd text files much, but anyway nobody reads them

title: Porton
author: Nitro Roar
description: You do not remember who you are and therefore you do not know where you are, but you are not alone because you have allies with whom you will make your way through anything you find in front of you, alongside some turrets and a friendly robot. Try to escape from this place, by completing small quests and activating gates, until you reach the final small battle. It's my first map have mercy
additional_info: A simple map. It does not have any custom files. No thought was given to the limited player capacity.

title: Postal X
author: Fortune
description: Map Type: Walkthrough The Story We know you can do this… Have you ever heard of the Program called Postal? Called this after its creator, who had worked for a Postal Company Died. Able to unlock any codes set up any computerized software in the world, its one tricky device… And now its fallen into the wronge hands. It was being sent over by boat, so the UN could review such a force as Postal. About two hours after it set sail, the ship was attacked… We belive the Disk and the last living creator of the disk have been taking to a remote base 20 miles inland of GreenLand. You must get the disk back. ----— --—— Your Mission… First, enter the HQ and bypass any of the enemies. Pictures of the base show the system was shut down by the cold, many of the doors will be sealed off. If their locked, work around it. A Chopper has been seen landing on the base. We belive they are planning to sell the disk, you must stop this.
additional_info: Postal - Kill Kill Kill By Fortune (moc.onuj|88frb#moc.onuj|88frb) A.K.A. Ben Finn Installing… Put all Map files in your maps folder, such as .cfg's .res's .bsp Put all sound files into your sound/ambience Folder And put the IceStorm.wad into the normal SvenCoop folder.

title: Pouet
author: regissounet
description: Kill them all :-)
additional_info: Title : Pouet Author : regis Date : 01/17/2006 Filename : pouet.bsp Email Address : moc.pi-on.siger|siger#moc.pi-on.siger|siger Description : Kill them all :-) *Construction* Base : New level Editor used : Worldcraft 3.4 Build time : Two or three weeks Known bugs : None Compile time : 20min on a Athlon XP 3200+ system Notes : If you are stuck after killing Gargantua, you need to push the two button on each side of the guard tower at the same time to open the red door. Access code is further this way.

title: POW in the Year 3910
author: Necromancer
description: Prisoner of War in the Year 3910 by Necromancer Can you escape the Iridium Fortress?… You are part of the classified military elite known as Redemption 1. After a failed high priority mission (someone must have sneaked information) you awaken to find yourself a prisoner of war in a uber high-tech maximum security facility. Your captors have some of the most advanced technologies and equipment that money can buy, so expect heavy and high-tech resistance. It is suspected back home that you have been KIA. However, your best friend strongly believes that you are still alive. He has appealed to the government to send a task force to rescue you but to no avail. Your friend persists that you have been taken to the "Iridium Fortress." But no one believes him though. The government simply tells him that you have been KIA and dismisses the Fortress immediately. Does the government know something…or is it scared to attack the Fortress…or maybe it just doesn't believe him? Despite his own family trying to console him he still believes you have been locked up and are being tortured in the Iridium Fortress. So, one night he decides to help you. It is still a mystery as to how he got inside the Iridium Fortress's ventilation system, or even how he got into the Fortress itself, but nevertheless he is above your cell and is trying to help you make the escape that no one has ever successfully accomplished. He advises you to find an armory with some better weaponry, but he brought what he could from home…his prize weapon given to him as a reward for his last mission. *He warns you that it is not the most powerful weapon, so you should replace it as soon as you can.* Good luck! Note about hacking: When hacking a hackable turret you have a 50% chance for success. A successful hack will yield an ally turret. However, a failed hack will inflict an electrical shock. (The turret will be inoperable; neither ally nor enemy since the circuitry is destroyed in a failed hack).
additional_info: Ripented to trigger a game_end after a minute in the ending room.

title: Power Node Complex Infiltration
author: c00leyo
description: You are the team IBR infiltration, sent on an operation to destroy illegal weapons contraband powernode within the complex.
additional_info: Included in the Classic Map Pack

title: Preperation X
author: Alex Roycewicz
description: You have been sent from the government training facility in Washington D.C. to train your skills in a live fire exercise with your team members. Little do you know that the government is planning a far bigger training operation than you were informed of. So you enter only with your wits and the weapons they have provided you with. Make it out alive and show them that you can defeat any challenge. The map starts out in the laboratories which you have just arrived in via teleportation. You have to run all the way through it to get to the outside of the complex. Once outside, you have to run through a maze filled with enemies. Finally, after exiting the maze, you are in a neighborhood that consists of houses, buildings, and many enemies (and a helicopter). You escape through a tunnel and the map is finally over. Tips: Watch out for the giant fish! They have a tendency to swim through to the other tank! Try to surprise the grunts! Don't just go head on into them! Use teammates for help! This is a co-op map!
additional_info: This is an extremely difficult map. At least 6-20 players recommended. You can do it with less if you use stealth techniques. Map included in the Classic Map Pack and Sven Co-op 2.0B Map Pack. Yes, the map is spelled "preperation", even though it's a misspelling of "preparation". Followed by Preperation Y.

title: Preperation Y
author: Alex Roycewicz
description: GET OUT ALIVE!! Make your way through the city and escape at all costs! You are a lonely scientist in a chemical compound which has just gotten flooded by monsters! You break into the nearest armory and team up with any surviving fellow scientists to get the hell out of the lab. When you get the the Apache, use stealth to avoid it!….Well you can just shoot at it for 30 min if you want… Use teammates for help! This is a Co-Op map!
additional_info: The Preperation X and Y series was one of the first campaign levels I created for HL1. The levels are meant to be used in SvenCoop, but they can be used in normal HL aswell (although it will be alot harder as the maps were designed for cooperative play). The levels themselves are quite short, but this was done because of the difficulty. It was seen as some of the hardest levels in SvenCoop history, as it would take large amounts of people in order to get through the whole campaign in under 30 minutes. In some areas, the enemies would have immense amounts of health in order to promote stealth instead of firepower, but some players just didnt care and ended up trying to kill all the enemies anyways (it just took a long, long time). If the player did manage to use stealth, they could get by without killing any of the enemies and beat the level rather quickly. Map scenery ranges from indoor to outdoor, as the players make their way through science facilities, caverns, neighborhoods, stripmalls and finally to the airport where they board a plane and take off. http://www.alexroyce.com/modules.php?name=Content&pa=showpage&pid=14 A merged version of Preperation X/Y is available here.

title: Prisoned
author: UnReAl - colera
description: Prisoned: You are a prisoner now. But they don't know they are trapped with YOU, and no the other way around! You pull out some guns out of nowhere for some reason inside your cell, and you must fight your way through the enemy base that has now been infested by an alien invasion. Somehow, you must now also stop the invasion, find the so called invisible Spirit of Xen final boss, and destroy it! Prisoned2: The escape continues, somehow. Now you must finish the job by finding the jail's chief and destroy him. Also, destroy the alien that holds the dimensional portal open, some random almost invisible high HP houndeye (the room with this boss will open back near spawn, after the Otis boss dies). But what would lie beyond the open portal? nobody knows because there is no sequel.
additional_info: There is no info about this map. It is quite old and forgotten. It is about a supposed jailbreak where you have guns inside your jail cell, then it turns into an ever increasing monster fest with weird names. Map architecture is not bad.

title: Prisoner of Event
author: Vaelastrasz
description: One night, Gordon Freeman was going home from work. It was late at night and he was in a hurry. The car’s engine purred quietly and inside was pretty comfortable. Beyond the car’s window was a cold, cold night and black mountains against a dark sky could be seen in the background. He was listening to a local station on the radio and was on the last stretch of his journey; the two canyons and the torturous mountain road. He passed the first canyon with no trouble over the new bridge. It was the second one that sometimes caused problems, as the wooden bridge was over 30 years old. And, unfortunately for Freeman, today was the day it collapsed! His car fell to canyon floor and Freeman lost consciousness. Coming to, Freeman found himself in the water near his car. Fortunately, this canyon wasn’t too high and he had survived. But the canyon’s walls were too vertical and smooth, so it was impossible to climb back to the bridge…………
additional_info: Some monsters replaced to set for Sven Co-op style added some monster ambush triggers put some secret weapons Survival mod involved DON'T SHOOT CAR !

title: Prisonriot Erosion
author: RNG
description: A typical prison escape map, that is basically futuristic and includes cynical hostile enemies, your team's mission is to escape from the inhospitable lock-up, and afterwards… wandering at the corridors and quadrangles that are full of forcible bad cops, guards and turrets. At last egressing the entrance-pit to find the way to escape. After facing a Barnabus roadblock in the streets, someone stunned you with gasgrenade. Now you find yourselves dumped in unknown prison complex underground. Suddenly, there is alarm sounding somewhere near, a jail riot against prison security. Simply escape from the complex, there can be prisoners on the way because of the riot.
additional_info: A minimum of 2 players is required. The map is a effortless quickie Development of a sequel, Prisonriot Erosion 2.0 Hyperpipewrenchcarnage started after first version of Sewer Systematic: Toxicidia Sektor 516 being finished. Although the map series is still not finished because of outdated content and lack of inspirations

title: Project: Guilty
author: MysticMDT
description: Objective Info: You are a Special Operations Executive (SOE) of the United States Special Forces. You have been captured along with your team in a corrupt marine complex. Your mission was to prevent the base transmitting secret information in regards to SOE operations. You are out of range of the satellite transmitter for the moment but you can delay the transmission by destroying the power generator located near your sector. Primary Objective: Escape the of the complex. Secondary Objective: Destroy the Power Generator before proceeding.
additional_info: There are secrets in some maps, keep your eyes open. Keep each other healed or you will not survive your escape. Part of the Case Closed, Project: Guilty, E.T.C. Co-op Map Pack map pack.

title: Project Orion
author: Icewolf (original), CubicVirtuoso (ripent conversion)
description: Co-operative version of the single-player mission Project Orion. Project Orion is a two map series based on the "new" Black Mesa. Orion was the facility created after the Black Mesa cascade three years later. You start out in a closet hiding from monsters and you have to make it out with your team.
additional_info: The original single-player version of Project Orion by Icewolf, released in January 2004, can be found here at PlanetPhillip.

title: Project Quantum Leap
author: Reuniclus-579
description: An assortment of maps from the Half-life mod Project Quantum Leap dumped into Sven Co-op. This episode was conceived and assembled as a collaborative effort among many individual mappers. The intent was to provide an enjoyable mixture of themes and gameplay and to have fun making the maps. We've certainly had our fun making the maps, hopefully you'll enjoy our efforts! WARNING! WARNING! WARNING! Since the maps: verc_5, verc_13, and verc_18 have already been ported. So it is not included in this port version!!!
additional_info: THANKS TO THERBCO for the original idea for this project. All of the mappers involved in this project, many of whom beta tested others' maps. All our other beta testers. Valve Software and The Valve ERC for providing a great support community for Half-Life mapping. Sean Cavanaugh for his superb Zoner's Tools, especially ripent - absolutely indispensible on this project.

title: Project Quantum Leap (OUTDATED)
author: PQL Team (original), Newbai1045 (conversion)
description: An assortment of maps from the Half-life mod Project Quantum Leap dumped into Sven Co-op. Escape from the soldiers, tanks, and donuts.
additional_info: N/A

title: Projekt Einstein
author: Reuniclus-579
description: You have a straight road ahead of you, you must find professor Albert Einstein. He is in this moment in the secret desert facility. Everything was OK before the unknown enemies entered into the facility and kill all the personel, including the scientists. But we know that Albert is hidden somewhere in the base. He is very important and we cannot lose him. You may on occasion see his work while exploring the base. Right now we don't have time to explain. Once you are inside this facility, find yourself firearm. Search the dead bodies, for anything useful. Professor hid some of the combinations to the doors to the deeper levels of the base. Pick off the unknown threats.
additional_info: Original mod: ModDB

title: Propanic
author: Trempler
description: Find a Way to escape. Build up the turrets and open the gate. Run into the base and find some weapons. Find the scientist and escort him to the surface (ALL PEOPLE NEEDED).
additional_info: Part 1 & 2 Part 1 ⚠️ Forum has been shut down and the community has moved to discord. Links will stay for archiving purposes.

title: Protozoaire
author: Protozoaire
description: I did this map in 2002 for my class (who had a penchant Svencoop rooms and network games). I put about 2 months to set up, it consists of 2 parts (for technical reasons ^^). As for the life of the map, you have enough of what to do, mean approximately 1h15 with 2 players. The adventure takes place in an underground military base, full of traps of all kinds and sometimes a little crazy. This map is not absolutely not serious, you will soon find out … Since Svencoop is a cooperative mod, I put forward this side because, for me, teamwork is to sacrifice for others … Finally, at times ^^ This will not prevent you from playing solo if you want (for this we must reduce the sv_gravity to 400 to simulate the "short-scale" of the other players # this command is typed into the console # ) For the story, let your imagination do the work ;) FR : J'ai fais cette map courant 2002 pour ma classe (qui avait un penchant Svencoop et les salles de jeux en réseau). J'ai mis environ 2 mois pour la créée, elle est constituée de 2 parties (pour des raisons techniques^^). Pour ce qui est de la durée de vie de la map, vous avez largement de quoi faire, cad environ 1h15 de jeu à 2. L'aventure se déroule dans une base militaire souterraine, bourrée de pièges en tout genre et parfois un peu loufoques. Cette map ne se veut absolument pas sérieuse, vous vous en rendrez vite compte … bref je me suis fais plaisir :P Étant donné que Svencoop est un mod coopératif, j'ai mis ce côté en avant car, pour moi, l'esprit d'équipe c'est de se sacrifier pour les autres … enfin, par moments ^^ Ce qui ne vous empêchera pas de jouer solo si vous en avez envie (pour cela il faut réduire le sv_gravity à 400 pour simuler la "courte-échelle" des autres joueurs #cette commande se tape dans la console#) Pour le scénario, chacun y vois ce qu'il y veut, laissez parler votre imagination ;)
additional_info: Protozoaire is Protozoaire's first Sven Co-op map. It features a number of new models, sounds, and textures.

title: Psychic Agog
author: RNG
description: 2122 Mars orbit You are some boring scientist team which got a signal from a weird spacestation. Well the spacestation sucked your ship inside it and you appear on some mysterious surreal place. It is now your mission to investigate the place and kill he who is responsible for that spacestation. You must gather your thoughts to solve the Psy Agog I.
additional_info: Some cutscenes include playing sounds which may crash ppl randomly because of FMODEX bugging, but otherwise the cutscenes would suck. Solution is reconnect or use Direct3D mode or some others The last place (hint: long room) doesnt have camera so wait on others to be there This is a puzzlemap 1/3 of the map is originally from Prisonriot Erosion 2 Pink/Violet sparkling walls are Forcefields.

title: Psyko
author: Lemonsoda
description: You have been sent to a weird magical world for a hard mission. You need to collect 10 powerfully magical symbols for a science team. These symbols are the heart of this world and give it it's bright colours and magic. Each symbol is located in it's own area, protected by monsters and different puzzles. In addition to a certain colour, the symbol also represents it's own theme, which is related to the symbols own area, monsters and puzzles. After finding a symbol, a new door will open randomly. This way you will never know which puzzle you need to solve next. The symbols will appear in the spawn area after they have been picked up.
additional_info: Won 1st place in the Sven Co-op Mapping Contest. Included in Sven Co-op 4.5.

title: Public Security
author: Lawyeaz
description: Inspired by classic tactical shooters. Coordinate with other players using tactics to take down bad guys. Bullets deal increased damage, everyone can die in one hit. That goes both ways. Pick weapons and armor that suit your playstyle in the starting room by pressing the USE key on them. Survival is enforced to encourage tactical gameplay.

title: Push The Button
author: StreamFox
description: A fun and annoying map A little side project, a small map about pushing buttons. On this map the task is "easy" find the 4 correct buttons which open the exit door. Wrong ones kills you. Map uses trigger_random system, that means each time when the map loaded different buttons open the door and kills you. This is just a small fun (I don't know how much you will find it fun that dying many time) map, with 3 rooms: spawn, button, and finish rooms.

description: The sequel to push-the-button Reach the keycard by pushing the right buttons. Each wrong button explodes the entire row so be careful. With the keycard you enter the obstacle maze. Someone at the other end can troll the rest of the players that didn't make it first to stop them from reaching the end of the maze as well. There is no end to the map after this. There is a vote to end the map every 3 minutes when reaching the end of the maze.

title: PVP Secretum
author: Twitch
description: Super secret secrets are everywhere. Once you gain entrance, you will have the option to trigger traps to those that wonder into the kill zones. Beware, you might think you are hidden but there are eyes behind every wall. This map is made for three teams (3v3). One team in the main area, one team in the first layer of secrets and the third in the final layer of secrets. There are three main areas to this map. Sprites for teleporters have been removed to make room for other entities. Many new custom textures were made to animate the teleporter pads. Teleporter textures are what makes the filesize so large. All textures are embedded in the map file. Very resource intensive map. I reached some of the limits for mapping on the Goldsrc engine. New textures, new secrets. This map is mostly played on a lan server and was never meant to be played by the masses. There is only one truly secure secret area in the map but at least three different ways to enter that area. Please do not message me and ask for the code to the door.

I rarely play half-life online with the masses, I tend to setup a lan server so my family and I can play. That is why I make these maps… for my family and friends. This map is great if you enjoy sniper maps. There are a ton of secrets! There is a method to my madness. I'm not looking to win any medals for my mapping skills. Enjoy or ignore! Thanks….

title: Quake for Sven Co-op
author: fgsfdsfgs
description: Single player and Deathmatch maps from Quake ported to Sven Co-op, along with monsters, weapons, items and other entities. Currently contains Episode 1 and three DM maps.
additional_info: Requires Sven Co-op 5.0+. Music is optional. Install after installing the main pack. When adding this pack to mapcycle, only add q1_start and the DM maps. The .res files might be too big for some servers. If your server crashes, delete all the .res files from this pack.

title: Quarter
author: Hezus
description: Black Mesa Incident + 72 hours The US Military found out we are storing some of the last remaining Xen Artifacts in Sector J. With them we could reopen the portal to Xen and escape our fate or elimination, for the government wants us dead. There is no other choice. We have to defend our facility against the incoming soldiers. We have gathered up former Black Mesa security forces and a few army deserters who refused to kill civilians. Together we must make a stand. Objective: Hold back the invading military force. There are 4 areas you will need to defend: - The Front Door Security panel in Area 1. - The Subway Train in Area 2. - The Main Computer in Area 3. - The Xen Arifacts in Area 4. Each wave of enemies will feature a boss. Killing him will end the current wave of enemies and spawn a tougher wave. Defeat all 3 bosses and the enemy forces will crumble.
additional_info: I started making this map in 2005 as an official map for Sven Co-op. I pretty much finished it within a few weeks but the code to make the map work was never finished. 7 years later I decided to use a work-around to fix the gameplay issue and retexture and redesign the map and release it to the public. I hope you like it.

title: Question
author: Rift
description: Use your mind to pass through many challenges. Watch your step. :) The are 8 floors and a total of 15 challenges. The idea is you must complete the challenges to advance. Most of the challenges are easier than they look, but are hard until you realize how stupid you were. According to the map's release thread, Question is "an epic challenge of the mind and its so freaken funny seeing people die…on an average round of newbies 100-200 deaths"
additional_info: At least 2 players required. 2-4 players recommended. TheBard's TB Fun 1, 2, and 3 were inspired by Question.

title: Quiet Neighborhood
author: Hedgy
description: Map features small town and outskirts area. Your goal is to get beer and enjoy it in your apartment. There are also some collectibles for you to find and music to listen. Hope you'll like it! Have fun! Story: It's so late already, anyway, we want to have some cold refreshing beer till tomorrow. Hope the grocery store behind the corner is still open… It's pretty quiet outside tho… Like everybody just disappeared. Or they really did?…
additional_info: There are optional 12 chip bags scattered around the map. Find them all to unlock a secret room.

title: Radix
author: Vaelastrasz
description: You are thrust aboard the Top Secret Research Ship USCTS Chanticleer. Exactly what type of research takes place on the Chanticleer, or if indeed it is even a research ship, is unknown to all but the highest echelon. But you are about to find out first hand what secrets are aboard the Chanticleer, as you set in motion a chain of events the likes of which the post-Black Mesa world has never even imagined.
additional_info: Original README: + Readme – Readme radix.txt INFORMATION Title : Radix Author : Unquenque Site : http://unqworks.com/ E-mail Address : moc.skrowqnu|qnu#moc.skrowqnu|qnu Type : Single Player Half-Life Original Release Date : June 13, 2002 Rerelease Date : October 2002 Steam Release Date : June 2011 (!) STEAM INSTALLATION Unzip the radix folder to steamapps\username\half-life. Restart Steam and Radix will appear in the Games list. DESCRIPTION This map was originally made for Project Quantum Leap - http://unquenque.com/quantum/ - a cooperative project among forum regulars at the Valve Editing Resource Center. I have released it as a standalone map partially because of the overwhelming positive response I've had to this map. TOOLS Worldcraft 3.3 : http://www.valve-erc.com Zoner's HL Tools : http://www.valve-erc.com Merl's Custom HL Tools : http://coding.valve-erc.com/?area=browse&id=3/1010963546 Wally : http://www.telefragged.com/wally Half-Life Model Viewer : http://www.contaminated.net/workshop TBCC : http://www.gracelessland.com TBLux : http://www.gracelessland.com Paint Shop Pro : http://www.jasc.com ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS I owe a ton of thanks to the mappers and artists out there that make and distribute custom textures for use in the public domain. About 80% of the textures I used were non-HL textures. Thanks to these makers of the excellent textures I used, in no particular order: - Relic25 - http://www.deltatraining.com/relic25/ - Crinity - http://www.contaminated.net/crinity/ - Marc Schroeder (Poke646) - http://www.poke646.com/ - Rewolf Software - http://www.sierra.com/games/gunman/ - Rob 'GONNAKILLYA' Peterson - http://www.planetquake.com/smackdown/ - Todd 'Mr.CleaN' Rose - http://www.planetquake.com/mrclean/ - Lunaran - http://lunaran.fragland.net/ - Yves 'evil lair' Allaire - http://www.planetquake.com/hfx/ - And from the Mapcenter Texture Challenge #1 texture pack: - Petter 'mindgamer' Andersson - Karloff - sc4r4b - Techx I must also acknowledge the influence of the upcoming mod Natural Selection - http://www.natural-selection.org. A lot of the 'look & feel' of my map are based on the atmosphere that NS is aiming for in its maps, and I was certainly inspired by various excellent screenshots posted during the last several months on the NS forum. Thanks to my beta testers: - Jabyaeye - Artbroken - Zypher - EsBe - Adam Foster FINE PRINT This level may be distributed freely, as long as it is accompanied by this text file in the original zip package and due credit is given. If you have feedback, questions, or comments about this map please email me at the above address. Half-Life is a registered trademark of Sierra Entertainment, Inc. added Survival mod

title: Ragemap
author: A1win, Archanor, cold_blood3d, Crapaccino, cyberdaemon, Dred_furst, Dynamite, El Gringo, Fourth Letter, Frostbite, BlueFeena, g1l, Hezus, JPolito, Killer12137, Mr. Mazur, Nih, Police L.T., cSMG, Puchi, Qwerty, SharkMan, Silencer, Slay, The_6th_Monkey, WAR_Nuker
description: This map was made in pieces and put together over time by the mapping community at the Sven Co-op Forums. All pieces of this map were made in one hour or less. It was intended to be a small project between friends to see how the map would end up, but once it was posted on the forums it became massive overnight.
additional_info: This map will most certainly crash if you are using cheats or are playing on a two player server. Nothing else can be added to this map. There are too many entities. This map is massive. There's a giant penis in it, which might make it inappropriate for minors. The original thread for the project can be found at http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=33803&page=1&pp=25. See the ragemap series listing for other instalments.

description: This map was made in pieces and put together over time by the mapping community here at the Sven Co-op Forums. Each mapper built their own section in an hour or less and passed it on to the next mapper who built upon what was already made. The result is an extremely diverse map, with many different themes and mini-missions distributed throughout. This idea was originally put forth in Ragemap (2007)).
additional_info: Original forum thread can be found here: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=40024 The source files for the map can be downloaded here: http://scmapdb.com/local--files/map:ragemap-2012/ragemap2012_source_v2_07-08-2016.zip See the ragemap series listing for other instalments.

title: RageMap 2018
author: AdamR, Aurora, Keen, Hezus, mr_redman, SV BOY, Tuesday's Avenger, Silencer, Puchi, _RC
description: Finish each sector and move on to the next to win! Ragemap is a collaberative map project by serveral Sven Co-op mappers: AdamR, Aurora, CryoKeen, Hezus, mr_redman, SV BOY, tu3sday, Silencer/Zyl, Puchi & _RC, created in the summer of 2018. Mappers had 1 week to create their section, which then resulted in a fully playable map. Since there was some room left, some mappers created another section over the course of another week. From the main spawn room, players can venture into the first opened door where they'll encounter a challenge. Once this part has been finished a new door will open up in the spawn room. Complete all sections in both maps and you beat the RAGE! Certain sections might require the use of the RAGECUBE you'll find in the center of the spawn room.
additional_info: More info about the project can be found on the SC forums: https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/45279-Ragemap-2018 See the ragemap series listing for other instalments. Ragemap2018a: - Room 1 (floating world) by Tu3sday - Room 2 (frogger game) by mr_redman - Room 3 (storage room) by SV BOY - Room 4 (coloured box machines) by Hezus - Room 5 (big elevator) by Silencer/Zyl - Room 6 (caverns) by Keen - Room 7 (bean catacombs) by AdamR Ragemap2018b: - Room 1 (bar) by Puchi - Room 2 (belt machine) by Hezus - Room 3 (box shooting range) by _RC - Room 4 (panic buttons) by Silencer/Zyl - Room 5 (lab) by Keen - Room 6 (robo apocalypse) by Aurora Spawn room and outro sequence by Hezus

title: Rampage
author: Rugal
description: You and your team are working as part of the disaster response team in this strange unusual facility. Those damn scientists screwed up yet again, and now there are aliens around every corner, it is your job to fix this mess before it gets to much out of hand. There are also some black ops that were sent in to kill you and your team. Primary Goal: Reach the coolant exchange facility. Secondary Goal: take out anything and everything that gets in your way.
additional_info: Map was previously included in Sven Co-op 3.0 and was removed at the request of the author.

title: Random Map Selector 2
author: cold_blood3d
description: Map made for the Cafe of Rabid Snarks. Fight your way to the random selection control room. Start the randomization by pressing the computer keypad. 1 of over 100 possible high-quality maps will be chosen randomly and the map will change. Instead of an instant map change, there is about a 25% chance of there being a mapvote. You will be transported to a room with a number of maps to vote for. Each room's maps are a themed category. To vote, kill the rat of the map you want. If the map does not change or gets stuck in a change, this is not a problem. Just wait 4-5 minutes and the map will reset. If this unsuccessful, the server will automatically reset.
additional_info: The .cfg file is missing

title: Rat Maze
author: butcher
description: Work as a Team to find the way out from this Maze Recommended: 3-5 Players Single Player: Could be a little frustating Comments/Bugs/Ideas: moc.liamg|sc.rehctub#moc.liamg|sc.rehctub

title: Ravenholm
author: cengaver386
description: A port of the half life 2 most infamous chapter, from start to finish
additional_info: Many scripted sequences don't work as intended, or are not included. This is mostly about Father Grigori, and fast zombies that of course cannot climb or jump in Sven Coop because they are gonomes here The gravity gun is not in the map as I am unsure if it could create softlocks, it is not tested. You can give it to yourself with cheats with give weapon_hl2_gravgun (as long as the scripts loaded fine)

title: RC's Labyrinth
author: R.C.
description: A huge randomly generated labyrinth. Get a random mission which 4 randomly placed boxes the players have to find and bring to the spawn room. 3 fully custom hostile npcs HEV & Health bot npcs that will follow you around and heal you some walls seem to move from time to time … randomly placed traps (disabled by shooting its fusebox) Have fun!
additional_info: 1. Difficulty Chose your difficulty, it affects: - amount of randomly placed walls placed to build the labyrinth - amount of randomly placed traps - amount of randomly placed boss robots - eventual spawns of additional boss robots during game 2. Labyrinth The labyrinth consists of: - a spawn room in the center - an inner ring of corridors/rooms around the spawn - 4 connection points to the outer area - an outer ring of corridors/rooms around the inner ring - 4 spawning spots for boxes in the inner ring - 8 spawning spots for boxes in the outer ring (includes a weapon + ammo) - regulary a random wall disappears, so make sure to check for new routes! 3. Mission Your mission is to find a combination of 4 colored boxes, and bring them to their cages in the spawn room. The mission gets randomly generated each time you play the map.

title: RC's Tower Defense
author: R.C.
description: This map is heavily inspired by Nih's awesome turretfortress, which got too easy for us and i decided to make this map. It is way harder and has less random events, but more tactical options.
additional_info: This map has some kind of noob protection: Right teleporter leads the "noob room". Left teleporter leads to the towerdefense area, press E (Use) to get teleported. 1. General 16 waves of monsters are trying to pass the 4 sectors and reach the end. Waves have at least 16 monsters. Monsters per wave and their HP increases in later waves and higher difficulty. There are 64 building spots, 16 in each sector. Fill them with structures to prevent the monsters from reaching the end. If more that 20 monsters reach the end of the map, you lose. 2. Buildings You can build structures by spawning a box (costs credits) of its type and pushing it onto a free building spot. You can demolish a structure by pressing the button next to the spot. 2.1 Turret Regular turret that shoots enemies. Weak but cheap. 2.2 Blue barrier Earns you 0.05 credits for each monster passing it. Very important, since its the only way of getting credits. 2.3 Green barrier Does similar damage as the turret does, but will attack all passing targets, no matter how many of them are there. 2.4 Yellow barrier Teleports passing enemies back to their original spawnpoint. What could that be useful for? Cooldown 60 seconds. 2.5 Red barrier Instantly kills passing enemies. Cooldown 120 seconds. Known Bugs Monsters get rid of these traffic jammed with backward through the pathway. Elevator Platform stuck by the func_pushable.

title: Reactivist
author: Frel
description: It's been around 15 years since I last picked up Hammer and I was surprised to find Sven Coop still active and more recently developed into a standalone game! This dedication to the game inspired me to revisit SC_Activist and see what difference (if any) those years of experience might make (assuming I could still remember how to use Hammer); thus SC_Reactivist was born and is now progressed to a state where I feel comfortable posting the results for feedback, positive or otherwise. This is not a direct remake, more of a reimagining; the basic progression remains the same but I haven't felt tied by the original layout where I felt improvements could be made. Still, you shouldn't feel in unfamiliar territory.
additional_info: Areas of attempted improvement: General architectural upgrade. More 'realistic' layouts; I've tried to make the map feel more real, with fake corridors and dummy doors to give the impression that the map isn't simply a long corridor. More debris and detail; posters, props etc. A smattering of NPCs, generally in inaccessible areas to again add some life. Increased use of props in general. More ambient noise and env_sound usage. My first foray into texture creation to produce some very basic signage to suit my particular needs. I've 'borrowed' Hezus' excellent lighting sprites. Expected issues: Minor texture misalignments (it is a beta). Minor clipping issue within a vent (jump to get passed, I'm at a loss as to the cause). The cleansuit scientists twitch on completion of the repeated animation (advice here would be welcome). I anticipate the automatic doors to break when used by multiple people, though this may not be the case. Some models are yet to be amended to item_generics (so they'll bleed xen). The lighting and general brightness of the map seems to vary between the two PCs I've been working on, so third party comments here would be welcome. Following the initial outbreak an env_beam should be firing by the broken glass to indicate to the player not to enter; this isn't activating (it works if I toggle 'start on') so I've blocked it with a func_clip for now. A cleansuit scientist scripted_sequence kicks out an error but otherwise works fine. Some kind of sound precache error loops at the end of the map relating to a sound I'm not aware is even used. Whether I ever get around to a recreation of sc_activist2 and 3 is another thing entirely but I'm personally pleased with the results thus far. In addition to incorporating any valid comments received from the still active community here, I intend to run back through the map and add more props and detailing where r_speeds will allow. https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/46449-SC_Reactivist-(Beta-1-0)

title: Real Adrenaline Quad
author: Mata & Angel
description: Real Adrenaline Quad is based on the original idea of quad_f created by (Streamfox) both lines and objectives remain the same and, this have things new. It requires team play and timing between players. This map is designed for exactly 2 players, maybe more players can help. If you see any error, please notify in the comment box.
additional_info: Map is for exactly 2 players. Not recommended to play with SCXPM This map has 2 guides Spanish/English This is the full version Added Scorebard Added the new puzzles (5, 6, 7 and 8) Del old music of ra_quad_demo. Added new musics for pz 1 & 2. Added a secret (Music lonely) Added new textures. Added a gameplay video.

title: Recon
author: Eyeling
description: You are a team of HECU soldiers who has been specially ordered to perform reconnasiance on the Black Mesa Research Facillity. You've just arived in a single truck, and set up your radio to await futher orders from the HECU commander. There should be an exit at the end of this sector of Black Mesa, another truck will be waiting for you there. This is your extraction zone. Once you have performed your reconnaissance and extracted, a further assault of Black Mesa by the HECU can begin. Good luck marines, god be with you. With voice acting from the popular Half Life youtuber, Ratlobber!!!!
additional_info: Pay attention to the radio broadcasts, they might help you find equipment.

title: Reconnaissance
author: michael-sisk
description: This level picks up after Aggregate Pain. If you played that level, you know that you escaped in a jet. Anyways, as you are flying back to your base, you receive new orders to head back to an adjacent part of the base. You are to find a satellite that the enemy has constructed and destroy it. As you'll soon find out, your flying skills are a little rusty. You end up crashing the jet and your bio-hazard suit is fried to a crisp. Don't worry though, you'll find a new one soon.
additional_info: Port of the small campaign, by request. You can find the original mod here. Maps are very short and could use a merged version into 1 or 2 maps tops. "This is my third level for Half-Life. My first two levels were Sepulcher and Aggregate Pain. The title "Recon" is short for "Reconnaissance." This is my best level yet. It weighs in at a hefty 10 megs unzipped, and takes about an hour to beat without cheating. I added a lot more variety as far as how the enemies attack you. They're not all just standing in front of you as in my previous levels. I would definitely recommend getting the lastest version of Half-Life before you play this. If you play this on an early version of Half-Life, it will be way too dark. Believe me, I've seen it. The level looks best on a TNT. For those of you who are going to review this level on your website, please e-mail me and let me know when the review will be up so I can check it out. And for all those who download it, please e-mail me and let me know what you thought of it." -Michael Sisk Known bugs: "A few minor things. I had a little trouble with the zombie scripted sequence." -Michael Sisk

title: Rectal Racers
author: Keen
description: This is an ancient map made about a decade about by yours truly. In (rectalracers.bsp) you get into one of the 3 "karts" press use key inside the func_train and shoot a button on the ground to the left of one of the breakable doors to release the spawn breaks. Otherwise your train may take off without you. It is a race to the end for you and 2 other players. The carts usually do not return on their own and there is no proper ending(no game_end). Despite the name there is no sexual or anus related content. You may be gibbed during the race. You may experience some vertigo. You may run into other racers and one or both of you may gib(hilarious). This map deserved a full release which is what this is, and it is a staple in Sven Co-op history and I encourage other mappers to release their old maps to the public for consumption and reflection. There is also a 2nd version (rectalracers2b.bsp) included that is only 300kb and contains many random earth images.
additional_info: Included as well are 34 player models courtesy of your local cryokeen. I created most of these but other contributors include Eisen, Reniah, cSMG, Buster Charlie, Malengine and Tuesday's Avenger. If anyone wants me to remove said model from the pack please do say so. enjoy!

title: Red Fang
author: Onox792
description: A mysterious government agent called Silver Smith has stolen a valuable crystal from a remote area of Black Mesa for unknown purposes and it is believed that he has hidden in Xen. Now you and your squad must get back that crystal, there is a lot of alien activity in the many areas of Black Mesa, so be careful. The portal through Xen must be near where your team has landed…
additional_info: · 3-6 players recommended · There are hidden areas with weapons or additional ammo, look for them! · You need Opposing Force installed so that my maps work

title: Redcity Hotel
author: mr_redman
description: Find all milkbags!!!!
additional_info: N/A

title: Redemption Project
author: Hatred
description: Redemption (The full story): In the year 2020 (shortly after the Black Mesa disaster) Gorden Freeman was 'added' to a special ops force known as Redemption. This team has only one sole mission, to seek out and destroy Mr.Black Stone (AkA:G-Man) and eradicate all members of the under ground organization Black Spear. G-man's secret army of the apocolypse. In part one you were hot on Stone's trail only to follow him through a highly unstable warp. When you got to the other side all your weapon except for a pistol and yoru trusty crowbar where destroyed (unexpected huh?) Lucky you it seems you were transported into yet another of Stone's secret bases and by chance a weapons hold may be near your entry point. The portal though had it's 'problems' such as the portal closed after going through and has begun to destroy the base that your in. The power is fading and emergency power is mostly useless if not totally. You must follow him, this is a one way trip team but if you can destroy the Black Speak and kill Black Stone it will all be worth it. Good luck and god speed.
additional_info: Includes Source Files Map Type: Walkthrough Map Author: Hatred Authors Comments Redemption Redemption-Project Alpha This is part 2 (hopefully better than the first) of my Redemption Series. Mission 3-Redemption Delta BSP Names: redemption (30/06/02) redemptionalpha (18/08/02) redempdelta (08/09/02) Filename: redemp_all.7z Additional Textures: none

title: Red's War Cooperative Mode
author: MihaiGamerXD
description: Red's War means from a game with birds and pigs from Angry Birds that shoot each other. Episode 1: Fight all the zombies also defeat the Gargantua and go in the helicopter to escape. Episode 2: Kill the Venom Zombie. Thus, Defeat the Gene Worm boss with a laser tank. then go to the helicopter and that's all.
additional_info: There's no secret and survival mode is enabled and added checkpoints.

title: Reflux
author: g1l
description: Sven Coop Intelligence (SCI) wants you to investigate what's going on in the biolabs of this facility. You have just landed on the roof of one of the buildings, which is also your extraction point. Have fun. An emphasis is placed on exploration as well as combat.
additional_info: It's an official map in Sven Co-op 4.0B. 4-8 players recommended. Reflux was first started as a deathmatch map, but was then converted for Sven Co-op. It received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums.

title: Rescue
author: Safra
description: In this map all you have to rescue your friend in assassin's land !

author: Vaelastrasz
description: Your mission is to rescue an imprisoned scientist so that he may continue his research on Xen… there will be alot of obstacles in the way and you may have to use stealth to get to him because the base is completetly occupied by military. this was originally created by Tylak (Tyler Munden)
