title: Rescue (by Stan)
author: origional Stan fixed Steve
additional_info: This is a fixed and slightly tweaked version of Rescue2. Changes include: -No more leaks, properly VISed (the main reason for this update). Now it runs at more than 1 frame-per-second on my computer. -The grunts near the start and end are produced by monstermakers. This allows for more of them without slowdown -Nearing the end of the level opens up a shortcut, making it much quicker to get back after respawning -No longer requires conquer2.wad -Lighting improved, uses some textured lights. Thanks to the origional author, Stan, for letting me alter his map. At his request the original documentation for rescue2 is included in the archive. Read that for more info. # Happy Fragging # Steve rescue and rescue2 are older versions of this map.

title: Resident Evil 2 Mini Game
author: Mrfranswa
description: Resident Evil, THE MINIGAME! This is a special treat for all of my loyal and dedicated fans. This isn't the FINAL version, however it should be fun! Enter the world of survival horror, IF YOU DARE! MUA HA HA HAHA HA HAH! (PS there are 5 missions, 3 of which are repeatable! Also, THIS MAP DOES NOT HAVE A WAY TO WIN! YOU SIMPLY PLAY IT UNTIL YOU GET BORED AND CHANGE THE MAP!)
additional_info: N/A

title: Resident Evil: Biohazard
author: Jamesmarine
description: You wake up in an isolated city. Raccoon City. Your head hurts, but you must find a way to leave this horror. A classical take on the fictional Resident Evil Universe. Encounter familiar faces, from previous games. Dynamic sounds & music.
additional_info: N/A

title: Resident Evil: Covert Operations
author: mrfranswa
description: Resident Evil: Covert Operations (RE:CO or RECO), is an indirect follow-up to Resident Evil: The Awakening. Expect even more spine-chilling zombie-whacking action, story-centric gameplay, and creative use of monster-replacement. Plenty of in-game cut-scenes, too. You are members of HCF's elite retrieval squadron. Your mission? To break into rival corporations, steal their research, and eliminate any witnesses. A more detailed background story is displayed at the start of the map.
additional_info: quakis has written a detailed walkthrough and review of RECO. This is a total conversion, meaning pretty much everything (weapons, npcs, textures, sounds) is fully customized for an authentic RE experience—the map even comes with 26 custom RE player models to choose from! RECO was the most downloaded map at Sven Co-op Central before the site closed, totaling 87,000+ downloads as of September 2011. Preceded by Resident Evil: The Awakening. Also available in the Resident Evil Map Pack.

title: Resident Evil: Directors Cut
author: James Smith
description: Another installment of the Resident Evil 1 mansion with some twists and turns.
additional_info: Also available in the Resident Evil Map Pack.

title: Resident Evil: Outbreak
author: Mrfranswa
description: N/A
additional_info: Also available in the Resident Evil Map Pack.

title: Resident Evil: The Aftermath
author: James Smith
description: Yet again, another different take on the Resident Evil 1 mansion. Fight zombies, grab guns, find keys, unlock passages, beat the map!

title: Resident Evil: The Awakening
author: mrfranswa
release_date:
Community fix 201712 - December 2, 2017
Dec 2016 fix - December 7, 2016
Final - December 20, 2003
description: Resident Evil, The Awakening It's been four days. You are tired, and you don't think they will return. Your Bravo Company, an elite squad of policemen from the Racoon City Police Department. Over the last few weeks you have been receiving bizarre reports of people being attacked. Most appear to have been eaten. All homicides have been reported in the Racoon Forrest. This is strangely close to the elaborate mansions in the area. When your team reached the forest, a strange explosion made the helicopter crash. Everyone was sadly separated. Suddenly, you hear a man approacing. Who could it be?!
additional_info: Also available in the Resident Evil Map Pack.

title: Residual Life 1.5
author: Created by Radiation Studios (Toxagen), conversion for Sven Co-op by Cadaver

title: Residual Life 1.9
author: Original author: Radiation studios Toxagen. Conversion: kmkz
description: This is a conversion of "Half-life: Residual life 1.9" to Sven Co-op made with ripent tools. I Tried to remain accurate to the original mod but with needed modifications to support coop gameplay. Currently this is in bad state with many bugs and issues, since it needs a massive update it will take time. If you want to report a bug please give details of the problem you found, so there is a bigger chance to solve it, and faster. Avoid making reports based only on the W00tguy repacker. Is common to have there false positives and things that does not affect the game and i have noticed that people is posting these reports without caring if there is a real problem. Fix trolling not allowed: there is a group of users that since they are unwilling to take the effort and time to make their own maps instead they mess with other people work adding their custom versions disguised as "fixes", trying in a display of arrogance to impose their own map preferences just to feel they are doing a contribution to the Sven Co-op community. To them i say if you really want to support the community leave other authors in peace and make your own maps. These maps have multiple paths and you an play all of them.The first map for the main story is rl0. For the bonus chapters the first map is rl20. For more information check readme_rl1_9.txt

title: Residual Point

title: Residue
author: HeAdCrAb KILLA
description: Clean up duty I'm afraid. A biohazardous chemical spill in this waste refinery has stirred up some trouble and you are in charge of the cleanup. Your mission is to enter the facility and eliminate any "lifeforms" that happen to be residing in the area. It's a mess but someone has to do it. Don't bother looking for survivors because it's obvious that nothing but mutations have lived through the accident. Get in and get out as fast as you can before you are a victim yourself.
additional_info: Ideal for 4-6 players.

title: Resistance
author: Turrican
description: The Sven Co-op military facility is under attack by an unknown military force. You will be given instructions on your mission objectives! Map tips: The revolver, crossbow, granades, Gauss gun, spore luncher and sniper rifle are somewhere in the facility. If you can find them, their blueprints will be recorded into the armory computer, and the weapons will spawn in the armory. If you see a computer console, use it! You will be able to access security systems, or gain valuable information. If you run low on health or ammo look around for a supply room. There are many around the facility, and have extra ammo and medkits, so you will not need to go back to the spawn armory.
additional_info: The original upload is a test version of the map which sadly has been abandoned. The first 2 or 3 missions can be played. Previously found here (forums don't exist anymore but an archive may be found somewhere): https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/8349-Resistance A ripent fix has been made adding more missions, bug fixes and additions to complete the map with what little it could be completed with. The fix version enables this map to be played from start to finish without problems since it now has an ending.

title: Resistance 1-3
author: Reuniclus-579
description: Resistance: This story takes place after the events in Half-Life. You are Gordon Freeman. After you defeated the Nihilanth and ended the alien invasion of Earth, you're transported to another place where you finally meet the Administrator of the Black Mesa Research Facility. He congratulates you on a job well done, and offers you a job. He doesn't say what the job is, just that if you refuse you'll die. The overconfident administrator believes that after being stripped of your weapons, and also after the recent battle in Xen, you no longer have the strength or the desire to fight, so he didn't bring along a bodyguard. Big mistake. You feel that the Administrator is partially or totally responsible for the accident, and probably is also the one who gave the orders for the military cleanup of Black Mesa. You remember all of the lives lost because of him. It would be better to die than to work for this monster. You pretend to accept his offer, so you walk over to the portal and while pretending to enter it, you knock the administrator unconscious with a quick blow to the head. You search him, and discover a small device in his suit that controls the portals. You then open up a new portal and put the administrator into it. It sends him to the refuge of what's left of Xen's forces, the same place he would have sent you if you refused his offer. The administrator wakes up to see that he's surrounded by alien grunts. He frantically searches for his device, but doesn't find it. As the portal slowly closes, you hear the laughter of alien grunts and the administrator giving out a blood-curdling scream. Finally, justice is served. You then open up a portal to earth, where you hope to return home and get some well-deserved rest. You take along his briefcase, which may contain some useful material. Unfortunately, the government had witnessed the administrator's death through a tiny camera placed on the train. They then send out a military special forces unit to find and kill you to prevent you from telling your story to the world. Meanwhile, you and seven other survivors from the Black Mesa research facility, five scientists and two security guards, take refuge in an old, small, underground complex located in Black Mesa. You and your comrades figure Black Mesa is the last place the military would look for you. A few days after your return to Earth, the special forces unit captures a scientist, who knows your location, and managed to "persuade" him to tell them the location of the complex. Shortly afterwards, they assault the complex and begin eliminating its inhabitants. You wake up with the sound of gunfire and the screaming of your comrades. With your few days of rest, you have regained your strength and are ready for more action. Resistance 2: After you eliminated the special forces unit and escaped the complex in an explorer, you have an opportunity to open the administrator's briefcase. Inside you discover a miniature computer, a pistol, and some documents pertaining to a small government research facility located in Fort Defiance, Arizona. The documents describe plans for further experiments to be done at this facility. Experiments aimed at finding a way to control Xen life forms. If they succeed they will have their own alien army, they would be able to use it to destroy anything or anyone they wanted and blame it on rogue Xen aliens. You decide you can't allow this to happen. You search the administrator's computer and find an image of the retina of his eye. You plan a night raid against the facility to put a stop to these experiments. Unfortunately, since the facility was built into the face of a mountain, you were unable to perform much reconnaissance, so you are unaware that the facility is heavily defended by the military. You arrive as planned and use the administrator's retina image on a retina scanner by the back door of the facility. Unfortunately, the government knowing about the administrator's death and your possession of his computer, removed his access to government facilities. Luckily, you have a plan B, you've brought along some explosives you obtained from the special forces unit. You place it near the door and prepare to detonate it. Your goal is to survive and reach the other end of the facility. When you get there you have to activate the self destruct system and escape before the facility is destroyed. After the facility is eliminated the government will be unable to duplicate the experiments. Good Luck. You will encounter a few different kinds of non-hostiles in the facility, some will be allies in your mission to stop the experiments, others won't. When the military realizes that you have allies in the facility they will attempt to execute them as well. Resistance 3: After you activated the facility's self-destruct, you escaped through a teleporter. You are knocked unconscious in the transport that ends up taking you to the Borderworld of Xen. You wake up in a unusual building with your HEV suit and all of your weapons missing, apparently lost in the transport. Shortly after the destruction of the facility, the military forces on Xen were ordered to start a genocide campaign against all sentient Xen life. "What we can't control, we'll destroy", sort of thing. Since the death of the Nihilanth, the aliens have become demoralized and unorganized, and easy prey for the military. Unfortunately, that's going to change. An alien controller by the name of Nexus has recently taken command of Xen and is starting to unite the alien forces against the military. He is becoming more powerful by the day and is starting to take the place of the Nihilanth. If Xen's forces unite under Nexus they will outnumber the military and are capable of overpowering them. If the military is defeated and Nexus survives, Earth can be invaded once again. It's your job to make sure that doesn't happen. Your mission is to fight through both sides, find Nexus and terminate him. When he realizes that you're coming for him, he will taunt you. You must also face another Bigmomma monster. She's not as tough as her predecessor Gonarch, but she is still quite powerful.
additional_info: Original mod ModDB

title: Restriction
author: ReX
description: "Restriction" is a 2-6 players walkthrough map highly inspired by the S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe. She can be played in Survival Mode or Normal Mode (default Survival) You will have to find a way to escape from a series of old bunkers and laboratories. Dark secrets, puzzles, soldiers and inhuman creatures will try to stop you from reaching your goal. This map offers you 10 parts to play with your friends. Using a whole new set of textures and models, you will be dragged into the atmosphere of the popular S.T.A.L.K.E.R. game franchise. New scripts have been written to turn the Sven Co-op NPCs into something new. They now have new abilities proper to the original game(s). Ex: Bloodsuckers can now become invisible to attack the players by surprise!

description: A map with coop puzzles and some jumps.

title: Retrieval
author: Wolf-3D
description: Puzzle/Objective based game play with 6 levels of difficulty and map layout. Please NOTE: All Maps are in Development, MAP 1 is 99% Complete, MAPS 2, 3 & 4 at approx 50-60%. Levels 1 to 5 are Training Missions. Level 6 is the real "Mission". Each Level Varies based on Player Equipment, Enemy Type, Strength & Quantity, Methods for Completing of Mission Objectives change slightly per Training Level. Lose Points are in effect (Example: Primary Orders are "Destroy SAM Site & Secure the LZ", Proceeding into the Main Complex, will result in a Court Marshal, if this is not been accomplished.) Statistics, Success/Failure & Secrets Found are transferred across maps. 1 - Training exercise: Max Health = 450, Max Armor = 250, Learn Map Layout, Complete Mission Orders, Look for Secrets. 2 - Training exercise: Max Health = 255, Max Armor = 175, Note small changes to Messages & Item HUD's. Different Enemies. 3 - Training exercise: Max Health = 103, Max Armor = 120, Slight variance in Training Routine. Different Enemies. 4 - Training exercise: Max Health = 100, Max Armor = 100, Loose points start having an Impact. 5 - Training exercise: Max Health = 100, Max Armor = 100, Avoid Friendly Fire, you can now Kill Friendly Troops. 6 - Mission : Expect things to go wrong from the Start & Plans to Change as a Result. Avoid Friendly Fire as Friendly Troops can now also kill you. Try to Revive Dead Team Mates.
additional_info: Known Bugs: MAP 1: - LvL6 - Rappelling Engineer gets stuck in Vent (Temp Solution:Shoot him, if he is Blocking you.) - Possible mis-counting for NPC's lead to "Map2 change level area". - Possible that LvL 6 "Coma routine" will "Think" you are cheating and Gib you rather than returning player to map. - Pod allocation iffy - Cryostasis Pod 21 know to Gib Players. Maps 2 and 4 are NOT in included in the Zip/Archive as both are unstable at the Moment. TO DO: - Complete Map to map data & stats transfer routine. MAP 2, 3 & 4 - Removed from zip, while "map to map" stats transfer is installed.

title: Reverse Turret Fortress
author: Nih
description: Reverse Turret Fortress is an assault version of the defense map The Turret Fortress. Players must invade the turret fortress, carrying a flag to capture points along a heavily-defended route leading into the fortress. Players can choose different classes on spawn, making the gameplay very similar to a Team Fortress Classic capture-the-flag map. Players can also grab special items at the spawn and use them to infiltrate the control/construction systems located inside of the fortress.
additional_info: The flag must be captured every seven minutes, or players lose the map. There are four flag capture points. Available classes are: Distractor, Sniper, Medic, Heavy, Runner

title: Richard Boderbot
author: Garompa
description: After the events of vger-2:the-lost-sequel your team stole an enemy dropship and reached the Viking ship in orbit, now captured by VGer. But the ship suddenly warps into space, escaping with everyone inside. You are stopped by VGer's forces and have landed on a nearby cargo vessel under attack. Help your allies, follow the Viking ship and board it!! Either you retake control of the Viking or you will have to find a way to destroy it later…
additional_info: The first map is losable! Defend the cockpit! Created as an unofficial sequel to vger-2:the-lost-sequel and richard-boderman-alternate maps This is a big experimental project to create new Sven Co-op experiences combining different GoldSrc maps from different authors. The theme is space and robots with heavy inspiration in Unreal Tournament (RIP), like Deck 16 and Hyperblast. A vast array of custom weapons from Unreal: Flak cannon, Biorifle, Redeemer, Razor, Stinger, Shockrifle, Sniper, Automag, Enforcers, Rocket Launcher, Pulsegun and much more I have added dynamic music so playing with some music volume is recommended The maps contain lots of weapon and monster scripts so its not recommended to be using weapon buy plugins or they may conflict. Since I'm not a scripter and some of the scripts are old, from authors that are no longer around, one day they will probably break with a new Sven version. But they still work after 6 years so let's be hopeful. Otherwise the fix is easy, just replace the broken monsters or weapons with their default counterparts and remove them from the scripts. EZ ⚠️ DIZZINESS WARNING ⚠️ The maps may give you dizziness, specially the last one. Because in SPACE there is no up or down! Things spin. If you are prone to be affected by this be warned. Some of the maps have secrets. The first secret is insanely overpowered, but being curious might make you regret it. Can you find the Instagib?

title: Richard Boderman
author: Aurora, JPolito, Puchi, hydeph
description: This map is based on the April Fools prank that occurred in 2005, where Richard Boderman took over Svencoop. It was first made by Aurora on April 1st 2005, then given to hydeph who did not succeed in finishing the map, then given to JPolito to finish. During the time it took to release, it was given to Puchi to fix several strange errors and problems. This map should have been released around April 1st, 2006, however Aurora and JPolito decided to make massive changes to the map, which ended with a much better looking and a much better running finished product. The goal of the map is for the players to defeat the army of Richard Boderman. The army consists of members who were active during the time of the Svencoop takeover. The players are given allies to help them fight, however, the allies definitely can not fight off the overwhelming strength of the Boderman army on their own. The players will have to raid two caverns in the center rock formation where major members and developers of Svencoop are being held captive. These members can be freed in order to help fight the Boderman army. There is also a radio-controlled huey helicopter which may circle the cliffsides. It is landed at a red target at the bottom of one side of the pit. To activate it, press the red button on the timer across from the landing pad. Players may use a combination of the minigun which respawns nearby and their own weapons to help obliterate the enemy soldiers on the inner and outer cliffsides. In order to activate the final boss sequence, the players must defeat 270 monsters. This usually takes around fifteen minutes. Defeat the army of Richard Boderman and take back SvenCoop!
additional_info: SC5.0 all issues seem to be eliminated, except for one that persists. The SFX for the huey helicopter's rotors plays once instead of looping. This cannot be fixed through ripent due to the sound being directly embedded into the map or so it seems. The map currently produces lag which can be eliminated by killing off some of the excess monsters while playing. This lag is fixed in Sven Co-op 4.0B. The end boss has been changed for Sven Co-op 4.0B. Note: An alternate version is available here with custom npcs richard-boderman-alternate

title: Richard Boderman Alternate
author: Aurora, JPolito, Puchi, hydeph
description: This is a ripent/edited version of richard-boderman moved from the main page to a new page by the author's request. It features unique models, sounds and monster_ entities for every single npc, creating lots of variety. Immersive dialogs from Richard Boderman, harder robot bosses.
additional_info: For more info check the changelog with all the details.

title: Rickshaw
author: Nih
description: In this map you are a contestant in some sort of game show in which a group of people compete for the grand prize consisting of millions of dollars!!!!! Unfortunately if you lose you die. The goal is to be the first one to reach the end of the map, using all means at your disposal. I basically wanted to create a map in which ego-tripping and screwing over your teammates is not just allowed, but even encouraged. I've created tons of opportunities for the player to gain advantages over his teammates, some of which are mentioned below. The map is split into 6 sections and 6 checkpoints. The checkpoints basically serve as a place to recharge your health and stock up on supplies. There are also random items scattered throughout the map. Items do not respawn in this map, which is made up for by the fact that there are far more available items than in usual maps. In each checkpoint you will also find 3 buttons: - The "Spawn Player Loadout" button spawns a set of assorted items. Only 8 loadouts are available at each checkpoint and the first 3 loadouts have extra goodies. Each player can spawn as many of the loadouts as he wants. - The "Destroy Items" button removes all non-weapon items from the previous section. - The "Release Gas" button fills all previous sections, except for the last one, with gas for 6 seconds. The "Release Gas" button is pretty sadistic, and I wasn't sure whether or not to include it in the map, but I simply couldn't resist the opportunity to add such a cruel gameplay device. It's basically a punishment for dying, and the punishment is more dying. Due to the lack of respawning items, you may occasionally find yourself without any weapons on a crowded server if you die. This is just part of the fun and you only have yourself to blame. You still have a chance to win, you'll just have to rely on other players for protection until you can find a new gun. The map is called Rickshaw for no particular reason, other than the fact that the word rickshaw is the greatest word and I wanted to use it in a map name.
additional_info: http://nih-mapping.dk/rickshaw.html http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=38029

title: Ricochet
author: Meryilla
description: Ricochet ported to Sven Co-op. Not much else to say. Comes with the 3 official maps: rc_arena - suitable for 2 players rc_deathmatch - suitable for 2-4 players rc_deathmatch2 - suitable for 4+ players
additional_info: I highly recommend you only put rc_deathmatch2 on map cycles, the other two are too small for public servers. The scripts should work with any Ricochet map you can find out there in the wild. Each map has a 20 minute time limit and 50 frag limit. You can customise this in the map config. This is a heavily scripted port, so players with high latency will suffer more than usual.

title: Rise of the Triad: The HUNT Begins
author: Wayne
description: It's time to go back and revisit another FPS classic in Sven Co-op now the one is Rise of the Triad: The Hunt Begins. This first version for Christmas only includes the first map of the 8 from the original Shareware release. So grab your UZI Akimbos and Rocket Launcher and prepare for some LUDICROUS GIBS!
additional_info: - Survival mode is supported. - There are no Life points scattered around. Rise of the Triad is property of Apogee Entertainment developed by Apogee Software. This map is for entertainment purposes only.

title: Robination
author: Silencer
description: In the chaos of the battle against zombies you lose your way and are now stuck up in some underground sewer. Survive the madness!
additional_info: For 2-8 players. 4 is recommended. You only have one life. Ledge-climbing is disabled. If one player reaches a checkpoint, all dead players will be revived. Pay attention to HUD messages. Take turns in using the flashlight when it's dark. Don't run into dark rooms alone like a berserker. Don't waste ammo. If time is short, don't waste it on zombies too much. Crouch in front of other players so they can shoot past you at the enemy. Be ready to heal teammates at any time. Value your armor. It is very durable against all sorts of attacks. Mind special items. They will be of use in the sequels.

title: Rooftop Warfare (Original)
author: Brian Mayberry
description: This is a port from my award winning mappak Pillars of Pain: A Buddy and Kona Saga, though this is just the first level of our pak, it is by far the most suited for Sven-Coop, in fact Sven-Coop was what I had in mind when I first made the pak. But at the time I had no lan =( so I decided that I could still play Coop in a DM style level if it was SP with barneys! Now that I have a lan and PoPBaks has died-down, I've decided to re-do it for Sven-Coop, largely thanks to Deathdog for the "I played your level, I saw it on PC Gamer's Best-of-Cd, it rocks, ect… ect… I make Sven-Coop maps…" and the rest is history. =)
additional_info: A rebuilt version of the map has been created by Ryan Lombardi. See Rooftop Warfare (Remake).

additional_info: Sidenote: This map was inspired by the map Rooftop Warfare (Original) by Brian 'Buddy' Mayberry (moc.tiabgarf|yddub#moc.tiabgarf|yddub) whose site and mailing adresss are dead (which prevented any contact between us). This map has been rebuilt from the ground up (literally).

title: Run and Gun
author: ReaLM
description: Don't you just love the recent wave of newbie mappers? Well here is my first map ever for Half-Life\SvenCoop or for any type of game for that matter. It is called 'RunAndGun' and what you do in this map is run around and gun down anything that isn't friendly. This was a pratice run at mapping for me and to see if I could learn worldcraft 3.3. The map is made for 2-8 people with grunts as your enemy force. Basic design and AI layout makes this map up. Here is the map and enjoy: oh look I found the edit thingy!!! (Updated the map) I changed a few things and added a couple secrets too. I left some visual clues as to where they are so all you have to do is look around. I got the impression that some people think all the map is is the base/spawn point. Well that is wrong and it is bigger than that. The map is split into three areas A, B and C. A is the base, B is on the other side of the boxes and C is on the other side of the fencing with the radio shack. …So here it is for anyone that cares
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=7684

title: Run For Freedom
author: Yossi Kohen
description: At first stage, there is a funny warm up. After that, you need to use your parkour skills (bunnyhop, longjump …) or you need your friends help (bugging, making human columns). Since this map created for rewarding the one who finished first, there is no meaning to help your friends as this is a rather competitive map. But you still need to co-operate because if you don't you probably won't be able to pass the first stage (You need some free space to gain speed.) because of collisions. 0 - Funny(?) warm-up 1 - Bunny hop stage 2 - Detailed movement stage 3 - Goldsource water stage 4 - Surf & Detailed movement stage 5 - Classic KZ from cs 1.6 #1 6 - Classic KZ from cs 1.6 #2 7 - Finish
additional_info: All things were created solely for fun. There is no offense. This map is not a product of commercial process.

title: Ruoste
author: RNG, Streamfox
description: DEMO MOTD Parts II & III: Laboratorical Storage Sections Mars, 2045 In the modern laboratory complexes near Cydonia, lies a mystical base which had cut itself from rest of the scientific research laboratories long ago. Many people think the specific lab sektor was invaded by unknown force, and the whole complex being turned into militarizing and altering local wildlife. Some beliefs lean towards even altering captured science team. Your agent team enters the complex to investigate and neutralize the threat which exists in this lab sektor. Armed only with special Gauss magnum.
additional_info: -Map demo is a part2 made into standalone version and doesnt contain parts by Streamfox, also it lacks half the puzzles. -Map mostly uses remixed sounds from Alien Swarm -Ruoste means rust in finnish

title: Rush
author: Ryan Goodrich
description: Run from your base to the shed in the back of the level marked "Generators". Turn on the first generator (there are 6 generators) and it will power 1 of the 6 doors in your base allowing that door to open and give you access to better weaponry. You cannot turn on a generator until all of it's previous generators have been turned on.
additional_info: N/A

title: Russia
author: ~Smith~
description: One global mission, real prototypes, real phototextures, real maps.
additional_info: These are Counter Strike maps by TopT converted into Sven Co-op maps

title: Rust
author: w00tguy123
description: A clone of Rust. Build bases, play guitar, and fight aliens (or players). This is loosely based on Rust builds from summer 2016.
additional_info: When the map first starts, it'll take a few minutes for the node graph to generate (it's huge). Latest scripts available here: https://github.com/wootguy/sc_rust + Known Bugs - Known Bugs glitches when inventory is full, sometimes rejoining doesn't always respawn you where you were when you left, and with the items you had monsters tend to congregate in one spot supply crates hover in the air if the object they landed on is removed flesh gather spot doesn't always align with the monster (depends on the death animation played) can't place items in fused doorways/windows (workaround: separate parts, place item, then fuse again) build placeholder isn't always transparent/tinted fused walls sometimes have glitchy collision. Rarely, fusing causes parts rotate weirdly, possibly breaking one of the part sockets in your base. window shutters have different hp for each half client crash when farming with inv open sometimes decal-related client crashes when hundreds of parts in a zone (workaround: set "mp_decals 2" and restart the game) Maps sometimes don't render correctly Boats clip into everything Can mine with bow by switching to melee wep after shooting Apache won't leave if you're inside your house Fire floats when part underneath is broken and much, much more!

title: S28
author: The fox
description: You are a unfortunate crew of security guards caught in the midst of the Black Mesa disaster, you must now fight your way out of the facility to survive. Almost no one is on your side, so value the allies you find. Just a few moments ago, a message was transmitted over the radio, indicating that a airborne rescue from the surface is possible, however they will not wait forever, so you will need to move quickly. There are also rumors that the old facilities hold a way out, but so far these are only rumors. Note: Alot in this map is controlled by random triggers, so what happens one time might not happen the other.
additional_info: Created for the 2009 Sven Co-op Map Contest.

title: SandStone
author: tdw, Hezus
description: A group of mercenaries have acquired bio-hazardous material and took shelter in a small town. Overhead surveillance of the area has confirmed nine targets for demolition. Your mission is to escort the Engineer to all of these targets. Your team will need to hold back any incoming forces and give the Engineer cover fire while he plants the explosives. Tip: Use the "Follow" command (npc_return) to keep the engineer moving through hostile territory.
additional_info: Included in Sven Co-op 4.0B and Sven Co-op 3.0 mod releases.

title: Sandstorm Defence Trilogy
author: Trempler
description: Welcome to the trilogy of Trempler's defense maps. Defend the breakable majjigagig in the center of the map from the hordes of monsters. The difficulty will increase and the maps will start to open and break! Allies will die and defensive turrets will be destroyed. Can you survive?
additional_info: The maps have no end except when losing. They progress very slowly.

title: Santa's Revenge
author: The_6th_Monkey
release_date:
Beta 6 - December 27, 2005
Beta 1-5 - a couple of days before Beta 6
description: Errrrrrr……..Santa's gone crazy…..from all that stress at Christmas…..Oh and he wants your brains for some reason O_o.
additional_info: Best played with 3-5 people. Map was made in just 3 days.

title: Santa's Workshop
author: rSnake, Andy
description: A puzzle map where players move from floor to floor in Santa's workshop solving various issues. There is no combat in this map, it is purely puzzles and platforming. All the puzzles in this map revolve around the concept of two teams - Green and Yellow. Each player is assigned to a team, and teams can only interact with coloured surfaces, buttons, and doors which match their team colour. e.g. Yellow team members can walk on yellow floors, but not on green floors. Your current team is displayed on your HUD on the left hand-side. Each player will also have an icon above their player model showing which team they are on. You can switch to the Green or Yellow team by typing .green or .yellow respectively in chat.
additional_info: At least 3 players are required, though you will find it much easier with a fourth. Originally a custom map for TFC. Differences to the original: HD music sources. Different songs are used for those I could not find the original source for Small changes to the text have been made, mostly spelling/grammar corrections The crate flinging puzzles have been simplified with trigger_push brushes, to account for the differences in func_pushable physics between SC and TFC Telefragging is disabled The map is easier in general compared to TFC due to much more lenient player movement Known issues: The sleigh ride at the end breaks very easily if people block it If you are hosting on Linux and installing into svencoop_addon, then you will need to copy or create a symlink to the TH spanner script: from: /path/to/svencoop/scripts/maps/hunger/weapons/weapon_spanner.as to: /path/to/svencoop_addon/scripts/maps/hunger/weapons/weapon_spanner.as

title: Save Sven
author: Hezus
description: My second map. The maps are based on a team of Sven Co-op players that must save Sven Viking (The maker of Sven Co-op) Sven has been captured by the evil G-man. The team breaks into the complex and then see Sven being taken away by aliens before you can rescue him. In the 2nd map you infiltrate the alien ship and then into a 2nd g-man outpost. I learned allot of the comments I got on Bridge so I used them in this 3 map-series.
additional_info: Read the Original Text Pre-Story ************** Story to map Save Sven Viking ************************ After a long night Sven returns to his office, finishing his new version of SvenCoop, when he sit down on his black chair, 3 grunts force his door and storm his office. Sven picks up his shotgun and shoots the Squadleader in his head. The 2nd grunt tries to get Sven but Sven shoots him his leg off so he flies out the door. When Sven looks behind him, he sees a big foot (KICK) right in his face. When he wakes up he found himself in a prison with THE EVIL G-MAN (scary sound!). -"Well, It`s looks ehh..(always making that noise) our guest woke up.." said THE EVIL G-MAN (another scary sound!) -"What do you want from me ? said Sven. -"I noticed ehh.. SvenCoop is the best HL mod there is, so you ehh.. must be very intelligent, ehh.. So I want your BRAIN (very scary sound!). -"WHAT ? MY BRAIN ? U NEVER GET IT BLOODSUCKER ! (Sven yelling) -"Yesss, ehh.. braintransplantation is a new technology, we need it to ehh.. test first. -"Test ?" -"Yess, some guy named ehh.. what was his name again ?" -"Sir, Freeman Sir!" said the grunt with one leg. -"ehh.. yess. Gordon Freeman..I remember. We didn`t need him after all.. I remember much about him... ehh. When he was still in that... - (Sven interrupting) "I was thinking this story was about me !?" -"ehh.. yesss Mr Viking. You still have ehh.. 4 hours left, use them wise.." The G-man leaves, and you are in prison with 2 guards. How to get out ? Very sneaky you steal the guards radio, and send a message to the SvenCoop HQ. At the SCHQ. Announcement systems boring voice : " Attention all players. Report to briefing NOW ! " After a while everybody is in the briefing room listening to Mr. Sniper. Sniper : "We got a message for 10 minutes ago. Otis : "Did the new Donuts arrive ? Sniper : "Do NOT panic everybody ! Sven has been kidnapped ! (silence) Hezus : Sniper, you didn`t tell us everything did you ???!! Sniper : You are right there is a 2nd thing.... Hezus : I knew it, TELL US ! Sniper : Well,.yes.. there is no more coffee left.. ( PANIC, SCREAMING, YELLING, RUNNING AROUND ) Sniper : Silence ! Sit down everybody. We must save Sven. Beetchy: ONLY IF HE BUYS NEW COFFEE ! Sniper : Ok, ok, he will ! Hezus : What are we waiting for ? Let`s go trough the teleporter ! After a while all players are spawned outside the building where Sven is inprisoned. Everybody is holding their 9mmAR MP4, shotguns and crowbars. Hezus : Ok guys, let`s kick some G-mans ass ! ******************** TO BE ENDED *************************

title: Saving Private Barney
author: Meat_Popsicle
description: fun and crazy map for sven coop Made by Marc B and Matt P
additional_info: Act 2 was lost ages ago, just pretend u made it half way thru the complex b4 u came to a big ugly dead end so u blow a hole into the sewage system… cue act 3

title: Saving The 2nd Amendment
author: Halfliferyan
description: A series of short maps featuring hordes of grunts. Many maps are copies of each other with different combinations of enemies.

title: Saw
author: rainman
description: Jigsaw: "Greetings and welcome. I trust that you are all wondering where you are. I can assure you that while your location is not important, what these walls offer for you is important. Salvation, if you earn it. Three hours from now the door to this house will open. Unfortunately, you only have 2 hours to live. Right now, you are breathing in a deadly nerve agent. You've been breathing it since you've arrived here. Those of you familiar with the Tokyo subway attacks will know its devastating effects on the human body. The only way to overcome it and walk out that door is to find an antidote. One is inside the safe in front of you. Let the game begin."
additional_info: Originally an escape map series for TFC so expect lots of platforming, puzzles which require coordinated teamwork, and no combat. At least 3 players are required to complete the map. The map is very loosely based on the 2nd film in the Saw franchise.

additional_info: N/A

title: SC5X Bonus
description: HIDE AND SEEK Hiders [Blue]: Stay hidden for as long as you can. Don't get caught. Seeker [Red]: Find the hiders. Catch them. (By "tagging" them with your knife.) The Captured Room: When a hider is found and caught, they go to the Captured Room. Once captured you cannot re-join the round unless another hider sets you free with the "Security Override" button. Each round lasts 5 minutes before it resets. TO SWITCH BETWEEN HIDER/SEEKER To become a hider send ".hider" in the text chat or console. To become a seeker send ".seeker" in the text chat or console. By default you will be a hider when joining the game. Only one player can be the seeker at a time, and will be taken away at each round reset. There are two main areas beyond the subway, which are the Docks and the City. Access to these areas alternates each round.
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic.

title: Scientist Guard
author: Tuesday's Avenger
description: Sciguard is a defense map that has the players defending a group of 5 scientists from a horde of zombies, gonomes, and other alien beasties. As long as one is left alive after 15 minutes, the players are victorious.
additional_info: This map is best played with four or more people. One person needs to herd the scientists into the back room so that they don't freak out and run into the combat area while the other three attempt to secure the three hallways which the monsters spawn from. Different monsters spawn with the passing minutes. Players can be quickly overwhelmed if there are not enough.

title: Scientist Guard 2
author: Tuesday's Avenger
description: OBJECTIVE: Defend the 5 scientists for 15 minutes. At least one scientist must survive. As some of you may know, I worked for quite a while on a project called SciGuard 2: a defense map requiring the players to defend 5 scientists against a horde of monsters. It was a lot of fun to work on, if probably a little overdone, and I had planned to release it sometime last year - until a total hard drive crash left me without any source files and no way to continue work without starting from scratch. However, thanks to the help of a friend of mine, I have one of the later (although not the final) builds of SciGuard 2, which is fully playable. It lacks a number of the features I wanted to add, but I'm still proud of what's there and I think it's a lot of fun to play. The map is provided as is - it has a number of glitches and missing features, and the design isn't finalized; however I still hope everyone will enjoy the map. Fair warning: The r_speeds on this map are brutal. Comments / Suggestions are welcome, but keep in mind: I cannot update or change this map, and it is essentially a work-stuck-in-progress.
additional_info: The battlefield is broken into 3 major sectors - North, Central, and South - joined by teleport zones. You arrive in these teleporter zones from the spawn area. Take the GREEN lit teleporter chambers to return to spawn. Enemies will attack from the tunnels leading to the 3 main arenas. Every few minutes a group of randomly selected High-Threat enemies will appear from a randomly selected tunnel. These foes will be much more dangerous and will likely require combined firepower to defeat. Return to the spawn area to grab weapons, ammo, and health. Beware, the delay in resupplying can be costly. HEV chargers are located in the North arena. Defend them! You have 3 mobile sentries at your disposal; they can be moved like a pushable by walking up to them, then pressing and holding the "use" key. Sentries can be repaired using the Wrench. Beware of sentry lines of fire - they can harm scientists, allied NPCs, and other turrets. Use the Medkit to heal injured scientists, other players, and allied NPCs. You are assisted by Leonard and Geoffrey, a pair of tame Vortigaunts. They are more powerful than the average Vort, and can be a powerful asset. However, be sure to keep them healed! If they go down and you do not revive them, they are lost permanently. Use the Medkit's revive feature to bring back fallen players; the time lost in respawning can cost you control of an area. Scientist counters are located in several areas, and will display how many of the science officers are alive (green) or dead (red). Scientists cannot be revived. The South area teleporters do not work; this feature was not finished at the time of the crash.

title: Scientist Run
author: Hezus
description: You were working on your project together with other scientists. But today your work will be done. Today you will complete the research on the HypoShacker. This device can track meteors in space. Let`s hope that those guys in Anomimal Materials do not use all the power today. The day started bad. You had trouble with your wife and the dog chewed on your shoes. And now you stand waiting in front of the elevator. After pressing a few buttons nothing happens. Seems it is jammed. After calling Otis, who tried to fix the elevator by hitting on the keypad which resulted in a complete elevator failure, you are now waiting on the handyman to come and fix that damn elevator so you can finally complete your greatest invention.. Suddenly the lights start flickering.. Then you hear strange sounds..

title: Scientist Save
author: Hezus
description: Rescue the scientist and don't kill the scientist if you lose. So kill all the military.
additional_info: N/A

title: Scientist Smasher
author: Unknown
description: 14 death rooms with some custom models.
additional_info: N/A

title: Scientists
author: Trainee / Freakin
description: The Alien Slayer's Gamble Last night, the player, Gordon, had been boasting to two scientists after a night of heavy drinking, claiming to be the ultimate alien killer. He was quite the show-off. The next day, as they were on their way to the cinema, they received a message: a horde of monster zombies was headed their way. Gordon, not wanting to appear weak, reassured the scientists that nothing would happen to them and that they could rely on him completely. Little did he know, this would be the ultimate test of his bravado. The scientists, looking at him with a mix of hope and skepticism, followed his lead. As the sun dipped below the horizon, casting eerie shadows across the deserted streets, Gordon led the way, determined to prove his claims right.
additional_info: Beta 3 has a lot more variety within the monster waves. You can play solo now and i did a lot balancing. Overall it is a lot more ripent :-) I would love to hear feedback on it :-) I couldn´t test the difficulty setting with 2-3 & 4-5 player-settings, so that could be a bit too easy and i am working on that next

title: Scots Doom Nukeplant
author: Scotsman
description: A short map in the style of doom.
additional_info: N/A

title: SCSkillz 2
author: Zorbos
description: Your average skill map with a twist. Instead of trying to reach the end, you can have a "relay" race with other players. The map is split into two teams, each jump is exactly identical on both sides, and each team travels through the map in the same sequence of jumps. At the end of each jump there are two buttons that two players must press at the same time, which opens the portal to the next area. After a team reaches the end of the map, they will need to open a portal that once stepped-through will win the round for their team. After the round ends, the players are respawned at the beginning and it all starts over again…
additional_info: The map is meant to have 2 people on each team, to balance out the game.

title: Sea Side Serie Revised
author: MassAsster
description: SeaSide
additional_info: N/A

title: Search N Destroy
author: Hezus
description: Mission Objectives: - Find, capture and hold all zones - Destroy enemy weapon caches with C4 charges - Defend the base Hints / Tips - Return found weapons to the base to add them to your arsenal - Use the radio to call in reinforcements (respawns dead players) - Found weapons can C4 charges are inventory items. Refer to the HUD icon and the inventory (i) to see what you are currently carrying. You can only carry one C4 charge and a limited load of found weapons.
additional_info: This map started out when I wanted to revamp Sandstone in early 2020. I had already upgraded the map once before years ago. After making some new textures and reworking a few streets I found the layout quite limiting and it felt better to start something new from scratch and thus SnD was born. SnD started as a working title (short for "sand" or "search 'n destroy") but it stuck and I never bothered to change it. I really wanted to push the engine this time and make something rather unique to Sven Co-op: an open world map where you could navigate the map at your own pace and insights. The most challenging part of the design is the fact that it's the goldsrc engine. Huge outdoor areas doesn't make it happy and large polycounts will grind the performance to a halt even on modern machines. I've taken great care to design the map in perfect 128x128 blocks with plenty of VIS blocks and HINT brushes pretty much everywhere. It's been a lot of work to get the map done not only because of the size but also because I made nearly everything by myself from stratch. This gave me the freedom however, to create the map exactly as I wanted it to be and that was pretty cool.

title: Secret Base
author: alexitox81
description: Kill all the bad aliens in the labalatory!!
additional_info: Missing 50% for the map :(

title: Secret City Keen
author: Turrican, Keen
description: Part 1 of a multi-part map series based loosely around the events of SecretCity 3. You and your teammates are exploring a seemingly abandoned complex. Although this map retains the SecretCity name and involves puzzles, it plays differently than normal SecretCity maps and has an ending.
additional_info: A minimum of 2 players is required to complete the puzzles. Sequels are planned and already in the works. The final version of SecretyCityKeen will target part 2 of the series as its next map. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

author: Keen
description: Part 2 of a multi-part map series based loosely around the events of SecretCity 3. You and your teammates are exploring a seemingly abandoned complex. Although this map retains the SecretCity name and involves puzzles, it plays differently than normal SecretCity maps and has an ending.
additional_info: This one is the sequel to Secret City Keen, and is on an alpha stage. It has an ending and is playable but many features of the map are still unfinished. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: Secret City X
author: Turrican
description: It should be obvious what these maps are about, by now.
additional_info: Map Information: You appear in a building in an oddly angular city. What badly executed secrets can you discover here? Tip: go down the stairs This map contains changes I actually made to secretcity5 years ago but was unable to compile due to engine limitations. This is a version of Secretcity5 with the changes nobody ever got to see now there are fewer limits. This should be thought of as an extended Secretcity5 rather than a new map, and I might consider extending it further at some point since it is my favorite of all the ones I made. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: Secret Elementals 1
author: Piesek
description: This is a my super map. I create it 2 days. And this map no have bugs… (PL:) To jest moja super mapa. Ja ją tworzyłem 2 dni. Ta mapa nie ma bugów..
additional_info: This map for 2 players. Good play it. And this map is for thinking… (PL:) Ta mapa jest dla 2 graczy. Dobrze sie w nią gra. I to jest mapa na myślenie..

title: Secret Garden
author: Victor-933
description: Deep in the steamy jungles of the Congo, Great Dane continues the centuries-long tradition of brutally exploiting this war-torn African region for its mineral wealth. Complex 374-2A was established with the help of a generous donation to the local Congolese warlord, who allotted the mining conglomerate a parcel of land deep within what is supposed to be protected Silverback Gorilla territory. Great Dane, in typical fashion, isn't about to let a little thing like a few endangered species get in their way — there's gold in them hills! Meanwhile, the ecoterrorist group Eden's Guard have taken particular exception to this latest affront by Great Dane, and have launched a clandestine assault on the mining complex to shut it down for good…
additional_info: This was originally a Half-Life Deathmatch level that can be found here

title: Secret Hitler
author: AllMightyDorile
description: So this is my first map hope to get better .. :)
additional_info: Think outside the box.

title: Secret Hunt 1
author: AmIAnnoyingNow
description: This is a quick map where you have to find all the "secret boxes" in all the areas. There are 60 secrets in all, 10 in each area. 24 easy, 18 medium, 12 hard, 6 leet, leet being the hardest to find. There are 10 secrets in each of the 6 areas. Winning the map is possible with one player.
additional_info: This is just a fun map, so there is not much detail, but it should keep you entertained for a while. Don't try stacking to cheat to a box, most of them have invisible walls to stop this. Followed by Secret Hunt 2.

title: Secret Hunt 2
author: AmIAnnoyingNow
description: The objective of the map is to find all the secret boxes. There are 4 types of boxes: Easy, Medium, Hard, and 1337, the latter of the four being the hardest to find. There are 1 1337, 2 hard, 3 mediums, and 4 easy in each area.
additional_info: There is a counter in the main room which counts up to 299, but will never pass 100. The boxes by the portal represent what type of boxes remain in the area. 7 Areas: Jump Zone 2; Grenade Zone; Office of no Escape; Desert Maze; Cliff Zone; Sky Castle; Newbieland. Sounds are played when someone finds a hard or leet secret. Points are awarded for everything above easy. (Medium-1; Hard-10; 1337-100) I need to mention that you do not get points for medium or hard in newbie land (For obvious reasons). This areas mainly for a laugh. Preceded by Secret Hunt 1.

title: Secret Lab
author: The fox
description: You find yourself in a very familiar lab. With secrets to uncover. Collect the items to make the bomb to access the exit portal. A map inspired by SecretCity Saga Remastered and They Hunger
additional_info: Originally a map for the dead TWLZ server by The Fox. Never saw the light of day or was finished, and the TWLZ community died before it could be released. The map was refurbished by Garompa as much as it could be restored. Bits and pieces of other rooms were scattered around, seemingly to have been deleted before compile due to the map reaching engine limits. These pieces were included into the rest of the map. Objectives were added, bugs and textures were fixed massively.

title: Secret Lounge 2016
author: boxes, softdrink
description: This map is meant for messing about and spamming the E key on walls. There's triggers everywhere, and tiny things to notice. If you're in a room, there's a very good chance there's something in there with you. Most puzzles can be completed with a minimum of two people. To get to the main hub loop, press E on the black guy's forehead. That's the only hint you'll get from me. The only way to 'officially' win the map is by finding all the 'Small Secret Triggers', which will break open the wall in the hub loop, however this requires you to get to each room, and even then there will still be things to find.
additional_info: I originally made this near the end of the year of 2016, but I forgot it existed for a while and took my sweet ass time releasing it. But, here it is. Known bugs: None, all of them have been fixed in the b7 version AFAIK.

title: Secret Rats
author: Dexter
description: This is Dexter's second map. It's a rats type map and is medium difficulty.
additional_info: Sorry for my bad english. I am from poland :)

title: Secret Rats 2
author: Dexter
description: This is a rats type map. It has monsters and hidden weapons.
additional_info: N/A

title: Secret Task
author: Ice Box
description: The author did not leave a map description. But this is what can be understood: Secret Task is the name of the mission the players are sent to. They must infiltrate a Japanese base because of reasons.
additional_info: The map series is unfinished. A "To be continued" text appears at the end. The first map has a remake included. Servers should ignore the old version of the map (sc_tl_secrettask_1a.bsp) and use sc_tl_secrettask_new1a.bsp instead

title: Secret World
author: AmIAnnoyingNow
description: A walkthrough map with secrets hidden everywhere imaginable. How many can you find?
additional_info: This map has 40 secrets to find total. It is possible to complete the map without finding the secrets, but finding secrets will allow you to obtain better weapons. At the end of the map, there is a counter displaying how many secrets you have found, and you are given a reward or punishment based on how many you have found.

title: SecretCity
author: Turrican
description: This map was created for messing around in. As the name suggests, it is full of secrets. Secret buttons, hidden buttons. I finished this map in late 2003, but I could not release it due to a number of stupid reasons. Eventually I lost the RMF in an equally stupid incident, and could'nt work on it anymore, making this version the last version I ever made. The same moronic incident which lost me the RMF also lost me the BSP, but I recently managed to get it from a friend, who had been circulating the map around svencoop in my absence. Now I can properly release the map. Although it isn't finished, its as close as it will ever get now. But a secretcity2 is coming. The map has no 'objectives', and no ending. Think of it like a 'lounge map', or an indoors OMG.
additional_info: Less coherent than its sequels. No real ending and not quite as many secrets, but well worth playing. Followed by SecretCity 2 but it doesn't continue where it finished. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: Secretcity 2
author: Turrican
description: If you played the first SecretCity, you should know what this is like. It's a fun map where players can just explore the map, complete puzzles, and find secrets. Contains a lot more secrets and puzzles, and is much bigger in comparison to the first SecretCity.
additional_info: Turrican reached the entity limit and can not add anything more to the map. Contains no real ending, but there's plenty of secrets and puzzles to keep players occupied. Preceded by SecretCity, but does not continue where it left off. Followed by SecretCity 3. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: SecretCity 3
author: Turrican
description: Locked in a stupid pointless building in the middle of some random city, you must find solutions to puzzles and use teamwork to get through some puzzles.
additional_info: Turrican cannot add any more to this map because it has hit the entity limit. Preceded by SecretCity 2. Followed by SecretCity 4. SecretCityKeen, a collaboration between Turrican and Keen, is based loosely around the events of SecretCity 3. 2 Players recommended. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: SecretCity 4
author: Turrican
description: After the heavily goal-oriented SecretCity 3, Turrican returned to a style which is more like a combination of the first two maps in the series. At first glance it may seem as if you are locked inside a small area of a building with very little to do, but a closer inspection will begin to reveal secrets everywhere, some just holes to hide in, others allow you to open new areas of the map.
additional_info: Turrican cannot add any more to this map because it has hit the entity limit. As with SecretCity 3, this resulted in a black wall at the end of the map. Preceded by SecretCity 3. Followed by SecretCity 5. All of the 'Secret Tiggers' must be found to unlock the rest of the map. Finding all 'Super Secret Tiggers' will activate a bonus area. The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: SecretCity 5
author: Turrican
description: You appear in a building in an oddly angular city. What badly executed secrets can you discover here? Tip: Go down the stairs
additional_info: Secret City X The map have been updated to the new versions of Sven Co-op and the stuff that couldn't be there before because of the old limits have been added, it is recommended to play the new version instead This map, like most other Secret City maps, incomplete due to an engine limitation. You will find yourself taken on top of a building with a vent entrance after the final credits room — that's the one with the pictures, not the one in the small black room. If you find yourself in a small icy area with a Turrican door, you're at the end of a puzzle chain and must kill yourself to continue from the start. If you have not found all the super duper secrets by this point, you need to look harder. Preceded by SecretCity 4. Followed by SecretCity 6?? This map has many more secret places and triggers than previous secret city maps. You really need to look hard to find them all! All of the 'Super Secret Tiggers' must be found to unlock the door to the city, although you don't need it as you can leave via a side exit. Finding all 'Super Duper Secret Tiggers' will activate a bonus area! The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: SecretCity 6
author: Turrican
description: The map has no description.
additional_info: Unofficial information from AdamR. Not officially released. Submitted here with explicit permission from Turrican. This map is set in a tower block. It doesn't appear to continue from any of the previous maps. You must find 4 elemental tablets for starters. This map is unfinished and without any source data to finish it. Therefore it will never be finished. Once you reach a small platform that hovers across a pit to a wall about 5m/16ft away, you're at the end. Enjoy. :) The secretcity series were originally made to be fun, lobby maps with no end, but they birthed an infamous saga of its own with its unique atmosphere and gameplay. So, decades later the community made a server-ready walkthrough playable version with tons of bugfixes. You can find the updated remastered version here: SecretCity Saga Remastered

title: SecretCity Saga Remastered
author: Turrican
description: This is a standalone series containing ALL of Turrican's Secret City series maps FIXED and WORKING with proper endings ready for hosting on any server, ALSO including Die, Fracture, the new SecretCityX and a community-made map of the ending to the series, which was just an idea by the author, now called RedDeath. Meaning the entire saga is complete! All of them have been ripented fully to accomodate easier secret finding for the common server dweller, a story, references, changelevels between maps, actual endings to the maps and to the entire series as well. Lewd textures have been censored for safe hosting on servers, and maps have been renamed to prevent mismatch errors with the original maps. This version, in comparison to the original maps, contain a HUGE amount of fixes and modifications, that have been approved and tested by the author Turrican himself and Vorinc (in short: the OGs), so you could think of this as the best version of Secret City that exists, which also gets as close to the official intentions and ideas as it can. If you want to play the original versions, you can try them first at secretcity-series LORE: + release notes / changelog – release notes / changelog You find yourselves in a strange dimension full of traps and secrets. You must find clues as to where you are and how to get out. Turrican has explained that they used a ship to reach places never reached before by mankind for what it seems was an interdimensional manhunt. But upon returning they brought back something, the entire city warped back in pieces to somewhere unknown, where laws of physics, space and time don't work the same way. And worse is that now they are being hunted by that something. Your mission is to find Turrican and help him fix this disaster before it is too late. Dr. Walter once found a way through Xen and into a dimension where there was nothing. Or so he thought. Walter came back but during his time in the nothing dimension he unknowingly became its God, creating a being in his image after he saw his own reflection on his wristwatch while waiting for teleport back to Earth. This clone only knew to do the same. And so another clone was created. And this one made another… and it repeated until the nothing dimension was later known as… the Walter dimension! Turrican made use of the Walters as unreliable, expendable, unlimited workers on his extradimensional routines. Now after the redmetal catastrophe, the city was overrun and wiped out by his Walters coming from the sealed Walterhouse workshop next to his lab, and the mysterious shadow people. Try to guess where you are now… Trapped inside this warped Walterhouse you will have to use your respawning powers to push forward while something keeps telling you to… JUST DIE. Because you just won't. As the redmetal grows around the city, pieces of it are falling to the abyss below! Saved by just a step, most of the city falls to the nether taking the Walterhouse with it. Turrican and his team are supposed to be nearby. You must help them fix the ship to get out of this dimension. But after finding Turrican and the ship, things look a bit… off. – release notes / changelog RELEASE NOTES: + release notes / changelog – release notes / changelog Did you know that the secret city series evolved to include a story and map endings? (or at least a simple idea from the author) which was showed vaguely only on some maps? Before the author just disappeared. Well, now he is back and with his help the community fixed the maps for a new experience. These new version of the maps are ripented, so there is no version mismatch, and includes map endings, map changes(connection between them) objectives and a storyline. To play the entire remastered secret city saga campaign you will have to start from the very first map: "secretcity". If you need to load another map to continue playing where you left off then here is the map order: secretcity_r_1 > secretcity_r_2 > secretcity_r_3 > secretcity_r_4 > secretcity_r_5 > secretcity_r_5x > secretcity_r_6 > secretcity_r_k > secretcity_r_k2 > secretcity_r_die > secretcity_r_frac > secretcity_r_red "scrm_die" and "scrm_fracb1" are actually also originally part of the secretcity series storyline. The last map that goes after "fracb1" never existed, only bits and pieces, ideas from the author, but a new community made map now takes its place trying to recreate at least the last part of the adventure to give it closure (it was called RedWorld, but was never released and source files were lost. Now this cheap version is called RedDeath).1 – release notes / changelog Actual massive changelog can be found down below.

title: Sector E
author: CryoKeen
description: You are part of a special branch of the military tasked with going into the classified research facility "Black Mesa" and extracting a scientist named "Gordon Freeman", alive. You are not part of the main military force sent into the facility to "cleanup". You may encounter some military forces who are friendly and will help you, and you may encounter some who are hostile. You are given permission to open return fire to protect yourself if you are fired upon.
additional_info: It's 2025 and we have found and added 2 remaining lost maps from these series! sectore_4 and sectore_5 are now patched up and added to the other 3 maps

author: Angel
description: Sectore Levels is a map type run/defend/survival, where you and your teammates must complete certain objectives in order to reach Level 5 and get out, currently it has 2 levels, but I will add the others soon.
additional_info: This map is designed for exactly 2 players, maybe more players can help. This is the full version 1 & 2. NOTE: Some models/sounds are modifications, I got them somewhere, I don't remember the exact location, but if I remember I'll add them in the credits. If you see any error, please notify in the comment box.

description: NOTE: For the heavily updated version of this map, please see Sector E. So.. uhh, story you ask? Well, you and your buds just escaped a fiery explosion, as you will be able to hear in the beginning, and you run out into a small loading area and the fire door closes behind you. You get a strange sense of deja'vu..

title: Severed
author: R E A P E R
description: An experimental research facility has been taken over by a hostile administrator. He has taken the research team as prisoners, and has full control over the site's teleportation equipment. We have sent in a team ahead of you, but communications were severed soon after they were dispatched. We believe that the ex-administrator is using the teleport device to immediately intercept any rescue attempt by instantly sending in enemy soldiers, to attack our forces. Using this method he can have his teams ready to attack any location in the facility at any time. It is up to you to infiltrate his advanced forces and rescue the prisoners. Only after they are safe are you to attempt to retake control of the teleportation control room and use it to get back home. Good luck!
additional_info: N/A

title: Sewer Systematic: Toxicidia Sektor 516
author: RNG
description: 2087 Extrsurreal Hyperpolis, Phobos Econopolis owned by other extraterrestrial species. You are to investigate anomalous Sewer Control Sector 516, which has been excluded due to extreme contamination Malignification with Multiradiation-waste leak 10 years ago and now its totally unknown. Sewer Control Sector 516 was highly populated with Xen, and you have no sense what kind of funny place it is now. The reason why you were transported in this desolate Sector is that once again Barnabus legion captured Scientists and they're held captive somewhere deep inside. Somehow find these Scientists alive or if they've undergone full zombification, just kill them.
additional_info: At least 2 players are required to play.

title: SEXR
author: SharkMan
description: A rats party/lounge map built as a replica of SharkMan's bedroom. Ride in the toy car, on the rocket ship, or swim in the fish tank—there's plenty to do.
additional_info: https://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/24544-Sexr The map gets its name from the first letter of SharkMan plus the initials of his name, Ethan Xavier Radg, hence SEXR. Good map for HookMod. Bug: The turret lags a lot, so be cautious or it could cause a crash.

title: Shanghai Harbor
author: MysticMDT
description: Mission Info: We received word from our agents in China that a document proving a link between the Chinese Government and the mafia can be found within the harbor of Shanghai where the mafia's base is located. There have been some strange reports of mutated creatures throughout the area, possibly the result of genetic experiments by the mafia. Be careful. Objective: Locate the secret passage in the Villa and retrieve this document Locate any Bosses/leaders in the area and kill them Escape the harbor Good luck!
additional_info: Entry in the Sven Co-op Mapping Contest. Included in the Sven Co-op Contest Map Pack.

description: Objective: Reach Surface, under ANY means possible. Stranded deep in a military facility, with few options, and only equipped with a standard class 'B' grunt's weaponry: MP5 Uzi Shotgun .357 Magnum You must fight your way to the surface! This requires your infiltration squad to work as a team to complete the mission.
additional_info: Included in Sven Co-op 4.0B, Sven Co-op 3.0, Sven Co-op 2.1, Sven Co-op 2.0F, and Sven Co-op 2.0B mod releases. Ranked #7 in the Creepsworld Top50 maps list.

title: Shephard's Adventures
author: noSICK
description: A short map series featuring Adrian Shephard and his adventures throughout Black Mesa with elements of classic level design.
additional_info: The maps have been adapted for multiplayer by an increased number of enemies and enemy spawns and minor puzzles that require some exploration. This is to make the maps slightly more challenging and lengthy for a more enriched experience. Maps features AntiRush support that is optional, and is disabled by default. To enable AntiRush, open shadv.as and go to Line 10 - change this to "true". const bool blAntiRushEnabled = false;

title: Shift-Two
author: Loulimi
description: You play as Otis, the overweight security guard. You survive the Black-Mesa incident and must escape with your colleagues. You’ll need to find somebody to help repair the tram though! "It is my first mod, Shift-Two. In this mod, you are Otis, the fat security man. You survive at the Black-Mesa incident and you must run away Black Mesa facility with your colleaugues for save your life." - Loulimi
additional_info: This is a conversion made very quickly. Hopefully the remake of this mod is will be also made for Sven Co-op since that author has done other sven maps!

title: Shitty PUBG
author: incognico
description: - The Last Man Standing wins, stay alive and kill the others - Every spawn gets a slow vehicle, 9 fast vehicles are available in the center of the map - Be careful with vehicles, they can smash you to death while driving (drive responsibly) - The moving walls are going to kill you, don't even try to get pushed by them - You have 2 armor points while holding the frying pan (use to your advantage) - Weapons deal way less damage than in normal Sven Co-op - After ~3 minutes only a small area is available and the players HP get reduced by 1 every 3.75 sec until they are dead - At the end you can choose to vote to play another round Also I've never played PUBG.
additional_info: Abandoned-at-release. This basically was a small TerrainGenerator/Hammer/AngelScript playground figuring out how to do things like cloning vehicles, placing stuff randomly and doing entitiy stuff in AS. I've decided to release it as with some players it can be fun for a short while. Also vehicles. There is a check which ends the game if there are less than 2 players at map begin, if you want to play alone for whatever reason (driving around?) then remove lines 57 and 58 in the map script. PvP in Sven Co-op only supports only up to X players so I've limited it to 12, the remaining players can only observe (which is fun too). May it be used to have fun or as an inspiration / example to other mappers who actually can map good.

ShockRaid_Jungle is an short assault mission. mission info is simple Our advance team was recovered an enemy SpyDrone，But they were besieged by enemyforce. Your team need to go deep into the jungle，find your allys and take the SpyDrone back. -Recommended for 10-16 players to playing this map. title: Shogo
author: glitchenco
description: Small quick but hard coop map based on the 1998 Monolith's game 'Shogo: Mad' it was a 4 days quick mapping challenge i made for myself -You are a member of the UCA faction, you and your squad starts in one of the entrances of the UCA headquarters and will attempt to capture the base already taken over by the mercenary faction 'Fallen' Ai have increased damage so you won't be able to rush it too easily. Map can be played with xp mode but will be less fun, it is suggested to play without it. perfect for 2-5 players. part 2 will come probably in end of this year with larger areas, harder ai, respawning ais and scenes. sorry about the spanish subtitles in game let me know if you find any other bug. have fun.

author: glitchenco
description: Another tribute to 'Shogo Mad' the classic Monolith's 98's game. I made this map in a week as a challenge. -You are a member of the UCA faction, you and your squad must continue with the mission to capture the UCA base already taken over by the mercenary faction 'Fallen' Ai have increased damage and can respawn in random areas for extra difficulty the map can be played with xp mode but it's reccomended to play without it for extra challenge/fun. let me know if you find any bug in the map. have fun.
