title: Single-Player Campaign Portal
author: Puchi
release_date:
v7.1 - March 31, 2019 (SC 5.19)
v7 - January 19, 2019 (SC 5.18)
v6 - March 2, 2016 (SC 5.03)
v5 - February 20, 2016 (SC 5.02)
v4 - January 22, 2016 (SC 5.0)
v3 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v2 - September 2, 2010 (SC 4.5)
v1 - December 24, 2008 (SC4.0B)
description: Sven Co-op 5 Portal map for Single Player Campaigns (Currently: HLSP, Uplink, OpFor, Blue Shift and TH). YOU NEED AT LEAST TWO PEOPLE IN ORDER TO CHOOSE A CHAPTER. Chapters are sub-divided by game: Ground level Opposing Force, first story Half-Life + Uplink, Outside area Blue Shift + They Hunger. If an Area is not accessible, either the server admin disabled it, or the Single Player Campaign is not available on the Server. Each table with two consoles represents a chapter. You need to press both buttons on a table at once WHILE STAYING DIRECTLY IN FRONT OF THE CONSOLE. When you fail to open a Portal, you will hear "Access Denied".
additional_info: Q: HOW CAN I EXPLOIT THE SYSTEM, IT SUCKS, I WANT TO CHANGE THE CHAPTER BY MYSELF! A1: The system was made so that it could not get exploited. Jonesy and I wanted a more fair system than in the old Portal map. A2: By now possible. Open scripts/maps/sp_portal/sp_portal_main.as Look for the lines // If the player count from the game_zone_player is 2, do the following stuff if (flValue == 2) { Q: THAT PORTAL SYSTEM IS COOL! HOW DID YOU DO IT? A: Utilizing game_zone_player, an idea from Jusupov. Q: THERE'S A CHAPTER OF OPPOSSING FORCE MISSING, IDIOT! A: Yes, because three maps earlier another chapter begins. Q: OMG! PLZ TELL ME TEH SECRET!!1111 A: REMOVED IT. We cannot use copyright protected material in official content anymore. This is why the Posters in the HL area were replaced aswell. Those are royalty free picture. Q: CAN I HAVE SEX WITH YOU? A: why not (:

title: Skillrun 3
author: rSnake
description: A bhop/strafe jumping course from Team Fortress Classic (TFC). Moderately difficult and also has a bunch of secrets to find. There are 8 collectible flowers throughout the map, collecting them all will open the secret room at the end. Picking up a flower kills you however - so only attempt this after you've completed the course! Movement speed is a little lower than default here to bring it closer to TFC, but the map is generally much easier in SC due to leniant player movement.
additional_info: There is a basic port of this map floating around various servers, however I was never satisfied with it as it only corrected the spawns. Now all the secrets and other missing features have been restored to work in SC, or adjusted where necessary. You will need to know how to either bhop or strafe jump in order to complete this map. Originally a custom map for TFC. Differences to the original: HD music sources. TFC Weapons in secret room replaced with boxing gloves from Grunt's Course. Added gauss cannon in secret room. Double damage trigger in secret room now gives 999999 hp instead. Added observer mode script.

title: Skylined
author: Pinapoke
description: Welcome to New York, men. You've been called in to find a team we lost a few days ago. They drove their vehicle to the garage of their target destination, and wasn't heard from after that. You must find the team, and bring them back to head quarters for de-briefing. You'll be picked up at the roof of the structure. Keep in mind the previous actions of the militia in the building and their in-humane ways. They will do everything it takes to try and stop you. As such, you must eliminate each of them in your area before moving on for your own safety. Leave no wounded, take no prisoners. You're supplied with our standards, but we've decided you may need some more things. You've been given medical kits, and alien devices that we have deemed useful. In the past your team has somehow posed the need for a wrench, so you have a few of those too.
additional_info: Silenced glock by Valve, modified by Pinapoke. Shotgun replacement by Quad, using a modified skin by Gearbox Sniper Rifle replacement by Black Panther, hands and hand animation by Felix. Hands placed on the gun itself by Jstanf35 Sentry Replacement by Valve, modified by Quad and Pinapoke Various models from Opposing Force or PS2 Half Life or something. The original building you play in was made by Lee with heavy modifications by Pinapoke. Really recommended you don't change anything.

Although this map looks like it's had months of hard work put into it, due to its great architecture and game play. Turrican's outstanding amount of effort on this map puts many other mappers to shame" -Creepsworld
additional_info: Ranked #34 in the CreepsWorld Top50 maps list. Included in the CreepsWorld Map Pack.

title: Slumber
author: Trainee
description: Gordan was tricked into an drug indicated deep slumber. In his dream Black Mesa is reseaching on killing techniques for aliens and is granting credit to Gordan and his multiple personalities (other players) as a payment for killing the lifetakers and boss units, but also for farming the Helium-3 mines.
additional_info: N/A

title: SmallTown
author: Hellotimber
description: This is a PVP map. This is a HNS style map. Players just have crowbars… unlimited crowbars. That means when throwing out a crowbar, you will get a new crowbar at once. Players will be killed by crowbars in one hit, whether hit or throw.
additional_info: Maybe many people like this map, many times the server changes to this map, the server always be filled of players. I never seen this situation in other maps. In this map, combat will intenser than "Block Buildings", because of smaller map and reasonable structure. And an important thing, this map is not completely made by me! This is my first HNS map for Sven Co-op, but it is transplanted from a Counter-Strike 1.6 map, I looked this map in the game, then collated it and made map in hammer. At first I just play this map between my friends, but after we set up a public server, we added this map into the server, it really fun! I can't find the original author, so I describe here. I added some entities into the map,that players can get unlimited crowbars, can spawn at reasonable structure, and can kill other mutually. I really like this map, it is really fun.

title: Smash TV
author: Enrory
description: Clear the area, take the key and choose the next door. Find the last room. BIG MONEY BIG PRIZES This is my first map
additional_info: One secret room

author: Unknown

title: Snakes
author: Monkey-Knuckles
description: A a secret snake experimental base, terrorists are attempting to steal the plane. Your job is to get to the plane and stop them. Beware, the terrorists have let loose the snakes.
additional_info: A map comic of this map can be found at www.monkey-knuckles.com/snake_comic.html. archive https://web.archive.org/web/20080213180546/http://www.monkey-knuckles.com/index.html Note: This is not Snakes on a Plane, but it does have snakes and it does have a plane and Sammy Jackson.

title: Snark Race
author: CubicVirtuoso
description: A snark race in which players reach the finish by riding on top of snarks using Sven Co-op's monster riding feature. There's two race lanes and a single spectator lane between them. Winner receives recognition.
additional_info: Hint: Throw some snarks in front of you and jump on top of one before it gets away. More puzzles, custom textures, and a storyline are planned.

title: SnarkCafe 1
author: TheBard
description: This is basically a copy of Osprey Attack, but on much a larger scale. It's not supposed to be better, only bigger. Made for the SnarkCafe server to replace Osprey Attack as the first map in the mapcycle. (although it was never used for this) It was designed for use with a lot of players. (the more the better)
additional_info: Built for up to 32 players. Ideal player amount: 10 - 16. Minimum: 4. Most of the friendly and enemy npcs in the map have been named after SnarkCafe staff There is a side area in the form of a disco, which requires cheats to get to.

title: SnarkCafe Bunker
author: TheBard
description: 3 part series being made for the SnarkCafe server, first part "beta" can be played on the Snarkcafe server Second part is currently WIP.
additional_info: Recommended players: Will work with 1 but 6+ is recommended.

title: SnarkFest
author: Kirby
description: Snarkfest is a fanmade remake of A1Win's original sc_snarks. Never heard of "sc_snarks"? No problem: sc_snarks is an arena map where your only objetive is to survive as long as you can. Constant waves of snarks jumping down to the arena to make sure you will need to keep moving all the time. And your only weapon is a shotgun. It's original concept has remain the same, snarkfest has a few additions, one of them are the choise of 4 gamemodes: Easy Mode: For those who never played snarkfest or the original sc_snarks, a single 3 minute wave to get the feeling of the map. Nothing special here, just to get stated. Players who die on this mode will spawn on the sky and have to wait until the mode ends, game ends if everyone dies off. Action Mode: If running away from snarks is boring for you, this is the remedy. Instead of just attemping to survive, you and your teammates must destroy the snark nest's to extend time and keep going. Beware, this comes along with unique modifiers that alter completly the gameplay and they come up randomly as you advance though levels. Unlike other gamemodes, completing a level will respawn all players who have died. Game ends if everyone dies off or if the time runs out. Master Mode: The classic sc_snarks you already know, now remasterized (theorically). If you've played the original snarks, this mode is no different (with the exception of more doors). You must attempt to survive the highest time as you can, starts easy but difficulty increases every 2 minutes. At the end you will be shown your grade, with represents how well you did. The more time you managed to survive, the higher the grade gets. Players who die on this mode will spawn on the sky and have to wait, but to prevent waiting players from getting bored, the game will end sooner based on how many players died. Survival Mode: Ridiculous difficulty for ridiculous people. If you are sadistic and want to watch others die in mere seconds, this should fit it's purpose. Many snarks, no breaks, no supplies.
additional_info: Completly inspired on A1Win's original sc_snarks Has tetris music, because I CAN Grade Recognition System It has a secret cabin, on it if correct codes are input, it will allow to modify the gameplay or to unlock additional gamemodes (On a future release…)

title: Snarks
author: A1win
description: Snarks is an arena map where your only objective is to survive as long as you can. Constant waves of snarks jumping down to the arena above the walls make sure you will need to keep moving all the time. Your only weapon is a shotgun, but don't rely on it too much — the snarks will die in ten seconds after they spawn anyway, and get just replaced by new ones. When you die, you spawn on the sky with a clear view down to see the remaining friends struggling for their lives. A digital clock will show you how long the team survived. The map is quite simple, and could be improved a lot, but I don't really have time or interest to work on it any longer. It took a few days to put it together. If you feel like continuing my work with it, contact me and I'll provide you with the map source file. If it's not obvious enough: push the red button to start a new round.
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=37142

title: Sneed's Seed & Feed
author: Zorik
description: Sneed's Seed & Feed (Formerly Chuck's) for GoldSrc Welcome city slicker to my seed and feed establishment we have seeds and we have feeds and much more.

author: Alexxxey

I spent a lot of time and energy on this map, I hope you enjoy it!

title: Soccer
author: giselachar20
release_date:
v1.3 - November 16, 2022
v1.2 - March 19, 2021
v1.1 - September 22, 2020
v1.0 - September 21, 2020
description: ------SC SOCCER -----—- Ever wanted to play soccer / football on sven coop like you did it in counter strike? Well, now you can!. This map features an entire soccer match. Match: First team to reach 10 goals wins. Features: Teams: Red and Blue Score Timer Team player models, so you can see allies and enemys. Goal system: Sound, ball on center after goal. And more! Entire football system made with entities. -Incoming features- *Power up system like soccerjam. *Respawn after goal.

title: Soiled
author: R E A P E R
description: Hey, There is no story line… This is just a PUSH map, you must live… while pushing ahead to the next available area. There are some things that may be annoyingly painful to get through (especially if your are alone). Intended for 2 -to- 4 players.
additional_info: WARNING Entering this map gives its creator the right to make you soiled!!!

title: Someplace Else
author: Adam Foster
description: Official Mod website
additional_info: It's very very short mod for Half-Life made by Adam Forster. The source RMFs are freely downloadable at the mods website. This version is just a compile for Sven Co-op with some more monsters and ammo. The story texts are removed (no support for custom titles.txt; it would be a very large hassle to convert all the long messages into the limited game_text entities). The end sequence is exchanged for a game_end. No coop is required, I'd wanted to leave this as vanilla as much. I suggest you to play the mod in Half-Life if you want to enjoy the (sadly short) story.

title: Sonic
author: TheBard
release_date:
Beta2 v3 - December 01, 2014
Alpha v2 - June 23, 2008
description: Now abandoned, too many other projects on-going I have however added a download link which contains most of the bits collected for the maps plus the RMF's & the bsp's I have now started working on this again fixed a couple of bugs with the beta map. There is now a beta2 map in the download. however that will be it for this map. I'm starting the map from scrach Sonic1 for Sven Co-op. 7 part series, 1 map for each zone of the original.
additional_info: Although not much of the mapping is done, a 116 texture .wad is + all the sounds & music need for the maps are. Screenshots are full-bright at the moment.

title: Sonic The Hedgehog
author: iLLuSioN
description: You have to go through all 6 zones to get to Dr.Eggman. Along the way there are 7 hidden chaos emeralds that you have to find to unlock the minigame. In the minigame you will find the last chaos emerald. Once you get the last emerald you unlock Super Sonic mode.
additional_info: There are a few problems. This is iLLuSioN's first Sven Co-op map. Followed by Sonic The Hedgehog 2.

title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
author: iLLuSioN
description: You have to go through all 6 zones to get to Dr.Eggman's Winged Fortress. Along the way there are 7 Hidden Chaos Emeralds that you have to find to unlock Hyper Sonic mode. Once you destroy the power core you can teleport to the final room where the master emerald is.
additional_info: 1 of the emeralds is at the top of the minigame. Uses lots of custom content to give the map a Sonic feel. Preceded by Sonic The Hedgehog.

title: Sonic2
author: w00tguy123
description: A race to the end. The first one to reach the end wins and must be stared at by the rest of the players as he dances, for a few seconds. Very short map.
additional_info: It's the first map I showed off in the forums. The only feedback I got was that I was bad mapper for using the carve tool but I swear those loops are hand crafted! The project was abandoned because the later levels don't fit inside the +/-4096 grid.

title: Sotano

description: Version pvp del mapa "A Day in Hell" del autor "MassAsster"
additional_info: Solo es una version beta, se mejorara.

title: Soul Run
author: Naigel
description: Welcome to the Soul Run track! This resort can be used for racing of any kind. Most people bunnyhop in this track. It's hard to explain what bunnyhop is, but basically it means you can gain speed with a certain way of jumping. You'll have to watch other people do it. There is not really an objective, the map is more eyecandy and fast speed bunnyhopping. With help of some trigger_push entities you are able to gain more speed, combine these with a bunnyhop and you'll be racing throughout the track. The spawnbuilding includes camera's to view different parts of the track, as well as medkit machines to heal yourself. Anyway, enough nonsense, go walk around the map and enjoy your stay.
additional_info: Soul Run uses many custom models, textures, and sounds. It is named after Souleh, who provided inspiration and help during the map's development. A sequel, Soul Run 2, was in development, but is most likely now abandoned. There is a chance that Soul Run will be converted to Sven Co-op 2.

description: -Story : The dark lord has destroyed the source of life and took the pieces of it with him. Your a Holy guard who needs to get the pieces from the dark lord.

description: You are a space invader and have to reach the end.

title: Space Monastery
author: Reuniclus-579
description: A starship monastery of the Nemesis are transporting an artecfact since several days. The federation has been already on the spot! Mission : - Kill the federal scientist in the Medic Lab. - Sabotage the two rest rooms. - Desactivate the communication system in the command center. - Sabotage the two machine rooms. - Destroy the artefact in the monastery. - Evacuate to the arrival zone !!!
additional_info: Original mod: ModDB

title: Space Monkeys
author: BigGuy
description: The map consists of a single low-gravity room, with a single respawning grunt, and a teleporter with bad rendering settings that teleports you into space and gibs you.
additional_info: N/A

title: Space Prisoner
author: EDUSAN
description: After the events at Mars, your team must help take back the Viking ship to be able to prepare a counter assault on Merkwürdiglust and Boderman. You are teleported directly into the prison, now used as a weapons storage by Boderman's henchmen.
additional_info: Conversion and ripent of the original map addon for Half-Life, found here: RTSL, and here: MODDB Maps were merged as far as the engine could withstand it, reducing the number of maps to just 2. Modifications took place to make the maps work better with co-op such as weapon progression, advancing spawnpoints, more enemies, etc. Several bugs were fixed that existed due to poor mapping choices. And gameplay was spiced up with addition of custom content (original mod had very few enemies and was dull). This conversion takes place after the events of Zubben(merged version) and Exodus2. And is an unofficial prequel to Fortified. As for the references, all of the events in the map are supposed to be happening in the past.

title: Space Surf
author: Dexter
description: This is a surf map type. Other people say its map is hard to complete ;/ My bad english i know… i from poland small speak english.
additional_info: Textures are included

title: Space Viking 1
author: Salamander
description: SPACE VIKING EPISODE I As you are in hyperspace, your ship and crew are attacked by Space Pirates! It seems they are after the cargo you are carrying, and you can't let them have it. Fight through a large spaceship, kill enemy intruders and reclaim what was stolen from you.
additional_info: Hint: Cargo bay is completed by getting past aliens, not shooting them. 3-4 players recommended, but it's possible alone. Included in the Classic Map Pack. Followed by Space Viking 2.

title: Space Viking 2
author: Salamander
description: SPACE VIKING EPISODE II: SPACE PIRATES JOURNAL: YEAR: 20100.1413 (IMPERIAL STANDARD) LOCATION: HENGIA, DELPHI QUADRANT PURPOSE: TRADING FOR NEEDED SUPPLIES CARGO: DILITHIUM CRYSTALS, RAW ORES SPACE VIKING STATUS: MINOR REPAIRS NEEDED THE SHIP HAS JUST TOUCHED DOWN ON THE PLANET SURFACE AND THE SHIPS NAVIGATOR YORGASH (ETHEREAL CLASS LIFE FORM) HAS AWAKENED YOU FROM CRYO STASIS. ALTHOUGH MOST CARGO WAS LOST DUE TO UNFORESEEN CIRCUMSTANCES, IT IS STILL POSSIBLE TO COME OUT AHEAD GIVEN FAVORABLE TRADING PROCEEDINGS. THE HULL HAS SEVERAL RUPTURES AND THE ENGINEERING SECTION HAS A SEVERE COOLANT LEAK WHICH ALSO REQUIRE FIXING AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.
additional_info: Ranked #46 in the CreepsWorld Top50 maps list. As of December 2008, with the release of Sven Co-op 4.0 and the update of all map packs to correct any errors in any maps that prevented them to run in 4.0, Space Viking 2 now runs flawlessly and a working version is available in the CreepsWorld Map Pack. Preceded by Space Viking 1.

title: Space2
author: Richman
description: This map takes place on a space station orbiting a planet. A minimum of 2 players are required to complete the objectives. Use your wits (and weapons) to secure the station and ascend!!! Generally, I wouldn't recommend more than 4 players as the space could get cramped. NOTE: I, Ratman, am not the author. I downloaded this from a server years ago and felt that it was too good to keep for myself. A Google search returns a single forum thread on a German site in 2009 indicating the author to be Richman. It appears that this was intended to be part of a multi-map campaign, but the other parts were never made. If the author has any problems with this being uploaded here, I have no problem with them removing it.
additional_info: TIPS: The boss cannot be killed by conventional weapons. A sacrifice must be made…

title: Spacewar
author: !!!PeRfEcT!!!
description: A little training map. The space station was taken over by monsters. You've been teleported on it in order to clean the station of monsters. At the Station there are 4 control rooms in which bosses are with defenders. You must kill them. In every compartment there's a computer which opens the next compartment. If you continue without eliminating a previous boss, it will be difficult to play. The best weapon lies in every new compartment. Utillize compartments as shelter for treatment and rest. Good luck!
additional_info: 2-4 players recommended. http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=32706

title: Sparrows Operations: Kubra Dam
author: Dangerous_Sparrow
description: No info given by author. Fight your way through freedom by killing everything in your path inside of office buildings and outside areas
additional_info: This is the Dangerous_Sparrow's Second Map. NPCs have x2 health in comparison to default Sven Co-op Difficulty. 5 Players recommended

title: Sparrows Operations: The Escape
author: Dangerous_Sparrow
description: No info given by author. You start off in the office area, your objective is to destroy the apache
additional_info: This is the Dangerous_Sparrow's First Map. NPCs have x2 health in comparison to default Sven Co-op Difficulty. 5 Players recommended

title: Special Ops 2000 (OUTDATED)
author: MassAsster
description: Hellz Kitchen - Objective: Get out Alive. 0400 Hours - After Operation " OOps “ you find yourself in the pits of the enemy transport system - defending you and your team, you are once again back down to minimal ammo supply - reach the surface, a helicopter is awaiting your arrival. Good Luck.
additional_info: Title: Special Operations 2000 A map for SvenCoop Author: MassAsster (moc.oohay|maet_gurd#moc.oohay|maet_gurd) Type of Map: Coop (its better played that way) Recommended players: 2-6 Special Thanks to yak fighter for the awesome fabs he makes. Thanks to prefab land for a few fabs too. Special thanks to Q for pointing out bugs and map testing. Construction * Editor(s) : Worldcraft 3.3 New textures: none New sky: no New sounds: No New models: no Known Bugs : Some Issues may result in everyones screen glowing green while you Teleport - I like it that way Compile Time(Approximate): 10 minutes Compile Machine : Intel p4 1.5 Mhz 261,200 KB RAM R_speeds : no real problem with R_speeds found

title: Spiderman Beta
author: Zorak
description: El mapa está hecho para divertirse. tirando telarañas (Barnacle) en toda la pared pasando los obstaculos. Todavia sigue en desarrollo. Mapa con traducción al español
additional_info: Mejoras en la versión full: - Mejor luminidad - Muchos obstaculos - Brazo de spiderman (Barnacle Custom) - Secretos - Musica de fondo de Spiderman

title: SprayArt
author: cold_blood3d
description: SprayArt is a giant drawing canvas where you can make artwork with your sprays! Just look down at the ground and press your spray key really quickly as you move around. Draw pictures, write stuff, play games, be creative, and have fun. :D As you can see in the screenshots, we've drawn all sorts of random stuff, written our names in fancy ways, played tic-tac-toe, hangman, dots and boxes, etc. There is also the potential for co-op in spray art, with several players all working together and contributing to the same drawing. There are several features designed specifically to help in creating spray art. Features: 6 drawing canvases, which you can cycle through. So it's okay if you mess up… Just flip to a new canvas, and all the existing sprays will be hidden away. Lots of background styles. Choose from 10 textures or 16 colors. These can be changed anytime without affecting sprays. Toggle-able grid. Overhead camera. Conveyor belts and longjump, to get around quickly. Simply shoot the floating buttons to use these features.
additional_info: Tips: For added control, it helps to be in thirdperson from up high. Go to Command Menu > Camera > Distance > 1024. The server must have have decalfrequency set to 0. It's also suggested that players set mp_decals to 5000. Other: Map inspired by Uglysweater, who invented "spray art" and popularized it on the map freakle3 at SnarkCafe. It was tons of fun, and we needed a bigger map dedicated to making spray art. See her original spray art that started it here and here.

title: SPRT Star Wars
author: sprt
description: Relive the the epic space battle from star wars a new hope. Well, it's a deathmatch or pvp map. You'll spawn as either an X-wing or a Tiefighter.
additional_info: You can try the beta exclusively on The Zebra Hut server. IP: 62.75.211.133:27015 DO COME AND TEST. Also please note that this is a beta, therefore it's not pretty and has some bugs. Also thanks goes to Kalo for the deathmatch entities.

title: Squad G-Man
author: GAMESABA
description: Tiny maps where you are tricked by GMan, and you must destroy him! Or at least attempt to. Expect small cramped corridors with very bright lighting and a lot of enemies, with some cringy but funny cutscenes and dialogues.
additional_info: N/A

title: Square Run
author: StreamFox
description: Square Run is a simple run and jump puzzle map, inspired both by The Void and the indie game Battle Jump. Each colored square has an ability like gives low gravity, boost or simply kills the player.
additional_info: At some places map uses trigger_gravities, custom server plugins may crash the trigger_gravity. Which means it may not work properly and players can't pass through in certain areas. Map has an extremely large size, it has literally a huge skybox. This means huge outdoor area which may causes lags. Players' latencies also causes some lags. It has already exceeded the Max_leaf_faces error because of the large size, but the error were fixed with highly overscaled textures which players cannot see. Map looks fullbright, but it has light, a light_environment. The reason its looks fullbright is that the light_env have a -90 pitch, and lava also emits some light. This way platforms get almost the same brightness light from top and bottom.

title: Stacja
author: Reuniclus-579
description: Author never gave a description in the original mod.
additional_info: Original mod: ModDB

title: Stadium
author: Sven Viking
release_date:
Final - December 16, 2000 (SC 1.9)
v2 - July 7, 2000 (SC 1.3)
v1 - July 16, 1999 (SC 1.2)

title: Stadium 2
author: Sven Viking + Edited by WaRgAsMo
description: The Stadium map allows you to spawn virtually any Half-Life creatures and watch them kill each other (or stand there). You can help one side by using the Gauss Gun, or by teleporting into the arena itself. But please, dont be a pussy and sit out there all the time gaussing the monsters. That is why i didnt put any extra gauss ammo in the map.This is an altered version of Stadium2, which was an altered version of Stadium1. In case that was confusing: It's great in single-player, but you can also play co-operatively with your friends. You could make bets on which monsters will survive, or one could spawn monsters while the others are in the arena, or whatever. The possibilities are endless, at least untill someone crashes the game by abusing my generosity of the monsters. Hope the host doesnt have a crappy computer!- I made Stadium1, and released the .rmf file - Wargasmo improved Stadium1 to make Stadium2, and gave me its .rmf file. - I altered /that/ to make Stadium-f, which is generally exactly the same as Stadium2, except for the addition of friendly monsters.
additional_info: Stadium2 is based on an .rmf Sven Viking provided of stadium1. Stadium-f, an edited version of Stadium2, was released by Sven Viking afterwards, featuring buttons for friendly monsters.

title: Stadium 3
author: Sven Viking
release_date:
v6 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v5 - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0B)
v4 - December 23, 2003 (SC 3.0)
v3 - December 19, 2002 (SC 2.1)
v2 - September 15, 2002 (SC 2.0F)
v1 - December 21, 2001 (SC 2.0B)
description: A small stadium where players can choose which monsters to spawn, friendly or foe, as well as several 'fun' options. Players can also choose whether to join the fight or spectate from the border safe zone. A fun map for model testing or playing around with your friends.
additional_info: Included in Sven Co-op 4.0B, Sven Co-op 3.0, Sven Co-op 2.0F, and Sven Co-op 2.0B mod releases. 2-8 players recommended.

title: Stadium 4
author: JPolito
description: Press the buttons, spawn the monsters, win the game!
additional_info: This map replaced Stadium 3 with the release of Sven Co-op 5.0

title: Stalk Lab
author: Machine
description: After the Black Mesa incident, a private scientific group acquired an extremely strange and unique Chumtoad. The mission is simple: rescue that specimen. However, the lab is infested with aliens, and it seems that the military has infiltrated as well. Another scientific group sent some of its scientists to rescue the specimen.
additional_info: sc_stalklab is a modification of stalklab, originally designed for HLDM. The map "stalklab" was created by Machine and converted to Sven Co-op by me. All of this started as a test map for Sven Co-op but ended up going public. The original map was created in 2022-2023; I don't remember exactly. I began this modification on January 1, 2024, and every day, I made some changes.

title: Star Trek
author: TheBard
release_date: not finished yet by a long way!, although although part of the alpha map is on the SnarkCafe server (ask an admin to see it)
description: A map based on the Starship Enterprise NCC-1701-D. At the moment the map is just the engineering core (which has so far taken around 300 hours to do!). It will be a walkthough map, although TheBard will be giving away the .rmf source files without all the additional walkthough entities so they can be used for other types of maps.
additional_info: Uses an 8MB texture pack, tons of Star Trek sounds, and loads of Trek player models.

title: Starbattle
author: Beefeater
description: You are soldiers in a NASA Space Station under Cheyene Mountain. Aliens have covert a Space Station, and now its your job to get The Station back and kill the aliens on their own planet. Then you have to get back to earth.
additional_info: *Play Information* Single Player : Yes Deathmatch : No Cooperative : Of course Difficulty Settings : Sometimes Hard New textures : No New sounds : No Players : as much as you want

author: Unknown

description: Fight your way from the bunker to the plane, and take off to the skies! Then, defend the plane with all your might!

author: Archanor Mhain
description: N/A

title: Starship Troopers Bug Hunt
author: Terran Ghost
description: Survive against waves of arachnid to the end! Music goes to the artists of Newgrounds Textures by Trempler

title: Starshiptroopers Minigame
author: XilData
description: A small arena type map where you blast away the nasty bugs.
additional_info: This is a COMPLETE overhaul of my map, it includes a little alarm system, day-night button (in admin room) with base lights etc. This is the first map I have ever made and have been working on it for 4 days. The admin area also has a 2nd door (operatable from inside) so if your a server admin you can keep people out of there . PS: trooper.mdl is a model for a soldier coming up (taken from the USMC player folder)

title: STFU And Climb
author: waTchouT
description: stfu_and_climb by waTchouT just climb nub and stop reading this, noone else does thanks to everyone at [FM] and jolt for the ideas and suggestions Thanks to Matt-MPG, 8-ball, Orange-Soda, Crev and some random people who join the server while we tested the first beta Also thanks to flump and LordDefendA for testing the final thing on flumps pinkage server lol o and mysTheAvatar for the mapname ;)
additional_info: A climb map from TFC that was reasonably popular back in the day. Not tremendously hard by modern standards, probably on par with The Climb difficulty-wise. The first few players to reach the top can pick up an item which will give them near infinite HP. There is also a secret item which will lower your gravity, can you find it?

title: Stixsworld
author: Stixsmaster
description: This map is a basic horde map…you and your team mates appear in a strange looking complex…and just start having to take on marines + all sorts of monsters in the Half-Life world…untill they all disappear… There are 2 levels to the complex…the lower is the easier/medium difficulty type of enemies…the upper level is the harder enemies…yet the upper level also has the more powerful supplies of ammo and weapons for you… The twist tho is…that to get the more powerful weapons and equipment at the top…you must go through a difficult jump puzzle… Now you can decide to try and take the enemies up there out…and possibly make it easier to get to the better weaponry…or you can try to get to the stuff whilst under heavy artillery… GOOD LUCK SOLDIERS!
additional_info: BTW This is my first SC map… Map is ment for 4 peeps tops…as that is all the spawns I made… A sequel may possibly come out…(doesnt depend on reviews…depends on my life) Expect updates with newer rounds to be provided… This also is NOT the prequel to Stixsworld 2

title: Stixsworld 2
author: Stixsmaster
description: This map demonstrates what the new AI system in v4.0 can do…
additional_info: This is not at all a sequel to Stixsworld nor is it a prequel to Stixsworld 3

title: Storage Area 2
author: SeaRaven
description: Me and my buddies were just a couple of low level security guards at some government research building. It was friday, and the boss made us stay late. I had never driven out in the desert at night before, so naturally after driving around a few hours I knew we were lost. The only thing we could do was go back and stay at the facility until morning. We were on our way back, almost there, when I saw a bright green flash. The car's hood exploded and I lost control, slamming the car into a rock wall, triggering a rock slide that smashed the car. We barely made it out alive. Now we're stranded AND lost. Our luck has to change soon, right?
additional_info: N/A

title: Storage D
author: Deathdog & MaD jOn
description: Story Its bright and hot. Your squad arrives at the target destination. The truck slides to a halt and your squad leader shouts over the radio. "Listen up marines! We have an attack by unknown forces in this sector. This base is a weapon and equipment storage area so be on the look out for some new tools. Those bastards may seem like they will come forever but if you can frag enough of their sorry asses then. I think they may get the idea, otherwise we will pull out in 15 mins anyway. Keep in squads of 2 or more and attack their flanks if you can. You'll have to work together, remember your training. If their is a high obstacle team up and lift a member over. It could mean the difference between life and death. Ok marines, unpack the equipment then move out!" Gameplay Info There is no health or batterys around this map. You have to return to your truck to repair. Their are two different colour trucks to allow players to tell each other where they are and 4 'ports' which mark specific places on the map. Using these you can co-ordinate your efforts to score the 200 monster frags. Players who team up and stand on each others heads can reach some good guns. There is an EGON in there….. One player can fuel up on ammo if he gets on top of the wooden boxes. There is a sniper position but this requires a lot of work to get up to. Any stack 2 crates (or more) high with no 1 crate high objects around it don't waste time trying to climb up. First to 250 frags wins!
additional_info: Turn Word Wrap off to read this! Title : Container Storage Day Time Filename : Storage.BSP Authors : Deathdog, MaD jOn Address : moc.liamesuohgodeht|godhtaeD#moc.liamesuohgodeht|godhtaeD moc.liamesuohgodeht|rratS#moc.liamesuohgodeht|rratS Description : A level full of cargo container crates! Monsters spawn in certain places. Special Thanks to : Rize for all the cargo crates. Webpage : If someone would host it. I don't want www.geocities.com/siliconvalley/68937829784/darkplasma.htm Other Work : OP4kit (prefabs) PCV charger (prefab) Storage This is V1.5 of Storage. It is not meant to replace the original storage but is there for people who prefer to be able to see what they are shooting at. The lighting has been redone and a number of object and texture fixes have been added. YOU WILL NEED THE STORAGE WAD FROM THE ORIGINAL MAP. GET IT FROM SVEN COOP WITH THE STORAGE MAP!!! IT IS NOT INCLUDED AS IT INCREASES THE SIZE OF THE ZIP DRASTICALLY!!!!!!!!! Play Information Single Player : Well, you could but you wouldn't reach the best guns :) Deathmatch : It would be no fun. What do you think Quake III is for? Cooperative : Yes sirreee. Difficulty Settings : Medium. New Sounds : No New Graphics : Yep. These are some OP4 ones. New Music : No Demos Replaced : None No. of players : From 2-8. I would reccommend 6. For 8 you should put the difficult CFG up. Monsters : Yes. They respawn after 5 secs. Goal : Get 200 frags in 15 mins. To change difficulty If you want to change the difficulty then edit the CFG file. Where it says: Skill2 Change the number to get the right difficulty. (1=Easy, 2=Medium, 3=Hard) Don't mess with other settings because it will spoil the gameplay. Construction Base : New level from imagination! Editor used : Worldcraft v2.0 Known Bugs : You have to bait monsters out from their holes to get them respawning. HEV chargers looked out of place so I used PCV ones. R_speeds high on top of crates. Build Time : 4 days of hard work. Compile Time : Short because I used a light_spot :) Deathdog made : Structure, layout, items and design. MaD jOn made : Respawners, R_speed reduction and testing.

title: Stormit
author: SeriousToni
description: Terrorists have taken Walter to a villa, you must help him out of there! There are some wardrobes in the house, where he hides randomly (each restart of the map he can be in another wardrobe). You must lead him out of the house to the big door near the startzone and he really doesn't have to die!
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=31992 Hey guys. It is just boring to wait for 3.5 so I decided to make a funny map for you And in the end there are not only one but 4 maps!! In Stormit you must conquer a house defended by terrorists. In the house there are some big wardrobes and in one of them Walter the hostage hides himself. Everytime you play the map, Walter will hide randomly in another wardrobe! Stormit is available in 4 sorts at the moment. In each sort the terrorists are another race. In the screenie it is the army, but there are also versions with black ops, xen and race x! If you like it, I could change the terrorists to zombies or Otises Oh I forgot, you have a friendly Otis and a friendly Barney from the Police to help you on the map finding Walter So guys, I hope you have fun with these maps and the time till 3.5 doesn't seem so long anymore with that I would like to hear some sentences of you, how you like these 4 maps. Ok, but now have fun, look at the screenie and click the link!

title: Straight Reloaded
author: ZenArcade
description: Another one of my boredom induced creations. This is a slightly updated version of this map. Fixed some issues such as players completing the map too early by "cheating" (on SC experience server mods, people would use anti-grav jumps to finish the map early. You must now trigger an explosion rather than blowing it up yourself) and I also added a little secret room, see if you can find it :P there are one or two minor fixes that had been bugging me for a while too.
additional_info: Thanks for playing this, I like to know that people are playing and enjoying what I make :)

title: Stranded
author: Iceshaft07
description: A major war has just ended. You have been ordered to search a natural gas plant to check for any explosives, however you soon become stranded. Searching through the files you found this note: To supervisor : There is an unidentified substance in the natural gas. It is extremely dangerous, and the plant is to be shut down immediately. All employees have been instructed to leave the facility upon arrival. Any employees currently inside the facility (including you) will be examined for bacterial infection. The plant's ventilation system will then be used to filter out the toxins. When the process has been completed, the plant can be restarted assuming all employees wear approptriate protective uniforms. Standard search parties are formed after 3 days of a missing person. You entire team has been missing for a week, so there has got to be at least someone looking for you. If you can find a way to contact them, they may be able to save you.
additional_info: N/A

title: Strangers
author: Onox792
description: A call warned about Gman stalking around a remote area of Black Mesa, we don't know what his mysterious agenda is, but one thing's assured: He must be stopped. Now you and your squad must stop him with the help of some HECU marines, it isn't a surprise that Black Mesa is still a zone with a lot of alien activity. Reports indicate high levels of Xen wildlife presence as well as the new "Race X", bio-mech units and even unidentified enemies. Be careful!
additional_info: 5+ players recommended There are hidden areas with weapons or additional ammo, look for them! A few easter eggs The maps are full of enemies and arenas, expect to die a lot of times if you go solo or with some friend!

title: Street Run
author: Jendr
description: This is the first of Small escape map. Run around the streets of the city and climb onto buildings while ocasonally killing counter-terrorists.
additional_info: The gun weapons are from Afraid Of Monsters

title: Strike Back
author: Mutant
description: OBJECTIVE : » Rescue the scientist within the time limit, before Black Operatives get him.
additional_info: Trapped, alone and afraid, your team down to a fifth of its previous strength and the soldiers getting ever closer, you glance round in the vain hope of finding a door with a reassuring 'Exit' sign above it, though as you hopelessly expected, no door was available. Momentary amnesia requires you to navigate through events so far, to piece together again what on earth just happened. You remember hearing the announcement to 'Pull back' by the military, and the realisation with your comrades that you stand no chance of reaching any of the evacuation zones in time. And so, building up where you are, you hope, against hope, for the best. A few days pass, and you see yourself in the same place, except this time feeling more positive than you ever have. In fact, feeling positively joyful. The radio had crackled to life again, and a quivering voice had called for help. And so the scientist entered our story. He was alone and afraid, near our position, trapped within Black Mesa by the zombified remains of his colleagues. He knew a way out, but needed some soldiers to help. Our Commanding Officer agreed. And the dreams of a homecoming seemed possible again. But it was a forlorn hope. The Black Operatives caught our message, and plotted our demise. And so as we followed the scientist's instructions, they launched their ambush in our path. Surrounded. Fired On. Screaming. Panicking. Within a few seconds the dreams of home and family were torn by bullets and blood. Only a few escaped the scything bullets to retreat to our stronghold. The Commanding Officer, leading from the front, hadn't managed to escape the assassins' bullet, casting him in darkness and our future in disarray. Low ammunition. No supplies. Few gunners. No Leadership. And little time until the Black Operatives caught the scientist, the situation would indeed appear hopeless… However, as the morale of Half-Life itself shows, trapped and desperate men can be the most dangerous and resourceful. As the assassins race to surround your position, memories of massacre and butchery are aroused all the more powerfully in your team; Dreams of home, food and family are kept alive, and the Commanding Officer's memory is not forgotten. The soldiers are urging for revenge. It’s time for the strike back to begin. http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=31680

title: SubSurface
author: HeAdCrAb KILLA
description: You are part of a highly trained military squad in the hunt for Gordon Freeman. Your mission is to infiltrate a small part of the Black Mesa Research facility in hopes of finding any information regarding the location of the unfortunate employee. Once the area has been scouted, return to the surface and send any information you have discovered to Adrian Shepard. Good Luck.
additional_info: Ideal for 4-6 players. This is the first map HeAdCrAb KILLA ever made.

"You would think Black Mesa/On A Rail environments would be getting old, but not after playing this map. It's so well put together, allowing the game play to flow superbly. Architecture is solid, presenting appropriate and sleek looks constantly." -CreepsWorld

title: Super Monkey Ball
author: Ace
description: This map designed for Half-life: TFC Multiplayer Fun style map with 16 areas. Try to get to goal of each stage as the civilian without falling off the stages. There may be hidden warps to help skip a few stages but your have to find them yourself. You don't return to start if u fall in levels. You start in the one you were in. At the end, your appear in a room with a working stargate from the hit tv show Stargate SG1. Travels to a fun areas, and areas 5, 9, and 13 in the level. Each with it's own dialing symbol coordinates. Fun room has 4 radios each playing a song. 5th to turn off/on overworld music and a comp. to turn on a tp that leads to start and stays on until turned back off. it's 2-way. You can help someone get to fun area this way if their having trouble with map. Also a maze with extras at end. Enjoy.
additional_info: Took about 1 month but would have been quicker. Work kinda drains my free time nowadays. The map has no ending.

To change a team simply surf your way to the CT and T rectangles in the water zone. Credits to : SuperMario - original mapper DNIO071 - KernCore91 - for the cs 1.6 weapon mod R4to0 -

title: Surface Ex-Tension
author: DAN200
release_date:
Final - December 22, 2003 (SC 3.0)
v1 - December 19, 2002 (SC 2.1)
Beta 1 - October 31, 2002
description: TIME: Lambda Incident + 12 hours In a bid to escape the Black Mesa Research Facility and counter the alien threat, former co-workers of the Facility must work together if they want to stay alive. Survival is only an option to those prepared to put aside their differences and fight as one. As a team of Security Workers and science personnel, you have so far managed to escape the lower lab levels of the facility and have reached the surface, unfortunately, so have the military forces sent in to clean up the area. Your goal is to navigate the various topside complexes and make your way to the underground Rail system leading to the Lambda reactor complex, where you should be able to find shelter. Resistance is high, so be on the lookout for Aliens, Soldiers and the rumored Black Operatives that are said to be patrolling these areas.
additional_info: Included in Sven Co-op 4.0B, Sven Co-op 3.0 and Sven Co-op 2.1 mod releases. Surface Ex-Tension received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums. Followed by Surface Ex-Tension 2: Extended Resistance. It was built in about a month. Ranked #2 in the Creepsworld Top50 maps list.

title: Surface Ex-Tension 2: Extended Resistance
author: DAN200
description: This map is essentially a continuation of the "objective" listed in Surface Ex-Tension. TIME: Lambda Incident + 16 hours In a bid to escape the Black Mesa Research Facility and counter the alien threat, former co-workers of the Facility must work together if they want to stay alive. Survival is only an option to those prepared to put aside their differences and fight as one. After much bravery and combat, you and your team of Co-Workers have finally managed to evade your Military pursuit and have arrived, hours later, on the outskirts of the Lambda reactor complex. Your goal now is to enter the complex via any means necessary and meet up with the Science Team waiting inside. The Alien presence in this area is high, and the military don't want anyone getting in to the complex and using it to escape. And you thought this day couldn't get any worse…
additional_info: Included in Sven Co-op 4.0B and Sven Co-op 3.0 mod releases. Preceded by Surface Ex-Tension.

title: Surface Run
author: noSICK
description: Step into the shoes of the Sven Co-op team once again. You have infiltrated the base and killed the last of the guards you could find, but the bastard managed to close the door, trapping you inside the maintenance area full of aliens. The enemy has let their experiments run lose and almost created a resonance cascade by activating the teleporter to bring back more aliens to stop you. That plan backfired though, and eventually the portal machine exploded with the whole room back to Xen. Now you find youself trapped with no weapons and ammo left to finish the job and move forward. The mission is not over just yet, find what you need and run to the surface! Conversion and ripent of the mod Surface Run, you can find it at ModDB and RTSL. This conversion is created as an unofficial sequel to Infiltrate and Inhuman, and a prequel to Mechanized Death: An Army of None
additional_info: "The scenario is simple: Save your own skin and get to the surface. Based in Black Mesa, you get to see a small part of the underground facility and even a quick trip to Xen, if you look in the right place." -noSICK

description: You must survive and go through numerous caves, defeating various enemies and stopping the enemy threat.
additional_info: N/A

title: Suspension
author: Hezus
description: Enemy forces have taken control of the bridge. Engage the enemy and retake the bridge! Select one of the 8 classes from the spawn room. A description of their loadouts can be seen at the portal. Some sections of the map require explosives, so make sure to have a few engineers on your assault team! The strength of the enemies is determined by the amount of players currently on the server, as can be seen from the spawn room. Players can select the amount of tickets available to the team. If the tickets are depleted the game goes into survival mode. Once all players are dead, the mission is lost. Choosing less tickets increases the difficulty of the map. If a mission is successful, you will be awarded a badge based on your teams total amount of deaths. The lobby has an overview of all available badges. Platinum - 0 deaths Gold - Max. 5 deaths Silver - Max. 10 deaths Bronze - Max. 20 deaths Stone - Max. 30 deaths Noob - More than 40 deaths NOTE: If you experience low FPS, try setting 'r_detailtextures 0' in the console.

title: Sven Coop Adventure
author: brigadiero7
description: No actual description provided by map author.
additional_info: STRADEGY GUIDE (fixed some grammar but gave up) This map is confusing. i suggest you look for secrets or this map will be VERY hard without them. But there are errors with the secrets. BEGINNING: Kill headcrabs and activate the eye scanners to open the door with a teammate, then take the portal. LEVEL 1: We end up at an area with a train. See the light behind the train? shoot it- DO NOT CROWBAR IT (if you crowbar it, the shotgun inside will fall on you and will cause an error). now, we are at least armed. Get on the train and continue. You come to your first gate. Look out the left side and you will see a darkened opening. Go inside and up the stairs and hit the keyboard (you need to aim down more than you think). The gate will open up. Now keep going and you come to your second stop. Hit both eyescanners to open it up (kill all grunts before continuing because they get the train stuck). Keep going, and you have to face a ot of marines. After you kill them all, keep going. there are two buttons. one that lets you enter the next level, and the other that lets you kill the last boss. hit both, the fuel will go on, and you should hear a buzz. Now return to the outside. LEVEL 2 (part 1): You should notice that you can now see 2 buttons- get your friend to help you out again as we enter the caves. When we first enter, there's a zombie. As we continue, there will be various enemies. finally, after feeling cramped, you will reach a pit full of deadly goo. Look for the button on the side. Hit it. Something should have happened outside. LEVEL 3 (part 1): Now that gaint wall blocking our way is gone. Get your friend again to help you out. this area requires a bit of teamwork. Once you get in, there are alot of assassins. Go over to the large switch and start pulling, and you will notice the car lift goes up. Have your friend jump on it and as he enters the vents rush over to the window, so you can see what happens to the assassin (lol, i think that is so funny..well…if you have a friend playing. yes, of course, this is my most detailed area (short because of it). Also, your stupid friend is going to fiddle with the coke machine. ok, so he hits the exit button…nothing happens. Instead, make him hit the button on the wall with the vents. this opens up the door you need. Well, for payback, let's not let him out of the security room (if you really want to, go over to it and hit the button…but he deserves it). Hit the button (on the wall near the…..goo…) what happens? nothing. Pick up the jumpsuit and leave. go back out side and enter the caves. LEVEL 2 (part 2): ok, so now, you need to jump over the (I CAN SAY IT AGAIN!) goo, and keep going. dont let the stupid alien slave hurt you though. and we come to our second boss. alot of alien grunts. i really hope you have a better weapon by now. once they are dead, there are two buttons in the room. one activates the button in level 3, the other activates the oxygen. so, back to the warehouse we go. LEVEL 3 (part 2): ok, now it is much easier (as YOU may think. hit the button that doesnt work. now it works, and the…goo…goes into the other room. arrange the barrelsso they are lined up RIGHT NEXT TO EACHOTHER on the opposite side of COOLANT ECHANGE. thisway, when you longjump, you wont melt in the…goo… raise the…goo…into the room, wait a few seconds and the barrels come into veiw. longjump onto them (you wont die, because you lined them up). after fighting more assassins, you can arrange the boxes. grab the one moveable box that clearly says EXPLOSIVE and DO NOT STACK…now lets think of what to do with it. if its an explosive, and doesnt want to be stacked, what do you think you gotta do with it (only stupid people wont get that one right)? so, the wall has broken, few more assassins, and (yes you can play with the computer, but it doesnt do anything…just highlights the numbers next to it in red). hit the other button, and the saftey hood is now on. lets go outside and see if anything happened. LEVEL 4: hmm…nothing. lets return to where we started. if you havent noticed, the gate way to the last level has been open the entire time- but you cant do anything except turn the power on. so lets go do that. its very dark, so turn on your flashlight. UHH OHH! ITS SOME TENTICLES…NOT ONLY THAT, BUT ITS DARK! so jump down, and run right. go up the ladder and turn the power on. now you can see somewhat. Now, jump down and now you can see the area (to your right i belive). now go up that ladder. now notice how each one is ON. well, lets test fire it. text should come up that says "THE SHELL HAS BROKEN! KILL IT NOW" or something like that.. now what do you shoot? well, there should be some wierd thing in the center of the tentacles. stay where you are and shoot it. once it has been broken, YOU WIN! you might now have notied it, but Eraft is in a small cage (from when you first jump down) to the foward right corner

title: Sven Co-op Holiday Island
author: Hezus
description: Hezus' 2005 birthday map. Have fun exploring the island and unlocking new buildings and areas. The island contains : Harbor Yacht (you'll arrive with this boat) Plaza SnarkCafe (play pool or eat something) Beach (beachvolley, swimming and music) City Pool (for swimming and diving) Gamehall (you can play DonkeyKong, Pacman, Gamblingslots and Miniracecars!) Disco (be the DJ, handle the lights or just dance around) Rock Bar (drink a beer and listen to rock music) Camera Station (watch all places on the Island from camera views) Hotel (rent a room or chill out on the couch) Have Fun ! Hint: If you do not know how to unlock certain areas, look into the holiday_readme.txt file.
additional_info: The map is built for a large amount of players, up to 32. A Frogger game and other features were planned, but the map reached the engine limits.
