description: You are a member of a party of adventurers that must slay the monster-lord that has been ravaging your homeland. You must travel through mountains, caverns, fortresses, dungeons, and castles to seek out the monster and destroy it. Beware the enemies' lairs, however; as long as they remain standing, monsters constantly issue from them. If you defeat the monster lord, you will receive an unimaginably large horde of treasure and will liberate the legendary sword of Sarticulus.
additional_info: Recommended players: 3-12 There are 3 shortcuts in the map. All models, textures, and ideas used in this map are free to use in your own Worldcraftian creations! Included in the Classic Map Pack.

title: Sven Co-op Training Course
author: Hezus
release_date:
v3 Beta 3 - November 28, 2003
v3 Beta 2 - September 26, 2003
v3 Beta 1 - April 27, 2003
v2 - January 26, 2002
v1 - November 27, 2001
description: Prepare yourself for the some of the many co-operative/combat scenarios that you will encounter while playing Sven Co-op.
additional_info: Maxplayers must be set high to prevent crashing. Bug: The elevator can act weird if used wrong. Sven Co-op Training Course received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums.

title: Sven Cs Assault
author: gruntastic
description: Another CS 1.6 map ported to Sven Co-op for PvP, with CS 1.6 weapons. It has 2 working teams, winning rounds lasting from 10 to 15, and you can save hostages to win the round as CT. Players are automatically assigned to their teams for balancing.

title: Sven Cs Office
author: gruntastic
description: CS_Office from CS 1.6 ported to Sven Co-op for PvP, with CS 1.6 weapons. It has 2 working teams, rounds lasting from 8 to 12, a 2-minute timer, and you can save hostages to win the round as CT. Players are automatically assigned to their teams for balancing.

title: Sven Dust 2
author: Gruntzz
description: De_dust2 is an iconic map from the classic first-person shooter game, Counter-Strike 1.6, and has been ported to Sven Co-op. With fully functioning CS weapons, teams, round restarts, and team score, players can experience the strategic gameplay and intense battles that made de_dust2 a fan favorite. Players are automatically assigned to both teams to ensure a fair match balance.

title: Sven Life
author: Unknown
description: Just Half - Life with Sven Coop contents. Add Sven Coop exclusive enemies. Add cutscene for important events. Add key items for locked paths. Adjust for items, locations, checkpoint, etc.
additional_info: N/A

title: Sven Operatives
author: Ozku
description: You are part of group called "Sven operatives". This is your first mission. A few days ago, scientist at facality called "Universality" were able to open portal to an alien dimension.After government heard about this, they decided to kill all aliens and conquer this dimension for humans.However, aliens quickly attacked and invaded the facality. You were ordered to help military kill all allaliens from the facality. When you arrived, you learned why aliens attacked, so you refused to help military. They didn't like this and now you are locked in a warehouse area without any weapons, waiting for being killed by aliens or military. You have no other choice than fight your way out. If that fails, you have to find radio and ask for help.
additional_info: mapper: Ozku "Orava" If you are stuck, here are hints how to move on. Q: I am at first room and I can go anywhere! A: You need to work together with your team, there is a pipewrench inside that container ans you must get it. Q: Ok, there is a big pool of toxic and I cannot find any way to move on. A: You must find a keycard hidden somewhere in that room. Q: There is this big storage area and I cant find any way to go. A: You must jump from container to container to find way out, there is however barricade which blocks your way You need explosives to break it, there are some explosives hidden inside one of those containers. Q: Ok, I came into a room where I shot some respawning grunts, and now I find myself at dead end! A: You must destroy the generator (that thing at center of the room). After you have done this, toxic pool, which you saw earlier, will drain and you can go there. If you want to give me feedback about this map, send me a pm at svencoop forums, http://www.svencoop.com/forums/ I am using Ozku as my nick. http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=34189

title: SvenContra2
author: GreenTea MiaoMiaoLe, Dr.abc
description: G-man controlled an abandoned military island for the research of alien and some tactical weapons, and deployed heavy troops throughout the island. This island has the characteristics of passing through time faster than the outside world. This may be conducive to the expansion speed of the alien lair on the island. All our vanguard troops have lost contact, and now it is up to you to attack.
additional_info: This is a new story and new maps with the theme of SuperContra in SvenCo-op. The texture of the map does not use the 8ibt texture in the original game, but uses some new textures to make the map look like a brand new style. Me and Dr. abc completed the production of this map together. Dr. abc is responsible for the writing of the As script for the entire map. This makes the shooting of weapons and the style of props in the map more similar to the effect of the original game. GreenTea MiaoMiaoLe: The production of the entire map is not as simple as I thought at first. In the process of making stage1 and stage2 maps of SvenContra, it is necessary to take into account the structure of the horizontal plane picture and the top plane picture of the two levels in the original game at the same time, and finally present it in the form of 3D space. This will make some objects and buildings that did not exist in the original game need to be added. So I redesigned the process of the entire map, the deployment of the enemy, the location of the trap, and the shape of the enemy boss. I hope you enjoy this map. Dr.abc: This is a plugin which assuming to implement those what a map-campanion plugin should be done for the map those should be run in a standard game library use and try to keep the mapwhich this plugin companion with maintain a acceptable working status with indefinite period. Script repository

title: Svencoop 1
author: Sven Viking
release_date:
v7 - September 2, 2010 (SC4.5)
v6 - December 24, 2008 (SC4.0B)
v5 - December 23, 2003 (SC 3.0)
v4 - September 15, 2002 (SC 2.0F)
v3 - December 21, 2001 (SC 2.0B)
v2 - July 7, 2000 (SC 1.3)
v1 - January 19, 1999 (SC .8B)
description: To: epsilon.team @ mslist.org From: admin @ mspost.org Subject: Briefing - CMD|PRI=1&PAGE=1&ENCRYPT=1 The United States Government has recently gained possession of an object that could vastly benefit our cause. Our operatives have informed us of an opposing alien faction that has learned of the object's existence, and is planning a major assault on the installation where it is held. As most of our associates are currently… occupied, we must rely on stealth (and the distraction caused by the rebel faction's attack). Your team will be deployed as close to the objective as possible, shortly before the enemy's assault is expected. You are to avoid attention, secure the objective, and await extraction. Other information you will need is attached. You must be in the deployment area by 14:26:00.
additional_info: Included in all Sven Co-op mod releases.

title: Svencoop 2
author: Sven Viking
release_date:
v5 - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0B)
v4 - December 23, 2003 (SC 3.0)
v3 - September 15, 2002 (SC 2.0F)
v2 - December 21, 2001 (SC 2.0B)
v1 - July 7, 2000 (SC 1.3)
description: Your unit, Epsilon team, is made up on ex-Black Mesa personnel forced to work for the Administrator's employers (henceforth known as the Organisation) after the Incident, during which Xen came under the Organisation's control. Recently, though, difficulties have been created for the Organisation by alien rebels attempting to liberate Xen, as well as the US government, with whom the Organisation is not directly associated. Government forces had recently recovered a crystal of immense power — the ownership of which could permanently consolidate the Organisation's hold on Xen. The Xen rebels had also learnt of its existence, however, and planned a major assault on the compound in which it was held. Your team has been instructed (partly by one of the Administrator's lackeys, the alien clone named Tor) to retrieve the crystal in the resulting confusion. Due to some computational error or malfunction, you found yourself far from the intended insertion point, slap in the middle of the military-rebel conflict. Worse still, your entire team has been led into some type of aquatic trap by Barnabus the security guard. Your lungs strain for air, the genuine floating sensation intensifies to the point of absurdity, and your vision becomes shaded by ever-darkening void.
additional_info: N/A

title: sven-coop c2ac1 series old
author: Kagerou
description: 5 year old map pack, some models may have errors due to lost models.
additional_info: N/A

title: Svenergy
author: Lymphoid
description: Short and simple walkthrough map with lots of explosives
additional_info: N/A

title: Sveney Christmas
author: CubicVirtuoso
description: Santa forgot about some children so you have to pick up the slack!! Fortunately for you all these children asked for grenades for Christmas. So you and your buddies have to ride Santa's sleigh and throw grenades down dem childrens' chimneys!
additional_info: Altogether the map took only about 2 hours to make.

title: Svenskill
author: Darthrod
description: Svenskill is a skill jumping style map and you can practise different jumps with grenades and crossbow. This map contains 5 crossbow jumps, 8 handgrenade jumps and 2 AR grenade jumps.
additional_info: N/A

title: Svenskill 2
author: Darthrod
description: Svenskill is a skill jumping style map where you can practice different jumps with grenades and the crossbow.
additional_info: N/A

title: Sventopia
author: Lymphoid
description: Lymphoid made this map too be a sort of collection of all fun maps such as Carnival, Stadium, Funzone SC, and two old maps called Sciride and Zombie Town. He stated that he didn't know what he was thinking when he made it because in some parts you have to kill yourself in order to return the beginning. Sventopia was meant for older versions of Sven Co-op because the Barneys in the Barney ride became enemies thus defeating the purpose of riding on the Barney's heads. Instead, they just shoot you. Also, in SC 3.0, players are unable to zoom in using the .357 which defeats the purpose of the target range. There is also a semi-difficult secret, which lies hidden in the map. If you destroy one of the windows in the bridge in zombie town, you can enter the bridge and there you find a button. Press it to open the air duct in the petting zoo. Continue through the bridge and you will be transported to the electric arena. One of the metal grates is destructible so you can go through and re-enter the zone-selection room. Go to the petting zoo and go through the air duct and you will transported to the secret zone. Lymphoid has also hidden some assault rifle grenades in the scientist slaughter house.
additional_info: Map fun and secret objectif !

title: Svor
author: Unknown
description: The mapper is unknown, please claim if your map. I assume the map is supposed to be called Survivor.
additional_info: Map Title: Svor (maps 1 & 2) BSP Name: svor01 (04/01/02) svor02 (04/01/02) Archive Name: svor.7z Additional Textures: none Maps created with Randmap

title: Swars Installation
author: DrStrangelove
description: SPACEWARS MISSION Rebel command has sent you to a remote desert planet to infiltrate an imperial installation. Land your ship in the hangar and fight down any resistance. Search the reactor core and blow up the beam system. A shuttle will arrive to pick you up intime. Good luck.
additional_info: N/A

title: Sweet Half-Life
author: Original author: Koumei Satou. Conversion: kmkz
description: This is a conversion of Sweet Half-Life (a mod of Half-Life) to Sven Co-op made with ripent. Modifications were made to support co-op gameplay. Custom npcs were replaced with Sven Co-op npcs. Custom weapons are included, but they are not exactly like the ones in the original mod. If you want to report a bug please give details of the problem you found, so there is a bigger chance to solve it, and faster. Avoid making reports based only on the W00tguy repacker. Is common to have there false positives and things that does not affect the game and i have noticed that people is posting these reports without caring if there is a real problem. Fix trolling not allowed: there is a group of users that since they are unwilling to take the effort and time to make their own maps instead they mess with other people work adding their custom versions disguised as "fixes", trying in a display of arrogance to impose their own map preferences just to feel they are doing a contribution to the Sven Co-op community. To them i say if you really want to support the community leave other authors in peace and make your own maps.
additional_info: If you are stuck look around, seek buttons, find things to broke, sometimes the path is not too obvious.

title: Sweet Home City
author: Kampy
description: Sweet Home City is a medium size Sven Co-Op map that plays in a city. You start inside an advanced version of Sweet_home3 (HLDM) where you find weapons and armor. Then you have to fight your way through the streets where groups of soldiers and snipers await you. Once you reached the warehouse there are a lot of aliens to take care of. In the end there is an endboss fight ;-) Oh yeah and there are a lot of small details and gimmicks that you maybe wont see beating the map for the first time. Btw: this map was created on the basis of my counter-strike map as_intruder. main points of the map: - conversion of as_intruder (cs) - city-theme - 6+ players recommended - difficulty of the map is medium hints: - entering the bathtub will heal you - theres crossbow ammo on the cupboard next to the crossbow - destroy the powersource for the gates to open them - theres a gman watching you in this map (find him) - you will get extra items/weapons at the spawnpoint as you proceed - you can use the gargantua to kill the groups of soldiers - use the lightswitch :-) http://www.kampys-stuff.de/scmap_shc.htm
additional_info: Sven Coop: Sweet Home City Filename : SweetHomeCity (bsp/cfg) Mapper : Kampy Mappers Page : www.kampys-stuff.de original maps : sweet_home3 & as_intruder (HLDM & CS) Construction Time : one week Beta Testings : 2.1 size : medium Enemy Type : alien, human Hints: 1) destroy the powersource for the gates 2) destroy the crates & find the key 3) go through the window IMPORTANT: you may not do this without my permission: - decompile and change this map - sell it in any way visit www.kampys-stuff.de for more maps If you have any comments on my map(s) contact me! my icq : 82273535 my email & msn : ed.xmg|02ypmaK#ed.xmg|02ypmaK or write in my guestbook on my page! Now have fun! :)

title: Swiss Cheese Halloween
author: Swiss Cheese
description: The protagonist starts out peering at poster of a girl in a bikini, in the mist of Halloween. Everything seems to be going well, there are some VERY good models of scientists dressed up as Frankenstein and ghosts, and you can almost hear them breath a sigh of relieve that they escaped Black Mesa alive. Then suddenly, Sven Co-op players are teleported inside the house to wreak havoc on the maps! So you trot over to that horny guy's friend’s house and stock up on Halloween necessities, such as a shotgun, submachine gun, detpacks and grenades…
additional_info: N/A

title: Syowa Japan
author: originaldon
release_date:
v1.2 - July 14, 2016
v1.1- February 14, 2016
v1.0 - February 15, 2009
description: Syowa_Japan players:2~8 This map is my second map. Japan is good place. enjoy!
additional_info: N/A

title: Tables Secret
author: Dexter
description: How finish the map? Find all tablets!! This is a small map…
additional_info: Textures are included.

title: Tactical Ops
author: MassAsster
description: WARNING: PLEASE READ THIS BEFORE ENTERING THIS IS A TACTICAL MAP! IF A HOSTAGE DIES, WHETHER IT BE YOUR HAND OR THE GRUNTS, YOU LOSE AND THE MAP IS OVER. IN THIS MAP IT IS ONE SHOT ONE KILL, USE STEALTH, ACCURACY, AND MOST OF ALL YOUR FREAKIN BRAIN. GOOD LUCK AND HAVE FUN! BRIEFING : It has come to our attention that at least 5 scientists have gone missing in the last 24 hours. All of these scientists have top secret information reguarding a new weapon of mass destruction. If this information was to get into the wrong hands the result would be catastrophic. These scientists MUST be rescued and brought back alive for debriefing. THERE IS NO ROOM FOR MISTAKES. Leave NO I repeat absolutely NO loose ends. We do not want word of this to leak out further. You must not fail. Good Luck Team!
additional_info: N/A

title: Tall Building
author: Hellotimber
description: This is a funny map. If you want to know something about this map, I can tell you the main characteristic: It will give you a surprise. Okay to be honest, if you play this map for the first time, maybe you will hate this map (or me). Finally, watch your steps. Otherwise, no refund after smashing your monitor.
additional_info: N/A

title: Target Neutralized
author: GoLdMaN
description: It's not a specific story.I did not want to write :) Make up with something for yourself :P Enjoy :) In the meantime; I can not speak more English..may be my fault.. excuse
additional_info: N/A

title: TB Breakdance 1
author: TheBard
description: Simple puzzle map based on Breakfree, except this goes up down and sideways.
additional_info: Made in just one day (So don't except much from it!) Followed by TB Breakdance 2. Final version of this map now out, called sc_tbreakdance1.

title: TB Breakdance 2
author: TheBard
description: Second Breakdance map along the same lines as the Breakfree series, much larger this time (2 lifts, a boss at end and a ton of other bits & pieces). Map has now been updated to a final version called sc_tbreakdance.
additional_info: Recommended players 4+ (will work with one) Preceded by TB Breakdance.

title: TB Disco
author: TheBard
description: A fun map created to relax in. Although the main area is a disco, there are a few side areas. Pool room Snack bar (or Snark bar) Basement Lobby Outdoors (car park) Toilets There are a number of weapons to find on the map all having custom models. They include: Spam hammer (nickname came from the map testers) Puppybombs (satchel-charge) Akira laser rifle TriGunCross (RPG & minigun versions) The way into the DJ booth is hidden so you don't end up with everybody spamming the music buttons.
additional_info: BUG: This map will crash unless you have every Resident Evil map installed, because it uses models directly from the models/reevil/ folder and these are not included in the zip. BUG sorted, New download which includes all models needed for map. Map supports up to 32 players

title: TB Fun 1
author: TheBard
description: TB Fun 1 is a simple puzzle map. Once each puzzle is solved, access to the next puzzle will open, until the end is reached. There are a total of 10 puzzles to solve.
additional_info: Map can handle up to 32 players but gets crowded at 16+. Minimum of 3 players required. Followed by TB Fun 2.

title: TB Fun 1 Remake
author: hypax
description: Remake of the jumping puzzle map TB Fun 1 by TheBard
additional_info: N/A

title: TB Fun 2
author: TheBard
description: This is a puzzle map along the same lines as TB Fun 1. However, this time there's also an action (combat) part, as well as a few secret areas.
additional_info: Map can handle up to 32 players. 8-16 recommended. 2 players minimum. Preceded by TB Fun 1. Followed by TB Fun 3

title: TB Fun 3
author: TheBard
description: TB Fun 3, the follow-up to TB Fun 2, runs along the same idea with a sequence of different puzzles. Once each puzzle is completed the next one opens up. The player who completes each one will also get a small score bonus. A number of secret areas will also be in this; finding each one will reward players with score, weapons, and interesting pictures.
additional_info: Needs a minimum of 2 players although 3 will make some areas easier to complete. Preceded by TB Fun 2.

title: TB Maze 1
author: TheBard
description: One huge maze, similar to Crazy Maze. There are a few areas to stop in along the way. The map is also broken in a few ways; turning on "theway" can trap players in the floor, the maze is huge and in hindsight to big. Areas in the map: Spawn room Maze Rest room Conveyor room Control room Admin room Hazardous materials bay End room Objective: Try to find a way into the admin room.
additional_info: TB Maze 1 is TheBard's first Sven Co-op map. Followed by TB Maze 2.

title: TB Maze 2
author: TheBard
description: This is the follow up to TB Maze 1. Three mazes are combined in one. You have a normal crush maze, the door maze, and a teleport maze.
additional_info: Preceded by TB Maze 1. Followed by TB Maze 3.

title: TB Maze 3
author: TheBard
release_date:
Final - October 8, 2006
Revision - June 21, 2006
Original - June 14, 2006
description: TB Maze 3 is less of a maze and more of fun map. The maze is smaller and has 2 admin rooms. Each of the admin rooms can do stuff to the maze and to the other admin room. There's also a disco, a "look at me" room, and a few other things!
additional_info: This was first made for the SnarkCafe server and had all the admins in the map as npcs. It has since been released as a general version without the SnarkCafe stuff. The music in this map is taken from other maps with paths intact to reduce in game download time. Preceded by TB Maze 2. Followed by TB Maze 4.

title: TB Maze 4
author: TheBard
description: A fun map containing four mazes—a crush maze, glass maze, block maze, and a door maze. Along with a disco, there is an outdoor pool area, 6 secret areas, 2 admin rooms, and a new "look at me" room. A bundle of music, along with many strange weapon models, is included.
additional_info: This map was designed for SnarkCafe, but is also usable on other servers. There are 2 different crowbar models. To change between them you'll need to drop one first and wait around 20 seconds before you can pick the other up. Preceded by TB Maze 3.

title: TB Maze 5
author: TheBard
description: sequele to tb_maze4 (2 years, 8 months later!) There will be a 6 (It's about 50% done) Solve the maze, Find the secrets. Simple! Thrown together in a couple of weeks. It's not amazing, its not crap, it just is!
additional_info: N/A

title: TB Maze 6
author: TheBard
description: Successor to tb_maze5 (5 month gap) Solve the mazes. Kick some monster ass! Simple!
additional_info: Pointless info ! Originaly intended as a remake of tb_maze2.

title: TB Maze 7
author: TheBard
description: Yes it has only been 3 days since i released the last one !!! 10 Puzzles ranging from simple to hard. A few of them need 2 players, The rest become simpler with 2+players.
additional_info: Hint : Many Pushables are Liftables

title: TB Mechanize
author: TheBard
description: You working away in one of the Army's mechanized repair bays, when all the lights go out! Whats going on…. Get out there and find out. 6 part series (although only 4 parts have been finished so far)
additional_info: Recommended players: 2 to 10+ One of the maps requires a missing .wad lost to time (tb_fear1.wad), but will not affect gameplay. Also, cookies for whoever finds the missing texture ingame (cause I couldn't)

title: TB Mesa
author: TheBard
description: Incoming transmission. Good morning commander hope your well rested. Hostile forces have taken over part of the Black Mesa facility. Go in assess the situation and sort it out. Ps. the internal security has been activated you have to knock it out as you go.
additional_info: 6 part series 6+ players recommended. Can handle up to 16. tb_mesaGold is currently in final testing (a complete rework of the whole series expanding it to 7 parts)

title: Tb Mesa Gold
author: TheBard
description: *Story Incoming transmission. Good morning commander hope you’re well rested. I'll get straight to the point. A hostile terrorist force have taken control of part of the Black mesa facility. They are demanding 10 Mil or they’ll launch a nuke. We have no idea if they have the capacity to launch or not. Your mission is to go in assess the situation and remove this terrorist group with extreme force. Weapons are O.S.P. as always. More Intel to follow….
additional_info: The tb mesa series was first started back in 2005 as a single map. (tb_mesa) Then it expanded into a series in 2006. (tb_mesa1 to tb_mesa6) Then in 2007 the first part was rebuild from scratch to match with the rest of the series better. (tb_mesa1r) For some strange reason it got popular (Don't ask me !) So in 2008 i started re-building the entire series from scratch (tb_mesaGold to tb_mesa7Gold (1extra part)) and someday i might even finish it……..

title: TB Tag
author: TheBard
description: This is a tag map.
additional_info: A minimum of 3 players is required. Since this is a tag map, you will need to play it on a server running some sort of tag plugin.

title: Tb Test
author: TheBard
description: This was a test map to try out a few textures plus ideas, however it expanded a bit ! And almost turned into a proper walkthough map, but then again a story was never made for it. Recomended players: 4-8 Can be done by 1 Hint: Beware of snipers, you will die very fast without armor.
additional_info: The textures are from F.E.A.R.

title: TB Zombie13
author: TheBard
description: TB Zombie13 is a map series made for Friday the 13th in October of 2006. Although there are 4 maps in the series, you only have to play 3 of them to complete it. Depending on which way you go and what you do in the first map, it will send you on to one of two maps, both of which will send you on to the last map to finish the mission. Here's a breakdown of each map in the series: tb_zombietown Set as a continuation to the story of TB Mesa. Contact has been lost with a local research town trying to figure out new ways to combat the alien invasion. Your team is to go in and find out what happened. A military unit has already gone in, and they too have vanished. You're the Top brass's last hope, short of a small tactical nuke! tb_zombiesewer You've gone down too far and ended up in the sewers beneath the town. While you're down here you may as well restore the power, then try to find a way back up to the research base. tb_zombielab You've made it down as far as the labs. First thing to do is get the blast doors open, then destroy the computer cores. Don't worry, all the info we need is stored on the main hard drive in the research base. tb_zombiebase You've reached the main base. Find that main hard drive and get out of there. The Top brass have decide to cleanse the area with a nuke anyway, so you have limited time.
additional_info: Maximum recommended players: 16-20. Minimum: 2. The series got rushed in the end in order to get it out for Friday the 13th.

title: Technium
author: Xoleras
description: Capture the flag map meant for 4-8 players.
additional_info: Notes: I made this as a portal hub for some servers a while back but nobody really used it, so I briefly converted it into a CTF map.

title: Teleporter Down
author: amckern
description: The Teleporters are down, and not working, time to walk across the facility.
additional_info: N/A

title: Tension
author: HeAdCrAb KILLA
release_date:
Final - September 4, 2005
v2 - August 27, 2005
v1 - August 25, 2005
description: Tension is building at your current position. The base you have been teleported to is extremely hostile. Radar readings show 4 major threats in the area that must be eliminated. Your objective is to neutralize the 4 threats to secure the base. The control room above the spawn room can be used to keep track of threats destroyed. Once all threats have been eliminated, your mission will be successful.
additional_info: 1-6 players recommended.

title: Terminator Run
author: Robootto
description: Classic terminator run competition (Similiar to American Gladiators) 3 Different tracks: Blue, Red and Green, each player starts from different track, winner is 1st one in the goal. Returning back to start from sideways, also good place for spectating.
additional_info: Contains longjump secret at the beginning. Buttons at the end doesnt work, 1st player must walk over the glass door at the end to access it go up. At the beginning rule is to go as fast as can, when glass door comes down The final version is featured in Robootto's Map Pack. Also included in the Robootto's Big Map Pack

title: Tetris
author: A1win
release_date:
v3 - June 30, 2013 (SC 4.8)
v2 - December 24, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v1.2 - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0B)
v1.1 - December 25, 2005
v1.0 - February 14, 2005
description: Block goes down, block goes left, block goes right. And there you are. FAQ: Q: Where do the pink blocks go when they disappear? A: They move to the fifth dimension. Q: The fifth dimension? Why not the fourth? A: The fourth dimension is reserved for the disappearing bodies of dead npcs and players.
additional_info: 3-5 players recommended. It takes about 2-3 hours to finish (with optimal player count). Gravity is 700 which is 87.5% normal gravity. HookMod is highly not recommended in Tetris. Servers should disabled it for this map. Tetris received BOMS status on the Sven Co-op forums. The package also includes the mushroom and robogrunt player models by JJ45. The mushroom model was originally created for the Tetris series, and was made into a player model later. The violence in this map is imaginary. No one really gets hurt.

title: Tetris: Fan Chapter
author: FoxPlays
description: Once again, huge tetris blocks meet you! Good Luck!
additional_info: 3-5 players recommended. My first map :)

title: tfc_crossfire
author: giselachar20
description: The classic crossfire, but better, now supports Sven Coop teams. PVP with 4 classic teams with unique spawns.
additional_info: Map state: Actual Support - New things and fixes every update.

title: The Back Door
author: Tiny Bruce
description: MISSION OBJECIVE The true intentions of the Black Mesa Research Facility have been discovered and a renegade group of civilians and officials pledge to stop all all further progress within the facility. However, all main entrances have been evactuated and destroyed. Insider information has been discovered as to a transportaion and supply facility where a bridge is being constructed to a hidden entrance. You must raid the supply facility and find that entrance. Good luck!
additional_info: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php?t=27598

title: The better than best entmap
author: Pit Viper 01
description: Sandbox style construction map (the original precursor to Gmod) where a library of entities is manipulated via EntMod to build structures, towns, armies etc.
additional_info: Map works properly with SC4.8. The top field is the building area; the entities are stored in many rooms beneath the field, accessible via EntMod's noclip mode. A 'phasor' manipulator weapon is used to copy, move, rotate, place and destroy the various entities. Constructs can be saved to file. Unleash your imagination! Create a new World..

title: The Bunker
author: Kenny
description: Fight your way to the end and destroy some missiles Just fight your way through the secret underground bunker and destroy the missiles in the last room. Easy really. NOTES: This map CANNOT be completed by just one player. There are at least two places where two things must be done at the same time. Having said that, if you do find a way round these bits then please tell me.
additional_info: Hints: Read below if your having trouble. The front door cant be opened so give up trying. Its why I put all those satchel charges there. Don't forget to look under the stairs. To get across the water you need at least two people to open both valves together, or at least within 6 seconds of each other. The shortcut through the vents can only be used after shooting the fuse box. To get the last person out of the first warehouse use the crates. The number for the combo lock is written down - look around for it. Have fun.

title: The Challenge
author: Kampy
description: The Challenge is my first serious attempt of making a great Svencoop map and Im pretty sure this is what you get when you download this map! The Challenge uses the maximum amount of entities possible with the HL engine. The main part of the map is a temple with 6 pillars and 6 teleporters. Each teleporter stands for an adventure or a task which you have to fulfill. When the job is done - for example to break a certain target - the teleporter is sealed and the pillar begins to shine. At the start you only have the crowbar. The first room inside the temple contains the glock and chargers for your health and HEV suit plus 6 doors. During the tasks you can find new weapons. Is a task finished one of the doors opens and reveals the weapon that could be found in this task. When all targets have been acchieved a big door opens and you can get some more action. You dont have to do the tasks in the same order everytime you play it, you can even chose if you team up on a mission or simply do several missions at the same time. Every mission has a totally different theme for example one is on a sailing ship. The whole map looks extremely cool and has lots of sounds and custom textures plus an alternative gameplay so I recommend this map to everyone who plays svencoop. It might be a little too easy for good players though. main points of the map: - alternative gameplay - different tasks with free choice of order - 2-5 players recommended - a little too easy for good players - cool outfit, sounds & textures with different themes hints: - you'll need 2 players to play the map, open the first door by pushing the buttons at the same time - the weapons that you find in the tasks can be found in the first temple room - these weapons are revealed when the tasks are fulfilled - try to destory the temple style objects to fulfill the tasks - destroy the dartboards in the bar task http://www.kampys-stuff.de/scmap_tc.htm
additional_info: Sven Coop: The Challenge Filename : the_challenge (bsp/cfg) Mapper : Kampy Mappers Page : www.kampys-stuff.de Construction Time : about 4 months Beta Testings : 2.4 size : big Enemy Type : alien, human Hints: 1) To open the first door you have to push the two buttons at the same time! 2) The pillars in the middle of the first temple room can heal you and recharge your armor. 3) In most missions, your goal is to destroy one or more cubes which has the tempel texture. 4) In one mission the monsters come out of green teleporter doors - destroy those doors to turn off the monsters' appearance. IMPORTANT: you may not do this without my permission: - decompile and change this map - sell it in any way visit www.kampys-stuff.de for more maps (HL+CS) visit www.dasMODarchiv.de for map and mod reviews If you have any comments on my map(s) contact me! my icq : 82273535 my email : ed.xmg|02ypmaK#ed.xmg|02ypmaK or write in my guestbook on my page! Now have fun! :)

title: The Challenger Deep 2
author: Reuniclus-579
description: Somewhere far beneath the surface of one of the Earth's Oceans lies a large complex known as The Challenger Deep. In this complex, many scientific experiments take place on a daily basis. These experiments deal with intense anti-mass spectrometer radiation. It is the hopes of the underwater scientific community that none of these experiments will fail; but, if they do, that none of the ill effects of the failed experiments will ever reach the surface. One man, a Gordon Freeman, has volunteered some of his time to assist in these underwater experiments. Freeman has had some experience in the past with anti-mass spectrometer radiation, and his resume was well received by the Challenger Deep complex. Freeman was brought to the complex and led to the radiation test chambers. Unfortunately, a resonance cascade scenario took place, unleashing alien beings into the Challenger Deep complex. Also, the outer hull of the Challenger Deep complex was breeched. The complex began to flood. It is now a life and death battle between alien creatures and a flooding complex. Thus, this is the story of THE CHALLENGER DEEP.
additional_info: Original mod The Challenger Deep 2 is a remake of the original Half-Life mod The Challenger Deep. This re-designed mod has been in development for more than 7 years. It follows the same storyline as the original.

title: The City

title: The Climb
author: Joe^vi[.r!], <[L!2]>Black][ce[.r!]^iL-T, ported by AdamR
description: TheClimb!! Make your way up the obstacle course, but be careful! If you fall you will have to start all over.
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic available here: https://gamebanana.com/maps/161015 Tips/notes: There are no checkpoints! If you fall off you have to climb back up. This is a pretty hard challenge, and will stress test your ability to manoeuvre in the GoldSrc/Svengine game engine. Expect your first attempt to take at least 1-2 hours. (Medium difficulty of the 3 maps.) Some of the longer jumps later on will require the strafe jumping technique. You may want (or ask the server owner) to enable Sven Co-op's Teleport plug-in so you can save your position by saying "/s", and restore it by saying "/p" when (not if) you fall. If you do use "/p" while falling you will still fall after restoring, thus you will likely be killed. Wait until you stop falling first. (Even if it means death.) Fall damage will hurt you badly. Please heal other players when they're hurt. Press +use (usually "E") to instantly stop moving when you land on something. Please be patient of players in front of you. This isn't a race, so don't try to push past causing others fall off. Although this map may seem impossible throughout it HAS been tested to completion by 3 people. It's just hard. Differences from the original map: Medkits added at the very start so should you fall (and not die) you can begin again with full health. (Probably pointless.) The victory ball at the end will not slow you down like an anvil. The "power field" at the inaccessible very very top does nothing. If you can beat this map (legitimately, no cheating, etc) you can call yourself pretty darn dexterous on this game engine. (You will also score 10 points for each completion.)

title: The Climb 2
author: Joe^vi[.r!], ported by AdamR
description: The sequel to The-Climb!!, This one is much more detailed and hopefully, funner :D The Story: You and your fellow explorer's were exploring this deep, deep, cave…. When suddenly…the rope to get back up was broken…you are now trapped down 4 miles deep…..and you are running low on food….You must climb out if you wish to survive…..
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic available here: https://gamebanana.com/maps/161016 Tips/notes: There are no checkpoints! If you fall off you have to climb back up. This is a pretty hard challenge, and will stress test your ability to manoeuvre in the GoldSrc/Svengine game engine. Expect your first attempt to take at least 1 hour. (This is the easiest of the 3 maps.) Some of the longer jumps later on will require the strafe jumping technique. You may want (or ask the server owner) to enable Sven Co-op's Teleport plug-in so you can save your position by saying "/s", and restore it by saying "/p" when (not if) you fall. If you do use "/p" while falling you will still fall after restoring, thus you will likely be killed. Wait until you stop falling first. (Even if it means death.) Fall damage will hurt you badly. Please heal other players when they're hurt. Press +use (usually "E") to instantly stop moving when you land on something. Please be patient of players in front of you. This isn't a race, so don't try to push past causing others fall off. Although this map may seem impossible throughout it HAS been tested to completion by 3 people. It's just hard. Differences from the original map: Medkits added at the very start so should you fall (and not die) you can begin again with full health. (Probably pointless.) The 12 coloured items at the end have not been ported. (They did nothing anyway.) A portal has been added at the end to give you points and let you run through the map again. If you can beat this map (legitimately, no cheating, etc) you can call yourself pretty darn dexterous on this game engine. (You will also score 10 points for each completion.)

title: The Climb 3
author: Joe^vi[.r!], ported by AdamR
description: Welcome to my 3rd climb map, I hope you enjoy it. :)
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic available here: https://gamebanana.com/maps/159098 Tips/notes: There are no checkpoints! If you fall off you have to climb back up. (Though you do at least get progress messages along your way.) This is an EXTREMELY HARD challenge, and will stress test your ability to manoeuvre in the GoldSrc/Svengine game engine to the very maximum. Expect your first attempt to take at least 2-3 hours. (Hardest of the 3 maps…hugely!) Many jumps will require the strafe jumping technique in straight, curved, and wiggly methods. The rage shortcuts may not be possible at all alone! Best to avoid them for your first run. (Reward is cutting from 45% to 80% distance but probably costs you 10x the time.) You may want (or ask the server owner) to enable Sven Co-op's Teleport plug-in so you can save your position by saying "/s", and restore it by saying "/p" when (not if) you fall. If you do use "/p" while falling you will still fall after restoring, thus you will likely be killed. Wait until you stop falling first. (Even if it means death.) Fall damage will hurt you badly. Please heal other players when they're hurt. Press +use (usually "E") to instantly stop moving when you land on something. Please be patient of players in front of you. This isn't a race, so don't try to push past causing others fall off. Although this map may seem impossible throughout it HAS been tested to completion by 3 people. It's just extremely hard. Differences from the original map: Medkits added at the very start so should you fall (and not die) you can begin again with full health. (Probably pointless.) Medkits have been added throughout where you will likely need them the most rather than the laggy constant "global heal" approach. The waterfall push force has been reduced by 4.1% so the two jumps through it work with TFC/SC physics differences. A portal has been added at the end to give you points and let you run through the map again. If you can beat this map (legitimately, no cheating, etc) you can call yourself really very dexterous indeed on this game engine. (You will also score 10 points for each completion.) — Very well done to you if you have done this.

title: The Community Map Project
author: Hezus, BMT, Penguin, Fortune2, Amckern, Koelzk, PD-KC, The-Real-Game, Dan200, eMTeG, Aurora, The_6th_monkey, Morgan, al_peggio, Nih
description: The Community Map Project The project was originally started in December 2002, and it might even be argued that the project is older than that. Long-gone forum poster OmEgA came up with the idea of a joint mapping project, where multiple mappers would collaborate in the creation of one large mappack. The project quickly gained interest from a lot of people, and it ended up involving a total of 15 different mappers, 8 of which have had previous maps included in official SC releases. Work on the mappack, dubbed the Community Map Project, fluctuated, with periods of low and high progress, and the project was frequently declared to be dead, only to later be revived. Black Mesa Accident + 15 hours You and some of the other Black Mesa Staff have survived the sudden accident that opened a portal to an alien world. Driven back by the alien orces, they find themselves trapped in a sub-underground storage facility. With every alien attack the survivers lose more ammo and some of their friends. The survivors agree to take their chances and break out of the facility. They want to reach the surface as soon as possible, not knowing that the military has already taken control of a large part of the facility. Black Mesa Accident + 19 hours Slowly the army has taken control over nearly all parts of the station. The survivors plan is to break through into an old abandoned communication outpost, without getting the army's attention. The situation looks even more desperate, because their only hope lies on an old communication server, which they will need to turn on again and send an emergency signal to the outside world. Black Mesa Accident + 21 hours The survivors of the Communications Array Onslaught have escaped through a tunnel passage opened by the explosion of the large communications computer. They have found themselves in the Sector H Parking Garage located very close to the surface, but very far from the outside world and its safety. Escaping the Communications Tower was only a small portion of the path that these strong-willed men and women must walk to escape the bowels of the Black Mesa Research Facility. Will they make it, who knows. Their fates now lie in the comrades they have gained through their adventures. Black Mesa Accident + 24 hours Reaching the surface wasn't a ticket towards freedom, the survivors of Black Mesa only got deeper into the alien-infested or military controller area's. Black Mesa has always been a classified government project, there wasn't an easy way to get into it so it didn't amaze the survivers that there wasn't an easy way out either. The waiting is for a good opportunity to either capture an enemy vehicle and get out of harms way for good. Before them lies a new complex, from wich they know that it will hold many dangers. Although there is no way around those, they have to fight through. Black Mesa Accident + 30 hours Fighting through the sewers and office complexes didn't leave the team without a scratch. Ammo is running low, some teammates were severly injured. Despite this their spirits were still up to fight through whatever lies ahead of them. The surroundings indicate that they were coming closer to the outskirts of the Black Mesa complex. No-one of the former staff has ever imagined that it would be so big. Hopefully there is a way out at the end of this all. Black Mesa Accident + 33 hours While the mission to aquire an enemy vehicle was successfull, the total outcome was a disaster. After succesfully fighting off an enemy tank, the APC was blown to bits by mortar fire near an enemy outpost. After more intense fighting with hostile forces the team now find themselves on the outskirts of the Black Mesa Complex. New dangers await them there. Black Mesa Accident + 39 hours After a long crawl through a ventilation system, the rag-tag group of survivors catches a glimpse of hope ahead. One of the survivors claims to have worked in this area of Black Mesa about a year ago, before being transferred to a different sector. Apparently there's supposed to be a heli-pad nearby. Escape may finally be close at hand.
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=37645

title: The Compound
author: Tiny Bruce
description: MISSION OBJECTIVE Long after the incident at the Black Mesa Research Facility, those not killed by the resulting military invasion are held prisoner in an undisclosed desert compound. A chance opportunity has arisen and it is your job to escape the compound and warn the world. Do your best to escape…
