title: The Dust
author: BlackShadow
description: Alright everyone, i finally finished my mapping project after a long time period and it's here now. I'll cut the introduction really fast and lets get to the map! Summary of the map: The map is basically, combined version of Dust and Dust II with CS Weapons. You'll plant bombs and kill the enemies with your team mates. I wouldn't like to spoil the map, so it'll be better if you play by yourself!
additional_info: Development Time: 2.5 Months Supported versions: 5.1.x FAQ: Q: Where do i install this map? A: Extract the files to "svencoop_addon" folder Q: I found a bug/exploit on map. What should i do? A: Great! Please send a PM or post below on this thread. Q: Can i run this lower versions of SvenCoop, like 4.8 or 3.0 ? A: Sadly, no. This map uses AngelScript and lower versions doesn't support it. Q: Do i need to own Counter-Strike in Steam? A: No, you don't need to own Counter-Strike. A Small Warning to SCXPM Servers: Map's last part can cause a little XP Whoring, so i don't really recommend to install this map "IF" your server have SCXPM. If a player completes map hisself/herself gets huge amount exp. So yeah map has a bit XP Whoring part. I tried to fix this but ended up failing. Sorry. But of course, you can avoid this warning and test by yourself.

title: The Evasion
author: Forsete
description: Playing as Adrian Shephard set shortly after the nuclear bomb that devastated the Black Mesa Research Facility. You find yourself on a Xen island and being kept out of harms way. Fortunately, you have managed to contact a scientist back on Earth and he can help you return. Whether that's a good thing only time will tell!
additional_info: The maps have been adapted for multiplayer by an increased number of enemies and enemy spawns and minor puzzles that require some exploration. This is to make the maps slightly more challenging and lengthy for a more enriched experience. Maps features AntiRush support that is optional, and is disabled by default. To enable AntiRush, open evasion.as and go to Line 13 - change this to "true". const bool blAntiRushEnabled = false;

title: The Experiment
author: Hezus
description: The Experiment is an special map to finally determine the real character of the people you normally call 'friends'. Let's see if all that co-operation and team spirit still holds true in THE EXPERIMENT. This map requires a minumum of 4 players to play.
additional_info: This map was originally created as a bonus area for Ragemap2019. It became too large for it and I decided to turn it into a stand alone map. It was already finished in September 2019, but I forgot about it. Now in 2020, it's finally released.

title: The Fall Of Me Special
author: Halfliferyan
description: He_got_weed's zombie lab has been attacked by assassins who are trying to steal his head crabs. They have released them and killed all of his staff. You must stop them! Your goals are to prevent the fall of he_got_weed. Kill all the assassins, head crabs, zombies, and super zombies.
additional_info: N/A

title: The Fox Halloween 2022
author: The Fox, Keen
description: Welcome to Halloween 2022! A map inspired by the likes of Swiss Cheese Halloween 2002, Monaween and Keen Halloween. Run around, explore the map and the various buildings in it, and maybe find a secret or two along the way. This map had no ending, originally, but now it has 7 sections or houses to complete before the final baws spawns. Good luck! But if you wish to change to another map, please initiate a vote, or change it manually.
additional_info: NOTE: Due to time constraints, there may be bugs in this map, It should still be stable. Updated version of halloween22.bsp, this one has some bug fixes and small changes. Map created by The fox, with a section made by Keen! MORE NOTE: This is intended as a sequel spinoff to Keen Halloween 7. In here, you resurrect CryoKeen.

title: The Game
description: THE GAME ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ SOMEWHERE IN THE ROCKY MOUNTAINS MAY 27th, 1998 ROCKY MNTN. RESEARCH FACILITY ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ The Scientists of the Rocky Mntn. Research Facility, in conglomeration with the Black Mesa Research Facility and the Little Rock Testing Facility, has been working on some 'kooky' experiments. ========================================= INCOMING TRANSMISSION: BLACK MESA *EVERYT*INGS GON* WRO*G. LE*VE TH* FAC*LIT* AT ON*E. GET O*T OF THE*E BEFO** THE RESON*NENC* CA*CADE SCE*ARIO!!*! GO GO *O *GO! EV*CU*TE T*E FAC*LI** IM*EDIA*E*Y! G**D LU*K! BL*A* M**A OV*R AND OU*********** *TRANSMISSION DISCONTINUED* ========================================== GET YOUR FATASS MOVING!!!
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic. This map looks to be somewhat a first or early project from the author, and as such has not been compiled with visibility optimisations and lighting at all. Therefore your framerate may suffer (for a simple looking map), and the whole map will be full bright (no need for flashlight).

title: The Game 2008
author: Foster Hoskins
description: A top secret research facility nestled in the Mariana Trench, more than eleven kilometers beneath the Pacific Ocean. The year is 1968. Fresh out of MIT you were chosen by the government and given work contracts for six months. Your secondary job is to maintain the pelagic facility's electrical and mechanical operations and to recycle failed anomolous materials. Your primary job is to not ask questions. Welcome back to the Game.
additional_info: Originally an escape map for TFC, at least 3 players are needed to complete the map. This is a purely puzzle-based map, there is no combat here. This map is a little different compared to other TFC puzzle maps in that it was played with the Engineer class rather than the Civvie. As a result some puzzles require you to make use of dispensers and/or teleporters, these have been added in via scripts. You can build by using your ATTACK2 (right-click by default) key whilst holding the spanner. Buildings cost cells to build, displayed in the lower-left hand corner. This is the last entry of "The Game" series of escape maps by Foster Hoskins. Known issues: If you are hosting on Linux and installing into svencoop_addon, then you will need to copy or create a symlink to the TH spanner script: from: /path/to/svencoop/scripts/maps/hunger/weapons/weapon_spanner.as to: /path/to/svencoop_addon/scripts/maps/hunger/weapons/weapon_spanner.as

title: The Game I (-K- Edition)
description: THE GAME (-K- Edition) ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ SOMEWHERE IN BRAZIL MAY 27th, 1998 LITTLE ROCK TESTING FACILITY ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ Little Rock Testing Facility, somewhere in Brazil. Working co-operatively with the Rocky Mountains and the Black Mesa Research Facility on Xen space and organisms. Highly trained scientist have created a multitude of inventions using Xen technology… including the Teleportation system. Animal testing wasn't enough for the arrogant scientists of the LRTF. The composition of the human race would have a far different reaction to the Xenite minerals than that of the local monkey population. Mysteriously…in a nearby town… there were 34 reports of missing people within a single month. Very few clues point to the LRTF…and the police frankly haven't got the jurisdiction to investigate without proper evidence. Almost the big day. Along with the Black Mesa and the Rocky Mountains Research Facilities, the LRTF will attempt to open a portal between the 2 realms…Xen and Earth. From the testing on the innocent civilians the scientists concluded that the Xenite minerals would not be harmful to them. With nothing to do with these people since the testing is done they tossed them into a dark, musty cell. Then the mixed transmission from Black Mesa came… INCOMING TRANSMISSION: BLACK MESA *EVERYT*INGS GON* WRO*G. LE*VE TH* FAC*LIT* AT ON*E. GET O*T OF THE*E BEFO** THE RESON*NENC* CA*CADE SCE*ARIO!!*! GO GO *O G*! EV*CU*TE T*E FAC*LI** IM*EDIA*E*Y! G**D LU*K! BL*A* M**A OV*R AND OU*********** *TRANSMISSION DISCONTINUED* Many of the scientists…refusing the abort the project and not listening to there comrades…continued the mission. Everything went wrong. Almost everyone's dead. Except the innocent civilians who are locked in a cell. As one of these civilians you must… ESCAPE!! Get out of the complex where there will most likely be a air convoy waiting for any survivors…
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic.

title: The Game II (-K- Edition)
description: THE GAME II (-K- Edition) Revised ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ SOMEWHERE IN THE ROCKY MOUNTAINS MAY 27TH, 2008 ROCKY MNTN. RESEARCH FACILITY ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ They thought they could handle it this time. They thought they were prepared for another resonance cascade scenario. They restored the Rocky Mountain Research Facility. They were reckless. They were wrong. Over four hundred lives were lost in the incidences at Black Mesa, Little Rock, and Rocky Mountains about ten years ago. They used a living embryo found inside the body of a specimen of the 'houndeye' to reopen the gateway to Xen. They believed that they could control another cascade. They had planned that if it happened again that they would simply destroy the embryo and close the portal. It happened so fast. The resonance cascade came without warning or indication. They didn't have the chance to enter the code to destroy the embryo. The gateway remains open and Xen monsters continue to pour into our earth-space. Why didn't they realize the true powers of the resonance cascade? Why did they have to tempt fate once again? You are one of the many scientists who had been working this operation. You and your fellow scientists must destroy the houndeye embryo to close the gateway and stop the aliens from coming and dominating the earth! Unfortunately, the U.S. military has joined the party. You must use your mind to evade them and the aliens that have entered earth-space through the gate. The fate of the world lies on your shoulders. Welcome back to The Game. ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ Note to Players 1. You need more than one player to really get anywhere in this map. 2. You may find it useful to have "impulse 100" binded to a key. 3. Take your time because K_TheGame2 will remove any time limits a server may have. 4. The smartest of the players currently playing should play as an 'organizer'. Playing with ten people can get messy, so one person needs to bring order (preferably the one with the most experience in TheGame maps). ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++ Map created by Foster Hoskins for his one and only true love, Kristine!
additional_info: Originally a custom map for Team Fortress Classic. 3 players are required for certain co-op aspects. Do not force realistic fall damage on because many legitimate paths through this map require it to be off, as per TFC not having this feature at all. Survival mode is seriously hard on this map.

title: The Grinch's Last Christmas
author: GrandmasterJ
description: The Grinch is always trying to ruin Christmas for the Whos of Whoville, but this year he has simply gone too far. It's time we join the war on Christmas, on the side of Christmas of course, and stop the Grinch once and for all.
additional_info: N/A

title: The Horror
author: Hezus
description: You have found a nice camping site in the countryside. The place is near an old castle ruin and a little lake. You've explored the neighborhood a bit today and it seems you are camping near an old mansion. A farmer came by this afternoon telling you a disturbing story that the Benston family who lived in that mansion was cursed with a terrible and untreatable disease. Story is that all members eventually killed each other in cold blood because of their pain and grief. The farmer was telling you that ghosts and the living dead haunt that mansion nowadays and no-one dares to come near the mansion at night, some not even at daytime. After the farmer left with a warning to stay inside the tent at all times at night, you were looking at your friends. After a second of silence everyone started laughing hysterically. "What an old fool, trying to scare us with his ghost stories !". The rest of the day was very enjoyable and as soon it was getting darker the friends gathered some wood to build a fire. They found themselves sitting on a log of wood, sharing college stories with each other and roasting marshmallows that night. At that time you see a light. A vehicle is driving on the nearby road, but suddenly the lights stop. While your friends are still enjoying themselves with stories you hear a scream. As you jump up and your friends laughter turns into silence, you recall the story the old farmer told you… The undead have awoken…
additional_info: 1-3 players recommended. Map was made for the Egir.dk Mapping Contest and finished in 2nd place. This is a horror map so for the best experience, do not play this on a sunny afternoon. DO PLAY AT NIGHT! Watch a scary movie first, start your PC, turn off the lights in the room and start playing. The max speed of the player is 200 (default is 270) so you can't run around like an idiot on this map. You can walk in a relatively fast pace. You can still jump around but there are no jumping puzzles and the map can be completed without a single jump all the time. So keep the realism and do not jump during the map. You are allowed to jump off your chair because you got scared though ;) You will not have a HUD in game as for you do not have a HEV suit. You cannot see your health status, as you cannot see your health status in real life. This means you do not have a flashlight either. Do not worry, you will not need it to progress in the map. The map has been heavily clipnoded, so you are not able to climb on the rock walls or many objects. To save on engine limits many faces that are not visible to the player have been NULL-ed (made invisible). You will not see any of those during regular playing unless you use the 3rd person camera or cheat with gravity settings. If you cannot progress any further in the map you can find a walkthrough in the included horror.txt readme file.

title: The Hotel
author: w00tguy123
description: Spend the night at a hotel after a long ride. But wait… it's haunted?!
additional_info: You will have to dodge and lure the enemies until you find weapons. Find and destroy the flesh blocking the door and call for a rescue helicopter.

title: The House Of Secrets
author: Zolleriux
description: You're in a house full of secrets, that means you must find secret doors, buttons, triggers and many more. Get out from the big house, alive! You will get into 10 rooms, 1 of them, is not funny to get into…
additional_info: Tips Dont get into portal at the same time as other players! When you're in surf room, change you're sv_airaccelerate to 100. When you're surfing, get on the "wave", and start strafe to the middle of the "wave". Then you will get speed. I think most credits go to Turrican, because I started to build this map after I was playing his map Secretcity all the time, very nice map. the_house_of_secrets2 is under development!

title: The Hunter
author: Mr.Glittoris
description: Walkthrough map that will take you to xen and back, and leave you wondering why it ends abruptly and without warning. You are Xen hunters.
additional_info: N/A

title: The Infected
author: Neclipse
description: Step into the shoes of Gerald Backman, an engineer commissioned to the Black Mesa Research facility to perform some repairs on their communications systems. As he begins his day of work, things go awry because of the resonance cascade incident - as they do in usual fashion - and finds himself in the midst of this catastrophe. Now left to his own devices, he must traverse a crumbling Black Mesa facility lousy with infected staff members and government agents, and to top it all off, otherworldy denizens of another dimension. Will he make it out alive?
additional_info: Maps have Anti-Rush feature: players must meet the 66% minimum players required and/or kill all enemies conditions to unlock progress

title: The Invasion
author: Alexxxey
description: Due to scientists’ ongoing teleportation experiments, severe anomalies have spread across our planet. As a result of these massive anomalies, a mysterious artifact fell into our dimension, allowing beings from another world to invade Earth. Your mission: destroy the artifact and save the planet!

title: The Jungle
author: NIPPER
description: Originally planned as a prequel to the-bunker by the same author. Make your way to the end of the jungle across a sea of human grunts and sandbag trenches
additional_info: N/A

title: The Lake
author: Paranoid_AF
description: PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS MAP CONTAINS META CONTENT. The map will fake messages sent by other players, do not get into conflict! :) Also, this map has dynamic difficulty. With waves and players increasing, monsters will spawn more and more frequent. This is a remake of the lake scene in Cry of Fear, with some assets imported. However, this map contains an unique gameplay: wave based survival. Within each wave (90 seconds), the player must kill all the monsters keeping spawned (until the last 20 seconds) in the map. If there's any monster on the scene when time's up, the game ends. When a wave is successfully fought back, a new wave starts while some supplies are dropped. Story: (pretty nonsense though) You've just escaped from a mental hospital, where the doctor said you're sick - but how could it be? Then you get to a lake where the doctor is standing there, saying that you're going to play a "game" with him. Why is the doctor here? What game would it be? You'll find out soon.

title: The Long Night
author: Uoz
description: As the name suggest, this mod takes pace through the night. You are taken through a variety of locations, within Black Mesa and beyond. Can you escape the influence of that trouble making Gman?
additional_info: N/A

title: The Lost World
author: Reuniclus-579
description: You discover a shaft in a what appears to be abandoned bunker, you venture inside unknowing of what what your fate will be.
additional_info: Original mod ModDB

title: The Mansion and Tower of Babel
author: Hunter Alpha
description: Remake of a Doom map. It's got lots of action and a few puzzle elements. The map is divided into two parts:
additional_info: 2-6 players recommended. Map uses custom textures (from Deathmatch Classic) to give it more of a Doom feel.

title: The Military Base
author: Sean Hamill
description: Infiltrate the millitary base.
additional_info: N/A

title: The Mission
author: Arvid
description: The basic idea for this map is as old as 2005, I started working on it during summer 2007 and now it's a great relief to finaly be able to release it to the Svencoop-community (and my friends won't nag me anymore for spending too much time on mapping ). You are a Special Forces team that is sent to a mountainous area in the dessert to stop an illegal experiment. The mission starts inside your helicopter just before reaching the landing zone. I did much work on the terrain as this was supposed to be mainly an outdoor map. It took 26 hours(!) to compile so I hope there are no obvious bugs. There shouldn't be as I've tested it several times. Story: A separatist group of the military has been discovered experimenting with some kind of interdimensional portal in the mountains. Since we don't want a new Black Mesa accident your team has been assigned with the task to destroy the portal. Be prepared to encounter both human and alien resistance. You'll be inserted by chopper at 10:00 PM. You need to be at least 2 players to complete due to one of the puzzles. Have fun and please tell me what's nice and what can be improved.
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=38112

title: The Mustard Factory
author: Nih
release_date:
v1 - December 7, 2024 (SC 5.26)
beta 7 - May 26, 2022
beta 4 - April 12, 2020
description: The basic concept of the map is this: You work as the new employees of the mad genius Maxwell McMillan, and your job is to run his factory and create a large amount of mustard. However, the factory is suddenly attacked by hired goons of a rival mustard company. And to make matters worse, rifts are opening to another world, and hostile beings are coming through. So what do you do? You have to juggle running the factory, repairing the broken machines, and closing all the rifts before they become too many for you to handle. Not an easy job. Be forewarned, this is a map that requires you to pay a lot of attention to figure things out. Luckily you can view all instructions in-game by clicking your tertiary fire button. You might not figure everything out on your first playthrough, especially the layout, because the map is enormous. For that reason I recommend playing the beginner mode first, which reduces the map size and introduces new gameplay features at a slower pace.
additional_info: N/A

title: The Nican Entmap Final 2
author: Protostar
description: Entmap statistics: 3500x3500x1500 Grass area Light switches All of SC 3.0 Weapons and NPC's (Except SAW and Deagle) Vehicles, Xen prefabs Liquids, Basic blocks and doors Valve prefabs and some other objects
additional_info: N/A

title: The Only Way Is Up
author: jobabob, ported by AdamR
description: The Only Way is Up - Stupid Civ Jump Map

title: The Plane
author: Cordian
description: Your mission is simple. Kill Captain Smith and jump off the plane. You team is supported by some soldiers.
additional_info: 7-10 players recommended. This is Cordian's conversion of his CS map as_Plane.

title: The Prison
author: Swedish Soldier
description: You have been captured by the military and locked up in a high security prison. It's heavily guarded by military units so the only possible way for you and your teammates to escape is to get your hands on some firearms and fight your way out. You have managed to steal a keycard from the guards and you have also observed that a lot of guns are stored in the guard room right next to your cell block. One night the electronic lock system malfunctions and causes a short power failure. When the power comes back suddenly the cell doors in your block open and you are able to leave your cells. This is your chance to escape…
additional_info: 2-8 players recommended. Possible with 1.

title: The Red Area
author: Necromancer
description: The Red Area Sven Edition by Necromancer Your objective is to get to the aircraft on the surface while fighting through alien and military rule. Good Luck!
additional_info: Ripented to have the launch button trigger a game_end.

title: The Room
author: Indulgence INC
description: YOU WAKE UP IN A ROOM WITH NO MEMORY HOW YOU GOT THERE. YOU SOON DISCOVER YOU'RE NOT ALONE.
additional_info: The Room is Indulgence Inc's first project. It features dark, terrifying atmospheres, innovative puzzles and gameplay, and many more features like: never before seen monsters mysterious and indulging story detail textures 3 different difficulties multiple endings new sounds and music traps and secrets perfected cutscenes plot twists various other visual effects Progress: 40% (SCRAPPED) Visit http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=35485 for more info.

title: The Stockades
author: Skals
description: The Stockades is medium sized SvenCoop map. its quite challenging and nice. i added it because i want suggestions of how to improve it and what should happen next. If you spot some bugs can you tell me those too :) Note: If you can't beat a boss, don't worry! skip it! (with the exception of the Volgraunt boss, Voltigore boss and the robots. the robots should be killed because youll need to use theshortcut that they are blocking.)
additional_info: Stockade v1.4 This is not the final version of the map but it is quite ready and i even have a game_end in it. i dont play on adding any other content for a while so, enjoy.

title: The Strike
author: BingusMaster
description: Sorry for making another map, I just thought this one was polished enough to deserve a upload This is simply a map where you just do some objectives and fight enemies with very high health, except this time you also do very high damage Also I flat out just used uboa monsters for this map, except for the 2D lawyers you fight after defeating the 2 red male assassins and the cat on the 2nd floor of the tiny castle
additional_info: Again, credits to enuze for the models

title: The Swamp
author: Hunter Alpha
description: You are part of an elite assassination squad and you must find a traitors hideout in the swamp and kill him. You must then wait for three minutes for reinforcements to arrive before you can leave.
additional_info: Recommended players: 2-9 There are three respawn areas : The start, the second outpost and the lodge at the end. There is one secret to the level (hint : It's marked by bloody hand prints.)

title: The Tomb of Death
author: generic
release_date:
v1.2 - January 31, 2008
v1.1 - May 27, 2007
v1.0 - April 9, 2007
Beta 3 - January 15, 2007
Beta 2 - October 20, 2006
Beta 1 - September 2, 2006
description: You are a team of mercenaries exploring an ancient tomb looking for a team of archeologists reported missing. You don't see them anywhere, but you do see plenty of horrible monsters, and now you must fight for your life. The individual map MOTDs have much more plot information for reading in-game. This is just a quick intro of the map.
additional_info: 4-6 players recommended. This isn't a Half-Life themed map - there are no HEV or health stations. To replenish armor, you can pick up armor vests that will give 100ap. Medkits will heal you 50hp. Portals in this map use an anti-telefrag mechanism that will reverse the the effect of telefragging. The portal will change appearance when a player enters so to show that it's unsafe to enter. After 2 seconds the portal will change back into the original form.

title: The Turret Fortress
author: Nih
release_date:
v3 - January 22, 2016 (SC 5.0)
v2 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
v1 - January 27, 2011
description: Players must fend off 12 waves of monsters by constructing sentry turrets and a few "special" friendly units. The players save up for these sentries and special units by killing the attacking monsters and surviving waves. If too many monsters make it to the end of the map, the players lose. Just to make life even harder for the players, random "Panic Events" will occur throughout the map. Such panic events could involve hostile soldiers infiltrating the base and installing a virus in the Turret AI, or the generators powering the sentries breaking down. As you can see in one of the screenshots, the map is divided into 4 different sectors. If a generator for a specific sector breaks down, all sentries in that sector will be deactivated until the generator is repaired. The end result is a map that puts your teamwork and strategic skills to a serious test. And you get to see a ton of monsters get ripped to pieces by sentry turrets.
additional_info: This map was renamed to tf_original and replaced with Reverse Turret Fortress with the release of Sven Co-op 5.0 At least three players is recommended. Any less and the map cannot be won. One player must operate the control panel and designate where turrets must be built. A second player must operate the turret crate teleport and send unbuilt turrets to the sectors where they are to be constructed. A third player must push unbuilt turret crates to their designated locations and construct them. Even on easy mode, there's a high chance that you will lose the first few times, as the map size can make it hard to navigate for newcomers. Once you get the hang of it though, it's pretty straightforward. Communication and teamwork is key. The original release thread can be found here: http://forums.svencoop.com/showthread.php/38808-The-Turret-Fortress Turkish translated version by ImpossibleTR: Turret Fortress Turkish version Note that the stock version of this map is broken in SC5.2x. Please download the patched tf_original.bsp and place it in your svencoop_addon/maps folder. (NB If you over-write the original file in svencoop/maps it will just revert to the broken stock version every time you verify your game/server.)

title: The Ultimate Killer Entmap
author: Killer101
description: Entmap statistics: Forest (higher walls, which is func_wall), Grass, Snow and Desert (no walls) and Water (lower celling) themed 3700x3700x3000 areas A big desert area with a cave Some sprites and all the func_breakable effects Some NPC's Pipes, concrete blocks, ducts Vehicles, detailed prefabs, xen rocks n terrain Buttons, prefabs, liquids, basic blocks, walls and floors Light swtiches
additional_info: An predecessor of this map, made by the same mapper, is The Better Than That Entmap

title: The Underground Base
author: Kurt Kesler
description: There is a hidden underground base somewhere in this valley. There are crates with ammo and weapons just outside the cavern your hiding in. You will receive resistance right away because the enemy saw our plane drop the ammo crates.
additional_info: Title : The Underground Base Filename : earthbase.zip Date : January 12 2003 Game : Sven Co-op Half-Life Author : Kurt Kesler Email Address : moc.liamdif|ktruk#moc.liamdif|ktruk Description : Find a way into the underground base, and kill everything. _ ##INFO## New Sky : No.

title: The Unknown Entmap
author: Tirex
description: This is one of the newest entmaps including all of the things added since SC 3.0. Leaned more towards military builds, but this is a videogame of combat! This entmap includes: 5000x5000x1000 Grass area Two lighting options All of Sven 3.0 weapons and monsters Black mesa prefabs and furniture, some trees and doors Mostly military builds and simple building blocks
additional_info: N/A

title: The Void
author: Hezus
description: The Void is an unknown area where everything floats in nothingness. The world consists out of different colored thin plates, which are the only walkways. Each color has a different ability: WHITE / GREY / BLACK = normal walkways RED = kills the player ORANGE = turbo BLUE = sticky (climbable) BROWN = moving objects GREEN = spawn area The Void is a collection of jump and run puzzles, flying through loopings, corkscrews, and thinking puzzles. The world is divided in 4 parts, and every part start with a green spawn area. If you reach such areas, a teleporter shortcut will be made available.
additional_info: Map was made in about 2 days It was originally called DevWorld because of the custom developer textures it uses.

title: The Water Works
author: AdamR
description: Xen aliens that escaped from the Black Mesa disaster have taken over a public sewer system and poisoned the treated water going back out to the public, killing anyone who drinks public water. Your squad was sent in to stop this happening. However when your team went down what was the only unguarded enterance left to stop the Xen, you all ended up trapped in a small maintenance room below the car park. The Xen has become aware of your presence and is ready to stop you terminating their plans. You must reach the treatment centre and stop the Xen aliens from poisoning the fresh water any further then escape the sewer system. Be prepared for a rough getaway! Top tip: If you find breakables aren't breaking try using explosives to destroy them instead. Explosives are only found in 3 rooms through the whole map so look around.
additional_info: N/A

title: The Winery
author: tdw
description: Yesterday a three man team was sent to retrieve computer data from a local facility. They were to report in this morning but there has been no word from them yet. We are sending your team to find them and retrieve the computer data. With help from a security guard we were able to locate an unguarded entrance to the facility. You will be transported by truck to this entrance. Once inside you must make it to the main office and upload the computer data to our database. Upon arrival, things didn't go as smoothly as planned. We were ambushed at the entrance and barley made it inside. Weapons are depleted and things are looking…
additional_info: Buttons at the start of map allow players to choose either single-player or co-op mode. The included thewinery.txt contains a detailed map walkthrough.

title: The Xeno Project
author: Reuniclus-579
description: The Xeno Project One: The terraformation of Xen has begun. The planet now supports a breathable oxygen-nitrogen atmosphere and earth-like gravity. A scientific facility called the Xeno Project has been set up on the planet for continuing research into portal technology. Tension on the planet is running high due to the secrecy surrounding the project and the military's distrust of the scientific community. You are Gordon Freeman. Your mission is to report to the underground test lab at the Xeno Project. The Xeno Project Two: After fighting your way across Xen and escaping in a rocket you are captured and imprisoned aboard an Earth vessel full of grunts lead by the our old friend the Gman. What happens next? I'm afraid that's up to you.
additional_info: Original mod txp1-2 Original mod txp3-4

title: Theater
author: mrfranswa
description: This is a lobby map made for all the Resident Evil themed maps. In this map you get to choose the next resident evil map to play.
additional_info: Back then, lobby maps were needed since votemap plugins didn't exist.

title: Them
author: PanzerOx
description: INCOMING TRANSMISSION: Smallsville Cemetary is infested with brainless zombified Undead. (which means their slightly smarter than Counter-Strike fans) YOUR MISSION OBJECTIVE: Whack them Zombies good and proper.
additional_info: N/A

title: Theme Park 1
author: Zippy
description: Themepark_1 Public Beta By Z!ppy and a Lil' help from Diz
additional_info: N/A

title: They Hunger Co-op: Episode 1
author: Created by Neil Manke and Black Widow Games, conversion for Sven Co-op by JPolito
description: A writer's vacation gets out of hand when his car is destroyed and he is forced to seek assistance in a cemetery on the outskirts of a small town. There, he encounters an unstoppable onslaught of zombies who are driven by some insatiable hunger for warm flesh and blood. You, the writer, must escape these unfortunate circumstances, along with a group of others who have been unaffected by the incident.
additional_info: Originally presented by PC Gamer, Autumn 1999. Survival mode and custom weapons have been implemented as of the October 30, 2016 (SC 5.07) release. 2-8 players recommended.

title: They Hunger Co-op: Episode 2
author: Created by Neil Manke and Black Widow Games, conversion for Sven Co-op by JPolito
description: The players continues on their journey from where it left off at the end of They Hunger Co-op: Episode 1, and eventually find the source of the zombies — a mad scientist named Doctor Franklin who has been experimenting on patients at a local asylum. You must infiltrate Doctor Franklin's facilities and stop his plan to spread the zombie infection to the entirety of the human race.
additional_info: Survival mode and custom weapons have been implemented as of the October 30, 2016 (SC 5.07) release. 2-8 players recommended.

title: They Hunger Co-op: Episode 3
author: Created by Neil Manke and Black Widow Games, conversion for Sven Co-op by JPolito and Dynamite
description: The players continue on their journey from where it left off at the end of They Hunger Co-op: Episode 2. Explore the zombified countryside of Rockwell and the burned-out ruins of the Asylum, get mauled by zombie chickens and bulls, and stop Dr. Franklin and Sheriff Rockwood from carrying out their plans for world domination!
additional_info: This map runs "Survival mode" gameplay by default and includes custom scripted weapons. 2-8 players recommended.

title: They Hunger: Escape
author: JPolito, GeckonCZ
description: The civilians of the town of Rockwell suddenly find themselves in the midst of the zombie apocalypse, their own Sheriff Chester Rockwood at the helm of the now-zombified police force. To make matters worse, you've caught wind that the military is on its way (and they're most certainly not on your side). You must work together to find three vital parts to repair a vehicle and escape before the 'purge' of this plagued city begins.
additional_info: 4 to 8 players recommended. Map has not been officially tested with more players. Up to 16 unique characters roles (police officer, drunk, paramedic, etc.) can be assigned to players by the map. After 16 players join, the map will assign players to 'Random Civilian' character roles. If 16 or more players are detected when the start button is pressed, hardcore mode is automatically activated (no vote is displayed).

title: They Hunger Lobby
author: AlexCorruptor
description: A simple mapvote lobby for the They Hunger campaign. Select one of 4 episodes to vote: Episode 1 Episode 2 Episode 3 Escape Stand in the areas in front of the posters to vote. Voting times are 10 seconds.

title: They Live Chungo
author: who_is_naven_r_johnson
description: Conversion of the mod They Live or Chungo (more info in Additional Info), ported as an unofficial continuation of Delta Return where you must find the captive Sven Viking before it is too late while the alien invasion from the portal storms rages on and is getting worse.
additional_info: “This is a pre release for my level They Live. The experience is far from finished, there is still much to add. The storyline isn’t all the way developed but basically your are Gordon Freeman, an expert in the science of teleportation. The lambda lab requires your expertise on some upcoming tests. Obviously all hell breaks loose and you must stop it.” -who_is_naven_r_johnson The mods They Live and Chungo were released by the same author and are exactly the same files. Perhaps the author uploaded his pre release, but wrongly uploaded it again with another name as if it was the full mod. Anyways, the full version never existed. This is all there is. This conversion has been enhanced for co-op play with a few additions. You can consider it a ripent, since the original mod was void of challenges or anything interesting some liberties were taken.

title: TheyRhungry
author: Sandurr
description: The map is about a sheriff who has a lab, he was researching about the undead, and created his own zombies, he turned into a zombie himself, and is now the leader of the zombie race… Your mission is to get into the house and get to him as soon as possible, though, you will have to kill all zombies to be sure they can't spread… But be careful, mafia grunts not knowing that there are zombies are still guarding the front garden of the house…
additional_info: This map includes: 2 secrets 2 traps 10 special effects (Hint: 3 in bathroom) 3 shortcuts A lot new sounds (including a music sound for the end) Custom Weapon Models (HL2 Pistol, MP5, Shotgun, Magnum) New Zombie Models New Headcrab models Mafia Grunts The map requires 2 people at least to play, to get over the fence at the first garden. If you are testing alone, you can always put sv_gravity on 400, and open the shortcut, then put gravity back to 800 again. Also, please report bugs, and, in map2 there are metal bars on the ground, please don't misunderstand it as a hole. Everything in this map is self-made and looks a lot like They Hunger.

title: Three Paths
author: Program Zeta
description: Three Paths - Choose Wisely This is my first map :D Doors are only shoot open, which can lead to some interesting tactics if used correctly….
additional_info: N/A

title: Tiles
author: Streamfox & Maiten
description: Be the last one alive and receive points. Two players required Touch the tiles,when it becomes red jump to another before it disappears

title: Titan Battle
author: Gurluas2000
description: deep into the desert there is a a bunker… a big security area with some tactical files… one day the xen appears …a and alot of alien destroy turret kill humans 3 days after the reinforcement come… time to kick ass… you are the reinforcement
additional_info: N/A

title: Titans
author: Monkey Knuckles
description: This is an adaptation of the superb Quake level House of the Titans in the series named "Anno Dommini 1492" by Mark Shan. According to Mark Shan's readme file for the series and as posted on his website (markshan.com) "Non-commercial level authors are free to use portions or ideas from this unit as a basis for other levels. The map source file is included in 1492.zip file: everybody can use it for building additional non-commercial levels. " I tried contacting him but the email given for him is inactive. Since Quake II is mostly compatible with Hammer, I converted Mark Shan's released source code directly into Sven Coop 4.0. I had to make conversions on textures and music. But all credit on the architecture and textures goes Mark Shan. Minor tweaks have been made to brush alignment and a few small additions for secrets have been added. I made a decision not to use any Quake textures or models so I replaced them with substitutes. This turned out to be only a small amount of textures such as metal, platforms, grass etc. that did not affect the overall feel of the map. Other than that, all textures are those from the original map. My goal for the map is to have a retro-Quake look with Sven-Coop monsters and weapons. I eliminated charging stations and replaced them with Sheilds for armour, and Health Boxes for health. The following models used were made by me. health1.mdl - replacement for healthkit armour33.mdl - replacement for battery duffle5.mdl - replacement for weaponbox keyblue.mdl - blue key keyred.mdl - red key I used the new model replacement files in SC 4.0 to replace the health, battery, and weaponbox.
additional_info: http://www.svencoop.com/forums/showthread.php?t=37204

title: Tkou
author: Dr.Abc
description: map name: sc_tkou sc_tkou map by 巫术蛊师(Dr.Abc) models by 颓废_心寂(SXLG) find out the VIP and rescue him. don't kill the VIP. have fun!

title: To Hell
author: radical-Ed
description: Yes It's kinda crappy but it is challeging.. and for only spending 10 - 20 minutes on it i think it came out pretty good.. o yeah check out the tentacle, burning pools of urine (it was lava.. but everyone that played said it was urine soo..), the people in the urine that have names(to the left of spawn look down and you will find them) , and the cloked snipers and evil chubbies. Peace out.. radical-Ed / Radical-Wolf / NightWolf
additional_info: The game ends when Santa(?) dies.

title: Toad Snatch
author: Nih
release_date:
v3 - June 30, 2013 (SC 4.8)
v2 - December 25, 2012 (SC 4.7)
v1 - December 25, 2011 (SC 4.6)
description: Your mission is to infiltrate the enemy stronghold and steal the Chumtoad Deluxe. Once the chumtoad has been picked up you must return it to the Obelisk. While the heist is taking place you must also protect the Obelisk from being destroyed. Death is permanent, unless revived with a medkit. Once you are dead you will respawn as a ghost, unable to leave the immediate area of the Obelisk. Your only option will be to defend the Obelisk.
additional_info: Tips: - If a grapple section is too difficult, try grappling onto another player. - The Obelisk can be repaired with the wrench. - Picking up new weapons will make them available for defenders as well.

title: Tomb of Nick Cage

title: Toon Run
author: koelzk
release_date:
v3 - January 22, 2016 (SC 5.0)
v2 - June 30, 2013 (SC 4.8)
v1.3 "Revised" - December 24, 2008 (SC 4.0b1)
Final - December 23, 2003 (SC 3.0)
v1.2 - October 24, 2003
v1.1 - October 4, 2002
v1.0 - July 11, 2002
description: A cartoon style map with colorful textures, wild scenery, and exciting puzzles. The Slimy-Sweaty-Evil-Giant-Mega-Monster-Boss-From-Outer-Space (called The Mother Spleen™) has built an Evil Giant Cloning Killing machine. Originally you wanted to make holidays next to the domain of the Slimy-Sweaty-Evil-Giant-Mega-Monster-Boss (The travel brochure praised its healthy green environment), but now it looks as if your fighting skill is needed. Just by coincidence you are also a member of a local Marvel-Super-Heroes club, so you and your heroic friends feel obligated to go on a suicide trip into the fortress of the Slimy-Sweaty-Evil-Giant-Mega-Monster-Boss From-Outer-Space to turn off the Evil Giant Cloning Killing machine, to destroy the Slimy-Sweaty-Evil-Giant-Mega-Monster-Boss, to defend the rights of humanity, to get away from your annoying wives and to avert all the rest of the usual Armageddon stuff.
additional_info: Included in all releases since Sven Co-op 2.1. Toon Run is in the Best of Map Showcase. Koelzk has released Toon Run's source files, so now mappers can learn from it. (See download button for map source download). Ranked #1 in the Creepsworld Top50 maps list.

title: Toon Run Classic
author: koelzk (original map sources), BryanH (port)
description: Simpler maps from a simpler age. A port of the old released map sources for Toon Run to Sven Co-op 5.x, including support for survival mode! These classic versions co-exist with the Toon Run maps shipped with Sven. Changes made from the original map sources: Updated maps to use kk1_classic.wad and kk2_classic.wad. Updated level transistions to target _classic versions. Enabled survival mode and added checkpoints. Replaced missing lights.rad files with various in-map info_texlights entities. Placed at least one weapon_m16 in each map to maintain compatibility with Sven 5.0 weapons. Fixed corner in pipe in toonrun1 causing players to get stuck in pipe. Fixed various lip values (e.g. elevators in blowtato plant area). Fixed various lighting issues in old map sources. Fixed various VIS issues in old map sources. Fixed center blowtato plant being killed prematurely by a grenade in the other blowtato plants. Fixed vortigaunts not getting launched out of the center blowtato properly. Added shotgun shells and a battery in the volcano area in toonrun2 to make it more doable with small amounts of people. Fixed leaks in toonrun3. Fixed vortigaunt spawning in the air in toonrun2.
additional_info: I STRONGLY recommend installing Classic Mode Deluxe before installing this map. The zip contains a modified classic_maps.txt that adds the toonrun_classic maps to the list.

Language can be changed in scripts/torre/torre.as. If you want to report a bug please give details of the problem you found, so there is a bigger chance to solve it, and faster. Avoid making reports based only on the W00tguy repacker. Is common to have there false positives and things that does not affect the game and i have noticed that people is posting these reports without caring if there is a real problem. Fix trolling not allowed: there is a group of users that since they are unwilling to take the effort and time to make their own maps instead they mess with other people work adding their custom versions disguised as "fixes", trying in a display of arrogance to impose their own map preferences just to feel they are doing a contribution to the Sven Co-op community. To them i say if you really want to support the community leave other authors in peace and make your own maps.

Features alot of great architecture and general good looks throughout. Then comes the game play, which is nothing short of excellent.." -CreepsWorld

title: Triad Run
author: Hezus
description: Triad Run was made in 2006 as an experimental idea. As you can see from the screenshot there is a large arena with 2 types of triads (blue and red). The goal for each team is to destroy their own triads as fast as possible to win the match. You can do this by wacking them or throwing them to pieces with the throw feature. To throw the crowbar, bind a key to "+alt1". You'll spawn in a waiting room, where you can activate a video tutorial that explains how the game works. You'll need at least 2 players to activate the game arena and play the game, but teams can go up to 8 players without problems. Other players can watch the game from above in the spectator area.

The main purpose of the map is to make a simple looking puzzle map. Since Devious Trials has 5000 w_poly in some place which isn't good, this one have max 1055. Other purpose is to make a small chance of "cheating". In this case using the buggy pushable cube to bypass puzzles.

title: Triton (OUTDATED)
author: Keen
description: This map is a linear map with monsters and some human grunts, set in a complex deep under the frosty crust of the moon Triton orbiting Neptune. + Full story - Full story I am one of a group of top secret cybernetisized marines that has just been woken from a deep cryogenic freeze. Deep this barren moon's icy core, I have lied brain dead and what they call "asleep" for more then 70 years. I am the ultimate weapon. I am a soldier for the UEC (United Earth Core) defending the Earth, if that still exists, from its most deadliest of hostile threats. Mostly alien species and other genetically altered/cyberized hybrids life myself. We are to… "special" to compare at all to a normal soldier. The reason you may ask yourself that we have been in sleep for so long? Surely the human race has not lost its edge of violence, rot, and decay? Of course not. But most of the governments of Earth are smart enough not to put us into use except when extreme prejudice is needed, and even then we are not usually called upon for fear of us growing out of control. Even when the governments fall on top of each other like domino's, there are still people smart enough to know that its preferable to band together to seal away people… no… things like us, until the time arises for need for "people", like us. We are brutal, savage. But it's not like we don't know what we are doing, we were programmed this way by our fathers we can't fight who we are. Some have tried and they take off in giant light ships and we haven't heard from them since. Any sane sentient would like to be at least 90 light years away from us to feel comfortable. But something has awoken us. And there are literally hundreds of safe guards in place to prevent accidental resuscitation… Someone.. or something has woken us to fight for something… What ever it is, we will soon find out. Come brothers and sisters, let us see what this new world hath brought us and let the world that made us cry for mercy when it learns that we have awoken again to take back what was once ours.
additional_info: There is a laser beam about half way through the map that will gib you if you don't have 100% HEV and 100% health. There is a trigger that sets the 2nd set of info_player_deathmatch respawn points so once you get through the beam and hit that trigger then 95% of the time you will respawn AFTER the beam of death and be fine. For some reason 5% of the time you respawn at the old spawn point. The map doesn't have a proper ending yet. It's over once you reach the rusty vents and kill the zombies.

Now fixed and merged with Tubers, which was another very similar series but without the nsfw part (most of it), and made it a longer and fuller tubes experience. The first map couldn't be censored fully because a lot of the members are part of the map geometry. Therefore if those couldn't be censored then removing the huge member you ride would be the same as nothing, so it was left alone for lols

title: Tunnel
author: Keen
description: You spawn near an opening to an underground cave, if you wait a couple of minutes a barney spawns near the ladder. You explore the underground area attacking zombies that come out of the wall and other monsters. Finding a teleporter to the end you teleport to a chamber with a garg in it. Once the garg is killed you run into a hole in the wall and complete the map. A very short, basic map one of Keen's first.
additional_info: Be careful there are traps near some of the weapons. And one of them has a hidden exit near the wall. If you hug the walls you will sometimes fall into a hidden compartment with additional ammo. There is also a hidden uranium ammo to the right of the floor in the garg area in the water. Look at the pics for info where. This is the second of very few maps Keen completed and released on the Sven Co-op website 8 or 9 years ago.

title: Tunnel Vision
author: Dr. Orange
description: A campaign made by Dr. Orange- a brilliant classic Half-Life styled campaign with many features of wonderful level design and aesthetics that make it a very enjoyable nostalgic experience, each level having its own unique characteristic that make the level progression truly worthwhile. An excellent throwback to what players enjoy most about the original Half-Life levels. First place winner of TWHL competition 35, Half-Life 20th Anniversary: Vanilla Half-Life- now ported to Sven Co-op https://twhl.info/vault/view/6310 Enjoy Mission:- HECU forces have launched a full-on assault on the Lambda Reactor Complex and the SC Team has been sent in to control the imminent attack. Your objective is simple: arm yourself and fight your way to the sector before the HECU get there first!
additional_info: This is a Sven Co-op conversion of the original Half Life mod- certain things had to be changed in order to be suitable for co-operative play: enemies are more challenging, have varied weaponry and slightly extended player arsenal.

The number of monster is huge, but one bullet can kill. So when monsters appear like waves, use MP5 or others weapons to dodge them, they will fall down like waves too. The pleasure of dodging. Of course this map pack not only has this style; it also has other styles such as jumping, avoidance, and combat.
additional_info: And thanks to Garompa, GR0UNDZ3R0, and all the Sven Co-op community for making these map series better.

title: TWHL Tower
author: Unknown
description: "They didn't even send a goddamn team over?" Back in February 2015, a group project was set up at The Whole Half Life (TWHL). Each mapper would be given a set amount of space in order to create a floor in a tower. The gameplay, appearance and story of each floor is unique, decided by the mapper. After a few months, the final maps were sent to Urby, who linked them together, added a start and end map, and the result was TWHL TOWER!
additional_info: The original 13 maps have been merged into 2, and some things had to be altered to function in a multiplayer setting. The recommended player count is 4 people or less, due to the way the levels are designed and the amount of enemies, any higher and you'll have trouble moving around and nothing to shoot at. Due to this, Survival Mode is also supported and encouraged.

The planet is believed to have intelligent life… Yeah, I know the story sucks but you can forget it and concentrate on slaughtering the aliens. title: Uboa
author: enuze
description: A very difficult alternative map requiring a high player count. Involves insider jokes and punishment. Throw the Crowbar: Throw the Crowbar is one of the many missions in the map. There are a few moving platforms and the player is given a crowbar. The furthest platform to the back has a Baby Shii standing on it in which the player must kill by throwing the provided crowbars at it. There are also Shiis that are standing on the other platforms, but they don't need to be killed. What makes this exceptionally hard is that the Baby Shii is extremely tiny and far away, and getting a direct hit on it with the crowbar is no easy task. The best strategy is just to wait in one particular area and hope you can time your shots correctly. It just takes practice. Yes or No: Yes or No is one of the more confusing missions given to the player. There are two breakable walls with tons of HP on both sides of the room named "Yes" and "No", and there is either a question or just a random statement or ascii art depiction on the wall and the player must choose the "right answer" that corresponds to the 'question' by breaking and going through the corresponding wall. The "questions" are so random that it's pretty much a timed guessing game, but from my experience, the answer is usually yes. Shoot the Duty Guy: Shoot the Duty Guy is tough if you don't know what to do. The players are all in a spectating room watching as Gamer N (an NPC of Enuze's playermodel) and Gamer T (an NPC of Takedeppo's (a map maker and contributor to the Uboa series) playermodel) fight each other. If Gamer N dies, the players lose, but if Gamer T dies before the timer runs out, the players win. Only thing is that Gamer T has way more health than Gamer N and it's an unfair fight, and the players must intervene by using the camera buttons and clicking on Gamer T, which will damage him. Defend the Cat: Defend the Cat is pretty easy with multiple players, but is hard to do solo. Basically, the room has a Bakeneko (a cat-like creature) in the center of the room and the players must protect it as an army of Uribou (black Houndeyes with ascii art faces) try to attack it until the timer runs out. It's pretty simple, but it can get pretty hard at times. Mayoral Election: Mayoral Election is another confusing mission that's very similar to Yes or No. There is a goofy ascii art picture depicting a random statement or question in the room, as a "Yes or No" vote shows up asking the question or saying the statement. Like Yes or No, the answer's usually yes but the questions are so random it's pretty much a guessing game. Browser Crasher: Browser Crasher is one of the much, much harder Uboa missions. The players are provided with a crowbar to fight a long-lasting army of Emoticons which will attack the player and an annoying overlay will appear to cloud the player's vision every once in a while. Once enough of the Emoticons are killed, the players win the mission. Destroy the Shii-Chan's House: Destroy the Shii-Chan's House is an exceptionally difficult mission where the players are sent to a large room full of Shiis and Baby Shiis and there is a cardboard box with 15000 HP that the players are supposed to break with a provided crowbar. The reason it's so hard is because not only of the sheer HP of the "house" and the fact that there are several monsters attacking the players, but also because there is a 60-second time limit. Boss Battle: Boss Battle is extremely hard, having the players face a monster with 10k HP with a crowbar. Because of the time limit, it is almost impossible to do. The boss is randomized, it can be the Abababa, the Cloaked Knifer, the Saitama, the Uribou, the Speed Hacker, or the 2D Monster. Heal the Kuma: Heal the Kuma is another mission that's tough if you don't know what to do. It's the same scenario as the Shoot the Duty Guy mission, but instead it is the Kuma (a friendly Pedo-Bear) facing against Electro (an extremely fast TFC Civillian, named after a map maker). However, the idea is to keep Kuma alive until the end of the timer instead of killing his opponent. The only way to do this is to use the camera buttons and clicking on the Kuma will slowly heal him. Patience: Patience is actually in my opinion the easiest mission. The players are in a large room with a door and several Shii trying to attack the players and as time goes by more doors begin to appear. To beat the mission, the players must avoid entering any of the doors until the timer runs out. Pretty simple, actually. Break the Target: Break the Target is next to impossible to beat. There are several squares that the players must break by throwing provided crowbars at them. However, there are multiple SIN Punishers on platforms blocking the way, and if the players hit one, they fail. Break the Wall: Break the Wall is fairly easy with more than one player, but solo it is much trickier. The player is in a large room with multiple Saitama and a crowbar. The player must find the breakable wall and destroy it with the crowbar which is very hard to find whilst not trying to get killed by the Saitama. The ideal method is to have one or two players distracting the Saitama as another crowbars each side of the wall until they find the right one and break it. Toss the Weapon: The players start off in a medium room with a Saitama, but there is a hole in one of the walls where one of the players must jump through it to obtain a crowbar and then throw it back so the other players can defeat Saitama. It's pretty easy to do, but the time limit makes it difficult. Find the Cloaker: Find the Cloaker is a simple but extremely hard mission. The players are provided with a crowbar and must find a 2D Monster who's hiding inside of a pitch-black room and kill him before the timer runs out, which is much easier said than done. An annoying overlay also appears every so often to distract the players and disorient them from finding the "Cloaker" again. Push the Button: The players are inside of a large room with several Saitama and two buttons. The players must gather up on each button and repeatedly press both od them at the same time until they win the mission. Pitfall: Pitfall is difficult if the players don't know what they are supposed to do, but if they know what to do, it's a piece of cake. Basically, the players are trapped in a medium sized room as a Speed Hacker (a TFC Spy that can go at exceptional speeds) tries to kill the players and there is a grid-shaped trap-door in the center of the room and a button that will temporarily open it, revealing a deadly pit and the players must use this pit to kill the Speed Hacker. The best method is to have one player lure the Speed Hacker onto the trap-door while the other presses the button on queue to kill the Speed Hacker.
additional_info: - UBOA - Feel the uboaizm! @ 2011 2016 enuze

title: U-Life
author: skaarj
description: You find yourself imprisoned in a high-tech facilities, then the power supply fails for some reason, opening the cell and letting you escape.
additional_info: Quick Sven Co-op conversion of the mod U-Life for Half-Life by skaarj found here. This map series is heavily inspired in the first Unreal game's first levels, using ported textures and sounds all over, a true work of art. Big thanks to glitchenco for his map sc-unreal and all the porting of the enemies, otherwise this would look very ugly and out of place with xen enemies. The last map will attempt to changelevel to sc_unreal, but will end the map if its not found on the server.

title: Ultimate Attack
author: P@TRIOT
description: You are Agent David Johnson, a Black Ops operative in the SC Institute's Cleanup Division. After coming back from a successful mission at a secret military research complex in Area 69, the Boss has assigned you in the coverup of a large scale accident known as the Black Mesa Incident, said to have been caused by a physical anomaly referred to as a resonance cascade. As you make your way through the research facility, you find yourself in the wake of fierce conflict between HECU military forces and otherwordly creatures. It's up to you to put an end to both and see to it that the nuclear payload is successfully delivered, that this catastrophe is lost to the pages of time… Hopefully if you make it out of this alive you'll get a large sum of money at the end of this and finally go on that long awaited vacation to Sven's Holiday Island Resort!
additional_info: This is a ripent conversion of the original Half-Life mod ported to Sven Co-op. Because of the limitations on the bsp size for Half-Life and the map transitions in Sven Co-op, the levels are brief and feel like a "loading simulator". There is no way around this other than to merge the bsps together which is almost impossible without the sourcemaps. Antirush feature has been implemented to ensure the levels are not completed in half a minute to allow players to explore the maps at their own leisure.

title: Ultra Monster
author: amckern
description: Your in an old area of black mesa and have to turn the power on, once thats done your going to have an Ultra Monster fight on your hands. Ultra Monster was developed as an official map for 4.5, but becuase it needs a bit more polish i have made it a public map so that i can large scale play test, and make changes for the map to be included in the next build of svencoop. It looks like some textures may be from other mods, your correct, the map uses some night watch textures, and the texture set by chrome angel for NS (found in sc_avp.wad) NB: If you look like your stuck, did you kill everything?
additional_info: Possible issue with the HW Grunt, he seems to find to many path nodes, and freezes the game when he try's to go UP, instead of in a straight line. Small fix to prevent scientist in box-room from breaking the map, by being stubbornly unwilling to die properly. Download the ultra_monster_final_FIXED.zip, extract the single file and use it to over-write your existing copy of ultra_monster_final.bsp wherever you originally installed it (e.g. svencoop_addons/maps).

title: Umbrella
author: Nymph
description: Based on Umbrella theme (Or at least that's what I tried?) Co-op is required on this map to open the doors by pressing some computers/buttons to going through the map, you cannot play it alone.
additional_info: N/A

title: UnDeath
author: DeathBog
description: You are a member of a masquerade party gone awry. Yet another appearance in the top 50 by Deathbog, this times its with the rather good undeath. Ever wanted to be in your own horror movie? Well this map definitely provides a pretty good idea of how it would feel like to be in a town full of zombies. You'll be on the end of your wits throughout the entire map, as its packed full of freighting moments! It even managed to scare FreakingNeo who said "Its so damn scary! When I first played it I was so scared I just sat on the light pole the whole time and let everybody do the rest! "
additional_info: http://scmapdb.wikidot.com/hosted:creepsworld-top-50 special thanks to : Valve - For making an incredible game SvenCoop-Team - For making a great mod

title: Under the Black Moon
author: B-dama
description: A conversion of the original Half Life: Opposing Force mod created by B-dama, ported to Sven Co-op. We hope you enjoy! Story You are Private Daniel Shephard, a new recruit of the Hazardous Environment Combat Unit. Your brother Adrian became a Corporal in less than 3 years- very few people have ever become an officer that quickly. After crash landing on your way to Black Mesa, you find yourself stranded and your comrades never made it. As a lowly grunt you have been given the perfect opportunity to prove yourself and show that Adrian isn't the only successful one in the family. Escape an infested research facility with aliens and a whole battalion of Black Ops… its going to be hell.
additional_info: This campaign has been ported and optimized for Sven Co-op: enemies are more challenging and varied, more items can be found and uses the much higher quality default Sven Co-op models. Ally grunts can be taken across level changes Working nightvision flashlight weapon_knife is its own standalone weapon with secondary attack Many secret items have been added New final boss

title: Underground
author: Nih
release_date:
Beta 1 v2 - July 13, 2004
Beta 1 v1 - July 12, 2004
description: You and your friends have been drinking and you end up in some sewers in some country. You and friends suddenly get attacked by some soldiers. With guns. You decide to kill them. With guns.
additional_info: 3-4 players recommended. No more than 7. Map uses custom textures, sounds, and a custom HW grunt model (HW gman). This is Nih's first ever released map.

title: Underground
author: Ninth_Life
description: You've arrived in paddington station to find it overrun by aliens and government black ops. Apparently the Black Mesa incident is bigger than initially thought. With all the exits blocked, your only hope is to fight, through the platforms and extortionate shops and toilets that charge you for entry, to the underground train system and hope that you can get out. Somehow. good luck. You'll need it… or maybe you won't… either way… have fun!
additional_info: Underground - a map for Sven Coop by Ninth Life ideas for some of the map - Magus & Lucifer KNOWN ISSUES some slight framerate drops are present in some areas. dunno why.

author: glitchenco

Objective: Find two hidden buttons to open the gate to the end, while fighting various tough monsters in the way. Difficulty: Medium to hard. NPCs have increased movement speed and damage. Players recommended: 2-8

title: Uplink Extended
author: The Mighty Atom
description: Conversion of the original mod. Uplink Extended has more size, more detail, more weapons, more enemies, fixed events, and over all a much better quality experience.
additional_info: The old uplink_extended.bsp only ported just the last map from this mod. Uplink Extended Remaster port is now instead complete with all the maps!

title: Uplinked
author: Ub-Oh
description: Uplinked is a series of eleven maps (SC 14 + hl_c12 vote) that aims to be an extension to "Forget About Freeman!". Uplinked takes place between the original maps, hence it can be started from "Forget About Freeman!" or "Black Mesa Inbound" like the original game. The general premise is the same as the Half-Life demo, Uplink (tune the transmitter to gain access to Lambda Complex). Locations vary from Uplink or Half-Life Alpha inspired to completely original ones. Be aware that Uplinked has more puzzles compared to the original game, therefore might require more thinking. My main goal in creation of Uplinked was to offer a unique gameplay… experience while creating a chapter that is like it was part of the original game.
additional_info: Map pack contains a replacement hl_c11_a5 cfg file configured to run a script that will allow a vote to choose the next level to start with this campaign or continue the original level. This can be overriden to change the transition directly to the start of this campaign: open hl_c11_a5.cfg included with the mappack, and change "as_command uplinked_voteskip" to 1 as_command uplinked_voteskip 1 Visit and support the original MOD playing it. https://www.moddb.com/mods/uplinked

title: Uprising
author: Kappa
description: Some corporation's military-grade A.I. has gone mad for unknown reasons and now controls all of the corporation's secret military projects. Experimental soldiers defending the corporate building are roaming the streets. In order to destroy the A.I., you must get to the entrance of the building. Unfortunately, the tunnel you were passing through has been blown apart, and you seem to be trapped. Your only way out is to accomplish your mission!
additional_info: Uprising features a good deal of urban combat and custom textures.

title: Urbicide
author: Forsete
description: Half-Life: Urbicide is a 11 map singleplayer modification for Half-Life set during the Xen invasion of Earth sometime during the events of Half-Life. You play as Bruce, a warehouse supervisor, who, during the alien invasion together with a colleague, gets stuck inside one of the warehouse buildings. Bruce's fiancé, Rebecca, is not far from his location and decides to go and get her. It may surprise some newer Half-Life fans to know the original was in fact published externally by Sierra Entertainment, in a time before Steam, and remains one of the most influential titles ever published by the company. -Forsete-
additional_info: An original Half-life mod had been converted to Sven-Coop, made possible with ripent and bspguy tools. Necessary adjustments were made into the mod to made the campaign playable and cooperative. If you want to report a bug please give details of the problem you found to me so there will be a bigger chance to solve it, and much faster. Also check out and support the author if you enjoyed the map. Note: Repack version might be recommended due to some map bugs has been fix and some files were reorganized correctly.

title: USP Ninjas
author: nipper
release_date: Final - 2004, around the same time as Dark Island?
description: Find a way into the building (try the doors first). Once inside clear the entire building of all enemy forces. There are keys lying around that will unlock more of the building. If you find a key hit “use” to get it (it won't disappear, but you'll hear a sound).
additional_info: All weapons do realistic damage. It is easy to kill enemies, however it is also easy to be killed. Included in the NIPPER Map Pack.

title: USS Dark Star (Merged)
author: Neil Manke, (Merged by kalo22)
description: Merged and ripented version of http://scmapdb.wikidot.com/map:uss-darkstar-co-op
additional_info: To: Mr. Walter Bennett From: Dr. Einar Saukas Subject: Offer of Employment Dear Mr. Walter Bennett, Black Widow Inc. would like to invite you to join our organization. You would be assigned as a member of the multi-disciplinary scientific team on board of the USS DARKSTAR, in a zoological research expedition to seek out, collect and investigate new alien life-forms in unexplored sectors of the universe. This mission occurs in the year 2066, but since you have already traveled to the future before, this should not be a problem for you. The space-time window to come to our present time will be available in just a few days, please decide ASAP about your interest in this job opportunity. You have been selected for this position by Cmdr. Neil Manke due to your broad knowledge on advanced biochemistry and extensive experience interacting with hostile aliens. Your proven capacity to survive under critical conditions was also considered. But actually you don't have anything to worry about, our project is adopting the most rigorous safety measures to prevent incidents. I can personally guarantee everything is under control and none of the crew will be ever submitted to any risk situations whatsoever. This is certainly going to be a calm, quiet and relaxing journey, as you can already predict from the pictures of our impressive spaceship installations at The Black Widow's Lair. We are looking forward to having you on our team! Dr. Einar Saukas Administration Office Black Widow Inc. Project USS DARKSTAR

title: USS Darkstar
author: Neil Manke
description: Neil Manke's futuristic USS Darkstar single-player mod converted to run properly on Sven Co-op. Prologue: To: Mr. Walter Bennett From: Dr. Einar Saukas Subject: Offer of Employment Dear Mr. Walter Bennett, Black Widow Inc. would like to invite you to join our organization. You would be assigned as a member of the multi-disciplinary scientific team on board of the USS DARKSTAR, in a zoological research expedition to seek out, collect and investigate new alien life-forms in unexplored sectors of the universe. This mission occurs in the year 2066, but since you have already traveled to the future before, this should not be a problem for you. The space-time window to come to our present time will be available in just a few days, please decide ASAP about your interest in this job opportunity. You have been selected for this position by Cmdr. Neil Manke due to your broad knowledge on advanced biochemistry and extensive experience interacting with hostile aliens. Your proven capacity to survive under critical conditions was also considered. But actually you don't have anything to worry about, our project is adopting the most rigorous safety measures to prevent incidents. I can personally guarantee everything is under control and none of the crew will be ever submitted to any risk situations whatsoever. This is certainly going to be a calm, quiet and relaxing journey, as you can already predict from the pictures of our impressive spaceship installations at The Black Widow's Lair. We are looking forward to having you on our team! Dr. Einar Saukas Administration Office Black Widow Inc. Project USS DARKSTAR Mr. Walter Bennett is one of several famous scientists invited to participate in this mission. You are Dr. Gordon Freeman, a brilliant researcher who has always had problems waking up on time…
additional_info: The original single-player mod USS Darkstar was originally released May 20, 1999. Several very favorable reviews have been written for it by the Quake Map Hotel, Ironplanet, The Maniacal Realm, and Hornetking UK Half-Life.
